title: Visual-Assisted Sound Source Depth Estimation in the Wild
title_zh: 野外视觉辅助声源深度估计
abstract: Depth estimation enables a wide variety of 3D applications, such as robotics, autonomous driving, and virtual reality. Despite significant work in this area, it remains open how to enable accurate, low-cost, high-resolution, and large-range depth estimation. Inspired by the flash-to-bang phenomenon (i.e. hearing the thunder after seeing the lightning), this paper develops FBDepth, the first audio-visual depth estimation framework. It takes the difference between the time-of-flight (ToF) of the light and the sound to infer the sound source depth. FBDepth is the first to incorporate video and audio with both semantic features and spatial hints for range estimation. It first aligns correspondence between the video track and audio track to locate the target object and target sound in a coarse granularity. Based on the observation of moving objects' trajectories, FBDepth proposes to estimate the intersection of optical flow before and after the sound production to locate video events in time. FBDepth feeds the estimated timestamp of the video event and the audio clip for the final depth estimation. We use a mobile phone to collect 3000+ video clips with 20 different objects at up to $50m$. FBDepth decreases the Absolute Relative error (AbsRel) by 55\% compared to RGB-based methods.
summary: Depth estimation enables a wide variety of 3D applications, such as robotics, autonomous driving, and virtual reality. Despite significant work in this area, it remains open how to enable accurate, low-cost, high-resolution, and large-range depth estimation. Inspired by the flash-to-bang phenomenon (i.e. hearing the thunder after seeing the lightning), this paper develops FBDepth, the first audio-visual depth estimation framework. It takes the difference between the time-of-flight (ToF) of the light and the sound to infer the sound source depth. FBDepth is the first to incorporate video and audio with both semantic features and spatial hints for range estimation. It first aligns correspondence between the video track and audio track to locate the target object and target sound in a coarse granularity. Based on the observation of moving objects' trajectories, FBDepth proposes to estimate the intersection of optical flow before and after the sound production to locate video events in time. FBDepth feeds the estimated timestamp of the video event and the audio clip for the final depth estimation. We use a mobile phone to collect 3000+ video clips with 20 different objects at up to $50m$. FBDepth decreases the Absolute Relative error (AbsRel) by 55\% compared to RGB-based methods.
abstract_zh: 深度估计可实现多种 3D 应用，例如机器人、自动驾驶和虚拟现实。尽管在这一领域开展了大量工作，但如何实现准确、低成本、高分辨率和大范围的深度估计仍然是一个开放的问题。受闪击现象（即看到闪电后听到雷声）的启发，本文开发了 FBDepth，第一个视听深度估计框架。它利用光和声音的飞行时间 (ToF) 之间的差异来推断声源深度。 FBDepth 是第一个将视频和音频与语义特征和空间提示结合起来进行范围估计的。它首先对齐视频轨道和音频轨道之间的对应关系，以粗粒度定位目标对象和目标声音。 FBDepth基于对运动物体轨迹的观察，提出估计声音产生前后光流的交集，以及时定位视频事件。 FBDepth 提供视频事件的估计时间戳和音频剪辑以进行最终深度估计。我们使用手机收集了 3000 多个涉及 20 个不同物体的视频剪辑，价值高达 5000 万美元。与基于 RGB 的方法相比，FBDepth 将绝对相对误差 (AbsRel) 降低了 55%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FBDepth框架，利用视觉与音频信号的时间差实现声源深度估计，解决现有方法在精度、成本及范围上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有深度估计方法难以兼顾高精度、低成本与大范围，而光与声的传播时差（如闪电与雷声）可提供天然的深度线索，启发了跨模态融合的可行性。
AI.method: 通过手机采集视频与音频数据，利用光流追踪目标运动轨迹，结合声学事件时间戳与视频帧对齐，提取时空特征进行深度预测。
AI.result: 在50米范围内20类物体的测试中，FBDepth将绝对相对误差（AbsRel）较RGB基线方法降低55%。
AI.conclusion: FBDepth验证了跨模态时差信息在深度估计中的有效性，为低成本、大范围的3D感知应用提供了新思路。

Based on the observation of moving objects' trajectories, FBDepth proposes to estimate the intersection of optical flow before and after the sound production to locate video events in time. We use a mobile phone to collect 3000+ video clips with 20 different objects at up to $50m$. authors_text: R. K. Daniels,J. B. Mallinson,Z. E. Heywood,P. J. Bones,M. D. Arnold,S. A. Brown
title: Reservoir Computing with 3D Nanowire Networks
title_zh: 使用 3D 纳米线网络进行储层计算
abstract: Networks of nanowires are currently being explored for a range of applications in brain-like (or neuromorphic) computing, and especially in reservoir computing (RC). Fabrication of real-world computing devices requires that the nanowires are deposited sequentially, leading to stacking of the wires on top of each other. However, most simulations of computational tasks using these systems treat the nanowires as 1D objects lying in a perfectly 2D plane - the effect of stacking on RC performance has not yet been established. Here we use detailed simulations to compare the performance of perfectly 2D and quasi-3D (stacked) networks of nanowires in two tasks: memory capacity and nonlinear transformation. We also show that our model of the junctions between nanowires is general enough to describe a wide range of memristive networks, and consider the impact of physically realistic electrode configurations on performance. We show that the various networks and configurations have a strikingly similar performance in RC tasks, which is surprising given their radically different topologies. Our results show that networks with an experimentally achievable number of electrodes perform close to the upper bounds achievable when using the information from every wire. However, we also show important differences, in particular that the quasi-3D networks are more resilient to changes in the input parameters, generalizing better to noisy training data. Since previous literature suggests that topology plays an important role in computing performance, these results may have important implications for future applications of nanowire networks in neuromorphic computing.
summary: Networks of nanowires are currently being explored for a range of applications in brain-like (or neuromorphic) computing, and especially in reservoir computing (RC). Fabrication of real-world computing devices requires that the nanowires are deposited sequentially, leading to stacking of the wires on top of each other. However, most simulations of computational tasks using these systems treat the nanowires as 1D objects lying in a perfectly 2D plane - the effect of stacking on RC performance has not yet been established. Here we use detailed simulations to compare the performance of perfectly 2D and quasi-3D (stacked) networks of nanowires in two tasks: memory capacity and nonlinear transformation. We also show that our model of the junctions between nanowires is general enough to describe a wide range of memristive networks, and consider the impact of physically realistic electrode configurations on performance. We show that the various networks and configurations have a strikingly similar performance in RC tasks, which is surprising given their radically different topologies. Our results show that networks with an experimentally achievable number of electrodes perform close to the upper bounds achievable when using the information from every wire. However, we also show important differences, in particular that the quasi-3D networks are more resilient to changes in the input parameters, generalizing better to noisy training data. Since previous literature suggests that topology plays an important role in computing performance, these results may have important implications for future applications of nanowire networks in neuromorphic computing.
abstract_zh: 目前正在探索纳米线网络在类脑（或神经形态）计算中的一系列应用，特别是在储层计算（RC）中。现实世界计算设备的制造需要按顺序沉积纳米线，导致纳米线彼此堆叠。然而，大多数使用这些系统的计算任务模拟都将纳米线视为位于完美 2D 平面中的 1D 物体 - 堆叠对 RC 性能的影响尚未确定。在这里，我们使用详细的模拟来比较完美 2D 和准 3D（堆叠）纳米线网络在两个任务中的性能：存储容量和非线性变换。我们还表明，我们的纳米线之间的连接模型足够通用，足以描述各种忆阻网络，并考虑物理上真实的电极配置对性能的影响。我们表明，各种网络和配置在 RC 任务中具有惊人相似的性能，考虑到它们截然不同的拓扑，这是令人惊讶的。我们的结果表明，具有实验上可实现的电极数量的网络的性能接近使用每条电线的信息时可实现的上限。然而，我们也显示出重要的差异，特别是准 3D 网络对输入参数的变化更具弹性，可以更好地泛化到噪声训练数据。由于之前的文献表明拓扑在计算性能中发挥着重要作用，因此这些结果可能对纳米线网络在神经形态计算中的未来应用产生重要影响。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过模拟比较了二维与准三维纳米线网络在脉冲计算任务中的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 当前纳米线网络在脉冲计算中的模拟多假设为二维结构，而实际制备中存在堆叠形成的准三维结构，其对计算性能的影响尚未明确。
AI.method: 采用详细仿真方法，对比二维与准三维纳米线网络在记忆容量和非线性变换任务中的表现，并分析电极配置对性能的影响。
AI.result: 不同拓扑结构的网络性能相似，但准三维网络在输入参数变化和噪声训练数据下表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑结构对计算性能影响有限，但准三维网络在实际应用中具有更高的稳定性，为神经形态计算提供了新方向。

authors_text: Xue Jiang,Xiulian Peng,Huaying Xue,Yuan Zhang,Yan Lu
title: Cross-Scale Vector Quantization for Scalable Neural Speech Coding
title_zh: 用于可扩展神经语音编码的跨尺度矢量量化
abstract: Bitrate scalability is a desirable feature for audio coding in real-time communications. Existing neural audio codecs usually enforce a specific bitrate during training, so different models need to be trained for each target bitrate, which increases the memory footprint at the sender and the receiver side and transcoding is often needed to support multiple receivers. In this paper, we introduce a cross-scale scalable vector quantization scheme (CSVQ), in which multi-scale features are encoded progressively with stepwise feature fusion and refinement. In this way, a coarse-level signal is reconstructed if only a portion of the bitstream is received, and progressively improves the quality as more bits are available. The proposed CSVQ scheme can be flexibly applied to any neural audio coding network with a mirrored auto-encoder structure to achieve bitrate scalability. Subjective results show that the proposed scheme outperforms the classical residual VQ (RVQ) with scalability. Moreover, the proposed CSVQ at 3 kbps outperforms Opus at 9 kbps and Lyra at 3kbps and it could provide a graceful quality boost with bitrate increase.
summary: Bitrate scalability is a desirable feature for audio coding in real-time communications. Existing neural audio codecs usually enforce a specific bitrate during training, so different models need to be trained for each target bitrate, which increases the memory footprint at the sender and the receiver side and transcoding is often needed to support multiple receivers. In this paper, we introduce a cross-scale scalable vector quantization scheme (CSVQ), in which multi-scale features are encoded progressively with stepwise feature fusion and refinement. In this way, a coarse-level signal is reconstructed if only a portion of the bitstream is received, and progressively improves the quality as more bits are available. The proposed CSVQ scheme can be flexibly applied to any neural audio coding network with a mirrored auto-encoder structure to achieve bitrate scalability. Subjective results show that the proposed scheme outperforms the classical residual VQ (RVQ) with scalability. Moreover, the proposed CSVQ at 3 kbps outperforms Opus at 9 kbps and Lyra at 3kbps and it could provide a graceful quality boost with bitrate increase.
abstract_zh: 比特率可扩展性是实时通信中音频编码的一个理想特性。现有的神经音频编解码器通常在训练期间强制执行特定的比特率，因此需要针对每个目标比特率训练不同的模型，这增加了发送方和接收方的内存占用，并且通常需要转码以支持多个接收方。在本文中，我们引入了一种跨尺度可扩展矢量量化方案（CSVQ），其中通过逐步特征融合和细化来逐步编码多尺度特征。通过这种方式，如果仅接收到比特流的一部分，则可以重构粗级信号，并且随着更多比特可用而逐渐提高质量。所提出的 CSVQ 方案可以灵活地应用于任何具有镜像自动编码器结构的神经音频编码网络，以实现比特率可扩展性。主观结果表明，所提出的方案在可扩展性方面优于经典残差 VQ（RVQ）。此外，所提出的 3 kbps 的 CSVQ 优于 9 kbps 的 Opus 和 3kbps 的 Lyra，并且随着比特率的增加，它可以提供良好的质量提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨尺度向量量化（CSVQ）方案，用于实现可扩展的神经语音编码，以支持实时通信中的比特率可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经音频编码器通常在训练时固定比特率，导致需要为不同目标比特率训练多个模型，增加了内存占用和转码需求，而CSVQ旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过多尺度特征逐步融合与优化，CSVQ实现渐进式编码。仅接收部分比特流时可重建粗粒度信号，随着更多比特可用逐步提升质量，并可灵活应用于任何镜像自编码结构的神经音频编码网络。
AI.result: 主观测试表明，CSVQ在3kbps下优于Opus（9kbps）和Lyra（3kbps），且随比特率提升质量平滑增强，同时优于可扩展残差VQ（RVQ）。
AI.conclusion: CSVQ为可扩展神经语音编码提供了有效解决方案，在性能和灵活性上优于现有方法，适用于实时通信场景。

search_text: Cross-Scale Vector Quantization for Scalable Neural Speech Coding 用于可扩展神经语音编码的跨尺度矢量量化 Bitrate scalability is a desirable feature for audio coding in real-time communications. Existing neural audio codecs usually enforce a specific bitrate during training, so different models need to be trained for each target bitrate, which increases the memory footprint at the sender and the receiver side and transcoding is often needed to support multiple receivers. In this paper, we introduce a cross-scale scalable vector quantization scheme (CSVQ), in which multi-scale features are encoded progressively with stepwise feature fusion and refinement. In this way, a coarse-level signal is reconstructed if only a portion of the bitstream is received, and progressively improves the quality as more bits are available. The proposed CSVQ scheme can be flexibly applied to any neural audio coding network with a mirrored auto-encoder structure to achieve bitrate scalability. Subjective results show that the proposed scheme outperforms the classical residual VQ (RVQ) with scalability. Moreover, the proposed CSVQ at 3 kbps outperforms Opus at 9 kbps and Lyra at 3kbps and it could provide a graceful quality boost with bitrate increase. 比特率可扩展性是实时通信中音频编码的一个理想特性。现有的神经音频编解码器通常在训练期间强制执行特定的比特率，因此需要针对每个目标比特率训练不同的模型，这增加了发送方和接收方的内存占用，并且通常需要转码以支持多个接收方。在本文中，我们引入了一种跨尺度可扩展矢量量化方案（CSVQ），其中通过逐步特征融合和细化来逐步编码多尺度特征。通过这种方式，如果仅接收到比特流的一部分，则可以重构粗级信号，并且随着更多比特可用而逐渐提高质量。所提出的 CSVQ 方案可以灵活地应用于任何具有镜像自动编码器结构的神经音频编码网络，以实现比特率可扩展性。主观结果表明，所提出的方案在可扩展性方面优于经典残差 VQ（RVQ）。此外，所提出的 3 kbps 的 CSVQ 优于 9 kbps 的 Opus 和 3kbps 的 Lyra，并且随着比特率的增加，它可以提供良好的质量提升。 本文提出了一种跨尺度向量量化（CSVQ）方案，用于实现可扩展的神经语音编码，以支持实时通信中的比特率可扩展性。 Xue Jiang,Xiulian Peng,Huaying Xue,Yuan Zhang,Yan Lu cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Jiangchao Yao,Feng Wang,Xichen Ding,Shaohu Chen,Bo Han,Jingren Zhou,Hongxia Yang
title: Device-Cloud Collaborative Recommendation via Meta Controller
title_zh: 通过Meta Controller进行端云协同推荐
abstract: On-device machine learning enables the lightweight deployment of recommendation models in local clients, which reduces the burden of the cloud-based recommenders and simultaneously incorporates more real-time user features. Nevertheless, the cloud-based recommendation in the industry is still very important considering its powerful model capacity and the efficient candidate generation from the billion-scale item pool. Previous attempts to integrate the merits of both paradigms mainly resort to a sequential mechanism, which builds the on-device recommender on top of the cloud-based recommendation. However, such a design is inflexible when user interests dramatically change: the on-device model is stuck by the limited item cache while the cloud-based recommendation based on the large item pool do not respond without the new re-fresh feedback. To overcome this issue, we propose a meta controller to dynamically manage the collaboration between the on-device recommender and the cloud-based recommender, and introduce a novel efficient sample construction from the causal perspective to solve the dataset absence issue of meta controller. On the basis of the counterfactual samples and the extended training, extensive experiments in the industrial recommendation scenarios show the promise of meta controller in the device-cloud collaboration.
summary: On-device machine learning enables the lightweight deployment of recommendation models in local clients, which reduces the burden of the cloud-based recommenders and simultaneously incorporates more real-time user features. Nevertheless, the cloud-based recommendation in the industry is still very important considering its powerful model capacity and the efficient candidate generation from the billion-scale item pool. Previous attempts to integrate the merits of both paradigms mainly resort to a sequential mechanism, which builds the on-device recommender on top of the cloud-based recommendation. However, such a design is inflexible when user interests dramatically change: the on-device model is stuck by the limited item cache while the cloud-based recommendation based on the large item pool do not respond without the new re-fresh feedback. To overcome this issue, we propose a meta controller to dynamically manage the collaboration between the on-device recommender and the cloud-based recommender, and introduce a novel efficient sample construction from the causal perspective to solve the dataset absence issue of meta controller. On the basis of the counterfactual samples and the extended training, extensive experiments in the industrial recommendation scenarios show the promise of meta controller in the device-cloud collaboration.
abstract_zh: 设备端机器学习可以在本地客户端轻量级部署推荐模型，从而减轻基于云的推荐器的负担，同时融入更多实时用户功能。尽管如此，考虑到其强大的模型能力和从数十亿规模的项目池中高效生成候选者，基于云的推荐在行业中仍然非常重要。之前整合两种范式优点的尝试主要采用顺序机制，该机制在基于云的推荐之上构建设备端推荐器。然而，当用户兴趣发生巨大变化时，这样的设计就不够灵活了：设备上的模型因有限的项目缓存而陷入困境，而基于大项目池的云端推荐在没有新的刷新反馈的情况下不会做出响应。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种元控制器来动态管理设备上推荐器和基于云的推荐器之间的协作，并从因果角度引入一种新颖的高效样本构造来解决元控制器的数据集缺失问题。在反事实样本和扩展训练的基础上，在工业推荐场景中的大量实验显示了元控制器在端云协作中的前景。

AI.tldr: 提出一种元控制器来动态管理设备端与云端推荐系统的协作，解决实时用户兴趣变化下的推荐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在用户兴趣突变时无法灵活调整，设备端模型受限于缓存物品，云端推荐缺乏新反馈导致无法及时响应。
AI.method: 提出元控制器动态管理协作，并从因果角度引入高效样本构建方法，解决元控制器的数据缺失问题。
AI.result: 工业推荐场景的大量实验验证了元控制器在设备-云端协作中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 元控制器有效提升了设备与云端推荐系统的协作效率与动态适应能力。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种元控制器来动态管理设备端与云端推荐系统的协作，解决实时用户兴趣变化下的推荐问题。

authors_text: Zhan Chen,Hong Liu,Tianyu Guo,Zhengyan Chen,Pinhao Song,Hao Tang
title: Contrastive Learning from Spatio-Temporal Mixed Skeleton Sequences for Self-Supervised Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于自监督骨架的动作识别的时空混合骨架序列的对比学习
abstract: Self-supervised skeleton-based action recognition with contrastive learning has attracted much attention. Recent literature shows that data augmentation and large sets of contrastive pairs are crucial in learning such representations. In this paper, we found that directly extending contrastive pairs based on normal augmentations brings limited returns in terms of performance, because the contribution of contrastive pairs from the normal data augmentation to the loss get smaller as training progresses. Therefore, we delve into hard contrastive pairs for contrastive learning. Motivated by the success of mixing augmentation strategy which improves the performance of many tasks by synthesizing novel samples, we propose SkeleMixCLR: a contrastive learning framework with a spatio-temporal skeleton mixing augmentation (SkeleMix) to complement current contrastive learning approaches by providing hard contrastive samples. First, SkeleMix utilizes the topological information of skeleton data to mix two skeleton sequences by randomly combing the cropped skeleton fragments (the trimmed view) with the remaining skeleton sequences (the truncated view). Second, a spatio-temporal mask pooling is applied to separate these two views at the feature level. Third, we extend contrastive pairs with these two views. SkeleMixCLR leverages the trimmed and truncated views to provide abundant hard contrastive pairs since they involve some context information from each other due to the graph convolution operations, which allows the model to learn better motion representations for action recognition. Extensive experiments on NTU-RGB+D, NTU120-RGB+D, and PKU-MMD datasets show that SkeleMixCLR achieves state-of-the-art performance. Codes are available at https://github.com/czhaneva/SkeleMixCLR.
summary: Self-supervised skeleton-based action recognition with contrastive learning has attracted much attention. Recent literature shows that data augmentation and large sets of contrastive pairs are crucial in learning such representations. In this paper, we found that directly extending contrastive pairs based on normal augmentations brings limited returns in terms of performance, because the contribution of contrastive pairs from the normal data augmentation to the loss get smaller as training progresses. Therefore, we delve into hard contrastive pairs for contrastive learning. Motivated by the success of mixing augmentation strategy which improves the performance of many tasks by synthesizing novel samples, we propose SkeleMixCLR: a contrastive learning framework with a spatio-temporal skeleton mixing augmentation (SkeleMix) to complement current contrastive learning approaches by providing hard contrastive samples. First, SkeleMix utilizes the topological information of skeleton data to mix two skeleton sequences by randomly combing the cropped skeleton fragments (the trimmed view) with the remaining skeleton sequences (the truncated view). Second, a spatio-temporal mask pooling is applied to separate these two views at the feature level. Third, we extend contrastive pairs with these two views. SkeleMixCLR leverages the trimmed and truncated views to provide abundant hard contrastive pairs since they involve some context information from each other due to the graph convolution operations, which allows the model to learn better motion representations for action recognition. Extensive experiments on NTU-RGB+D, NTU120-RGB+D, and PKU-MMD datasets show that SkeleMixCLR achieves state-of-the-art performance. Codes are available at https://github.com/czhaneva/SkeleMixCLR.
abstract_zh: 具有对比学习的自监督基于骨架的动作识别引起了广泛关注。最近的文献表明，数据增强和大量对比对对于学习此类表示至关重要。在本文中，我们发现直接扩展基于法线增强的对比对在性能方面带来的回报有限，因为随着训练的进行，法线数据增强的对比对对损失的贡献越来越小。因此，我们深入研究硬对比对来进行对比学习。受到混合增强策略成功的激励，该策略通过合成新颖的样本来提高许多任务的性能，我们提出了 SkeleMixCLR：一种具有时空骨架混合增强（SkeleMix）的对比学习框架，通过提供硬对比样本来补充当前的对比学习方法。首先，SkeleMix 利用骨架数据的拓扑信息，通过随机组合裁剪后的骨架片段（修剪视图）与剩余骨架序列（截断视图）来混合两个骨架序列。其次，应用时空掩模池在特征级别分离这两个视图。第三，我们用这两种观点扩展对比对。 SkeleMixCLR 利用修剪和截断的视图来提供丰富的硬对比对，因为它们由于图卷积运算而涉及彼此的一些上下文信息，这使得模型能够学习更好的运动表示以进行动作识别。在 NTU-RGB+D、NTU120-RGB+D 和 PKU-MMD 数据集上进行的大量实验表明 SkeleMixCLR 实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/czhaneva/SkeleMixCLR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空混合骨架序列的对比学习框架SkeleMixCLR，用于提升自监督骨架动作识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法通过常规数据增强生成对比对，但随着训练进行其效果受限，需引入更具挑战性的硬对比样本以提升模型表现。
AI.method: 提出SkeleMix方法，通过拓扑信息混合骨架序列生成trimmed和truncated视图，结合时空掩码池化分离特征，并扩展对比对以增强学习效果。
AI.result: 在NTU-RGB+D、NTU120-RGB+D和PKU-MMD数据集上达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: SkeleMixCLR通过生成包含互相关景信息的硬对比对，有效提升了骨架动作识别的运动表征学习能力。

search_text: Contrastive Learning from Spatio-Temporal Mixed Skeleton Sequences for Self-Supervised Skeleton-Based Action Recognition 用于基于自监督骨架的动作识别的时空混合骨架序列的对比学习 Self-supervised skeleton-based action recognition with contrastive learning has attracted much attention. Recent literature shows that data augmentation and large sets of contrastive pairs are crucial in learning such representations. In this paper, we found that directly extending contrastive pairs based on normal augmentations brings limited returns in terms of performance, because the contribution of contrastive pairs from the normal data augmentation to the loss get smaller as training progresses. Therefore, we delve into hard contrastive pairs for contrastive learning. Motivated by the success of mixing augmentation strategy which improves the performance of many tasks by synthesizing novel samples, we propose SkeleMixCLR: a contrastive learning framework with a spatio-temporal skeleton mixing augmentation (SkeleMix) to complement current contrastive learning approaches by providing hard contrastive samples. First, SkeleMix utilizes the topological information of skeleton data to mix two skeleton sequences by randomly combing the cropped skeleton fragments (the trimmed view) with the remaining skeleton sequences (the truncated view). Second, a spatio-temporal mask pooling is applied to separate these two views at the feature level. Third, we extend contrastive pairs with these two views. SkeleMixCLR leverages the trimmed and truncated views to provide abundant hard contrastive pairs since they involve some context information from each other due to the graph convolution operations, which allows the model to learn better motion representations for action recognition. Extensive experiments on NTU-RGB+D, NTU120-RGB+D, and PKU-MMD datasets show that SkeleMixCLR achieves state-of-the-art performance. Codes are available at https://github.com/czhaneva/SkeleMixCLR. 具有对比学习的自监督基于骨架的动作识别引起了广泛关注。最近的文献表明，数据增强和大量对比对对于学习此类表示至关重要。在本文中，我们发现直接扩展基于法线增强的对比对在性能方面带来的回报有限，因为随着训练的进行，法线数据增强的对比对对损失的贡献越来越小。因此，我们深入研究硬对比对来进行对比学习。受到混合增强策略成功的激励，该策略通过合成新颖的样本来提高许多任务的性能，我们提出了 SkeleMixCLR：一种具有时空骨架混合增强（SkeleMix）的对比学习框架，通过提供硬对比样本来补充当前的对比学习方法。首先，SkeleMix 利用骨架数据的拓扑信息，通过随机组合裁剪后的骨架片段（修剪视图）与剩余骨架序列（截断视图）来混合两个骨架序列。其次，应用时空掩模池在特征级别分离这两个视图。第三，我们用这两种观点扩展对比对。 SkeleMixCLR 利用修剪和截断的视图来提供丰富的硬对比对，因为它们由于图卷积运算而涉及彼此的一些上下文信息，这使得模型能够学习更好的运动表示以进行动作识别。在 NTU-RGB+D、NTU120-RGB+D 和 PKU-MMD 数据集上进行的大量实验表明 SkeleMixCLR 实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/czhaneva/SkeleMixCLR 获取。 本文提出了一种基于时空混合骨架序列的对比学习框架SkeleMixCLR，用于提升自监督骨架动作识别的性能。 Zhan Chen,Hong Liu,Tianyu Guo,Zhengyan Chen,Pinhao Song,Hao Tang cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaowo Xu,Xiaoling Zhang,Tianwen Zhang,Zhenyu Yang,Jun Shi,Xu Zhan
title: Shadow-Background-Noise 3D Spatial Decomposition Using Sparse Low-Rank Gaussian Properties for Video-SAR Moving Target Shadow Enhancement
title_zh: 使用稀疏低阶高斯特性进行阴影-背景-噪声 3D 空间分解进行视频 SAR 移动目标阴影增强
abstract: Moving target shadows among video synthetic aperture radar (Video-SAR) images are always interfered by low scattering backgrounds and cluttered noises, causing poor detec-tion-tracking accuracy. Thus, a shadow-background-noise 3D spatial decomposition (SBN-3D-SD) model is proposed to enhance shadows for higher detection-tracking accuracy. It leverages the sparse property of shadows, the low-rank property of back-grounds, and the Gaussian property of noises to perform 3D spatial three-decomposition. It separates shadows from back-grounds and noises by the alternating direction method of multi-pliers (ADMM). Results on the Sandia National Laboratories (SNL) data verify its effectiveness. It boosts the shadow saliency from the qualitative and quantitative evaluation. It boosts the shadow detection accuracy of Faster R-CNN, RetinaNet and YOLOv3. It also boosts the shadow tracking accuracy of TransTrack, FairMOT and ByteTrack.
summary: Moving target shadows among video synthetic aperture radar (Video-SAR) images are always interfered by low scattering backgrounds and cluttered noises, causing poor detec-tion-tracking accuracy. Thus, a shadow-background-noise 3D spatial decomposition (SBN-3D-SD) model is proposed to enhance shadows for higher detection-tracking accuracy. It leverages the sparse property of shadows, the low-rank property of back-grounds, and the Gaussian property of noises to perform 3D spatial three-decomposition. It separates shadows from back-grounds and noises by the alternating direction method of multi-pliers (ADMM). Results on the Sandia National Laboratories (SNL) data verify its effectiveness. It boosts the shadow saliency from the qualitative and quantitative evaluation. It boosts the shadow detection accuracy of Faster R-CNN, RetinaNet and YOLOv3. It also boosts the shadow tracking accuracy of TransTrack, FairMOT and ByteTrack.
abstract_zh: Moving target shadows among video synthetic aperture radar (Video-SAR) images are always interfered by low scattering backgrounds and cluttered noises, causing poor detec-tion-tracking accuracy. Thus, a shadow-background-noise 3D spatial decomposition (SBN-3D-SD) model is proposed to enhance shadows for higher detection-tracking accuracy. It leverages the sparse property of shadows, the low-rank property of back-grounds, and the Gaussian property of noises to perform 3D spatial three-decomposition.它通过乘法器交替方向法 (ADMM) 将阴影与背景和噪声分开。桑迪亚国家实验室 (SNL) 数据的结果验证了其有效性。它从定性和定量评估中提高了阴影显着性。它提高了 Faster R-CNN、RetinaNet 和 YOLOv3 的阴影检测精度。它还提高了 TransTrack、FairMOT 和 ByteTrack 的阴影跟踪精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏低秩高斯特性的3D空间分解模型，用于增强视频SAR图像中移动目标阴影，以提高检测与跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 视频SAR图像中的移动目标阴影常受低散射背景和杂波噪声干扰，导致检测跟踪效果不佳，需更有效的阴影增强方法。
AI.method: 构建SBN-3D-SD模型，利用阴影稀疏性、背景低秩性及噪声高斯特性，通过ADMM算法实现三维空间分解以分离阴影。
AI.result: 在SNL数据集上验证有效，显著提升阴影显著性，并增强Faster R-CNN、RetinaNet等检测模型及TransTrack等跟踪模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了视频SAR阴影增强问题，为后续目标检测与跟踪提供了更清晰的阴影特征支持。

title: Centralised Connectivity-Preserving Transformations by Rotation: 3 Musketeers for all Orthogonal Convex Shapes
title_zh: 通过旋转实现集中式连接保持变换：适用于所有正交凸形状的 3 个火枪手
abstract: We study a model of programmable matter systems consisting of $n$ devices lying on a 2-dimensional square grid, which are able to perform the minimal mechanical operation of rotating around each other. The goal is to transform an initial shape A into a target shape B. We are interested in characterising the class of shapes which can be transformed into each other in such a scenario, under the additional constraint of maintaining global connectivity at all times. This was one of the main problems left open by $[$Michail et al., JCSS'19$]$. Note that the considered question is about structural feasibility of transformations, which we exclusively deal with via centralised constructive proofs. Distributed solutions are left for future work and form an interesting research direction. Past work made some progress for the special class of nice shapes. We here consider the class of orthogonal convex shapes, where for any two nodes $u, v$ in a horizontal or vertical line on the grid, there is no empty cell between $u$ and $v$. We develop a generic centralised transformation and prove that, for any pair $A$, $B$ of colour-consistent orthogonal convex shapes, it can transform $A$ into $B$. In light of the existence of blocked shapes in the considered class, we use a minimal 3-node seed to trigger the transformation. The running time of our transformation is an optimal $O(n^2)$ sequential moves, where $n=|A|=|B|$. We leave as an open problem the existence of a universal connectivity-preserving transformation with a small seed. Our belief is that the techniques developed in this paper might prove useful to answer this.
summary: We study a model of programmable matter systems consisting of $n$ devices lying on a 2-dimensional square grid, which are able to perform the minimal mechanical operation of rotating around each other. The goal is to transform an initial shape A into a target shape B. We are interested in characterising the class of shapes which can be transformed into each other in such a scenario, under the additional constraint of maintaining global connectivity at all times. This was one of the main problems left open by $[$Michail et al., JCSS'19$]$. Note that the considered question is about structural feasibility of transformations, which we exclusively deal with via centralised constructive proofs. Distributed solutions are left for future work and form an interesting research direction. Past work made some progress for the special class of nice shapes. We here consider the class of orthogonal convex shapes, where for any two nodes $u, v$ in a horizontal or vertical line on the grid, there is no empty cell between $u$ and $v$. We develop a generic centralised transformation and prove that, for any pair $A$, $B$ of colour-consistent orthogonal convex shapes, it can transform $A$ into $B$. In light of the existence of blocked shapes in the considered class, we use a minimal 3-node seed to trigger the transformation. The running time of our transformation is an optimal $O(n^2)$ sequential moves, where $n=|A|=|B|$. We leave as an open problem the existence of a universal connectivity-preserving transformation with a small seed. Our belief is that the techniques developed in this paper might prove useful to answer this.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种可编程物质系统模型，该模型由位于二维方形网格上的 $n$ 设备组成，这些设备能够执行围绕彼此旋转的最小机械操作。目标是将初始形状 A 转换为目标形状 B。我们感兴趣的是在始终保持全局连接的额外约束下，描述在这种情况下可以相互转换的形状类别。这是 $[$Michail 等人，JCSS'19$]$ 未解决的主要问题之一。请注意，所考虑的问题是关于转换的结构可行性，我们专门通过集中的构造性证明来处理这个问题。分布式解决方案留给未来的工作并形成一个有趣的研究方向。过去的工作在漂亮形状的特殊类别方面取得了一些进展。我们在这里考虑正交凸形状的类别，其中对于网格上水平或垂直线上的任意两个节点$u，v$，$u$和$v$之间没有空单元格。我们开发了一种通用的集中变换，并证明，对于任何颜色一致的正交凸形状对 $A$，$B$，它可以将 $A$ 转换为 $B$。鉴于所考虑的类中存在块状形状，我们使用最小的 3 节点种子来触发转换。我们的转换的运行时间是最优的 $O(n^2)$ 连续移动，其中 $n=|A|=|B|$。我们将具有小种子的通用连通性保持变换的存在作为一个悬而未决的问题。我们相信，本文开发的技术可能有助于回答这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在二维网格中通过旋转操作保持连通性地将正交凸形状进行转换的集中式方法。
AI.motivation: 解决可编程物质系统中形状转换的结构可行性问题，特别是保持全局连通性的挑战，补充了先前关于'美好形状'的研究空白。
AI.method: 开发了一种通用的集中式转换算法，利用3节点种子触发转换，并通过构造性证明确保正交凸形状的可转换性。
AI.result: 证明了所有颜色一致的正交凸形状对均可通过O(n²)时间复杂度的旋转操作完成转换，且保持连通性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了针对正交凸形状的通用转换方案，但开放性问题仍存在，如是否存在更小的种子实现通用转换。

conclusion: 提出了针对正交凸形状的通用转换方案，但开放性问题仍存在，如是否存在更小的种子实现通用转换。
search_text: Centralised Connectivity-Preserving Transformations by Rotation: 3 Musketeers for all Orthogonal Convex Shapes 通过旋转实现集中式连接保持变换：适用于所有正交凸形状的 3 个火枪手 We study a model of programmable matter systems consisting of $n$ devices lying on a 2-dimensional square grid, which are able to perform the minimal mechanical operation of rotating around each other. The goal is to transform an initial shape A into a target shape B. We are interested in characterising the class of shapes which can be transformed into each other in such a scenario, under the additional constraint of maintaining global connectivity at all times. This was one of the main problems left open by $[$Michail et al., JCSS'19$]$. Note that the considered question is about structural feasibility of transformations, which we exclusively deal with via centralised constructive proofs. Distributed solutions are left for future work and form an interesting research direction. Past work made some progress for the special class of nice shapes. We here consider the class of orthogonal convex shapes, where for any two nodes $u, v$ in a horizontal or vertical line on the grid, there is no empty cell between $u$ and $v$. We develop a generic centralised transformation and prove that, for any pair $A$, $B$ of colour-consistent orthogonal convex shapes, it can transform $A$ into $B$. In light of the existence of blocked shapes in the considered class, we use a minimal 3-node seed to trigger the transformation. The running time of our transformation is an optimal $O(n^2)$ sequential moves, where $n=|A|=|B|$. We leave as an open problem the existence of a universal connectivity-preserving transformation with a small seed. Our belief is that the techniques developed in this paper might prove useful to answer this. 我们研究了一种可编程物质系统模型，该模型由位于二维方形网格上的 $n$ 设备组成，这些设备能够执行围绕彼此旋转的最小机械操作。目标是将初始形状 A 转换为目标形状 B。我们感兴趣的是在始终保持全局连接的额外约束下，描述在这种情况下可以相互转换的形状类别。这是 $[$Michail 等人，JCSS'19$]$ 未解决的主要问题之一。请注意，所考虑的问题是关于转换的结构可行性，我们专门通过集中的构造性证明来处理这个问题。分布式解决方案留给未来的工作并形成一个有趣的研究方向。过去的工作在漂亮形状的特殊类别方面取得了一些进展。我们在这里考虑正交凸形状的类别，其中对于网格上水平或垂直线上的任意两个节点$u，v$，$u$和$v$之间没有空单元格。我们开发了一种通用的集中变换，并证明，对于任何颜色一致的正交凸形状对 $A$，$B$，它可以将 $A$ 转换为 $B$。鉴于所考虑的类中存在块状形状，我们使用最小的 3 节点种子来触发转换。我们的转换的运行时间是最优的 $O(n^2)$ 连续移动，其中 $n=|A|=|B|$。我们将具有小种子的通用连通性保持变换的存在作为一个悬而未决的问题。我们相信，本文开发的技术可能有助于回答这个问题。 本文研究了在二维网格中通过旋转操作保持连通性地将正交凸形状进行转换的集中式方法。 Matthew Connor,Othon Michail cs.DS,cs.CG,cs.RO

title: Back to the Basics: Revisiting Out-of-Distribution Detection Baselines
title_zh: 回到基础：重新审视分布外检测基线
comment: ICML Workshop on Principles of Distribution Shift 2022
comments: ICML Workshop on Principles of Distribution Shift 2022
abstract: We study simple methods for out-of-distribution (OOD) image detection that are compatible with any already trained classifier, relying on only its predictions or learned representations. Evaluating the OOD detection performance of various methods when utilized with ResNet-50 and Swin Transformer models, we find methods that solely consider the model's predictions can be easily outperformed by also considering the learned representations. Based on our analysis, we advocate for a dead-simple approach that has been neglected in other studies: simply flag as OOD images whose average distance to their K nearest neighbors is large (in the representation space of an image classifier trained on the in-distribution data).
summary: We study simple methods for out-of-distribution (OOD) image detection that are compatible with any already trained classifier, relying on only its predictions or learned representations. Evaluating the OOD detection performance of various methods when utilized with ResNet-50 and Swin Transformer models, we find methods that solely consider the model's predictions can be easily outperformed by also considering the learned representations. Based on our analysis, we advocate for a dead-simple approach that has been neglected in other studies: simply flag as OOD images whose average distance to their K nearest neighbors is large (in the representation space of an image classifier trained on the in-distribution data).
abstract_zh: 我们研究了用于分布外（OOD）图像检测的简单方法，这些方法与任何已经训练的分类器兼容，仅依赖于其预测或学习的表示。在评估与 ResNet-50 和 Swin Transformer 模型一起使用时各种方法的 OOD 检测性能时，我们发现仅考虑模型预测的方法很容易通过考虑学习的表示来超越。根据我们的分析，我们提倡采用一种在其他研究中被忽视的极其简单的方法：简单地标记为 OOD 图像，其到 K 个最近邻的平均距离很大（在分布数据上训练的图像分类器的表示空间中）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了与任何预训练分类器兼容的简单分布外检测方法，通过比较模型预测和学习表示的性能，提出了一种基于表示空间距离的简单检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有复杂方法可能忽视了基础方法的有效性，需重新评估简单方法在分布外检测中的潜力。
AI.method: 在ResNet-50和Swin Transformer模型上评估多种方法，发现结合学习表示的方法优于仅依赖预测的方法，最终提出通过计算图像在表示空间中与K近邻的平均距离来判断是否为分布外样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于表示空间距离的简单方法在OOD检测中表现优异，优于仅依赖模型预测的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 应重视简单且基于表示空间距离的OOD检测方法，其在实际应用中可能更有效且易于实现。

authors_text: Lang Nie,Chunyu Lin,Kang Liao,Shuaicheng Liu,Yao Zhao
title: Deep Rotation Correction without Angle Prior
title_zh: 无角度先验的深度旋转校正
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing(TIP); code and dataset:https://github.com/nie-lang/RotationCorrection
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing(TIP); code and dataset:https://github.com/nie-lang/RotationCorrection
abstract: Not everybody can be equipped with professional photography skills and sufficient shooting time, and there can be some tilts in the captured images occasionally. In this paper, we propose a new and practical task, named Rotation Correction, to automatically correct the tilt with high content fidelity in the condition that the rotated angle is unknown. This task can be easily integrated into image editing applications, allowing users to correct the rotated images without any manual operations. To this end, we leverage a neural network to predict the optical flows that can warp the tilted images to be perceptually horizontal. Nevertheless, the pixel-wise optical flow estimation from a single image is severely unstable, especially in large-angle tilted images. To enhance its robustness, we propose a simple but effective prediction strategy to form a robust elastic warp. Particularly, we first regress the mesh deformation that can be transformed into robust initial optical flows. Then we estimate residual optical flows to facilitate our network the flexibility of pixel-wise deformation, further correcting the details of the tilted images. To establish an evaluation benchmark and train the learning framework, a comprehensive rotation correction dataset is presented with a large diversity in scenes and rotated angles. Extensive experiments demonstrate that even in the absence of the angle prior, our algorithm can outperform other state-of-the-art solutions requiring this prior. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/nie-lang/RotationCorrection.
summary: Not everybody can be equipped with professional photography skills and sufficient shooting time, and there can be some tilts in the captured images occasionally. In this paper, we propose a new and practical task, named Rotation Correction, to automatically correct the tilt with high content fidelity in the condition that the rotated angle is unknown. This task can be easily integrated into image editing applications, allowing users to correct the rotated images without any manual operations. To this end, we leverage a neural network to predict the optical flows that can warp the tilted images to be perceptually horizontal. Nevertheless, the pixel-wise optical flow estimation from a single image is severely unstable, especially in large-angle tilted images. To enhance its robustness, we propose a simple but effective prediction strategy to form a robust elastic warp. Particularly, we first regress the mesh deformation that can be transformed into robust initial optical flows. Then we estimate residual optical flows to facilitate our network the flexibility of pixel-wise deformation, further correcting the details of the tilted images. To establish an evaluation benchmark and train the learning framework, a comprehensive rotation correction dataset is presented with a large diversity in scenes and rotated angles. Extensive experiments demonstrate that even in the absence of the angle prior, our algorithm can outperform other state-of-the-art solutions requiring this prior. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/nie-lang/RotationCorrection.
abstract_zh: 并不是每个人都能具备专业的摄影技巧和足够的拍摄时间，拍摄的图像有时会出现一些倾斜。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的实用任务，称为旋转校正，在旋转角度未知的情况下自动校正高内容保真度的倾斜。该任务可以轻松集成到图像编辑应用程序中，允许用户无需任何手动操作即可校正旋转图像。为此，我们利用神经网络来预测可以将倾斜图像扭曲为感知水平的光流。然而，单个图像的像素级光流估计严重不稳定，尤其是在大角度倾斜图像中。为了增强其鲁棒性，我们提出了一种简单但有效的预测策略来形成鲁棒的弹性扭曲。特别是，我们首先对网格变形进行回归，将其转化为鲁棒的初始光流。然后我们估计残余光流以促进我们的网络像素级变形的灵活性，进一步校正倾斜图像的细节。为了建立评估基准并训练学习框架，提出了一个具有多种场景和旋转角度的综合旋转校正数据集。大量的实验表明，即使在没有角度先验的情况下，我们的算法也可以优于需要此先验的其他最先进的解决方案。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/nie-lang/RotationCorrection 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需角度先验的深度旋转校正方法，通过神经网络预测光流场自动修正图像倾斜问题。
AI.motivation: 普通用户拍摄图像时常因操作不当导致倾斜，而现有方法依赖已知旋转角度先验，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计双阶段光流预测网络：首先回归网格变形生成鲁棒初始光流，再估计残差光流细化细节，结合多样化数据集训练模型。
AI.result: 在无角度先验条件下，算法性能优于需要该先验的最先进方法，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的旋转校正框架有效解决了未知角度图像校正难题，可集成至图像编辑应用实现自动化修正。

To this end, we leverage a neural network to predict the optical flows that can warp the tilted images to be perceptually horizontal. authors_text: Lixin Zou,Haitao Mao,Xiaokai Chu,Jiliang Tang,Wenwen Ye,Shuaiqiang Wang,Dawei Yin
title: A Large Scale Search Dataset for Unbiased Learning to Rank
title_zh: 用于无偏见学习排名的大规模搜索数据集
abstract: The unbiased learning to rank (ULTR) problem has been greatly advanced by recent deep learning techniques and well-designed debias algorithms. However, promising results on the existing benchmark datasets may not be extended to the practical scenario due to the following disadvantages observed from those popular benchmark datasets: (1) outdated semantic feature extraction where state-of-the-art large scale pre-trained language models like BERT cannot be exploited due to the missing of the original text;(2) incomplete display features for in-depth study of ULTR, e.g., missing the displayed abstract of documents for analyzing the click necessary bias; (3) lacking real-world user feedback, leading to the prevalence of synthetic datasets in the empirical study. To overcome the above disadvantages, we introduce the Baidu-ULTR dataset. It involves randomly sampled 1.2 billion searching sessions and 7,008 expert annotated queries, which is orders of magnitude larger than the existing ones. Baidu-ULTR provides:(1) the original semantic feature and a pre-trained language model for easy usage; (2) sufficient display information such as position, displayed height, and displayed abstract, enabling the comprehensive study of different biases with advanced techniques such as causal discovery and meta-learning; and (3) rich user feedback on search result pages (SERPs) like dwelling time, allowing for user engagement optimization and promoting the exploration of multi-task learning in ULTR. In this paper, we present the design principle of Baidu-ULTR and the performance of benchmark ULTR algorithms on this new data resource, favoring the exploration of ranking for long-tail queries and pre-training tasks for ranking. The Baidu-ULTR dataset and corresponding baseline implementation are available at https://github.com/ChuXiaokai/baidu_ultr_dataset.
summary: The unbiased learning to rank (ULTR) problem has been greatly advanced by recent deep learning techniques and well-designed debias algorithms. However, promising results on the existing benchmark datasets may not be extended to the practical scenario due to the following disadvantages observed from those popular benchmark datasets: (1) outdated semantic feature extraction where state-of-the-art large scale pre-trained language models like BERT cannot be exploited due to the missing of the original text;(2) incomplete display features for in-depth study of ULTR, e.g., missing the displayed abstract of documents for analyzing the click necessary bias; (3) lacking real-world user feedback, leading to the prevalence of synthetic datasets in the empirical study. To overcome the above disadvantages, we introduce the Baidu-ULTR dataset. It involves randomly sampled 1.2 billion searching sessions and 7,008 expert annotated queries, which is orders of magnitude larger than the existing ones. Baidu-ULTR provides:(1) the original semantic feature and a pre-trained language model for easy usage; (2) sufficient display information such as position, displayed height, and displayed abstract, enabling the comprehensive study of different biases with advanced techniques such as causal discovery and meta-learning; and (3) rich user feedback on search result pages (SERPs) like dwelling time, allowing for user engagement optimization and promoting the exploration of multi-task learning in ULTR. In this paper, we present the design principle of Baidu-ULTR and the performance of benchmark ULTR algorithms on this new data resource, favoring the exploration of ranking for long-tail queries and pre-training tasks for ranking. The Baidu-ULTR dataset and corresponding baseline implementation are available at https://github.com/ChuXiaokai/baidu_ultr_dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近的深度学习技术和精心设计的去偏差算法极大地推进了无偏学习排序（ULTR）问题。然而，由于从这些流行的基准数据集中观察到以下缺点，现有基准数据集上的有希望的结果可能无法扩展到实际场景：（1）过时的语义特征提取，由于缺少原始文本，无法利用最先进的大规模预训练语言模型（如 BERT）；（2）用于深入研究 ULTR 的显示特征不完整，例如，缺少用于分析点击必要偏差的文档的显示摘要； （3）缺乏真实世界的用户反馈，导致实证研究中普遍存在合成数据集。为了克服上述缺点，我们引入了Baidu-ULTR数据集。它涉及随机采样的 12 亿个搜索会话和 7,008 个专家注释查询，比现有的要大几个数量级。百度-ULTR提供：（1）原始语义特征和易于使用的预训练语言模型； （2）充足的位置、显示高度、显示摘要等显示信息，能够利用因果发现、元学习等先进技术对不同偏差进行综合研究； （3）搜索结果页面（SERP）上丰富的用户反馈（例如停留时间），可以优化用户参与度并促进 ULTR 中多任务学习的探索。在本文中，我们介绍了Baidu-ULTR的设计原理以及基准ULTR算法在这种新数据资源上的性能，有利于长尾查询排名和排名预训练任务的探索。百度-ULTR数据集和相应的基线实现可在https://github.com/ChuXiaokai/baidu_ultr_dataset获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Baidu-ULTR的大规模搜索数据集，旨在解决现有无偏学习排序（ULTR）基准数据集的局限性，推动更真实、全面的ULTR研究。
AI.motivation: 现有ULTR数据集存在语义特征过时、显示信息不完整、缺乏真实用户反馈等问题，限制了算法在实际场景中的效果验证与研究深度。
AI.method: 通过采集12亿搜索会话和7008个专家标注查询构建数据集，包含原始文本语义特征、完整显示信息（如位置、高度、摘要）及用户停留时间等真实反馈，支持因果发现、元学习等先进方法研究。
AI.result: 验证了基准ULTR算法在新数据集上的性能，发现其对长尾查询排序和预训练任务的优化潜力，并开源数据集及基线实现。
AI.conclusion: Baidu-ULTR通过规模优势和多维度特征覆盖，为ULTR研究提供了更贴近实际场景的基准，推动了长尾优化和多任务学习方向的发展。

title: Multi-Task Lung Nodule Detection in Chest Radiographs with a Dual Head Network
title_zh: 使用双头网络进行胸部 X 光照片中的多任务肺结节检测
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to the MICCAI Conference 2022
comments: 11 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to the MICCAI Conference 2022
abstract: Lung nodules can be an alarming precursor to potential lung cancer. Missed nodule detections during chest radiograph analysis remains a common challenge among thoracic radiologists. In this work, we present a multi-task lung nodule detection algorithm for chest radiograph analysis. Unlike past approaches, our algorithm predicts a global-level label indicating nodule presence along with local-level labels predicting nodule locations using a Dual Head Network (DHN). We demonstrate the favorable nodule detection performance that our multi-task formulation yields in comparison to conventional methods. In addition, we introduce a novel Dual Head Augmentation (DHA) strategy tailored for DHN, and we demonstrate its significance in further enhancing global and local nodule predictions.
summary: Lung nodules can be an alarming precursor to potential lung cancer. Missed nodule detections during chest radiograph analysis remains a common challenge among thoracic radiologists. In this work, we present a multi-task lung nodule detection algorithm for chest radiograph analysis. Unlike past approaches, our algorithm predicts a global-level label indicating nodule presence along with local-level labels predicting nodule locations using a Dual Head Network (DHN). We demonstrate the favorable nodule detection performance that our multi-task formulation yields in comparison to conventional methods. In addition, we introduce a novel Dual Head Augmentation (DHA) strategy tailored for DHN, and we demonstrate its significance in further enhancing global and local nodule predictions.
abstract_zh: 肺结节可能是潜在肺癌的一个令人担忧的前兆。胸部X光片分析过程中遗漏的结节检测仍然是胸部放射科医生面临的一个常见挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于胸片分析的多任务肺结节检测算法。与过去的方法不同，我们的算法使用双头网络（DHN）预测指示结节存在的全局级标签以及预测结节位置的局部级标签。我们证明了我们的多任务配方与传统方法相比具有良好的结节检测性能。此外，我们引入了一种专为 DHN 量身定制的新型双头增强 (DHA) 策略，并证明了其在进一步增强全局和局部结节预测方面的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双头网络的多任务肺结节检测方法，用于胸部X光片分析，同时预测结节全局存在标签和局部位置标签。
AI.motivation: 肺结节漏诊是胸部影像分析的常见问题，传统方法难以兼顾全局与局部特征，需探索更有效的检测方案。
AI.method: 设计双头网络（DHN）同时输出全局标签和局部定位标签，并提出双头增强策略（DHA）优化模型训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在结节检测性能上优于传统方法，DHA策略显著提升了全局与局部预测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 多任务双头网络框架有效提升了肺结节检测效果，DHA策略为医学影像分析提供了新思路。

title: AV-Gaze: A Study on the Effectiveness of Audio Guided Visual Attention Estimation for Non-Profilic Faces
title_zh: AV-Gaze：针对非侧面面孔的音频引导视觉注意力估计有效性的研究
abstract: In challenging real-life conditions such as extreme head-pose, occlusions, and low-resolution images where the visual information fails to estimate visual attention/gaze direction, audio signals could provide important and complementary information. In this paper, we explore if audio-guided coarse head-pose can further enhance visual attention estimation performance for non-prolific faces. Since it is difficult to annotate audio signals for estimating the head-pose of the speaker, we use off-the-shelf state-of-the-art models to facilitate cross-modal weak-supervision. During the training phase, the framework learns complementary information from synchronized audio-visual modality. Our model can utilize any of the available modalities i.e. audio, visual or audio-visual for task-specific inference. It is interesting to note that, when AV-Gaze is tested on benchmark datasets with these specific modalities, it achieves competitive results on multiple datasets, while being highly adaptive toward challenging scenarios.
summary: In challenging real-life conditions such as extreme head-pose, occlusions, and low-resolution images where the visual information fails to estimate visual attention/gaze direction, audio signals could provide important and complementary information. In this paper, we explore if audio-guided coarse head-pose can further enhance visual attention estimation performance for non-prolific faces. Since it is difficult to annotate audio signals for estimating the head-pose of the speaker, we use off-the-shelf state-of-the-art models to facilitate cross-modal weak-supervision. During the training phase, the framework learns complementary information from synchronized audio-visual modality. Our model can utilize any of the available modalities i.e. audio, visual or audio-visual for task-specific inference. It is interesting to note that, when AV-Gaze is tested on benchmark datasets with these specific modalities, it achieves competitive results on multiple datasets, while being highly adaptive toward challenging scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在具有挑战性的现实生活条件下，例如极端的头部姿势、遮挡和低分辨率图像，视觉信息无法估计视觉注意力/注视方向，音频信号可以提供重要的补充信息。在本文中，我们探讨音频引导的粗略头部姿势是否可以进一步增强非多产面部的视觉注意力估计性能。由于很难注释音频信号来估计说话者的头部姿势，因此我们使用现成的最先进模型来促进跨模态弱监督。在训练阶段，该框架从同步视听模态中学习补充信息。我们的模型可以利用任何可用的模式，即音频、视觉或视听来进行特定任务的推理。有趣的是，当 AV-Gaze 在具有这些特定模式的基准数据集上进行测试时，它在多个数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果，同时对具有挑战性的场景具有高度适应性。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了在非专业人脸场景下，利用音频引导的视觉注意估计方法的有效性，以提升复杂条件下的视觉注意力估计性能。
AI.motivation: 在极端头部姿态、遮挡或低分辨率等现实挑战条件下，纯视觉信息难以准确估计视觉注意力/注视方向，需引入音频信号作为补充信息。
AI.method: 采用跨模态弱监督框架，利用现成的音频-视觉预训练模型，通过同步音频-视觉模态学习互补信息，支持音频、视觉或音频-视觉多模态推理。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上取得具有竞争力的性能表现，尤其在极端场景下展现出高度适应性。

search_text: AV-Gaze: A Study on the Effectiveness of Audio Guided Visual Attention Estimation for Non-Profilic Faces AV-Gaze：针对非侧面面孔的音频引导视觉注意力估计有效性的研究 In challenging real-life conditions such as extreme head-pose, occlusions, and low-resolution images where the visual information fails to estimate visual attention/gaze direction, audio signals could provide important and complementary information. In this paper, we explore if audio-guided coarse head-pose can further enhance visual attention estimation performance for non-prolific faces. Since it is difficult to annotate audio signals for estimating the head-pose of the speaker, we use off-the-shelf state-of-the-art models to facilitate cross-modal weak-supervision. During the training phase, the framework learns complementary information from synchronized audio-visual modality. Our model can utilize any of the available modalities i.e. audio, visual or audio-visual for task-specific inference. It is interesting to note that, when AV-Gaze is tested on benchmark datasets with these specific modalities, it achieves competitive results on multiple datasets, while being highly adaptive toward challenging scenarios. 在具有挑战性的现实生活条件下，例如极端的头部姿势、遮挡和低分辨率图像，视觉信息无法估计视觉注意力/注视方向，音频信号可以提供重要的补充信息。在本文中，我们探讨音频引导的粗略头部姿势是否可以进一步增强非多产面部的视觉注意力估计性能。由于很难注释音频信号来估计说话者的头部姿势，因此我们使用现成的最先进模型来促进跨模态弱监督。在训练阶段，该框架从同步视听模态中学习补充信息。我们的模型可以利用任何可用的模式，即音频、视觉或视听来进行特定任务的推理。有趣的是，当 AV-Gaze 在具有这些特定模式的基准数据集上进行测试时，它在多个数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果，同时对具有挑战性的场景具有高度适应性。 本论文研究了在非专业人脸场景下，利用音频引导的视觉注意估计方法的有效性，以提升复杂条件下的视觉注意力估计性能。 Shreya Ghosh,Abhinav Dhall,Munawar Hayat,Jarrod Knibbe cs.CV

title: Single-image Defocus Deblurring by Integration of Defocus Map Prediction Tracing the Inverse Problem Computation
title_zh: 通过集成散焦图预测跟踪逆问题计算进行单图像散焦去模糊
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem in defocus image deblurring. Previous classical methods follow two-steps approaches, i.e., first defocus map estimation and then the non-blind deblurring. In the era of deep learning, some researchers have tried to address these two problems by CNN. However, the simple concatenation of defocus map, which represents the blur level, leads to suboptimal performance. Considering the spatial variant property of the defocus blur and the blur level indicated in the defocus map, we employ the defocus map as conditional guidance to adjust the features from the input blurring images instead of simple concatenation. Then we propose a simple but effective network with spatial modulation based on the defocus map. To achieve this, we design a network consisting of three sub-networks, including the defocus map estimation network, a condition network that encodes the defocus map into condition features, and the defocus deblurring network that performs spatially dynamic modulation based on the condition features. Moreover, the spatially dynamic modulation is based on an affine transform function to adjust the features from the input blurry images. Experimental results show that our method can achieve better quantitative and qualitative evaluation performance than the existing state-of-the-art methods on the commonly used public test datasets.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem in defocus image deblurring. Previous classical methods follow two-steps approaches, i.e., first defocus map estimation and then the non-blind deblurring. In the era of deep learning, some researchers have tried to address these two problems by CNN. However, the simple concatenation of defocus map, which represents the blur level, leads to suboptimal performance. Considering the spatial variant property of the defocus blur and the blur level indicated in the defocus map, we employ the defocus map as conditional guidance to adjust the features from the input blurring images instead of simple concatenation. Then we propose a simple but effective network with spatial modulation based on the defocus map. To achieve this, we design a network consisting of three sub-networks, including the defocus map estimation network, a condition network that encodes the defocus map into condition features, and the defocus deblurring network that performs spatially dynamic modulation based on the condition features. Moreover, the spatially dynamic modulation is based on an affine transform function to adjust the features from the input blurry images. Experimental results show that our method can achieve better quantitative and qualitative evaluation performance than the existing state-of-the-art methods on the commonly used public test datasets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑散焦图像去模糊的问题。以前的经典方法遵循两步方法，即首先进行散焦图估计，然后进行非盲去模糊。在深度学习时代，一些研究人员尝试通过CNN来解决这两个问题。然而，表示模糊级别的散焦图的简单串联会导致性能不佳。考虑到散焦模糊的空间变化特性和散焦图中指示的模糊级别，我们采用散焦图作为条件指导来调整输入模糊图像的特征，而不是简单的串联。然后我们提出了一个简单但有效的基于散焦图的空间调制网络。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了一个由三个子网络组成的网络，包括散焦图估计网络、将散焦图编码为条件特征的条件网络以及基于条件特征执行空间动态调制的散焦去模糊网络。此外，空间动态调制基于仿射变换函数来调整输入模糊图像的特征。实验结果表明，我们的方法在常用的公共测试数据集上比现有最先进的方法能够取得更好的定量和定性评估性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的单图像去模糊方法，通过整合深度图预测与空间调制实现更优的去模糊效果。
AI.motivation: 传统两步法（深度图估计+非盲去模糊）及现有CNN方法因简单拼接深度图导致性能不足，未能有效利用深度图的空间可变性与模糊程度信息。
AI.method: 设计包含三个子网络的架构：深度图估计网络、条件特征编码网络及空间动态调制去模糊网络，通过仿射变换函数实现基于条件特征的输入模糊图像特征调整。
AI.result: 在常用公开数据集上，该方法在定量指标和视觉质量上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过将深度图作为条件引导进行特征调制，有效提升了单图像去模糊性能，验证了空间动态调制策略的有效性。

authors_text: Kemal Davaslioglu,Serdar Boztas,Mehmet Can Ertem,Yalin E. Sagduyu,Ender Ayanoglu
title: Self-Supervised RF Signal Representation Learning for NextG Signal Classification with Deep Learning
title_zh: 通过深度学习进行 NextG 信号分类的自监督射频信号表示学习
abstract: Deep learning (DL) finds rich applications in the wireless domain to improve spectrum awareness. Typically, DL models are either randomly initialized following a statistical distribution or pretrained on tasks from other domains in the form of transfer learning without accounting for the unique characteristics of wireless signals. Self-supervised learning (SSL) enables the learning of useful representations from Radio Frequency (RF) signals themselves even when only limited training data samples with labels are available. We present a self-supervised RF signal representation learning method and apply it to the automatic modulation recognition (AMR) task by specifically formulating a set of transformations to capture the wireless signal characteristics. We show that the sample efficiency (the number of labeled samples needed to achieve a certain performance) of AMR can be significantly increased (almost an order of magnitude) by learning signal representations with SSL. This translates to substantial time and cost savings. Furthermore, SSL increases the model accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art DL methods and maintains high accuracy when limited training data is available.
summary: Deep learning (DL) finds rich applications in the wireless domain to improve spectrum awareness. Typically, DL models are either randomly initialized following a statistical distribution or pretrained on tasks from other domains in the form of transfer learning without accounting for the unique characteristics of wireless signals. Self-supervised learning (SSL) enables the learning of useful representations from Radio Frequency (RF) signals themselves even when only limited training data samples with labels are available. We present a self-supervised RF signal representation learning method and apply it to the automatic modulation recognition (AMR) task by specifically formulating a set of transformations to capture the wireless signal characteristics. We show that the sample efficiency (the number of labeled samples needed to achieve a certain performance) of AMR can be significantly increased (almost an order of magnitude) by learning signal representations with SSL. This translates to substantial time and cost savings. Furthermore, SSL increases the model accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art DL methods and maintains high accuracy when limited training data is available.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 在无线领域找到了丰富的应用，以提高频谱感知能力。通常，深度学习模型要么按照统计分布随机初始化，要么以迁移学习的形式对来自其他领域的任务进行预训练，而不考虑无线信号的独特特征。即使只有有限的带有标签的训练数据样本，自监督学习 (SSL) 也能够从射频 (RF) 信号本身学习有用的表示。我们提出了一种自监督射频信号表示学习方法，并通过专门制定一组变换来捕获无线信号特征，并将其应用于自动调制识别（AMR）任务。我们证明，通过使用 SSL 学习信号表示，AMR 的样本效率（实现特定性能所需的标记样本数量）可以显着提高（几乎一个数量级）。这意味着可以节省大量时间和成本。此外，与最先进的深度学习方法相比，SSL 提高了模型的准确性，并在可用的训练数据有限时保持高精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习方法，用于提升下一代无线通信信号分类的深度学习模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型在无线信号处理中依赖随机初始化或跨域迁移学习，未能有效利用无线信号的特性且对标注数据依赖度高。
AI.method: 设计自监督学习框架，通过特定变换提取无线信号特征，并应用于自动调制识别任务以学习高效信号表示。
AI.result: 在标注样本数量减少约10倍的情况下，模型准确率显著优于现有深度学习方法，且保持高精度。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能有效提升无线信号分类的样本效率和模型精度，为标注数据稀缺的下一代通信系统提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Self-Supervised RF Signal Representation Learning for NextG Signal Classification with Deep Learning 通过深度学习进行 NextG 信号分类的自监督射频信号表示学习 Deep learning (DL) finds rich applications in the wireless domain to improve spectrum awareness. Typically, DL models are either randomly initialized following a statistical distribution or pretrained on tasks from other domains in the form of transfer learning without accounting for the unique characteristics of wireless signals. Self-supervised learning (SSL) enables the learning of useful representations from Radio Frequency (RF) signals themselves even when only limited training data samples with labels are available. We present a self-supervised RF signal representation learning method and apply it to the automatic modulation recognition (AMR) task by specifically formulating a set of transformations to capture the wireless signal characteristics. We show that the sample efficiency (the number of labeled samples needed to achieve a certain performance) of AMR can be significantly increased (almost an order of magnitude) by learning signal representations with SSL. This translates to substantial time and cost savings. Furthermore, SSL increases the model accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art DL methods and maintains high accuracy when limited training data is available. 深度学习 (DL) 在无线领域找到了丰富的应用，以提高频谱感知能力。通常，深度学习模型要么按照统计分布随机初始化，要么以迁移学习的形式对来自其他领域的任务进行预训练，而不考虑无线信号的独特特征。即使只有有限的带有标签的训练数据样本，自监督学习 (SSL) 也能够从射频 (RF) 信号本身学习有用的表示。我们提出了一种自监督射频信号表示学习方法，并通过专门制定一组变换来捕获无线信号特征，并将其应用于自动调制识别（AMR）任务。我们证明，通过使用 SSL 学习信号表示，AMR 的样本效率（实现特定性能所需的标记样本数量）可以显着提高（几乎一个数量级）。这意味着可以节省大量时间和成本。此外，与最先进的深度学习方法相比，SSL 提高了模型的准确性，并在可用的训练数据有限时保持高精度。 本文提出一种自监督学习方法，用于提升下一代无线通信信号分类的深度学习模型性能。 Kemal Davaslioglu,Serdar Boztas,Mehmet Can Ertem,Yalin E. Sagduyu,Ender Ayanoglu cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SP

title: Vision Transformers: State of the Art and Research Challenges
title_zh: 视觉转换器：最先进的技术和研究挑战
abstract: Transformers have achieved great success in natural language processing. Due to the powerful capability of self-attention mechanism in transformers, researchers develop the vision transformers for a variety of computer vision tasks, such as image recognition, object detection, image segmentation, pose estimation, and 3D reconstruction. This paper presents a comprehensive overview of the literature on different architecture designs and training tricks (including self-supervised learning) for vision transformers. Our goal is to provide a systematic review with the open research opportunities.
summary: Transformers have achieved great success in natural language processing. Due to the powerful capability of self-attention mechanism in transformers, researchers develop the vision transformers for a variety of computer vision tasks, such as image recognition, object detection, image segmentation, pose estimation, and 3D reconstruction. This paper presents a comprehensive overview of the literature on different architecture designs and training tricks (including self-supervised learning) for vision transformers. Our goal is to provide a systematic review with the open research opportunities.
abstract_zh: Transformer 在自然语言处理方面取得了巨大成功。由于 Transformer 中自注意力机制的强大能力，研究人员开发了用于各种计算机视觉任务的视觉 Transformer，例如图像识别、目标检测、图像分割、姿态估计和 3D 重建。本文全面概述了有关视觉变换器的不同架构设计和训练技巧（包括自监督学习）的文献。我们的目标是通过开放的研究机会提供系统的回顾。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了视觉Transformer的最新研究进展，总结了不同架构设计和训练方法，并探讨了未来研究挑战。
AI.motivation: Transformer在NLP领域取得成功后，研究者将其扩展至计算机视觉任务，但缺乏系统性综述以明确当前进展与开放问题。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分析视觉Transformer的架构创新（如分层设计、注意力机制优化）及训练策略（如自监督学习），并分类讨论其在图像识别、检测等任务中的应用。
AI.result: 总结了视觉Transformer的性能优势与局限性，指出计算效率、数据依赖性及跨任务泛化能力等未解决的核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer具有广阔前景，但需进一步优化模型效率、减少对大规模数据的依赖，并探索更普适的架构设计。

authors_text: Xin Gu,Hanhua Ye,Guang Chen,Yufei Wang,Libo Zhang,Longyin Wen
title: Dual-Stream Transformer for Generic Event Boundary Captioning
title_zh: 用于通用事件边界字幕的双流转换器
abstract: This paper describes our champion solution for the CVPR2022 Generic Event Boundary Captioning (GEBC) competition. GEBC requires the captioning model to have a comprehension of instantaneous status changes around the given video boundary, which makes it much more challenging than conventional video captioning task. In this paper, a Dual-Stream Transformer with improvements on both video content encoding and captions generation is proposed: (1) We utilize three pre-trained models to extract the video features from different granularities. Moreover, we exploit the types of boundary as hints to help the model generate captions. (2) We particularly design an model, termed as Dual-Stream Transformer, to learn discriminative representations for boundary captioning. (3) Towards generating content-relevant and human-like captions, we improve the description quality by designing a word-level ensemble strategy. The promising results on the GEBC test split demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed model.
summary: This paper describes our champion solution for the CVPR2022 Generic Event Boundary Captioning (GEBC) competition. GEBC requires the captioning model to have a comprehension of instantaneous status changes around the given video boundary, which makes it much more challenging than conventional video captioning task. In this paper, a Dual-Stream Transformer with improvements on both video content encoding and captions generation is proposed: (1) We utilize three pre-trained models to extract the video features from different granularities. Moreover, we exploit the types of boundary as hints to help the model generate captions. (2) We particularly design an model, termed as Dual-Stream Transformer, to learn discriminative representations for boundary captioning. (3) Towards generating content-relevant and human-like captions, we improve the description quality by designing a word-level ensemble strategy. The promising results on the GEBC test split demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed model.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们在 CVPR2022 通用事件边界字幕 (GEBC) 竞赛中的冠军解决方案。 GEBC 要求字幕模型能够理解给定视频边界周围的瞬时状态变化，这使得它比传统的视频字幕任务更具挑战性。在本文中，提出了一种在视频内容编码和字幕生成方面都有改进的双流变换器：（1）我们利用三个预训练模型来提取不同粒度的视频特征。此外，我们利用边界类型作为提示来帮助模型生成标题。 (2)我们特别设计了一个模型，称为双流变压器，来学习边界字幕的判别表示。 （3）为了生成内容相关且类似人类的字幕，我们通过设计单词级集成策略来提高描述质量。 GEBC 测试分割的有希望的结果证明了我们提出的模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双流Transformer模型，用于解决视频边界处事件状态变化的字幕生成任务，以应对传统视频字幕生成的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统视频字幕生成难以捕捉视频边界处的瞬时状态变化，需设计更精确的模型来理解此类动态信息。
AI.method: 采用三个预训练模型提取多粒度视频特征，结合边界类型提示设计双流Transformer架构，并通过词级集成策略优化字幕描述质量。
AI.result: 在CVPR2022 GEBC测试集上取得优异结果，验证了模型在边界字幕生成任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双流Transformer架构与多粒度特征融合策略为视频边界事件理解提供了新思路，显著提升了字幕生成质量。

authors_text: Wenqi Shao,Xun Zhao,Yixiao Ge,Zhaoyang Zhang,Lei Yang,Xiaogang Wang,Ying Shan,Ping Luo
title: Not All Models Are Equal: Predicting Model Transferability in a Self-challenging Fisher Space
title_zh: 并非所有模型都是平等的：在自我挑战的费舍尔空间中预测模型的可迁移性
comment: ECCV 2022 camera ready. 24 pages, 11 tables, 5 figures
comments: ECCV 2022 camera ready. 24 pages, 11 tables, 5 figures
abstract: This paper addresses an important problem of ranking the pre-trained deep neural networks and screening the most transferable ones for downstream tasks. It is challenging because the ground-truth model ranking for each task can only be generated by fine-tuning the pre-trained models on the target dataset, which is brute-force and computationally expensive. Recent advanced methods proposed several lightweight transferability metrics to predict the fine-tuning results. However, these approaches only capture static representations but neglect the fine-tuning dynamics. To this end, this paper proposes a new transferability metric, called \textbf{S}elf-challenging \textbf{F}isher \textbf{D}iscriminant \textbf{A}nalysis (\textbf{SFDA}), which has many appealing benefits that existing works do not have. First, SFDA can embed the static features into a Fisher space and refine them for better separability between classes. Second, SFDA uses a self-challenging mechanism to encourage different pre-trained models to differentiate on hard examples. Third, SFDA can easily select multiple pre-trained models for the model ensemble. Extensive experiments on $33$ pre-trained models of $11$ downstream tasks show that SFDA is efficient, effective, and robust when measuring the transferability of pre-trained models. For instance, compared with the state-of-the-art method NLEEP, SFDA demonstrates an average of $59.1$\% gain while bringing $22.5$x speedup in wall-clock time. The code will be available at \url{https://github.com/TencentARC/SFDA}.
summary: This paper addresses an important problem of ranking the pre-trained deep neural networks and screening the most transferable ones for downstream tasks. It is challenging because the ground-truth model ranking for each task can only be generated by fine-tuning the pre-trained models on the target dataset, which is brute-force and computationally expensive. Recent advanced methods proposed several lightweight transferability metrics to predict the fine-tuning results. However, these approaches only capture static representations but neglect the fine-tuning dynamics. To this end, this paper proposes a new transferability metric, called \textbf{S}elf-challenging \textbf{F}isher \textbf{D}iscriminant \textbf{A}nalysis (\textbf{SFDA}), which has many appealing benefits that existing works do not have. First, SFDA can embed the static features into a Fisher space and refine them for better separability between classes. Second, SFDA uses a self-challenging mechanism to encourage different pre-trained models to differentiate on hard examples. Third, SFDA can easily select multiple pre-trained models for the model ensemble. Extensive experiments on $33$ pre-trained models of $11$ downstream tasks show that SFDA is efficient, effective, and robust when measuring the transferability of pre-trained models. For instance, compared with the state-of-the-art method NLEEP, SFDA demonstrates an average of $59.1$\% gain while bringing $22.5$x speedup in wall-clock time. The code will be available at \url{https://github.com/TencentARC/SFDA}.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了对预先训练的深度神经网络进行排序并为下游任务筛选最可转移的神经网络的重要问题。这是具有挑战性的，因为每个任务的真实模型排名只能通过在目标数据集上微调预训练模型来生成，这是蛮力且计算成本昂贵。最近的先进方法提出了几种轻量级可转移性指标来预测微调结果。然而，这些方法仅捕获静态表示而忽略了微调动态。为此，本文提出了一种新的可转移性度量，称为 \textbf{S}elf-challenging \textbf{F}isher \textbf{D}iscriminant \textbf{A}naanalysis (\textbf{SFDA})，它具有许多现有作品所没有的吸引人的好处。首先，SFDA 可以将静态特征嵌入到 Fisher 空间中并对其进行细化，以实现类之间更好的可分离性。其次，SFDA 使用自我挑战机制来鼓励不同的预训练模型在困难的例子上进行区分。第三，SFDA 可以轻松地为模型集成选择多个预训练模型。对 11 美元下游任务的 33 美元预训练模型进行的广泛实验表明，SFDA 在衡量预训练模型的可转移性时是高效、有效和稳健的。例如，与最先进的 NLEEP 方法相比，SFDA 平均获得了 59.1$\% 的收益，同时在挂钟时间上带来了 22.5$x 的加速。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/TencentARC/SFDA} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SFDA的新方法，用于预测预训练深度神经网络在下游任务中的可迁移性，以高效筛选出最适用的模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过静态表示评估模型可迁移性，但忽略了微调过程中的动态变化，且计算成本高。
AI.method: SFDA通过将静态特征嵌入Fisher空间并引入自挑战机制，增强类间可分性，同时利用硬样本促进模型差异化的动态学习。
AI.result: 在11个下游任务的33个预训练模型实验中，SFDA相比NLEEP方法平均提升59.1%，速度加快22.5倍。
AI.conclusion: SFDA通过动态建模微调过程，实现了高效且鲁棒的模型可迁移性评估，为模型选择提供了新思路。

search_text: Not All Models Are Equal: Predicting Model Transferability in a Self-challenging Fisher Space 并非所有模型都是平等的：在自我挑战的费舍尔空间中预测模型的可迁移性 This paper addresses an important problem of ranking the pre-trained deep neural networks and screening the most transferable ones for downstream tasks. It is challenging because the ground-truth model ranking for each task can only be generated by fine-tuning the pre-trained models on the target dataset, which is brute-force and computationally expensive. Recent advanced methods proposed several lightweight transferability metrics to predict the fine-tuning results. However, these approaches only capture static representations but neglect the fine-tuning dynamics. To this end, this paper proposes a new transferability metric, called \textbf{S}elf-challenging \textbf{F}isher \textbf{D}iscriminant \textbf{A}nalysis (\textbf{SFDA}), which has many appealing benefits that existing works do not have. First, SFDA can embed the static features into a Fisher space and refine them for better separability between classes. Second, SFDA uses a self-challenging mechanism to encourage different pre-trained models to differentiate on hard examples. Third, SFDA can easily select multiple pre-trained models for the model ensemble. Extensive experiments on $33$ pre-trained models of $11$ downstream tasks show that SFDA is efficient, effective, and robust when measuring the transferability of pre-trained models. For instance, compared with the state-of-the-art method NLEEP, SFDA demonstrates an average of $59.1$\% gain while bringing $22.5$x speedup in wall-clock time. The code will be available at \url{https://github.com/TencentARC/SFDA}. 本文解决了对预先训练的深度神经网络进行排序并为下游任务筛选最可转移的神经网络的重要问题。这是具有挑战性的，因为每个任务的真实模型排名只能通过在目标数据集上微调预训练模型来生成，这是蛮力且计算成本昂贵。最近的先进方法提出了几种轻量级可转移性指标来预测微调结果。然而，这些方法仅捕获静态表示而忽略了微调动态。为此，本文提出了一种新的可转移性度量，称为 \textbf{S}elf-challenging \textbf{F}isher \textbf{D}iscriminant \textbf{A}naanalysis (\textbf{SFDA})，它具有许多现有作品所没有的吸引人的好处。首先，SFDA 可以将静态特征嵌入到 Fisher 空间中并对其进行细化，以实现类之间更好的可分离性。其次，SFDA 使用自我挑战机制来鼓励不同的预训练模型在困难的例子上进行区分。第三，SFDA 可以轻松地为模型集成选择多个预训练模型。对 11 美元下游任务的 33 美元预训练模型进行的广泛实验表明，SFDA 在衡量预训练模型的可转移性时是高效、有效和稳健的。例如，与最先进的 NLEEP 方法相比，SFDA 平均获得了 59.1$\% 的收益，同时在挂钟时间上带来了 22.5$x 的加速。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/TencentARC/SFDA} 获取。 本文提出了一种名为SFDA的新方法，用于预测预训练深度神经网络在下游任务中的可迁移性，以高效筛选出最适用的模型。 Wenqi Shao,Xun Zhao,Yixiao Ge,Zhaoyang Zhang,Lei Yang,Xiaogang Wang,Ying Shan,Ping Luo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Lu Gan,Jessy W. Grizzle,Ryan M. Eustice,Maani Ghaffari
title: Energy-based Legged Robots Terrain Traversability Modeling via Deep Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于能量的腿式机器人通过深度逆强化学习进行地形可穿越性建模
abstract: This work reports on developing a deep inverse reinforcement learning method for legged robots terrain traversability modeling that incorporates both exteroceptive and proprioceptive sensory data. Existing works use robot-agnostic exteroceptive environmental features or handcrafted kinematic features; instead, we propose to also learn robot-specific inertial features from proprioceptive sensory data for reward approximation in a single deep neural network. Incorporating the inertial features can improve the model fidelity and provide a reward that depends on the robot's state during deployment. We train the reward network using the Maximum Entropy Deep Inverse Reinforcement Learning (MEDIRL) algorithm and propose simultaneously minimizing a trajectory ranking loss to deal with the suboptimality of legged robot demonstrations. The demonstrated trajectories are ranked by locomotion energy consumption, in order to learn an energy-aware reward function and a more energy-efficient policy than demonstration. We evaluate our method using a dataset collected by an MIT Mini-Cheetah robot and a Mini-Cheetah simulator. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/ganlumomo/minicheetah-traversability-irl.
summary: This work reports on developing a deep inverse reinforcement learning method for legged robots terrain traversability modeling that incorporates both exteroceptive and proprioceptive sensory data. Existing works use robot-agnostic exteroceptive environmental features or handcrafted kinematic features; instead, we propose to also learn robot-specific inertial features from proprioceptive sensory data for reward approximation in a single deep neural network. Incorporating the inertial features can improve the model fidelity and provide a reward that depends on the robot's state during deployment. We train the reward network using the Maximum Entropy Deep Inverse Reinforcement Learning (MEDIRL) algorithm and propose simultaneously minimizing a trajectory ranking loss to deal with the suboptimality of legged robot demonstrations. The demonstrated trajectories are ranked by locomotion energy consumption, in order to learn an energy-aware reward function and a more energy-efficient policy than demonstration. We evaluate our method using a dataset collected by an MIT Mini-Cheetah robot and a Mini-Cheetah simulator. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/ganlumomo/minicheetah-traversability-irl.
abstract_zh: 这项工作报告了为腿式机器人地形可穿越性建模开发一种深度逆强化学习方法，该方法结合了外感受和本体感觉数据。现有作品使用与机器人无关的外感受环境特征或手工制作的运动学特征；相反，我们建议还从本体感觉数据中学习机器人特定的惯性特征，以在单个深度神经网络中进行奖励近似。结合惯性特征可以提高模型保真度，并根据机器人在部署期间的状态提供奖励。我们使用最大熵深度逆强化学习（MEDIRL）算法训练奖励网络，并建议同时最小化轨迹排名损失，以处理有腿机器人演示的次优问题。演示的轨迹按运动能耗进行排序，以便学习能量感知奖励函数和比演示更节能的策略。我们使用麻省理工学院迷你猎豹机器人和迷你猎豹模拟器收集的数据集来评估我们的方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/ganlumomo/minicheetah-traversability-irl 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度逆强化学习的能量感知足式机器人地形可穿越性建模方法，结合外部感知和本体感觉数据，提升模型精度与能量效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖通用环境特征或手工设计的运动学特征，难以捕捉机器人特异性惯性特征，导致模型保真度不足且无法有效优化能量消耗。
AI.method: 通过最大熵深度逆强化学习算法（MEDIRL）训练奖励网络，融合本体感觉数据中的惯性特征，并引入基于运动能耗的轨迹排序损失函数，联合优化能量感知奖励函数与策略。
AI.result: 在MIT Mini-Cheetah机器人数据集与仿真环境中验证，相比传统方法实现更优的能耗效率与地形穿越性能。
AI.conclusion: 整合机器人特异性本体感觉特征与能量感知奖励机制，可有效提升足式机器人地形可穿越性建模精度与运动效率。
