title: Enhancing a Student Productivity Model for Adaptive Problem-Solving Assistance
title_zh: 增强学生生产力模型以提供自适应问题解决帮助
abstract: Research on intelligent tutoring systems has been exploring data-driven methods to deliver effective adaptive assistance. While much work has been done to provide adaptive assistance when students seek help, they may not seek help optimally. This had led to the growing interest in proactive adaptive assistance, where the tutor provides unsolicited assistance upon predictions of struggle or unproductivity. Determining when and whether to provide personalized support is a well-known challenge called the assistance dilemma. Addressing this dilemma is particularly challenging in open-ended domains, where there can be several ways to solve problems. Researchers have explored methods to determine when to proactively help students, but few of these methods have taken prior hint usage into account. In this paper, we present a novel data-driven approach to incorporate students' hint usage in predicting their need for help. We explore its impact in an intelligent tutor that deals with the open-ended and well-structured domain of logic proofs. We present a controlled study to investigate the impact of an adaptive hint policy based on predictions of HelpNeed that incorporate students' hint usage. We show empirical evidence to support that such a policy can save students a significant amount of time in training, and lead to improved posttest results, when compared to a control without proactive interventions. We also show that incorporating students' hint usage significantly improves the adaptive hint policy's efficacy in predicting students' HelpNeed, thereby reducing training unproductivity, reducing possible help avoidance, and increasing possible help appropriateness (a higher chance of receiving help when it was likely to be needed). We conclude with suggestions on the domains that can benefit from this approach as well as the requirements for adoption.
summary: Research on intelligent tutoring systems has been exploring data-driven methods to deliver effective adaptive assistance. While much work has been done to provide adaptive assistance when students seek help, they may not seek help optimally. This had led to the growing interest in proactive adaptive assistance, where the tutor provides unsolicited assistance upon predictions of struggle or unproductivity. Determining when and whether to provide personalized support is a well-known challenge called the assistance dilemma. Addressing this dilemma is particularly challenging in open-ended domains, where there can be several ways to solve problems. Researchers have explored methods to determine when to proactively help students, but few of these methods have taken prior hint usage into account. In this paper, we present a novel data-driven approach to incorporate students' hint usage in predicting their need for help. We explore its impact in an intelligent tutor that deals with the open-ended and well-structured domain of logic proofs. We present a controlled study to investigate the impact of an adaptive hint policy based on predictions of HelpNeed that incorporate students' hint usage. We show empirical evidence to support that such a policy can save students a significant amount of time in training, and lead to improved posttest results, when compared to a control without proactive interventions. We also show that incorporating students' hint usage significantly improves the adaptive hint policy's efficacy in predicting students' HelpNeed, thereby reducing training unproductivity, reducing possible help avoidance, and increasing possible help appropriateness (a higher chance of receiving help when it was likely to be needed). We conclude with suggestions on the domains that can benefit from this approach as well as the requirements for adoption.
abstract_zh: 智能辅导系统的研究一直在探索数据驱动的方法来提供有效的自适应帮助。尽管已经做了很多工作来在学生寻求帮助时提供适应性帮助，但他们可能无法以最佳方式寻求帮助。这导致人们对主动适应性援助越来越感兴趣，导师在预测到困难或生产力低下时主动提供援助。确定何时以及是否提供个性化支持是一个众所周知的挑战，称为援助困境。在开放式领域中，解决这一困境尤其具有挑战性，因为在开放式领域中可以有多种方法来解决问题。研究人员已经探索了确定何时主动帮助学生的方法，但这些方法很少考虑到事先的提示使用情况。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的数据驱动方法，将学生的提示用法纳入预测他们对帮助的需求。我们探讨了它对处理开放式且结构良好的逻辑证明领域的智能导师的影响。我们提出了一项对照研究，以调查基于 HelpNeed 预测的自适应提示策略的影响，其中包含学生的提示使用情况。我们的实证证据表明，与没有主动干预的对照相比，这种政策可以节省学生大量的培训时间，并提高后测结果。我们还表明，纳入学生的提示使用情况可以显着提高自适应提示策略在预测学生的帮助需求方面的功效，从而减少培训效率低下，减少可能的帮助回避，并增加可能的帮助适当性（在可能需要时获得帮助的机会更高）。最后，我们对可以从这种方法中受益的领域以及采用的要求提出了建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，通过结合学生使用提示的历史来预测其帮助需求，优化自适应辅导系统中的主动帮助策略。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应辅导系统在预测学生帮助需求时未充分考虑其历史提示使用情况，导致帮助时机不精准，影响学习效率。需改进模型以解决开放性领域中的帮助困境。
AI.method: 构建包含学生历史提示使用数据的HelpNeed预测模型，在逻辑证明领域智能导师系统中实施自适应提示策略，并通过对照实验验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明该策略使训练时间减少，后测成绩提升，且预测准确率提高，有效降低无效训练和帮助回避，提升帮助适时性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于开放性与结构化领域，但需满足数据采集与模型训练的条件，未来可拓展至更多教育场景。

ai_content.result: 实验表明该策略使训练时间减少，后测成绩提升，且预测准确率提高，有效降低无效训练和帮助回避，提升帮助适时性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法适用于开放性与结构化领域，但需满足数据采集与模型训练的条件，未来可拓展至更多教育场景。

search_text: Enhancing a Student Productivity Model for Adaptive Problem-Solving Assistance 增强学生生产力模型以提供自适应问题解决帮助 Research on intelligent tutoring systems has been exploring data-driven methods to deliver effective adaptive assistance. While much work has been done to provide adaptive assistance when students seek help, they may not seek help optimally. This had led to the growing interest in proactive adaptive assistance, where the tutor provides unsolicited assistance upon predictions of struggle or unproductivity. Determining when and whether to provide personalized support is a well-known challenge called the assistance dilemma. Addressing this dilemma is particularly challenging in open-ended domains, where there can be several ways to solve problems. Researchers have explored methods to determine when to proactively help students, but few of these methods have taken prior hint usage into account. In this paper, we present a novel data-driven approach to incorporate students' hint usage in predicting their need for help. We explore its impact in an intelligent tutor that deals with the open-ended and well-structured domain of logic proofs. We present a controlled study to investigate the impact of an adaptive hint policy based on predictions of HelpNeed that incorporate students' hint usage. We show empirical evidence to support that such a policy can save students a significant amount of time in training, and lead to improved posttest results, when compared to a control without proactive interventions. We also show that incorporating students' hint usage significantly improves the adaptive hint policy's efficacy in predicting students' HelpNeed, thereby reducing training unproductivity, reducing possible help avoidance, and increasing possible help appropriateness (a higher chance of receiving help when it was likely to be needed). We conclude with suggestions on the domains that can benefit from this approach as well as the requirements for adoption. 智能辅导系统的研究一直在探索数据驱动的方法来提供有效的自适应帮助。尽管已经做了很多工作来在学生寻求帮助时提供适应性帮助，但他们可能无法以最佳方式寻求帮助。这导致人们对主动适应性援助越来越感兴趣，导师在预测到困难或生产力低下时主动提供援助。确定何时以及是否提供个性化支持是一个众所周知的挑战，称为援助困境。在开放式领域中，解决这一困境尤其具有挑战性，因为在开放式领域中可以有多种方法来解决问题。研究人员已经探索了确定何时主动帮助学生的方法，但这些方法很少考虑到事先的提示使用情况。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的数据驱动方法，将学生的提示用法纳入预测他们对帮助的需求。我们探讨了它对处理开放式且结构良好的逻辑证明领域的智能导师的影响。我们提出了一项对照研究，以调查基于 HelpNeed 预测的自适应提示策略的影响，其中包含学生的提示使用情况。我们的实证证据表明，与没有主动干预的对照相比，这种政策可以节省学生大量的培训时间，并提高后测结果。我们还表明，纳入学生的提示使用情况可以显着提高自适应提示策略在预测学生的帮助需求方面的功效，从而减少培训效率低下，减少可能的帮助回避，并增加可能的帮助适当性（在可能需要时获得帮助的机会更高）。最后，我们对可以从这种方法中受益的领域以及采用的要求提出了建议。 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，通过结合学生使用提示的历史来预测其帮助需求，优化自适应辅导系统中的主动帮助策略。 Mehak Maniktala,Min Chi,Tiffany Barnes cs.AI

title: Partial Shape Similarity via Alignment of Multi-Metric Hamiltonian Spectra
title_zh: 通过多度量哈密顿谱对齐的部分形状相似性
abstract: Evaluating the similarity of non-rigid shapes with significant partiality is a fundamental task in numerous computer vision applications. Here, we propose a novel axiomatic method to match similar regions across shapes. Matching similar regions is formulated as the alignment of the spectra of operators closely related to the Laplace-Beltrami operator (LBO). The main novelty of the proposed approach is the consideration of differential operators defined on a manifold with multiple metrics. The choice of a metric relates to fundamental shape properties while considering the same manifold under different metrics can thus be viewed as analyzing the underlying manifold from different perspectives. Specifically, we examine the scale-invariant metric and the corresponding scale-invariant Laplace-Beltrami operator (SI-LBO) along with the regular metric and the regular LBO. We demonstrate that the scale-invariant metric emphasizes the locations of important semantic features in articulated shapes. A truncated spectrum of the SI-LBO consequently better captures locally curved regions and complements the global information encapsulated in the truncated spectrum of the regular LBO. We show that matching these dual spectra outperforms competing axiomatic frameworks when tested on standard benchmarks. We introduced a new dataset and compare the proposed method with the state-of-the-art learning based approach in a cross-database configuration. Specifically, we show that, when trained on one data set and tested on another, the proposed axiomatic approach which does not involve training, outperforms the deep learning alternative.
summary: Evaluating the similarity of non-rigid shapes with significant partiality is a fundamental task in numerous computer vision applications. Here, we propose a novel axiomatic method to match similar regions across shapes. Matching similar regions is formulated as the alignment of the spectra of operators closely related to the Laplace-Beltrami operator (LBO). The main novelty of the proposed approach is the consideration of differential operators defined on a manifold with multiple metrics. The choice of a metric relates to fundamental shape properties while considering the same manifold under different metrics can thus be viewed as analyzing the underlying manifold from different perspectives. Specifically, we examine the scale-invariant metric and the corresponding scale-invariant Laplace-Beltrami operator (SI-LBO) along with the regular metric and the regular LBO. We demonstrate that the scale-invariant metric emphasizes the locations of important semantic features in articulated shapes. A truncated spectrum of the SI-LBO consequently better captures locally curved regions and complements the global information encapsulated in the truncated spectrum of the regular LBO. We show that matching these dual spectra outperforms competing axiomatic frameworks when tested on standard benchmarks. We introduced a new dataset and compare the proposed method with the state-of-the-art learning based approach in a cross-database configuration. Specifically, we show that, when trained on one data set and tested on another, the proposed axiomatic approach which does not involve training, outperforms the deep learning alternative.
abstract_zh: 评估具有显着偏向性的非刚性形状的相似性是许多计算机视觉应用中的一项基本任务。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的公理方法来匹配形状上的相似区域。匹配相似区域被公式化为与拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子（LBO）密切相关的算子谱的对齐。该方法的主要新颖之处在于考虑了在具有多个度量的流形上定义的微分算子。度量的选择与基本形状属性相关，同时在不同度量下考虑相同流形可以被视为从不同角度分析底层流形。具体来说，我们检查尺度不变度量和相应的尺度不变拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子（SI-LBO）以及常规度量和常规 LBO。我们证明了尺度不变度量强调了铰接形状中重要语义特征的位置。因此，SI-LBO 的截断频谱可以更好地捕获局部弯曲区域，并补充封装在常规 LBO 截断频谱中的全局信息。我们表明，在标准基准测试中，匹配这些双光谱的性能优于竞争的公理框架。我们引入了一个新的数据集，并将所提出的方法与跨数据库配置中最先进的基于学习的方法进行了比较。具体来说，我们表明，当在一个数据集上进行训练并在另一个数据集上进行测试时，所提出的不涉及训练的公理方法优于深度学习替代方案。

AI.tldr: 评估非刚性形状的部分相似性，提出一种基于多度量哈密顿谱对齐的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理部分相似性和不同度量下的形状分析存在不足，需更有效的方法。
AI.method: 通过多度量哈密顿谱对齐（结合尺度不变与常规度量的LBO谱）匹配形状局部特征，融合局部曲率与全局信息。
AI.result: 在标准基准及跨数据库测试中优于现有方法，且无需训练过程。
AI.conclusion: 该公理化方法在部分形状匹配任务中有效，尤其在跨数据库场景下表现优异。

title: MaiT: Leverage Attention Masks for More Efficient Image Transformers
title_zh: MaiT：利用注意力掩模实现更高效的图像转换器
abstract: Though image transformers have shown competitive results with convolutional neural networks in computer vision tasks, lacking inductive biases such as locality still poses problems in terms of model efficiency especially for embedded applications. In this work, we address this issue by introducing attention masks to incorporate spatial locality into self-attention heads. Local dependencies are captured efficiently with masked attention heads along with global dependencies captured by unmasked attention heads. With Masked attention image Transformer - MaiT, top-1 accuracy increases by up to 1.7% compared to CaiT with fewer parameters and FLOPs, and the throughput improves by up to 1.5X compared to Swin. Encoding locality with attention masks is model agnostic, and thus it applies to monolithic, hierarchical, or other novel transformer architectures.
summary: Though image transformers have shown competitive results with convolutional neural networks in computer vision tasks, lacking inductive biases such as locality still poses problems in terms of model efficiency especially for embedded applications. In this work, we address this issue by introducing attention masks to incorporate spatial locality into self-attention heads. Local dependencies are captured efficiently with masked attention heads along with global dependencies captured by unmasked attention heads. With Masked attention image Transformer - MaiT, top-1 accuracy increases by up to 1.7% compared to CaiT with fewer parameters and FLOPs, and the throughput improves by up to 1.5X compared to Swin. Encoding locality with attention masks is model agnostic, and thus it applies to monolithic, hierarchical, or other novel transformer architectures.
abstract_zh: 尽管图像转换器在计算机视觉任务中显示出与卷积神经网络竞争的结果，但缺乏局部性等归纳偏差仍然会在模型效率方面带来问题，特别是对于嵌入式应用程序。在这项工作中，我们通过引入注意力掩模将空间局部性纳入自注意力头来解决这个问题。使用屏蔽的注意力头可以有效地捕获局部依赖关系，而通过未屏蔽的注意力头捕获全局依赖关系。使用Masked Attention Image Transformer - MaiT，与参数和FLOPs更少的CaiT相比，top-1准确率提高了高达1.7%，与Swin相比，吞吐量提高了高达1.5倍。使用注意力掩码对局部性进行编码与模型无关，因此它适用于整体式、分层式或其他新颖的变压器架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MaiT方法，通过引入注意力掩码提升图像变压器的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 图像变压器虽表现优异，但缺乏局部性等归纳偏置，导致模型效率不足，尤其在嵌入式应用中存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过引入注意力掩码，将局部依赖关系与全局依赖关系分别由掩码注意力头和未掩码注意力头捕捉。
AI.result: 相比CaiT，参数和FLOPs更少的情况下top-1准确率提升1.7%；相比Swin吞吐量提升1.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 注意力掩码方法具有模型无关性，可广泛应用于各类变压器架构，包括单片、分层等新型设计。

Encoding locality with attention masks is model agnostic, and thus it applies to monolithic, hierarchical, or other novel transformer architectures. 尽管图像转换器在计算机视觉任务中显示出与卷积神经网络竞争的结果，但缺乏局部性等归纳偏差仍然会在模型效率方面带来问题，特别是对于嵌入式应用程序。在这项工作中，我们通过引入注意力掩模将空间局部性纳入自注意力头来解决这个问题。使用屏蔽的注意力头可以有效地捕获局部依赖关系，而通过未屏蔽的注意力头捕获全局依赖关系。使用Masked Attention Image Transformer - MaiT，与参数和FLOPs更少的CaiT相比，top-1准确率提高了高达1.7%，与Swin相比，吞吐量提高了高达1.5倍。使用注意力掩码对局部性进行编码与模型无关，因此它适用于整体式、分层式或其他新颖的变压器架构。 本文提出MaiT方法，通过引入注意力掩码提升图像变压器的效率和性能。 Ling Li,Ali Shafiee Ardestani,Joseph Hassoun cs.CV

title: Team Learning as a Lens for Designing Human-AI Co-Creative Systems
title_zh: 团队学习作为设计人类与人工智能共同创造系统的镜头
comment: ACM CHI 2022 Workshop on Generative AI and HCI
comments: ACM CHI 2022 Workshop on Generative AI and HCI
abstract: Generative, ML-driven interactive systems have the potential to change how people interact with computers in creative processes - turning tools into co-creators. However, it is still unclear how we might achieve effective human-AI collaboration in open-ended task domains. There are several known challenges around communication in the interaction with ML-driven systems. An overlooked aspect in the design of co-creative systems is how users can be better supported in learning to collaborate with such systems. Here we reframe human-AI collaboration as a learning problem: Inspired by research on team learning, we hypothesize that similar learning strategies that apply to human-human teams might also increase the collaboration effectiveness and quality of humans working with co-creative generative systems. In this position paper, we aim to promote team learning as a lens for designing more effective co-creative human-AI collaboration and emphasize collaboration process quality as a goal for co-creative systems. Furthermore, we outline a preliminary schematic framework for embedding team learning support in co-creative AI systems. We conclude by proposing a research agenda and posing open questions for further study on supporting people in learning to collaborate with generative AI systems.
summary: Generative, ML-driven interactive systems have the potential to change how people interact with computers in creative processes - turning tools into co-creators. However, it is still unclear how we might achieve effective human-AI collaboration in open-ended task domains. There are several known challenges around communication in the interaction with ML-driven systems. An overlooked aspect in the design of co-creative systems is how users can be better supported in learning to collaborate with such systems. Here we reframe human-AI collaboration as a learning problem: Inspired by research on team learning, we hypothesize that similar learning strategies that apply to human-human teams might also increase the collaboration effectiveness and quality of humans working with co-creative generative systems. In this position paper, we aim to promote team learning as a lens for designing more effective co-creative human-AI collaboration and emphasize collaboration process quality as a goal for co-creative systems. Furthermore, we outline a preliminary schematic framework for embedding team learning support in co-creative AI systems. We conclude by proposing a research agenda and posing open questions for further study on supporting people in learning to collaborate with generative AI systems.
abstract_zh: 机器学习驱动的生成式交互系统有潜力改变人们在创意过程中与计算机交互的方式——将工具变成共同创造者。然而，目前尚不清楚我们如何在开放式任务领域实现有效的人机协作。与机器学习驱动系统交互时的通信存在一些已知的挑战。共同创意系统设计中一个被忽视的方面是如何更好地支持用户学习与此类系统进行协作。在这里，我们将人类与人工智能的协作重新定义为一个学习问题：受到团队学习研究的启发，我们假设适用于人类团队的类似学习策略也可能会提高人类与共同创造生成系统一起工作的协作效率和质量。在这篇立场文件中，我们的目标是促进团队学习，将其作为设计更有效的人类与人工智能共同创造协作的镜头，并强调协作过程质量作为共同创造系统的目标。此外，我们概述了一个初步的示意框架，用于将团队学习支持嵌入到共同创意的人工智能系统中。最后，我们提出了一个研究议程，并提出了进一步研究的开放性问题，以支持人们学习与生成人工智能系统进行协作。

AI.tldr: 本文将团队学习理论作为设计人类与生成式AI协同创作系统的框架，旨在提升开放任务领域中人机协作的有效性与质量。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式AI系统在创意流程中面临人机沟通障碍与协作学习支持不足的问题，需探索如何通过学习策略优化人类与AI的协作过程。
AI.method: 基于团队学习研究，提出将人类-人类团队的学习策略迁移至人类-AI协作场景，并构建初步的团队学习支持框架。
AI.result: 形成了一套嵌入团队学习支持的协同创作AI系统设计框架，并提出未来研究方向与开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 团队学习视角为设计高效人机协同系统提供了新方向，后续需深入研究如何支持用户学习与生成式AI系统的协作过程。

title: Orthogonal Matrix Retrieval with Spatial Consensus for 3D Unknown-View Tomography
title_zh: 3D 未知视图层析成像的空间一致性正交矩阵检索
comment: Keywords: unknown view tomography, single-particle cryo-electron microscopy, method of moments, autocorrelation, spherical harmonics
comments: Keywords: unknown view tomography, single-particle cryo-electron microscopy, method of moments, autocorrelation, spherical harmonics
abstract: Unknown-view tomography (UVT) reconstructs a 3D density map from its 2D projections at unknown, random orientations. A line of work starting with Kam (1980) employs the method of moments (MoM) with rotation-invariant Fourier features to solve UVT in the frequency domain, assuming that the orientations are uniformly distributed. This line of work includes the recent orthogonal matrix retrieval (OMR) approaches based on matrix factorization, which, while elegant, either require side information about the density that is not available, or fail to be sufficiently robust. For OMR to break free from those restrictions, we propose to jointly recover the density map and the orthogonal matrices by requiring that they be mutually consistent. We regularize the resulting non-convex optimization problem by a denoised reference projection and a nonnegativity constraint. This is enabled by the new closed-form expressions for spatial autocorrelation features. Further, we design an easy-to-compute initial density map which effectively mitigates the non-convexity of the reconstruction problem. Experimental results show that the proposed OMR with spatial consensus is more robust and performs significantly better than the previous state-of-the-art OMR approach in the typical low-SNR scenario of 3D UVT.
summary: Unknown-view tomography (UVT) reconstructs a 3D density map from its 2D projections at unknown, random orientations. A line of work starting with Kam (1980) employs the method of moments (MoM) with rotation-invariant Fourier features to solve UVT in the frequency domain, assuming that the orientations are uniformly distributed. This line of work includes the recent orthogonal matrix retrieval (OMR) approaches based on matrix factorization, which, while elegant, either require side information about the density that is not available, or fail to be sufficiently robust. For OMR to break free from those restrictions, we propose to jointly recover the density map and the orthogonal matrices by requiring that they be mutually consistent. We regularize the resulting non-convex optimization problem by a denoised reference projection and a nonnegativity constraint. This is enabled by the new closed-form expressions for spatial autocorrelation features. Further, we design an easy-to-compute initial density map which effectively mitigates the non-convexity of the reconstruction problem. Experimental results show that the proposed OMR with spatial consensus is more robust and performs significantly better than the previous state-of-the-art OMR approach in the typical low-SNR scenario of 3D UVT.
abstract_zh: 未知视图断层扫描 (UVT) 根据未知、随机方向的 2D 投影重建 3D 密度图。 Kam (1980) 开始的一系列工作采用具有旋转不变傅里叶特征的矩量法 (MoM) 来求解频域中的 UVT，假设方向均匀分布。这一工作包括最近基于矩阵分解的正交矩阵检索（OMR）方法，该方法虽然很优雅，但要么需要有关不可用的密度的辅助信息，要么不够鲁棒。为了让 OMR 摆脱这些限制，我们建议通过要求密度图和正交矩阵相互一致来联合恢复它们。我们通过去噪参考投影和非负约束来正则化所得到的非凸优化问题。这是通过空间自相关特征的新封闭式表达式实现的。此外，我们设计了一个易于计算的初始密度图，它有效地减轻了重建问题的非凸性。实验结果表明，在 3D UVT 的典型低 SNR 场景中，所提出的具有空间一致性的 OMR 更加鲁棒，并且比之前最先进的 OMR 方法表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合空间一致性的正交矩阵检索方法，用于解决3D未知视角断层扫描问题，以提高重建的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有正交矩阵检索（OMR）方法在处理3D未知视角断层扫描时，要么需要不可用的密度信息，要么在低信噪比场景下鲁棒性不足，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 通过联合恢复密度图与正交矩阵并确保其相互一致性，引入去噪参考投影和非负性约束以正则化非凸优化问题，并设计易于计算的初始密度图以缓解非凸性。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在典型低信噪比场景下显著优于现有最先进的OMR方法，具有更高的鲁棒性和重建精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过空间共识约束和优化策略改进了OMR方法，有效解决了3D未知视角断层扫描中的关键问题，为后续研究提供了新方向。

title: MoRPI: Mobile Robot Pure Inertial Navigation
title_zh: MoRPI：移动机器人纯惯性导航
abstract: Mobile robots are used in industrial, leisure, and military applications. In some situations, a robot navigation solution relies only on inertial sensors and as a consequence, the navigation solution drifts in time. In this paper, we propose the MoRPI framework, a mobile robot pure inertial approach. Instead of travelling in a straight line trajectory, the robot moves in a periodic motion trajectory to enable peak-to-peak estimation. In this manner, instead of performing three integrations to calculate the robot position in a classical inertial solution, an empirical formula is used to estimate the travelled distance. Two types of MoRPI approaches are suggested, where one is based on both accelerometer and gyroscope readings while the other is only on gyroscopes. Closed form analytical solutions are derived to show that MoRPI produces lower position error compared to the classical pure inertial solution. In addition, to evaluate the proposed approach, field experiments were made with a mobile robot equipped with two types of inertial sensors. In total, 143 trajectories with a time duration of 75 minutes were collected and evaluated. The results show the benefits of using our approach. To facilitate further development of the proposed approach, both dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/ansfl/MoRPI.
summary: Mobile robots are used in industrial, leisure, and military applications. In some situations, a robot navigation solution relies only on inertial sensors and as a consequence, the navigation solution drifts in time. In this paper, we propose the MoRPI framework, a mobile robot pure inertial approach. Instead of travelling in a straight line trajectory, the robot moves in a periodic motion trajectory to enable peak-to-peak estimation. In this manner, instead of performing three integrations to calculate the robot position in a classical inertial solution, an empirical formula is used to estimate the travelled distance. Two types of MoRPI approaches are suggested, where one is based on both accelerometer and gyroscope readings while the other is only on gyroscopes. Closed form analytical solutions are derived to show that MoRPI produces lower position error compared to the classical pure inertial solution. In addition, to evaluate the proposed approach, field experiments were made with a mobile robot equipped with two types of inertial sensors. In total, 143 trajectories with a time duration of 75 minutes were collected and evaluated. The results show the benefits of using our approach. To facilitate further development of the proposed approach, both dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/ansfl/MoRPI.
abstract_zh: 移动机器人用于工业、休闲和军事应用。在某些情况下，机器人导航解决方案仅依赖于惯性传感器，因此导航解决方案会及时漂移。在本文中，我们提出了MoRPI框架，一种移动机器人纯惯性方法。机器人不是沿直线轨迹行驶，而是沿周期性运动轨迹移动，以实现峰峰值估计。通过这种方式，不是在经典惯性解中执行三次积分来计算机器人位置，而是使用经验公式来估计行进距离。建议采用两种类型的 MoRPI 方法，其中一种基于加速度计和陀螺仪读数，而另一种仅基于陀螺仪。导出的封闭式解析解表明，与经典的纯惯性解相比，MoRPI 产生的位置误差更低。此外，为了评估所提出的方法，使用配备两种惯性传感器的移动机器人进行了现场实验。总共收集并评估了 143 个持续时间为 75 分钟的轨迹。结果显示了使用我们的方法的好处。为了促进所提出的方法的进一步开发，数据集和代码都可以在 https://github.com/ansfl/MoRPI 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MoRPI的移动机器人纯惯性导航框架，通过周期性运动轨迹和经验公式减少惯性导航中的位置漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 传统纯惯性导航方案因多次积分导致位置误差随时间累积，需寻找更精准的替代方法以提升导航稳定性。
AI.method: 设计周期性运动轨迹实现峰峰值估计，采用经验公式替代三次积分计算位移；提出两种方案：一种结合加速度计和陀螺仪数据，另一种仅依赖陀螺仪，并推导解析解证明其优势。
AI.result: 实验数据显示MoRPI相比传统方法显著降低位置误差，143条轨迹测试数据及代码已公开共享。
AI.conclusion: MoRPI通过周期性运动与传感器优化有效抑制漂移，为纯惯性导航提供新思路，并开放数据促进后续研究。

title: Extending Logical Neural Networks using First-Order Theories
title_zh: 使用一阶理论扩展逻辑神经网络
abstract: Logical Neural Networks (LNNs) are a type of architecture which combine a neural network's abilities to learn and systems of formal logic's abilities to perform symbolic reasoning. LLNs provide programmers the ability to implicitly modify the underlying structure of the neural network via logical formulae. In this paper, we take advantage of this abstraction to extend LNNs to support equality and function symbols via first-order theories. This extension improves the power of LNNs by significantly increasing the types of problems they can tackle. As a proof of concept, we add support for the first-order theory of equality to IBM's LNN library and demonstrate how the introduction of this allows the LNN library to now reason about expressions without needing to make the unique-names assumption.
summary: Logical Neural Networks (LNNs) are a type of architecture which combine a neural network's abilities to learn and systems of formal logic's abilities to perform symbolic reasoning. LLNs provide programmers the ability to implicitly modify the underlying structure of the neural network via logical formulae. In this paper, we take advantage of this abstraction to extend LNNs to support equality and function symbols via first-order theories. This extension improves the power of LNNs by significantly increasing the types of problems they can tackle. As a proof of concept, we add support for the first-order theory of equality to IBM's LNN library and demonstrate how the introduction of this allows the LNN library to now reason about expressions without needing to make the unique-names assumption.
abstract_zh: 逻辑神经网络 (LNN) 是一种架构，它结合了神经网络的学习能力和形式逻辑系统执行符号推理的能力。 LLN 使程序员能够通过逻辑公式隐式修改神经网络的底层结构。在本文中，我们利用这种抽象来扩展 LNN，以通过一阶理论支持等式和函数符号。这一扩展通过显着增加 LNN 可以解决的问题类型来提高 LNN 的能力。作为概念证明，我们向 IBM 的 LNN 库添加了对一阶等式理论的支持，并演示了这一点的引入如何允许 LNN 库现在推理表达式，而无需进行唯一名称假设。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入一阶理论扩展逻辑神经网络（LNNs），使其支持等式和函数符号，从而提升其推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LNNs在处理需要等式推理或函数符号的复杂逻辑问题时存在局限，需依赖唯一名称假设，限制了其应用范围。
AI.method: 基于LNNs的逻辑公式抽象能力，引入一阶理论中的等式和函数符号，并在IBM的LNN库中实现该扩展。
AI.result: 成功扩展LNN库以支持等式推理，无需唯一名称假设即可处理表达式，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该扩展显著增强了LNNs的表达能力，使其能解决更广泛的逻辑问题，为符号与神经网络结合提供了新方向。

title: Semi-supervised Human Pose Estimation in Art-historical Images
title_zh: 艺术历史图像中的半监督人体姿势估计
comment: Accepted at ACM MM 2022 as a conference paper
comments: Accepted at ACM MM 2022 as a conference paper
abstract: Gesture as language of non-verbal communication has been theoretically established since the 17th century. However, its relevance for the visual arts has been expressed only sporadically. This may be primarily due to the sheer overwhelming amount of data that traditionally had to be processed by hand. With the steady progress of digitization, though, a growing number of historical artifacts have been indexed and made available to the public, creating a need for automatic retrieval of art-historical motifs with similar body constellations or poses. Since the domain of art differs significantly from existing real-world data sets for human pose estimation due to its style variance, this presents new challenges. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to estimate human poses in art-historical images. In contrast to previous work that attempts to bridge the domain gap with pre-trained models or through style transfer, we suggest semi-supervised learning for both object and keypoint detection. Furthermore, we introduce a novel domain-specific art data set that includes both bounding box and keypoint annotations of human figures. Our approach achieves significantly better results than methods that use pre-trained models or style transfer.
summary: Gesture as language of non-verbal communication has been theoretically established since the 17th century. However, its relevance for the visual arts has been expressed only sporadically. This may be primarily due to the sheer overwhelming amount of data that traditionally had to be processed by hand. With the steady progress of digitization, though, a growing number of historical artifacts have been indexed and made available to the public, creating a need for automatic retrieval of art-historical motifs with similar body constellations or poses. Since the domain of art differs significantly from existing real-world data sets for human pose estimation due to its style variance, this presents new challenges. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to estimate human poses in art-historical images. In contrast to previous work that attempts to bridge the domain gap with pre-trained models or through style transfer, we suggest semi-supervised learning for both object and keypoint detection. Furthermore, we introduce a novel domain-specific art data set that includes both bounding box and keypoint annotations of human figures. Our approach achieves significantly better results than methods that use pre-trained models or style transfer.
abstract_zh: 手势作为非语言交流的语言自 17 世纪以来就在理论上被确立。然而，它与视觉艺术的相关性只是零星地表达出来。这可能主要是由于传统上必须手动处理的大量数据。然而，随着数字化的稳步进展，越来越多的历史文物被编入索引并向公众开放，这就产生了自动检索具有相似身体星座或姿势的艺术历史主题的需求。由于艺术领域由于其风格差异而与现有的用于人体姿势估计的现实世界数据集显着不同，这提出了新的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种估计艺术历史图像中人体姿势的新颖方法。与之前尝试通过预训练模型或通过风格迁移弥合领域差距的工作相比，我们建议对对象和关键点检测进行半监督学习。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的特定领域艺术数据集，其中包括人体图形的边界框和关键点注释。我们的方法比使用预训练模型或风格迁移的方法取得了明显更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种半监督方法用于艺术历史图像中的人体姿态估计，以解决传统方法在艺术风格差异上的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理艺术图像的风格差异，且手工标注数据量大，需自动检索相似姿势的艺术主题。
AI.method: 采用半监督学习同时进行物体和关键点检测，并构建包含边界框和关键点标注的艺术领域特定数据集。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在艺术图像的人体姿态估计上优于预训练模型和风格迁移方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效应对艺术图像风格差异挑战，为艺术历史图像分析提供新思路及数据支持。

result: 实验结果表明，该方法在艺术图像的人体姿态估计上优于预训练模型和风格迁移方法。
conclusion: 该方法有效应对艺术图像风格差异挑战，为艺术历史图像分析提供新思路及数据支持。
search_text: Semi-supervised Human Pose Estimation in Art-historical Images 艺术历史图像中的半监督人体姿势估计 Gesture as language of non-verbal communication has been theoretically established since the 17th century. However, its relevance for the visual arts has been expressed only sporadically. This may be primarily due to the sheer overwhelming amount of data that traditionally had to be processed by hand. With the steady progress of digitization, though, a growing number of historical artifacts have been indexed and made available to the public, creating a need for automatic retrieval of art-historical motifs with similar body constellations or poses. Since the domain of art differs significantly from existing real-world data sets for human pose estimation due to its style variance, this presents new challenges. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to estimate human poses in art-historical images. In contrast to previous work that attempts to bridge the domain gap with pre-trained models or through style transfer, we suggest semi-supervised learning for both object and keypoint detection. Furthermore, we introduce a novel domain-specific art data set that includes both bounding box and keypoint annotations of human figures. Our approach achieves significantly better results than methods that use pre-trained models or style transfer. 手势作为非语言交流的语言自 17 世纪以来就在理论上被确立。然而，它与视觉艺术的相关性只是零星地表达出来。这可能主要是由于传统上必须手动处理的大量数据。然而，随着数字化的稳步进展，越来越多的历史文物被编入索引并向公众开放，这就产生了自动检索具有相似身体星座或姿势的艺术历史主题的需求。由于艺术领域由于其风格差异而与现有的用于人体姿势估计的现实世界数据集显着不同，这提出了新的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种估计艺术历史图像中人体姿势的新颖方法。与之前尝试通过预训练模型或通过风格迁移弥合领域差距的工作相比，我们建议对对象和关键点检测进行半监督学习。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的特定领域艺术数据集，其中包括人体图形的边界框和关键点注释。我们的方法比使用预训练模型或风格迁移的方法取得了明显更好的结果。 提出一种半监督方法用于艺术历史图像中的人体姿态估计，以解决传统方法在艺术风格差异上的不足。 Matthias Springstein,Stefanie Schneider,Christian Althaus,Ralph Ewerth cs.CV,cs.IR

title: Learning Invariant World State Representations with Predictive Coding
title_zh: 通过预测编码学习不变的世界状态表示
abstract: Self-supervised learning methods overcome the key bottleneck for building more capable AI: limited availability of labeled data. However, one of the drawbacks of self-supervised architectures is that the representations that they learn are implicit and it is hard to extract meaningful information about the encoded world states, such as 3D structure of the visual scene encoded in a depth map. Moreover, in the visual domain such representations only rarely undergo evaluations that may be critical for downstream tasks, such as vision for autonomous cars. Herein, we propose a framework for evaluating visual representations for illumination invariance in the context of depth perception. We develop a new predictive coding-based architecture and a hybrid fully-supervised/self-supervised learning method. We propose a novel architecture that extends the predictive coding approach: PRedictive Lateral bottom-Up and top-Down Encoder-decoder Network (PreludeNet), which explicitly learns to infer and predict depth from video frames. In PreludeNet, the encoder's stack of predictive coding layers is trained in a self-supervised manner, while the predictive decoder is trained in a supervised manner to infer or predict the depth. We evaluate the robustness of our model on a new synthetic dataset, in which lighting conditions (such as overall illumination, and effect of shadows) can be be parametrically adjusted while keeping all other aspects of the world constant. PreludeNet achieves both competitive depth inference performance and next frame prediction accuracy. We also show how this new network architecture, coupled with the hybrid fully-supervised/self-supervised learning method, achieves balance between the said performance and invariance to changes in lighting. The proposed framework for evaluating visual representations can be extended to diverse task domains and invariance tests.
summary: Self-supervised learning methods overcome the key bottleneck for building more capable AI: limited availability of labeled data. However, one of the drawbacks of self-supervised architectures is that the representations that they learn are implicit and it is hard to extract meaningful information about the encoded world states, such as 3D structure of the visual scene encoded in a depth map. Moreover, in the visual domain such representations only rarely undergo evaluations that may be critical for downstream tasks, such as vision for autonomous cars. Herein, we propose a framework for evaluating visual representations for illumination invariance in the context of depth perception. We develop a new predictive coding-based architecture and a hybrid fully-supervised/self-supervised learning method. We propose a novel architecture that extends the predictive coding approach: PRedictive Lateral bottom-Up and top-Down Encoder-decoder Network (PreludeNet), which explicitly learns to infer and predict depth from video frames. In PreludeNet, the encoder's stack of predictive coding layers is trained in a self-supervised manner, while the predictive decoder is trained in a supervised manner to infer or predict the depth. We evaluate the robustness of our model on a new synthetic dataset, in which lighting conditions (such as overall illumination, and effect of shadows) can be be parametrically adjusted while keeping all other aspects of the world constant. PreludeNet achieves both competitive depth inference performance and next frame prediction accuracy. We also show how this new network architecture, coupled with the hybrid fully-supervised/self-supervised learning method, achieves balance between the said performance and invariance to changes in lighting. The proposed framework for evaluating visual representations can be extended to diverse task domains and invariance tests.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习方法克服了构建更强大人工智能的关键瓶颈：标记数据的可用性有限。然而，自监督架构的缺点之一是它们学习的表示是隐式的，并且很难提取有关编码的世界状态的有意义的信息，例如深度图中编码的视觉场景的 3D 结构。此外，在视觉领域，此类表示很少经过可能对下游任务至关重要的评估，例如自动驾驶汽车的视觉。在这里，我们提出了一个框架，用于评估深度感知背景下照明不变性的视觉表示。我们开发了一种新的基于预测编码的架构和混合完全监督/自监督学习方法。我们提出了一种扩展预测编码方法的新颖架构：PRedictive横向自下而上和自上而下的编码器-解码器网络（PreludeNet），它显式地学习从视频帧推断和预测深度。在 PreludeNet 中，编码器的预测编码层堆栈以自监督的方式进行训练，而预测解码器以监督的方式进行训练以推断或预测深度。我们在新的合成数据集上评估模型的鲁棒性，其中可以对照明条件（例如整体照明和阴影效果）进行参数调整，同时保持世界的所有其他方面不变。 PreludeNet 实现了有竞争力的深度推理性能和下一帧预测精度。我们还展示了这种新的网络架构如何与混合全监督/自监督学习方法相结合，如何在上述性能和光照变化不变性之间实现平衡。所提出的用于评估视觉表示的框架可以扩展到不同的任务领域和不变性测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预测编码的框架PreludeNet，用于评估和学习在光照变化下保持不变的视觉表示，特别是在深度感知任务中。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习虽能减少对标注数据的依赖，但其学习的表示难以提取如深度图等有意义的环境状态信息，且缺乏对光照不变性的有效评估，影响自动驾驶等下游任务的可靠性。
AI.method: 设计PreludeNet架构，结合自监督与监督学习：编码器通过预测编码层自监督训练，解码器通过监督学习预测深度；构建可控合成数据集，参数化调整光照条件以测试模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: PreludeNet在深度推理和下一帧预测任务中表现优异，且在光照变化下保持较高不变性，验证了框架在平衡性能与鲁棒性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为评估视觉表示的不变性提供了新方法，可扩展至多任务领域，为构建鲁棒的AI系统奠定基础。

title: Branchformer: Parallel MLP-Attention Architectures to Capture Local and Global Context for Speech Recognition and Understanding
title_zh: Branchformer：并行 MLP-Attention 架构捕获本地和全局上下文以进行语音识别和理解
abstract: Conformer has proven to be effective in many speech processing tasks. It combines the benefits of extracting local dependencies using convolutions and global dependencies using self-attention. Inspired by this, we propose a more flexible, interpretable and customizable encoder alternative, Branchformer, with parallel branches for modeling various ranged dependencies in end-to-end speech processing. In each encoder layer, one branch employs self-attention or its variant to capture long-range dependencies, while the other branch utilizes an MLP module with convolutional gating (cgMLP) to extract local relationships. We conduct experiments on several speech recognition and spoken language understanding benchmarks. Results show that our model outperforms both Transformer and cgMLP. It also matches with or outperforms state-of-the-art results achieved by Conformer. Furthermore, we show various strategies to reduce computation thanks to the two-branch architecture, including the ability to have variable inference complexity in a single trained model. The weights learned for merging branches indicate how local and global dependencies are utilized in different layers, which benefits model designing.
summary: Conformer has proven to be effective in many speech processing tasks. It combines the benefits of extracting local dependencies using convolutions and global dependencies using self-attention. Inspired by this, we propose a more flexible, interpretable and customizable encoder alternative, Branchformer, with parallel branches for modeling various ranged dependencies in end-to-end speech processing. In each encoder layer, one branch employs self-attention or its variant to capture long-range dependencies, while the other branch utilizes an MLP module with convolutional gating (cgMLP) to extract local relationships. We conduct experiments on several speech recognition and spoken language understanding benchmarks. Results show that our model outperforms both Transformer and cgMLP. It also matches with or outperforms state-of-the-art results achieved by Conformer. Furthermore, we show various strategies to reduce computation thanks to the two-branch architecture, including the ability to have variable inference complexity in a single trained model. The weights learned for merging branches indicate how local and global dependencies are utilized in different layers, which benefits model designing.
abstract_zh: Conformer 已被证明在许多语音处理任务中是有效的。它结合了使用卷积提取局部依赖关系和使用自注意力提取全局依赖关系的优点。受此启发，我们提出了一种更灵活、可解释和可定制的编码器替代方案 Branchformer，它具有并行分支，用于对端到端语音处理中的各种范围依赖关系进行建模。在每个编码器层中，一个分支采用自注意力或其变体来捕获远程依赖性，而另一个分支则利用具有卷积门控 (cgMLP) 的 MLP 模块来提取局部关系。我们对几个语音识别和口语理解基准进行了实验。结果表明，我们的模型优于 Transformer 和 cgMLP。它还与 Conformer 取得的最先进结果相匹配或优于 Conformer。此外，我们还展示了通过两分支架构减少计算的各种策略，包括在单个训练模型中具有可变推理复杂性的能力。为合并分支学习的权重表明如何在不同层中利用局部和全局依赖关系，这有利于模型设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Branchformer的并行MLP-Attention架构，用于语音识别和理解任务，通过结合局部和全局上下文建模提升性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Conformer在语音处理中表现良好，但其灵活性和可解释性不足。本文旨在设计更灵活、可解释且可定制的编码器，以更高效地捕捉多尺度依赖关系。
AI.method: Branchformer采用双分支结构：每个编码层中，一个分支使用自注意力或其变体建模全局依赖，另一个分支通过卷积门控MLP（cgMLP）提取局部特征，实现并行处理。
AI.result: 实验表明，Branchformer在多个语音识别和理解基准测试中优于Transformer和cgMLP，且性能与Conformer相当或更优。此外，双分支架构支持动态调整计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: Branchformer通过分离局部与全局建模，提升了模型性能和灵活性，其分支权重分布为模型设计提供了直观指导。

result: 实验表明，Branchformer在多个语音识别和理解基准测试中优于Transformer和cgMLP，且性能与Conformer相当或更优。此外，双分支架构支持动态调整计算复杂度。
conclusion: Branchformer通过分离局部与全局建模，提升了模型性能和灵活性，其分支权重分布为模型设计提供了直观指导。
search_text: Branchformer: Parallel MLP-Attention Architectures to Capture Local and Global Context for Speech Recognition and Understanding Branchformer：并行 MLP-Attention 架构捕获本地和全局上下文以进行语音识别和理解 Conformer has proven to be effective in many speech processing tasks. It combines the benefits of extracting local dependencies using convolutions and global dependencies using self-attention. Inspired by this, we propose a more flexible, interpretable and customizable encoder alternative, Branchformer, with parallel branches for modeling various ranged dependencies in end-to-end speech processing. In each encoder layer, one branch employs self-attention or its variant to capture long-range dependencies, while the other branch utilizes an MLP module with convolutional gating (cgMLP) to extract local relationships. We conduct experiments on several speech recognition and spoken language understanding benchmarks. Results show that our model outperforms both Transformer and cgMLP. It also matches with or outperforms state-of-the-art results achieved by Conformer. Furthermore, we show various strategies to reduce computation thanks to the two-branch architecture, including the ability to have variable inference complexity in a single trained model. The weights learned for merging branches indicate how local and global dependencies are utilized in different layers, which benefits model designing. Conformer 已被证明在许多语音处理任务中是有效的。它结合了使用卷积提取局部依赖关系和使用自注意力提取全局依赖关系的优点。受此启发，我们提出了一种更灵活、可解释和可定制的编码器替代方案 Branchformer，它具有并行分支，用于对端到端语音处理中的各种范围依赖关系进行建模。在每个编码器层中，一个分支采用自注意力或其变体来捕获远程依赖性，而另一个分支则利用具有卷积门控 (cgMLP) 的 MLP 模块来提取局部关系。我们对几个语音识别和口语理解基准进行了实验。结果表明，我们的模型优于 Transformer 和 cgMLP。它还与 Conformer 取得的最先进结果相匹配或优于 Conformer。此外，我们还展示了通过两分支架构减少计算的各种策略，包括在单个训练模型中具有可变推理复杂性的能力。为合并分支学习的权重表明如何在不同层中利用局部和全局依赖关系，这有利于模型设计。 本文提出一种名为Branchformer的并行MLP-Attention架构，用于语音识别和理解任务，通过结合局部和全局上下文建模提升性能。 Yifan Peng,Siddharth Dalmia,Ian Lane,Shinji Watanabe cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuzhang Shang,Dan Xu,Ziliang Zong,Liqiang Nie,Yan Yan
title: Network Binarization via Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过对比学习进行网络二值化
abstract: Neural network binarization accelerates deep models by quantizing their weights and activations into 1-bit. However, there is still a huge performance gap between Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) and their full-precision (FP) counterparts. As the quantization error caused by weights binarization has been reduced in earlier works, the activations binarization becomes the major obstacle for further improvement of the accuracy. BNN characterises a unique and interesting structure, where the binary and latent FP activations exist in the same forward pass (i.e., $\text{Binarize}(\mathbf{a}_F) = \mathbf{a}_B$). To mitigate the information degradation caused by the binarization operation from FP to binary activations, we establish a novel contrastive learning framework while training BNNs through the lens of Mutual Information (MI) maximization. MI is introduced as the metric to measure the information shared between binary and FP activations, which assists binarization with contrastive learning. Specifically, the representation ability of the BNNs is greatly strengthened via pulling the positive pairs with binary and FP activations from the same input samples, as well as pushing negative pairs from different samples (the number of negative pairs can be exponentially large). This benefits the downstream tasks, not only classification but also segmentation and depth estimation, etc. The experimental results show that our method can be implemented as a pile-up module on existing state-of-the-art binarization methods and can remarkably improve the performance over them on CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet, in addition to the great generalization ability on NYUD-v2.
summary: Neural network binarization accelerates deep models by quantizing their weights and activations into 1-bit. However, there is still a huge performance gap between Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) and their full-precision (FP) counterparts. As the quantization error caused by weights binarization has been reduced in earlier works, the activations binarization becomes the major obstacle for further improvement of the accuracy. BNN characterises a unique and interesting structure, where the binary and latent FP activations exist in the same forward pass (i.e., $\text{Binarize}(\mathbf{a}_F) = \mathbf{a}_B$). To mitigate the information degradation caused by the binarization operation from FP to binary activations, we establish a novel contrastive learning framework while training BNNs through the lens of Mutual Information (MI) maximization. MI is introduced as the metric to measure the information shared between binary and FP activations, which assists binarization with contrastive learning. Specifically, the representation ability of the BNNs is greatly strengthened via pulling the positive pairs with binary and FP activations from the same input samples, as well as pushing negative pairs from different samples (the number of negative pairs can be exponentially large). This benefits the downstream tasks, not only classification but also segmentation and depth estimation, etc. The experimental results show that our method can be implemented as a pile-up module on existing state-of-the-art binarization methods and can remarkably improve the performance over them on CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet, in addition to the great generalization ability on NYUD-v2.
abstract_zh: 神经网络二值化通过将深度模型的权重和激活量化为 1 位来加速深度模型。然而，二元神经网络（BNN）和全精度（FP）网络之间仍然存在巨大的性能差距。由于早期工作中权值二值化引起的量化误差已经减少，激活二值化成为进一步提高精度的主要障碍。 BNN 具有独特且有趣的结构，其中二进制和潜在 FP 激活存在于同一前向传递中（即 $\text{Binarize}(\mathbf{a}_F) = \mathbf{a}_B$）。为了减轻从 FP 到二元激活的二值化操作造成的信息退化，我们建立了一种新颖的对比学习框架，同时通过互信息（MI）最大化的角度训练 BNN。 MI 被引入作为测量二值和 FP 激活之间共享信息的度量，这有助于通过对比学习进行二值化。具体来说，通过从相同输入样本中拉出具有二元和 FP 激活的正对，以及从不同样本中推送负对（负对的数量可能呈指数级增长），BNN 的表示能力得到极大增强。这有利于下游任务，不仅有利于分类，还有分割和深度估计等。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以作为现有最先进的二值化方法的堆积模块实现，并且除了在 NYUD-v2 上具有强大的泛化能力外，还可以显着提高 CIFAR-10/100 和 ImageNet 上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过对比学习框架提升二值神经网络（BNN）性能，解决激活二值化导致的信息退化问题。
AI.motivation: 二值神经网络（BNN）与全精度模型存在显著性能差距，激活二值化是主要瓶颈，现有方法未能有效缓解信息损失。
AI.method: 基于互信息最大化构建对比学习框架，通过拉近同一输入样本的二值与全精度激活表示、推远不同样本的表示，增强网络表征能力。
AI.result: 方法可堆叠于现有二值化方法，在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet等数据集上显著提升性能，并在NYUD-v2上展现良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习有效缓解激活二值化信息损失，为BNN性能提升提供新思路，具有广泛任务适用性。

authors_text: Xuyang Yan,Shabnam Nazmi,Biniam Gebru,Mohd Anwar,Abdollah Homaifar,Mrinmoy Sarkar,Kishor Datta Gupta
title: Mitigating shortage of labeled data using clustering-based active learning with diversity exploration
title_zh: 使用基于聚类的主动学习和多样性探索来缓解标记数据的短缺
comment: Accepted by the ICML 2022 Workshop on Adaptive Experimental Design and Active Learning in the Real World
comments: Accepted by the ICML 2022 Workshop on Adaptive Experimental Design and Active Learning in the Real World
abstract: In this paper, we proposed a new clustering-based active learning framework, namely Active Learning using a Clustering-based Sampling (ALCS), to address the shortage of labeled data. ALCS employs a density-based clustering approach to explore the cluster structure from the data without requiring exhaustive parameter tuning. A bi-cluster boundary-based sample query procedure is introduced to improve the learning performance for classifying highly overlapped classes. Additionally, we developed an effective diversity exploration strategy to address the redundancy among queried samples. Our experimental results justified the efficacy of the ALCS approach.
summary: In this paper, we proposed a new clustering-based active learning framework, namely Active Learning using a Clustering-based Sampling (ALCS), to address the shortage of labeled data. ALCS employs a density-based clustering approach to explore the cluster structure from the data without requiring exhaustive parameter tuning. A bi-cluster boundary-based sample query procedure is introduced to improve the learning performance for classifying highly overlapped classes. Additionally, we developed an effective diversity exploration strategy to address the redundancy among queried samples. Our experimental results justified the efficacy of the ALCS approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于聚类的主动学习框架，即使用基于聚类的采样的主动学习（ALCS），以解决标记数据的短缺问题。 ALCS 采用基于密度的聚类方法从数据中探索聚类结构，无需进行详尽的参数调整。引入基于双簇边界的样本查询过程来提高对高度重叠的类进行分类的学习性能。此外，我们开发了一种有效的多样性探索策略来解决查询样本之间的冗余问题。我们的实验结果证明了 ALCS 方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聚类的主动学习框架ALCS，用于缓解标签数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 标签数据不足是机器学习中的关键挑战，传统主动学习方法需大量参数调优且难以处理高度重叠类别，亟需更高效的数据选择策略。
AI.method: ALCS采用密度聚类挖掘数据簇结构，通过双聚类边界样本查询策略提升重叠类别分类性能，并引入多样性探索策略降低样本冗余。
AI.result: 实验验证了ALCS在分类任务中的有效性，尤其在标签数据稀缺场景下表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ALCS通过聚类结构分析和多样性控制，有效缓解了标签数据不足问题，为复杂类别划分提供了新思路。

title: The Weaknesses of Adversarial Camouflage in Overhead Imagery
title_zh: 俯视图像中对抗性伪装的弱点
abstract: Machine learning is increasingly critical for analysis of the ever-growing corpora of overhead imagery. Advanced computer vision object detection techniques have demonstrated great success in identifying objects of interest such as ships, automobiles, and aircraft from satellite and drone imagery. Yet relying on computer vision opens up significant vulnerabilities, namely, the susceptibility of object detection algorithms to adversarial attacks. In this paper we explore the efficacy and drawbacks of adversarial camouflage in an overhead imagery context. While a number of recent papers have demonstrated the ability to reliably fool deep learning classifiers and object detectors with adversarial patches, most of this work has been performed on relatively uniform datasets and only a single class of objects. In this work we utilize the VisDrone dataset, which has a large range of perspectives and object sizes. We explore four different object classes: bus, car, truck, van. We build a library of 24 adversarial patches to disguise these objects, and introduce a patch translucency variable to our patches. The translucency (or alpha value) of the patches is highly correlated to their efficacy. Further, we show that while adversarial patches may fool object detectors, the presence of such patches is often easily uncovered, with patches on average 24% more detectable than the objects the patches were meant to hide. This raises the question of whether such patches truly constitute camouflage. Source code is available at https://github.com/IQTLabs/camolo.

Further, we show that while adversarial patches may fool object detectors, the presence of such patches is often easily uncovered, with patches on average 24% more detectable than the objects the patches were meant to hide. This raises the question of whether such patches truly constitute camouflage. Source code is available at https://github.com/IQTLabs/camolo.
abstract_zh: 机器学习对于分析不断增长的俯视图像语料库变得越来越重要。先进的计算机视觉对象检测技术在从卫星和无人机图像中识别感兴趣的对象（例如船舶、汽车和飞机）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，依赖计算机视觉会带来重大漏洞，即对象检测算法容易受到对抗性攻击。在本文中，我们探讨了俯视图像环境中对抗性伪装的功效和缺点。虽然最近的许多论文已经证明了利用对抗性补丁可靠地欺骗深度学习分类器和对象检测器的能力，但大部分工作都是在相对统一的数据集和单一类别的对象上进行的。在这项工作中，我们利用 VisDrone 数据集，该数据集具有大范围的视角和对象大小。我们探索四种不同的对象类别：公共汽车、汽车、卡车、货车。我们构建了一个包含 24 个对抗性补丁的库来伪装这些对象，并为我们的补丁引入了补丁半透明变量。贴片的半透明度（或阿尔法值）与其功效高度相关。此外，我们还表明，虽然对抗性补丁可能会欺骗物体检测器，但此类补丁的存在通常很容易被发现，补丁的可检测性平均比补丁要隐藏的物体高 24%。这就提出了这样的问题：这些补丁是否真的构成伪装。源代码可在 https://github.com/IQTLabs/camolo 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在航拍图像中对抗性伪装的有效性及其局限性，通过实验发现对抗性补丁虽能欺骗目标检测器，但自身易被检测。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习在航拍图像分析中的广泛应用，对抗性攻击可能成为关键漏洞。现有研究多基于单一类别和均匀数据集，缺乏对复杂场景的验证。
AI.method: 使用VisDrone数据集（含多视角和尺寸的4类目标：巴士、汽车、卡车、货车），构建24种对抗补丁并引入透明度参数，测试其伪装效果。
AI.result: 对抗补丁平均比目标本身高出24%的可检测性，表明其伪装效果有限，且容易被检测到。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性伪装在航拍场景中难以实现真正隐蔽，因其补丁本身易被识别，需重新评估其作为伪装手段的有效性。

search_text: The Weaknesses of Adversarial Camouflage in Overhead Imagery 俯视图像中对抗性伪装的弱点 Machine learning is increasingly critical for analysis of the ever-growing corpora of overhead imagery. Advanced computer vision object detection techniques have demonstrated great success in identifying objects of interest such as ships, automobiles, and aircraft from satellite and drone imagery. Yet relying on computer vision opens up significant vulnerabilities, namely, the susceptibility of object detection algorithms to adversarial attacks. In this paper we explore the efficacy and drawbacks of adversarial camouflage in an overhead imagery context. While a number of recent papers have demonstrated the ability to reliably fool deep learning classifiers and object detectors with adversarial patches, most of this work has been performed on relatively uniform datasets and only a single class of objects. In this work we utilize the VisDrone dataset, which has a large range of perspectives and object sizes. We explore four different object classes: bus, car, truck, van. We build a library of 24 adversarial patches to disguise these objects, and introduce a patch translucency variable to our patches. The translucency (or alpha value) of the patches is highly correlated to their efficacy. Further, we show that while adversarial patches may fool object detectors, the presence of such patches is often easily uncovered, with patches on average 24% more detectable than the objects the patches were meant to hide. This raises the question of whether such patches truly constitute camouflage. Source code is available at https://github.com/IQTLabs/camolo. 机器学习对于分析不断增长的俯视图像语料库变得越来越重要。先进的计算机视觉对象检测技术在从卫星和无人机图像中识别感兴趣的对象（例如船舶、汽车和飞机）方面取得了巨大成功。然而，依赖计算机视觉会带来重大漏洞，即对象检测算法容易受到对抗性攻击。在本文中，我们探讨了俯视图像环境中对抗性伪装的功效和缺点。虽然最近的许多论文已经证明了利用对抗性补丁可靠地欺骗深度学习分类器和对象检测器的能力，但大部分工作都是在相对统一的数据集和单一类别的对象上进行的。在这项工作中，我们利用 VisDrone 数据集，该数据集具有大范围的视角和对象大小。我们探索四种不同的对象类别：公共汽车、汽车、卡车、货车。我们构建了一个包含 24 个对抗性补丁的库来伪装这些对象，并为我们的补丁引入了补丁半透明变量。贴片的半透明度（或阿尔法值）与其功效高度相关。此外，我们还表明，虽然对抗性补丁可能会欺骗物体检测器，但此类补丁的存在通常很容易被发现，补丁的可检测性平均比补丁要隐藏的物体高 24%。这就提出了这样的问题：这些补丁是否真的构成伪装。源代码可在 https://github.com/IQTLabs/camolo 获取。 本文研究了在航拍图像中对抗性伪装的有效性及其局限性，通过实验发现对抗性补丁虽能欺骗目标检测器，但自身易被检测。 Adam Van Etten cs.CV

title: Quantum compression with classically simulatable circuits
title_zh: 使用经典可模拟电路的量子压缩
abstract: As we continue to find applications where the currently available noisy devices exhibit an advantage over their classical counterparts, the efficient use of quantum resources is highly desirable. The notion of quantum autoencoders was proposed as a way for the compression of quantum information to reduce resource requirements. Here, we present a strategy to design quantum autoencoders using evolutionary algorithms for transforming quantum information into lower-dimensional representations. We successfully demonstrate the initial applications of the algorithm for compressing different families of quantum states. In particular, we point out that using a restricted gate set in the algorithm allows for efficient simulation of the generated circuits. This approach opens the possibility of using classical logic to find low representations of quantum data, using fewer computational resources.
summary: As we continue to find applications where the currently available noisy devices exhibit an advantage over their classical counterparts, the efficient use of quantum resources is highly desirable. The notion of quantum autoencoders was proposed as a way for the compression of quantum information to reduce resource requirements. Here, we present a strategy to design quantum autoencoders using evolutionary algorithms for transforming quantum information into lower-dimensional representations. We successfully demonstrate the initial applications of the algorithm for compressing different families of quantum states. In particular, we point out that using a restricted gate set in the algorithm allows for efficient simulation of the generated circuits. This approach opens the possibility of using classical logic to find low representations of quantum data, using fewer computational resources.
abstract_zh: 随着我们不断发现当前可用的噪声设备比传统设备表现出优势的应用，量子资源的有效利用是非常可取的。提出量子自动编码器的概念作为压缩量子信息以减少资源需求的一种方法。在这里，我们提出了一种使用进化算法设计量子自动编码器的策略，将量子信息转换为低维表示。我们成功地演示了压缩不同量子态族的算法的初步应用。特别是，我们指出，在算法中使用受限门集可以有效地模拟生成的电路。这种方法开启了使用经典逻辑、使用更少的计算资源来找到量子数据的低表示的可能性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种使用经典可模拟电路设计量子自编码器的方法，以压缩量子信息并减少资源需求。
AI.motivation: 当前量子设备在某些任务上优于经典设备，但需高效利用量子资源，量子自编码器可压缩信息以减少资源消耗。
AI.method: 采用进化算法设计量子自编码器，结合受限门集实现电路的经典高效模拟。
AI.result: 成功应用于多种量子态压缩，证明了经典模拟下有效压缩量子数据的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为利用经典计算资源高效压缩量子信息提供了可行方案，促进量子资源优化利用。

authors_text: Ninad Khargonkar,Neil Song,Zesheng Xu,Balakrishnan Prabhakaran,Yu Xiang
title: NeuralGrasps: Learning Implicit Representations for Grasps of Multiple Robotic Hands
title_zh: NeuralGrasps：学习多个机器人手抓取的隐式表示
abstract: We introduce a neural implicit representation for grasps of objects from multiple robotic hands. Different grasps across multiple robotic hands are encoded into a shared latent space. Each latent vector is learned to decode to the 3D shape of an object and the 3D shape of a robotic hand in a grasping pose in terms of the signed distance functions of the two 3D shapes. In addition, the distance metric in the latent space is learned to preserve the similarity between grasps across different robotic hands, where the similarity of grasps is defined according to contact regions of the robotic hands. This property enables our method to transfer grasps between different grippers including a human hand, and grasp transfer has the potential to share grasping skills between robots and enable robots to learn grasping skills from humans. Furthermore, the encoded signed distance functions of objects and grasps in our implicit representation can be used for 6D object pose estimation with grasping contact optimization from partial point clouds, which enables robotic grasping in the real world.
summary: We introduce a neural implicit representation for grasps of objects from multiple robotic hands. Different grasps across multiple robotic hands are encoded into a shared latent space. Each latent vector is learned to decode to the 3D shape of an object and the 3D shape of a robotic hand in a grasping pose in terms of the signed distance functions of the two 3D shapes. In addition, the distance metric in the latent space is learned to preserve the similarity between grasps across different robotic hands, where the similarity of grasps is defined according to contact regions of the robotic hands. This property enables our method to transfer grasps between different grippers including a human hand, and grasp transfer has the potential to share grasping skills between robots and enable robots to learn grasping skills from humans. Furthermore, the encoded signed distance functions of objects and grasps in our implicit representation can be used for 6D object pose estimation with grasping contact optimization from partial point clouds, which enables robotic grasping in the real world.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种神经隐式表示，用于从多个机器人手抓取物体。多个机器人手的不同抓握被编码到共享的潜在空间中。每个潜在向量被学习以根据两个 3D 形状的有符号距离函数解码为物体的 3D 形状和处于抓取姿势的机器人手的 3D 形状。此外，学习潜在空间中的距离度量以保留不同机器人手的抓握之间的相似性，其中抓握的相似性是根据机器人手的接触区域定义的。这一特性使我们的方法能够在包括人手在内的不同抓手之间转移抓握，并且抓握转移有可能在机器人之间共享抓握技能，并使机器人能够向人类学习抓握技能。此外，隐式表示中对象和抓取的编码符号距离函数可用于 6D 对象姿态估计，并通过部分点云进行抓取接触优化，从而实现现实世界中的机器人抓取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种神经隐式表示方法，将多机械手的抓取编码到共享潜在空间，实现跨机械手的抓取迁移和6D位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以迁移不同机械手间的抓取技能，且缺乏统一的跨形态抓取表示，限制了机器人学习人类抓取技能和跨平台协作能力。
AI.method: 构建共享潜在空间编码器，将物体与机械手抓取姿态同时表示为符号距离函数；通过接触区域相似性约束学习潜在空间度量，支持跨机械手抓取迁移，并基于隐式表示实现点云中的6D位姿估计。
AI.result: 实现机械手与人手间的抓取迁移，验证了跨形态技能共享有效性；在真实点云数据上成功完成物体位姿估计与抓取规划。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人跨平台抓取技能迁移和现实场景抓取提供了统一的隐式表示框架，推动了人机协作与多机器人系统的发展。

motivation: 现有方法难以迁移不同机械手间的抓取技能，且缺乏统一的跨形态抓取表示，限制了机器人学习人类抓取技能和跨平台协作能力。
method: 构建共享潜在空间编码器，将物体与机械手抓取姿态同时表示为符号距离函数；通过接触区域相似性约束学习潜在空间度量，支持跨机械手抓取迁移，并基于隐式表示实现点云中的6D位姿估计。
result: 实现机械手与人手间的抓取迁移，验证了跨形态技能共享有效性；在真实点云数据上成功完成物体位姿估计与抓取规划。
conclusion: 该方法为机器人跨平台抓取技能迁移和现实场景抓取提供了统一的隐式表示框架，推动了人机协作与多机器人系统的发展。
search_text: NeuralGrasps: Learning Implicit Representations for Grasps of Multiple Robotic Hands NeuralGrasps：学习多个机器人手抓取的隐式表示 We introduce a neural implicit representation for grasps of objects from multiple robotic hands. Different grasps across multiple robotic hands are encoded into a shared latent space. Each latent vector is learned to decode to the 3D shape of an object and the 3D shape of a robotic hand in a grasping pose in terms of the signed distance functions of the two 3D shapes. In addition, the distance metric in the latent space is learned to preserve the similarity between grasps across different robotic hands, where the similarity of grasps is defined according to contact regions of the robotic hands. This property enables our method to transfer grasps between different grippers including a human hand, and grasp transfer has the potential to share grasping skills between robots and enable robots to learn grasping skills from humans. Furthermore, the encoded signed distance functions of objects and grasps in our implicit representation can be used for 6D object pose estimation with grasping contact optimization from partial point clouds, which enables robotic grasping in the real world. 我们引入了一种神经隐式表示，用于从多个机器人手抓取物体。多个机器人手的不同抓握被编码到共享的潜在空间中。每个潜在向量被学习以根据两个 3D 形状的有符号距离函数解码为物体的 3D 形状和处于抓取姿势的机器人手的 3D 形状。此外，学习潜在空间中的距离度量以保留不同机器人手的抓握之间的相似性，其中抓握的相似性是根据机器人手的接触区域定义的。这一特性使我们的方法能够在包括人手在内的不同抓手之间转移抓握，并且抓握转移有可能在机器人之间共享抓握技能，并使机器人能够向人类学习抓握技能。此外，隐式表示中对象和抓取的编码符号距离函数可用于 6D 对象姿态估计，并通过部分点云进行抓取接触优化，从而实现现实世界中的机器人抓取。 提出一种神经隐式表示方法，将多机械手的抓取编码到共享潜在空间，实现跨机械手的抓取迁移和6D位姿估计。 Ninad Khargonkar,Neil Song,Zesheng Xu,Balakrishnan Prabhakaran,Yu Xiang cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: SphereVLAD++: Attention-based and Signal-enhanced Viewpoint Invariant Descriptor
title_zh: SphereVLAD++：基于注意力和信号增强的视点不变描述符
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: LiDAR-based localization approach is a fundamental module for large-scale navigation tasks, such as last-mile delivery and autonomous driving, and localization robustness highly relies on viewpoints and 3D feature extraction. Our previous work provides a viewpoint-invariant descriptor to deal with viewpoint differences; however, the global descriptor suffers from a low signal-noise ratio in unsupervised clustering, reducing the distinguishable feature extraction ability. We develop SphereVLAD++, an attention-enhanced viewpoint invariant place recognition method in this work. SphereVLAD++ projects the point cloud on the spherical perspective for each unique area and captures the contextual connections between local features and their dependencies with global 3D geometry distribution. In return, clustered elements within the global descriptor are conditioned on local and global geometries and support the original viewpoint-invariant property of SphereVLAD. In the experiments, we evaluated the localization performance of SphereVLAD++ on both public KITTI360 datasets and self-generated datasets from the city of Pittsburgh. The experiment results show that SphereVLAD++ outperforms all relative state-of-the-art 3D place recognition methods under small or even totally reversed viewpoint differences and shows 0.69% and 15.81% successful retrieval rates with better than the second best. Low computation requirements and high time efficiency also help its application for low-cost robots.
summary: LiDAR-based localization approach is a fundamental module for large-scale navigation tasks, such as last-mile delivery and autonomous driving, and localization robustness highly relies on viewpoints and 3D feature extraction. Our previous work provides a viewpoint-invariant descriptor to deal with viewpoint differences; however, the global descriptor suffers from a low signal-noise ratio in unsupervised clustering, reducing the distinguishable feature extraction ability. We develop SphereVLAD++, an attention-enhanced viewpoint invariant place recognition method in this work. SphereVLAD++ projects the point cloud on the spherical perspective for each unique area and captures the contextual connections between local features and their dependencies with global 3D geometry distribution. In return, clustered elements within the global descriptor are conditioned on local and global geometries and support the original viewpoint-invariant property of SphereVLAD. In the experiments, we evaluated the localization performance of SphereVLAD++ on both public KITTI360 datasets and self-generated datasets from the city of Pittsburgh. The experiment results show that SphereVLAD++ outperforms all relative state-of-the-art 3D place recognition methods under small or even totally reversed viewpoint differences and shows 0.69% and 15.81% successful retrieval rates with better than the second best. Low computation requirements and high time efficiency also help its application for low-cost robots.
abstract_zh: 基于 LiDAR 的定位方法是最后一英里配送和自动驾驶等大规模导航任务的基本模块，定位的鲁棒性高度依赖于视点和 3D 特征提取。我们之前的工作提供了一个视点不变描述符来处理视点差异；然而，全局描述符在无监督聚类中信噪比较低，降低了可区分特征提取能力。在这项工作中，我们开发了 SphereVLAD++，一种注意力增强的视点不变位置识别方法。 SphereVLAD++ 在每个独特区域的球形视角上投影点云，并捕获局部特征及其与全局 3D 几何分布的依赖关系之间的上下文连接。作为回报，全局描述符中的集群元素以局部和全局几何形状为条件，并支持 SphereVLAD 的原始视点不变属性。在实验中，我们评估了 SphereVLAD++ 在公共 KITTI360 数据集和匹兹堡市自行生成的数据集上的定位性能。实验结果表明，SphereVLAD++ 在较小甚至完全相反的视点差异下优于所有相对最先进的 3D 地点识别方法，并显示出 0.69% 和 15.81% 的成功检索率，优于第二个最佳方法。低计算要求和高时间效率也有助于其在低成本机器人中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SphereVLAD++，一种基于注意力机制和信号增强的视角不变三维地点识别方法，用于提升LiDAR导航中的定位鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视角不变描述符在无监督聚类中存在信噪比低的问题，导致特征区分能力下降，需改进视角差异下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过球面投影处理点云数据，结合注意力机制捕捉局部特征与全局几何分布的依赖关系，并基于局部与全局几何条件化聚类元素。
AI.result: 在KITTI360和匹兹堡自建数据集上，SphereVLAD++在小视角及完全相反视角下均优于现有方法，成功检索率分别为0.69%和15.81%，且计算量低、效率高。
AI.conclusion: SphereVLAD++通过注意力增强与信号优化有效提升了视角不变性，适用于低成本机器人应用，为大规模导航任务提供更鲁棒的定位方案。

title: Context-aware Self-supervised Learning for Medical Images Using Graph Neural Network
title_zh: 使用图神经网络进行医学图像的上下文感知自监督学习
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS workshop 2020. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.06457
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS workshop 2020. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.06457
abstract: Although self-supervised learning enables us to bootstrap the training by exploiting unlabeled data, the generic self-supervised methods for natural images do not sufficiently incorporate the context. For medical images, a desirable method should be sensitive enough to detect deviation from normal-appearing tissue of each anatomical region; here, anatomy is the context. We introduce a novel approach with two levels of self-supervised representation learning objectives: one on the regional anatomical level and another on the patient-level. We use graph neural networks to incorporate the relationship between different anatomical regions. The structure of the graph is informed by anatomical correspondences between each patient and an anatomical atlas. In addition, the graph representation has the advantage of handling any arbitrarily sized image in full resolution. Experiments on large-scale Computer Tomography (CT) datasets of lung images show that our approach compares favorably to baseline methods that do not account for the context. We use the learned embedding for staging lung tissue abnormalities related to COVID-19.
summary: Although self-supervised learning enables us to bootstrap the training by exploiting unlabeled data, the generic self-supervised methods for natural images do not sufficiently incorporate the context. For medical images, a desirable method should be sensitive enough to detect deviation from normal-appearing tissue of each anatomical region; here, anatomy is the context. We introduce a novel approach with two levels of self-supervised representation learning objectives: one on the regional anatomical level and another on the patient-level. We use graph neural networks to incorporate the relationship between different anatomical regions. The structure of the graph is informed by anatomical correspondences between each patient and an anatomical atlas. In addition, the graph representation has the advantage of handling any arbitrarily sized image in full resolution. Experiments on large-scale Computer Tomography (CT) datasets of lung images show that our approach compares favorably to baseline methods that do not account for the context. We use the learned embedding for staging lung tissue abnormalities related to COVID-19.
abstract_zh: 尽管自监督学习使我们能够通过利用未标记的数据来引导训练，但自然图像的通用自监督方法并不能充分结合上下文。对于医学图像，理想的方法应该足够灵敏，能够检测每个解剖区域与正常组织的偏差；在这里，解剖学就是背景。我们引入了一种新颖的方法，具有两个层面的自我监督表征学习目标：一个在区域解剖层面，另一个在患者层面。我们使用图神经网络来整合不同解剖区域之间的关系。该图的结构由每个患者和解剖图谱之间的解剖对应关系决定。此外，图形表示的优点是可以以全分辨率处理任意大小的图像。对肺部图像的大规模计算机断层扫描 (CT) 数据集的实验表明，我们的方法优于不考虑上下文的​​基线方法。我们使用学习到的嵌入来对与 COVID-19 相关的肺组织异常进行分期。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的上下文感知自监督学习方法，用于医学图像分析，特别针对肺部CT图像的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在医学图像中未能充分结合解剖结构上下文，而医学图像分析需敏感检测各解剖区域的异常。
AI.method: 设计两阶段自监督学习目标（区域解剖级和患者级），利用图神经网络建模解剖区域关系，图结构由患者与解剖图谱的对应关系生成。
AI.result: 在大规模CT数据集实验中，该方法优于不考虑上下文的基线方法，并成功应用于COVID-19相关肺组织异常分期。
AI.conclusion: 结合解剖上下文与图神经网络的自监督学习方法能有效提升医学图像分析性能，尤其适用于需要区域敏感性的任务。

In addition, the graph representation has the advantage of handling any arbitrarily sized image in full resolution. Experiments on large-scale Computer Tomography (CT) datasets of lung images show that our approach compares favorably to baseline methods that do not account for the context. We use the learned embedding for staging lung tissue abnormalities related to COVID-19. 尽管自监督学习使我们能够通过利用未标记的数据来引导训练，但自然图像的通用自监督方法并不能充分结合上下文。对于医学图像，理想的方法应该足够灵敏，能够检测每个解剖区域与正常组织的偏差；在这里，解剖学就是背景。我们引入了一种新颖的方法，具有两个层面的自我监督表征学习目标：一个在区域解剖层面，另一个在患者层面。我们使用图神经网络来整合不同解剖区域之间的关系。该图的结构由每个患者和解剖图谱之间的解剖对应关系决定。此外，图形表示的优点是可以以全分辨率处理任意大小的图像。对肺部图像的大规模计算机断层扫描 (CT) 数据集的实验表明，我们的方法优于不考虑上下文的​​基线方法。我们使用学习到的嵌入来对与 COVID-19 相关的肺组织异常进行分期。 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的上下文感知自监督学习方法，用于医学图像分析，特别针对肺部CT图像的异常检测。 Li Sun,Ke Yu,Kayhan Batmanghelich eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Esteve Almirall,Davide Callegaro,Peter Bruins,Mar Santamaría,Pablo Martínez,Ulises Cortés
title: The use of Synthetic Data to solve the scalability and data availability problems in Smart City Digital Twins
title_zh: 使用合成数据解决智慧城市数字孪生的可扩展性和数据可用性问题
abstract: The A.I. disruption and the need to compete on innovation are impacting cities that have an increasing necessity to become innovation hotspots. However, without proven solutions, experimentation, often unsuccessful, is needed. But experimentation in cities has many undesirable effects not only for its citizens but also reputational if unsuccessful. Digital Twins, so popular in other areas, seem like a promising way to expand experimentation proposals but in simulated environments, translating only the half-baked ones, the ones with higher probability of success, to real environments and therefore minimizing risks. However, Digital Twins are data intensive and need highly localized data, making them difficult to scale, particularly to small cities, and with the high cost associated to data collection. We present an alternative based on synthetic data that given some conditions, quite common in Smart Cities, can solve these two problems together with a proof-of-concept based on NO2 pollution.
summary: The A.I. disruption and the need to compete on innovation are impacting cities that have an increasing necessity to become innovation hotspots. However, without proven solutions, experimentation, often unsuccessful, is needed. But experimentation in cities has many undesirable effects not only for its citizens but also reputational if unsuccessful. Digital Twins, so popular in other areas, seem like a promising way to expand experimentation proposals but in simulated environments, translating only the half-baked ones, the ones with higher probability of success, to real environments and therefore minimizing risks. However, Digital Twins are data intensive and need highly localized data, making them difficult to scale, particularly to small cities, and with the high cost associated to data collection. We present an alternative based on synthetic data that given some conditions, quite common in Smart Cities, can solve these two problems together with a proof-of-concept based on NO2 pollution.
abstract_zh: 人工智能颠覆和创新竞争的需要正在影响着越来越有必要成为创新热点的城市。然而，如果没有经过验证的解决方案，就需要进行往往不成功的实验。但城市中的实验如果不成功，不仅会给市民带来许多不良影响，还会损害声誉。数字孪生在其他领域如此受欢迎，似乎是扩展实验建议的一种有前途的方法，但在模拟环境中，仅将不成熟的实验（成功概率较高的实验）转化为真实环境，从而最大限度地降低风险。然而，数字孪生是数据密集型的，需要高度本地化的数据，这使得它们难以扩展，特别是对于小城市，并且数据收集的成本很高。我们提出了一种基于合成数据的替代方案，在智能城市中很常见的某些条件下，可以与基于二氧化氮污染的概念验证一起解决这两个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用合成数据解决智能城市数字孪生中的可扩展性和数据可用性问题，并通过NO2污染的案例验证其可行性。
AI.motivation: 城市需通过创新提升竞争力，但实验风险高且数据收集成本高，数字孪生技术因依赖本地数据难以扩展，尤其是对小城市。
AI.method: 通过生成满足特定条件的合成数据，替代真实数据，降低数据收集成本，并利用NO2污染案例进行概念验证。
AI.result: 合成数据有效解决了数字孪生的扩展性和数据获取难题，并在NO2污染案例中验证了其可行性。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据能有效应对智能城市数字孪生的扩展性和数据可用性问题，为资源有限的城市提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yijie Zhang,Luzhe Huang,Tairan Liu,Keyi Cheng,Kevin de Haan,Yuzhu Li,Bijie Bai,Aydogan Ozcan
title: Virtual staining of defocused autofluorescence images of unlabeled tissue using deep neural networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络对未标记组织的散焦自发荧光图像进行虚拟染色
abstract: Deep learning-based virtual staining was developed to introduce image contrast to label-free tissue sections, digitally matching the histological staining, which is time-consuming, labor-intensive, and destructive to tissue. Standard virtual staining requires high autofocusing precision during the whole slide imaging of label-free tissue, which consumes a significant portion of the total imaging time and can lead to tissue photodamage. Here, we introduce a fast virtual staining framework that can stain defocused autofluorescence images of unlabeled tissue, achieving equivalent performance to virtual staining of in-focus label-free images, also saving significant imaging time by lowering the microscope's autofocusing precision. This framework incorporates a virtual-autofocusing neural network to digitally refocus the defocused images and then transforms the refocused images into virtually stained images using a successive network. These cascaded networks form a collaborative inference scheme: the virtual staining model regularizes the virtual-autofocusing network through a style loss during the training. To demonstrate the efficacy of this framework, we trained and blindly tested these networks using human lung tissue. Using 4x fewer focus points with 2x lower focusing precision, we successfully transformed the coarsely-focused autofluorescence images into high-quality virtually stained H&E images, matching the standard virtual staining framework that used finely-focused autofluorescence input images. Without sacrificing the staining quality, this framework decreases the total image acquisition time needed for virtual staining of a label-free whole-slide image (WSI) by ~32%, together with a ~89% decrease in the autofocusing time, and has the potential to eliminate the laborious and costly histochemical staining process in pathology.
summary: Deep learning-based virtual staining was developed to introduce image contrast to label-free tissue sections, digitally matching the histological staining, which is time-consuming, labor-intensive, and destructive to tissue. Standard virtual staining requires high autofocusing precision during the whole slide imaging of label-free tissue, which consumes a significant portion of the total imaging time and can lead to tissue photodamage. Here, we introduce a fast virtual staining framework that can stain defocused autofluorescence images of unlabeled tissue, achieving equivalent performance to virtual staining of in-focus label-free images, also saving significant imaging time by lowering the microscope's autofocusing precision. This framework incorporates a virtual-autofocusing neural network to digitally refocus the defocused images and then transforms the refocused images into virtually stained images using a successive network. These cascaded networks form a collaborative inference scheme: the virtual staining model regularizes the virtual-autofocusing network through a style loss during the training. To demonstrate the efficacy of this framework, we trained and blindly tested these networks using human lung tissue. Using 4x fewer focus points with 2x lower focusing precision, we successfully transformed the coarsely-focused autofluorescence images into high-quality virtually stained H&E images, matching the standard virtual staining framework that used finely-focused autofluorescence input images. Without sacrificing the staining quality, this framework decreases the total image acquisition time needed for virtual staining of a label-free whole-slide image (WSI) by ~32%, together with a ~89% decrease in the autofocusing time, and has the potential to eliminate the laborious and costly histochemical staining process in pathology.
abstract_zh: 开发基于深度学习的虚拟染色是为了将图像对比度引入无标记的组织切片，以数字方式匹配组织学染色，这是耗时、费力且对组织有破坏性的。标准虚拟染色在无标记组织的整个载玻片成像过程中需要很高的自动对焦精度，这会消耗整个成像时间的很大一部分，并可能导致组织光损伤。在这里，我们引入了一种快速虚拟染色框架，可以对未标记组织的散焦自发荧光图像进行染色，实现与聚焦无标记图像虚拟染色相同的性能，还通过降低显微镜的自动对焦精度来节省大量成像时间。该框架结合了虚拟自动聚焦神经网络，以数字方式重新聚焦散焦图像，然后使用连续网络将重新聚焦图像转换为虚拟染色图像。这些级联网络形成了协作推理方案：虚拟染色模型通过训练期间的风格损失来规范虚拟自动对焦网络。为了证明该框架的有效性，我们使用人体肺组织来训练和盲目测试这些网络。使用减少 4 倍的焦点和降低 2 倍的聚焦精度，我们成功地将粗略聚焦的自发荧光图像转换为高质量的虚拟染色 H&E 图像，与使用精细聚焦的自发荧光输入图像的标准虚拟染色框架相匹配。在不牺牲染色质量的情况下，该框架将无标记全玻片图像 (WSI) 虚拟染色所需的总图像采集时间减少了约 32%，自动对焦时间减少了约 89%，并且有可能消除病理学中费力且昂贵的组织化学染色过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的快速虚拟染色框架，用于对未标记组织的失焦自发荧光图像进行染色，无需高精度对焦即可实现与传统虚拟染色相当的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统虚拟染色需要高精度对焦，耗时且可能损伤组织。本文旨在通过降低对焦精度和减少对焦点数量，提升成像效率并减少组织损伤。
AI.method: 框架包含两个级联网络：虚拟对焦网络用于数字复焦，随后通过连续网络将复焦图像转换为虚拟染色图像。训练过程中通过风格损失正则化虚拟对焦网络。
AI.result: 在人类肺组织测试中，使用4倍更少的对焦点和2倍更低的对焦精度，成功生成高质量虚拟H&E染色图像，总成像时间减少32%，对焦时间减少89%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保证染色质量的同时显著提升效率，有望替代传统耗时且昂贵的组织化学染色流程。
