Without sacrificing the staining quality, this framework decreases the total image acquisition time needed for virtual staining of a label-free whole-slide image (WSI) by ~32%, together with a ~89% decrease in the autofocusing time, and has the potential to eliminate the laborious and costly histochemical staining process in pathology. 开发基于深度学习的虚拟染色是为了将图像对比度引入无标记的组织切片，以数字方式匹配组织学染色，这是耗时、费力且对组织有破坏性的。标准虚拟染色在无标记组织的整个载玻片成像过程中需要很高的自动对焦精度，这会消耗整个成像时间的很大一部分，并可能导致组织光损伤。在这里，我们引入了一种快速虚拟染色框架，可以对未标记组织的散焦自发荧光图像进行染色，实现与聚焦无标记图像虚拟染色相同的性能，还通过降低显微镜的自动对焦精度来节省大量成像时间。该框架结合了虚拟自动聚焦神经网络，以数字方式重新聚焦散焦图像，然后使用连续网络将重新聚焦图像转换为虚拟染色图像。这些级联网络形成了协作推理方案：虚拟染色模型通过训练期间的风格损失来规范虚拟自动对焦网络。为了证明该框架的有效性，我们使用人体肺组织来训练和盲目测试这些网络。使用减少 4 倍的焦点和降低 2 倍的聚焦精度，我们成功地将粗略聚焦的自发荧光图像转换为高质量的虚拟染色 H&E 图像，与使用精细聚焦的自发荧光输入图像的标准虚拟染色框架相匹配。在不牺牲染色质量的情况下，该框架将无标记全玻片图像 (WSI) 虚拟染色所需的总图像采集时间减少了约 32%，自动对焦时间减少了约 89%，并且有可能消除病理学中费力且昂贵的组织化学染色过程。 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的快速虚拟染色框架，用于对未标记组织的失焦自发荧光图像进行染色，无需高精度对焦即可实现与传统虚拟染色相当的效果。 Yijie Zhang,Luzhe Huang,Tairan Liu,Keyi Cheng,Kevin de Haan,Yuzhu Li,Bijie Bai,Aydogan Ozcan eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Matthew Groh,Caleb Harris,Roxana Daneshjou,Omar Badri,Arash Koochek
title: Towards Transparency in Dermatology Image Datasets with Skin Tone Annotations by Experts, Crowds, and an Algorithm
title_zh: 通过专家、群体和算法实现具有肤色注释的皮肤科图像数据集的透明度
abstract: While artificial intelligence (AI) holds promise for supporting healthcare providers and improving the accuracy of medical diagnoses, a lack of transparency in the composition of datasets exposes AI models to the possibility of unintentional and avoidable mistakes. In particular, public and private image datasets of dermatological conditions rarely include information on skin color. As a start towards increasing transparency, AI researchers have appropriated the use of the Fitzpatrick skin type (FST) from a measure of patient photosensitivity to a measure for estimating skin tone in algorithmic audits of computer vision applications including facial recognition and dermatology diagnosis. In order to understand the variability of estimated FST annotations on images, we compare several FST annotation methods on a diverse set of 460 images of skin conditions from both textbooks and online dermatology atlases. We find the inter-rater reliability between three board-certified dermatologists is comparable to the inter-rater reliability between the board-certified dermatologists and two crowdsourcing methods. In contrast, we find that the Individual Typology Angle converted to FST (ITA-FST) method produces annotations that are significantly less correlated with the experts' annotations than the experts' annotations are correlated with each other. These results demonstrate that algorithms based on ITA-FST are not reliable for annotating large-scale image datasets, but human-centered, crowd-based protocols can reliably add skin type transparency to dermatology datasets. Furthermore, we introduce the concept of dynamic consensus protocols with tunable parameters including expert review that increase the visibility of crowdwork and provide guidance for future crowdsourced annotations of large image datasets.
summary: While artificial intelligence (AI) holds promise for supporting healthcare providers and improving the accuracy of medical diagnoses, a lack of transparency in the composition of datasets exposes AI models to the possibility of unintentional and avoidable mistakes. In particular, public and private image datasets of dermatological conditions rarely include information on skin color. As a start towards increasing transparency, AI researchers have appropriated the use of the Fitzpatrick skin type (FST) from a measure of patient photosensitivity to a measure for estimating skin tone in algorithmic audits of computer vision applications including facial recognition and dermatology diagnosis. In order to understand the variability of estimated FST annotations on images, we compare several FST annotation methods on a diverse set of 460 images of skin conditions from both textbooks and online dermatology atlases. We find the inter-rater reliability between three board-certified dermatologists is comparable to the inter-rater reliability between the board-certified dermatologists and two crowdsourcing methods. In contrast, we find that the Individual Typology Angle converted to FST (ITA-FST) method produces annotations that are significantly less correlated with the experts' annotations than the experts' annotations are correlated with each other. These results demonstrate that algorithms based on ITA-FST are not reliable for annotating large-scale image datasets, but human-centered, crowd-based protocols can reliably add skin type transparency to dermatology datasets. Furthermore, we introduce the concept of dynamic consensus protocols with tunable parameters including expert review that increase the visibility of crowdwork and provide guidance for future crowdsourced annotations of large image datasets.
abstract_zh: 虽然人工智能 (AI) 有望为医疗保健提供者提供支持并提高医疗诊断的准确性，但数据集组成缺乏透明度，使 AI 模型可能出现无意且可避免的错误。特别是，皮肤病的公共和私人图像数据集很少包含有关肤色的信息。作为提高透明度的开始，人工智能研究人员将菲茨帕特里克皮肤类型 (FST) 的使用从衡量患者光敏度的指标转移到了在计算机视觉应用（包括面部识别和皮肤病诊断）的算法审核中估计肤色的指标。为了了解图像上估计的 FST 注释的可变性，我们对来自教科书和在线皮肤病学图集的 460 张不同皮肤状况图像的几种 FST 注释方法进行了比较。我们发现三位委员会认证的皮肤科医生之间的评估者间可靠性与委员会认证的皮肤科医生和两种众包方法之间的评估者间可靠性相当。相比之下，我们发现将个体类型学角度转换为 FST (ITA-FST) 方法产生的注释与专家注释的相关性明显低于专家注释之间的相关性。这些结果表明，基于 ITA-FST 的算法对于注释大规模图像数据集并不可靠，但以人为中心、基于人群的协议可以可靠地为皮肤病学数据集添加皮肤类型透明度。此外，我们引入了具有可调参数的动态共识协议的概念，包括专家评审，可以提高众包的可见性，并为未来大型图像数据集的众包注释提供指导。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过比较专家、众包和算法三种方法对皮肤科图像数据集进行肤色标注的可靠性，提高皮肤科图像数据集的透明度。
AI.motivation: 当前皮肤科图像数据集缺乏肤色信息，可能导致AI模型在诊断时产生偏差，而Fitzpatrick皮肤类型（FST）作为标注标准尚未被充分验证。
AI.method: 在460张皮肤疾病图像上，对比三位皮肤科专家、两种众包方法及ITA-FST算法的标注一致性，并分析其相关性。
AI.result: 专家间及专家与众包方法的标注一致性较高，而ITA-FST算法的标注与专家结果相关性显著较低，表明其不可靠。
AI.conclusion: 基于人类协作的众包协议能可靠地为皮肤科数据集添加肤色透明度，而动态共识协议可优化未来大规模图像标注流程。

ai_content.conclusion: 基于人类协作的众包协议能可靠地为皮肤科数据集添加肤色透明度，而动态共识协议可优化未来大规模图像标注流程。

authors_text: Eric Loreaux,Ke Yu,Jonas Kemp,Martin Seneviratne,Christina Chen,Subhrajit Roy,Ivan Protsyuk,Natalie Harris,Alexander D'Amour,Steve Yadlowsky,Ming-Jun Chen
title: Boosting the interpretability of clinical risk scores with intervention predictions
title_zh: 通过干预预测提高临床风险评分的可解释性
abstract: Machine learning systems show significant promise for forecasting patient adverse events via risk scores. However, these risk scores implicitly encode assumptions about future interventions that the patient is likely to receive, based on the intervention policy present in the training data. Without this important context, predictions from such systems are less interpretable for clinicians. We propose a joint model of intervention policy and adverse event risk as a means to explicitly communicate the model's assumptions about future interventions. We develop such an intervention policy model on MIMIC-III, a real world de-identified ICU dataset, and discuss some use cases that highlight the utility of this approach. We show how combining typical risk scores, such as the likelihood of mortality, with future intervention probability scores leads to more interpretable clinical predictions.
summary: Machine learning systems show significant promise for forecasting patient adverse events via risk scores. However, these risk scores implicitly encode assumptions about future interventions that the patient is likely to receive, based on the intervention policy present in the training data. Without this important context, predictions from such systems are less interpretable for clinicians. We propose a joint model of intervention policy and adverse event risk as a means to explicitly communicate the model's assumptions about future interventions. We develop such an intervention policy model on MIMIC-III, a real world de-identified ICU dataset, and discuss some use cases that highlight the utility of this approach. We show how combining typical risk scores, such as the likelihood of mortality, with future intervention probability scores leads to more interpretable clinical predictions.
abstract_zh: 机器学习系统在通过风险评分预测患者不良事件方面显示出巨大的前景。然而，根据训练数据中存在的干预政策，这些风险评分隐含地编码了关于患者未来可能接受的干预措施的假设。如果没有这个重要的背景，临床医生就很难解释此类系统的预测。我们提出了干预政策和不良事件风险的联合模型，作为明确传达模型对未来干预措施的假设的手段。我们在 MIMIC-III（一个真实世界的去识别化 ICU 数据集）上开发了这样的干预政策模型，并讨论了一些强调这种方法实用性的用例。我们展示了如何将典型的风险评分（例如死亡可能性）与未来干预概率评分相结合，从而产生更可解释的临床预测。

AI.tldr: 提出结合干预预测的联合模型，以提高临床风险评分的可解释性
AI.motivation: 现有临床风险评分隐含干预政策假设但缺乏透明度，影响临床解释与应用
AI.method: 构建干预政策与不良事件风险的联合模型，结合典型风险评分与未来干预概率预测
AI.result: 验证了结合风险评分与干预概率可提升预测可解释性，并展示实际应用场景
AI.conclusion: 该方法能显式表达模型干预假设，增强临床预测的可解释性与实用性

authors_text: Zhongqiang Ren,Akshaya Kesarimangalam Srinivasan,Howard Coffin,Ian Abraham,Howie Choset
title: A Local Optimization Framework for Multi-Objective Ergodic Search
title_zh: 多目标遍历搜索的局部优化框架
abstract: Robots have the potential to perform search for a variety of applications under different scenarios. Our work is motivated by humanitarian assistant and disaster relief (HADR) where often it is critical to find signs of life in the presence of conflicting criteria, objectives, and information. We believe ergodic search can provide a framework for exploiting available information as well as exploring for new information for applications such as HADR, especially when time is of the essence. Ergodic search algorithms plan trajectories such that the time spent in a region is proportional to the amount of information in that region, and is able to naturally balance exploitation (myopically searching high-information areas) and exploration (visiting all locations in the search space for new information). Existing ergodic search algorithms, as well as other information-based approaches, typically consider search using only a single information map. However, in many scenarios, the use of multiple information maps that encode different types of relevant information is common. Ergodic search methods currently do not possess the ability for simultaneous nor do they have a way to balance which information gets priority. This leads us to formulate a Multi-Objective Ergodic Search (MOES) problem, which aims at finding the so-called Pareto-optimal solutions, for the purpose of providing human decision makers various solutions that trade off between conflicting criteria. To efficiently solve MOES, we develop a framework called Sequential Local Ergodic Search (SLES) that converts a MOES problem into a "weight space coverage" problem. It leverages the recent advances in ergodic search methods as well as the idea of local optimization to efficiently approximate the Pareto-optimal front. Our numerical results show that SLES runs distinctly faster than the baseline methods.
summary: Robots have the potential to perform search for a variety of applications under different scenarios. Our work is motivated by humanitarian assistant and disaster relief (HADR) where often it is critical to find signs of life in the presence of conflicting criteria, objectives, and information. We believe ergodic search can provide a framework for exploiting available information as well as exploring for new information for applications such as HADR, especially when time is of the essence. Ergodic search algorithms plan trajectories such that the time spent in a region is proportional to the amount of information in that region, and is able to naturally balance exploitation (myopically searching high-information areas) and exploration (visiting all locations in the search space for new information). Existing ergodic search algorithms, as well as other information-based approaches, typically consider search using only a single information map. However, in many scenarios, the use of multiple information maps that encode different types of relevant information is common. Ergodic search methods currently do not possess the ability for simultaneous nor do they have a way to balance which information gets priority. This leads us to formulate a Multi-Objective Ergodic Search (MOES) problem, which aims at finding the so-called Pareto-optimal solutions, for the purpose of providing human decision makers various solutions that trade off between conflicting criteria. To efficiently solve MOES, we develop a framework called Sequential Local Ergodic Search (SLES) that converts a MOES problem into a "weight space coverage" problem. It leverages the recent advances in ergodic search methods as well as the idea of local optimization to efficiently approximate the Pareto-optimal front. Our numerical results show that SLES runs distinctly faster than the baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 机器人有潜力在不同场景下执行各种应用的搜索。我们的工作是由人道主义援助和救灾 (HADR) 推动的，在这些领域，在存在冲突的标准、目标和信息的情况下寻找生命迹象往往至关重要。我们相信遍历搜索可以提供一个框架，用于利用可用信息以及探索 HADR 等应用程序的新信息，尤其是在时间至关重要的情况下。遍历搜索算法规划轨迹，使得在一个区域中花费的时间与该区域中的信息量成正比，并且能够自然地平衡利用（近视搜索高信息区域）和探索（访问搜索空间中的所有位置以获取新信息）。现有的遍历搜索算法以及其他基于信息的方法通常考虑仅使用单个信息图进行搜索。然而，在许多场景中，使用对不同类型的相关信息进行编码的多个信息映射是很常见的。遍历搜索方法目前不具备同步能力，也没有办法平衡哪些信息优先。这导致我们提出了多目标遍历搜索（MOES）问题，其目的是找到所谓的帕累托最优解决方案，目的是为人类决策者提供在相互冲突的标准之间进行权衡的各种解决方案。为了有效地解决 MOES，我们开发了一个称为顺序局部遍历搜索（SLES）的框架，它将 MOES 问题转换为“权重空间覆盖”问题。它利用遍历搜索方法的最新进展以及局部优化的思想来有效地逼近帕累托最优前沿。我们的数值结果表明，SLES 的运行速度明显快于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SLES的框架，用于解决多目标遍历搜索（MOES）问题，通过将问题转化为权重空间覆盖问题，以高效近似帕累托最优前沿。
AI.motivation: 在人道主义援助和灾难救援（HADR）等场景中，机器人需要在存在冲突准则和多类型信息的情况下快速平衡探索与利用，现有遍历搜索算法无法处理多信息地图的优先级问题。
AI.method: 开发Sequential Local Ergodic Search（SLES）框架，将MOES问题转化为权重空间覆盖问题，并结合局部优化与最新遍历搜索方法近似帕累托最优解。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，SLES相比基线方法运行速度显著更快，能有效处理多目标搜索任务。
AI.conclusion: SLES框架为多目标遍历搜索提供了高效解决方案，能够为决策者提供权衡不同冲突准则的帕累托最优方案。

authors_text: Keyi Li,Sen Yang,Travis M. Sullivan,Randall S. Burd,Ivan Marsic
title: Exploring Runtime Decision Support for Trauma Resuscitation
title_zh: 探索创伤复苏的运行时决策支持
comment: 2022 KDD Workshop on Applied Data Science for Healthcare
comments: 2022 KDD Workshop on Applied Data Science for Healthcare
abstract: AI-based recommender systems have been successfully applied in many domains (e.g., e-commerce, feeds ranking). Medical experts believe that incorporating such methods into a clinical decision support system may help reduce medical team errors and improve patient outcomes during treatment processes (e.g., trauma resuscitation, surgical processes). Limited research, however, has been done to develop automatic data-driven treatment decision support. We explored the feasibility of building a treatment recommender system to provide runtime next-minute activity predictions. The system uses patient context (e.g., demographics and vital signs) and process context (e.g., activities) to continuously predict activities that will be performed in the next minute. We evaluated our system on a pre-recorded dataset of trauma resuscitation and conducted an ablation study on different model variants. The best model achieved an average F1-score of 0.67 for 61 activity types. We include medical team feedback and discuss the future work.
summary: AI-based recommender systems have been successfully applied in many domains (e.g., e-commerce, feeds ranking). Medical experts believe that incorporating such methods into a clinical decision support system may help reduce medical team errors and improve patient outcomes during treatment processes (e.g., trauma resuscitation, surgical processes). Limited research, however, has been done to develop automatic data-driven treatment decision support. We explored the feasibility of building a treatment recommender system to provide runtime next-minute activity predictions. The system uses patient context (e.g., demographics and vital signs) and process context (e.g., activities) to continuously predict activities that will be performed in the next minute. We evaluated our system on a pre-recorded dataset of trauma resuscitation and conducted an ablation study on different model variants. The best model achieved an average F1-score of 0.67 for 61 activity types. We include medical team feedback and discuss the future work.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能的推荐系统已成功应用于许多领域（例如电子商务、提要排名）。医学专家认为，将此类方法纳入临床决策支持系统可能有助于减少医疗团队的错误并改善治疗过程（例如创伤复苏、手术过程）中的患者结果。然而，在开发自动数据驱动的治疗决策支持方面所做的研究有限。我们探索了构建治疗推荐系统以提供运行时下一分钟活动预测的可行性。该系统使用患者背景（例如人口统计和生命体征）和流程背景（例如活动）来连续预测下一分钟将执行的活动。我们根据预先记录的创伤复苏数据集评估了我们的系统，并对不同模型变体进行了消融研究。最佳模型的 61 种活动类型的平均 F1 分数为 0.67。我们纳入医疗团队的反馈并讨论未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文探索构建实时创伤复苏治疗推荐系统，通过预测下一分钟的医疗活动以辅助临床决策。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗决策支持系统研究不足，而AI推荐系统在其他领域表现优异，可能减少医疗错误并改善患者预后。
AI.method: 基于患者上下文（人口统计、生命体征）和流程上下文（活动记录），构建模型持续预测下一分钟医疗活动，通过消融实验评估不同模型变体。
AI.result: 最佳模型在61类活动上达到平均F1分数0.67，医疗团队反馈显示系统具有潜在应用价值，但需进一步优化。
AI.conclusion: 实时活动预测方法可行，但需更多临床验证与模型改进以提升准确性与实用性。

title: On The Universality of Diagrams for Causal Inference and The Causal Reproducing Property
title_zh: 论因果推理图的普适性及因果再现性
abstract: We propose Universal Causality, an overarching framework based on category theory that defines the universal property that underlies causal inference independent of the underlying representational formalism used. More formally, universal causal models are defined as categories consisting of objects and morphisms between them representing causal influences, as well as structures for carrying out interventions (experiments) and evaluating their outcomes (observations). Functors map between categories, and natural transformations map between a pair of functors across the same two categories. Abstract causal diagrams in our framework are built using universal constructions from category theory, including the limit or co-limit of an abstract causal diagram, or more generally, the Kan extension. We present two foundational results in universal causal inference. The first result, called the Universal Causality Theorem (UCT), pertains to the universality of diagrams, which are viewed as functors mapping both objects and relationships from an indexing category of abstract causal diagrams to an actual causal model whose nodes are labeled by random variables, and edges represent functional or probabilistic relationships. UCT states that any causal inference can be represented in a canonical way as the co-limit of an abstract causal diagram of representable objects. UCT follows from a basic result in the theory of sheaves. The second result, the Causal Reproducing Property (CRP), states that any causal influence of a object X on another object Y is representable as a natural transformation between two abstract causal diagrams. CRP follows from the Yoneda Lemma, one of the deepest results in category theory. The CRP property is analogous to the reproducing property in Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces that served as the foundation for kernel methods in machine learning.

More formally, universal causal models are defined as categories consisting of objects and morphisms between them representing causal influences, as well as structures for carrying out interventions (experiments) and evaluating their outcomes (observations). We present two foundational results in universal causal inference. UCT states that any causal inference can be represented in a canonical way as the co-limit of an abstract causal diagram of representable objects. The second result, the Causal Reproducing Property (CRP), states that any causal influence of a object X on another object Y is representable as a natural transformation between two abstract causal diagrams. CRP follows from the Yoneda Lemma, one of the deepest results in category theory. The CRP property is analogous to the reproducing property in Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces that served as the foundation for kernel methods in machine learning.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了普遍因果关系，这是一个基于范畴论的总体框架，它定义了因果推理的普遍属性，独立于所使用的底层表征形式主义。更正式地说，通用因果模型被定义为由代表因果影响的对象和它们之间的态射组成的类别，以及用于执行干预（实验）和评估其结果（观察）的结构。函子在类别之间映射，自然变换在同一两个类别的一对函子之间映射。我们框架中的抽象因果图是使用范畴论的通用结构构建的，包括抽象因果图的极限或共同极限，或者更一般地说，Kan 扩展。我们提出了普遍因果推理的两个基本结果。第一个结果称为通用因果定理（UCT），涉及图的普遍性，图被视为将对象和关系从抽象因果图的索引类别映射到实际因果模型的函子，其节点由随机变量标记，边表示函数或概率关系。 UCT 指出任何因果推理都可以以规范的方式表示为可表示对象的抽象因果图的共同限制。 UCT 源自滑轮理论的基本结果。第二个结果是因果再现属性（CRP），指出对象 X 对另一个对象 Y 的任何因果影响都可以表示为两个抽象因果图之间的自然转换。 CRP 源自米田引理，这是范畴论中最深刻的结果之一。 CRP 属性类似于再现内核希尔伯特空间中的再现属性，它是机器学习中内核方法的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于范畴论的统一因果推断框架，定义普遍因果模型并利用范畴论构造证明两个基础定理。
AI.motivation: 现有因果推断方法依赖特定表示形式，缺乏统一理论框架，需建立独立于具体形式的普适性数学基础。
AI.method: 采用范畴论构建因果模型，通过函子映射因果关系，运用极限/上极限及Kan扩张构造抽象因果图，结合层论与Yoneda引理证明核心定理。
AI.result: 提出普遍因果性定理（UCT）和因果再生性质（CRP），分别证明因果推断可表为上极限，因果影响可表为自然变换。
AI.conclusion: 为因果推断提供统一数学框架，揭示因果图的普适性与表示规律，类比再生核希尔伯特空间理论，推动跨领域方法整合。

search_text: On The Universality of Diagrams for Causal Inference and The Causal Reproducing Property 论因果推理图的普适性及因果再现性 We propose Universal Causality, an overarching framework based on category theory that defines the universal property that underlies causal inference independent of the underlying representational formalism used. More formally, universal causal models are defined as categories consisting of objects and morphisms between them representing causal influences, as well as structures for carrying out interventions (experiments) and evaluating their outcomes (observations). Functors map between categories, and natural transformations map between a pair of functors across the same two categories. Abstract causal diagrams in our framework are built using universal constructions from category theory, including the limit or co-limit of an abstract causal diagram, or more generally, the Kan extension. We present two foundational results in universal causal inference. The first result, called the Universal Causality Theorem (UCT), pertains to the universality of diagrams, which are viewed as functors mapping both objects and relationships from an indexing category of abstract causal diagrams to an actual causal model whose nodes are labeled by random variables, and edges represent functional or probabilistic relationships. UCT states that any causal inference can be represented in a canonical way as the co-limit of an abstract causal diagram of representable objects. UCT follows from a basic result in the theory of sheaves. The second result, the Causal Reproducing Property (CRP), states that any causal influence of a object X on another object Y is representable as a natural transformation between two abstract causal diagrams. CRP follows from the Yoneda Lemma, one of the deepest results in category theory. The CRP property is analogous to the reproducing property in Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces that served as the foundation for kernel methods in machine learning. 我们提出了普遍因果关系，这是一个基于范畴论的总体框架，它定义了因果推理的普遍属性，独立于所使用的底层表征形式主义。更正式地说，通用因果模型被定义为由代表因果影响的对象和它们之间的态射组成的类别，以及用于执行干预（实验）和评估其结果（观察）的结构。函子在类别之间映射，自然变换在同一两个类别的一对函子之间映射。我们框架中的抽象因果图是使用范畴论的通用结构构建的，包括抽象因果图的极限或共同极限，或者更一般地说，Kan 扩展。我们提出了普遍因果推理的两个基本结果。第一个结果称为通用因果定理（UCT），涉及图的普遍性，图被视为将对象和关系从抽象因果图的索引类别映射到实际因果模型的函子，其节点由随机变量标记，边表示函数或概率关系。 UCT 指出任何因果推理都可以以规范的方式表示为可表示对象的抽象因果图的共同限制。 UCT 源自滑轮理论的基本结果。第二个结果是因果再现属性（CRP），指出对象 X 对另一个对象 Y 的任何因果影响都可以表示为两个抽象因果图之间的自然转换。 CRP 源自米田引理，这是范畴论中最深刻的结果之一。 CRP 属性类似于再现内核希尔伯特空间中的再现属性，它是机器学习中内核方法的基础。 本文提出基于范畴论的统一因果推断框架，定义普遍因果模型并利用范畴论构造证明两个基础定理。 Sridhar Mahadevan cs.AI

title: Inter and Intra Signal Variance in Feature Extraction and Classification of Affective State
title_zh: 情感状态特征提取和分类中的信号间和信号内方差
comment: Preprint for the AICS 2022 Conference This publication has emanated from research supported in part by a Grant from Science Foundation Ireland under Grant number 18/CRT/6222 Associated source code https://github.com/ZacDair/Emo_Phys_Eval
comments: Preprint for the AICS 2022 Conference This publication has emanated from research supported in part by a Grant from Science Foundation Ireland under Grant number 18/CRT/6222 Associated source code https://github.com/ZacDair/Emo_Phys_Eval
abstract: Psychophysiology investigates the causal relationship of physiological changes resulting from psychological states. There are significant challenges with machine learning-based momentary assessments of physiology due to varying data collection methods, physiological differences, data availability and the requirement for expertly annotated data. Advances in wearable technology have significantly increased the scale, sensitivity and accuracy of devices for recording physiological signals, enabling large-scale unobtrusive physiological data gathering. This work contributes an empirical evaluation of signal variances acquired from wearables and their associated impact on the classification of affective states by (i) assessing differences occurring in features representative of affective states extracted from electrocardiograms and photoplethysmography, (ii) investigating the disparity in feature importance between signals to determine signal-specific features, and (iii) investigating the disparity in feature importance between affective states to determine affect-specific features. Results demonstrate that the degree of feature variance between ECG and PPG in a dataset is reflected in the classification performance of that dataset. Additionally, beats-per-minute, inter-beat-interval and breathing rate are identified as common best-performing features across both signals. Finally, feature variance per-affective state identifies hard-to-distinguish affective states requiring one-versus-rest or additional features to enable accurate classification.
summary: Psychophysiology investigates the causal relationship of physiological changes resulting from psychological states. There are significant challenges with machine learning-based momentary assessments of physiology due to varying data collection methods, physiological differences, data availability and the requirement for expertly annotated data. Advances in wearable technology have significantly increased the scale, sensitivity and accuracy of devices for recording physiological signals, enabling large-scale unobtrusive physiological data gathering. This work contributes an empirical evaluation of signal variances acquired from wearables and their associated impact on the classification of affective states by (i) assessing differences occurring in features representative of affective states extracted from electrocardiograms and photoplethysmography, (ii) investigating the disparity in feature importance between signals to determine signal-specific features, and (iii) investigating the disparity in feature importance between affective states to determine affect-specific features. Results demonstrate that the degree of feature variance between ECG and PPG in a dataset is reflected in the classification performance of that dataset. Additionally, beats-per-minute, inter-beat-interval and breathing rate are identified as common best-performing features across both signals. Finally, feature variance per-affective state identifies hard-to-distinguish affective states requiring one-versus-rest or additional features to enable accurate classification.
abstract_zh: 心理生理学研究心理状态引起的生理变化的因果关系。由于不同的数据收集方法、生理差异、数据可用性以及对专业注释数据的要求，基于机器学习的生理学瞬时评估面临着重大挑战。可穿戴技术的进步显着提高了记录生理信号的设备的规模、灵敏度和准确性，从而实现大规模而不引人注目的生理数据收集。这项工作通过以下方式对从可穿戴设备获取的信号方差及其对情感状态分类的相关影响进行了实证评估：(i) 评估从心电图和光电体积描记术中提取的代表情感状态的特征中发生的差异，(ii) 研究信号之间特征重要性的差异以确定信号特定的特征，以及 (iii) 研究情感状态之间特征重要性的差异以确定情感特定的特征。结果表明，数据集中 ECG 和 PPG 之间的特征差异程度反映在该数据集的分类性能中。此外，每分钟心跳次数、心跳间隔和呼吸频率被认为是两个信号中共同的最佳性能特征。最后，每个情感状态的特征方差识别出难以区分的情感状态，需要一对一或其他特征来实现准确分类。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究可穿戴设备获取的生理信号（如心电图和光电容积描记图）在情感状态分类中的特征方差影响。
AI.motivation: 传统生理数据采集方法存在数据差异大、依赖专家标注等挑战，而可穿戴设备的普及为大规模无干扰数据采集提供了可能，需探索信号方差对情感分类的影响。
AI.method: 通过分析ECG和PPG信号的特征差异，评估信号间特征重要性以确定信号特异性特征，并分析情感状态间的特征差异以确定情感特异性特征。
AI.result: ECG与PPG信号的特征方差直接影响分类性能，心率、心动周期间隔和呼吸率是两种信号的共同最佳特征；部分情感状态需采用一对一或额外特征提升分类准确性。
AI.conclusion: 信号间方差和情感特异性特征对分类效果至关重要，未来需结合信号特性和情感状态设计优化特征提取方法。

title: Towards Substantive Conceptions of Algorithmic Fairness: Normative Guidance from Equal Opportunity Doctrines
title_zh: 走向算法公平的实质性概念：来自平等机会主义的规范指导
abstract: In this work we use Equal Oppportunity (EO) doctrines from political philosophy to make explicit the normative judgements embedded in different conceptions of algorithmic fairness. We contrast formal EO approaches that narrowly focus on fair contests at discrete decision points, with substantive EO doctrines that look at people's fair life chances more holistically over the course of a lifetime. We use this taxonomy to provide a moral interpretation of the impossibility results as the incompatibility between different conceptions of a fair contest -- foward-looking versus backward-looking -- when people do not have fair life chances. We use this result to motivate substantive conceptions of algorithmic fairness and outline two plausible procedures based on the luck-egalitarian doctrine of EO, and Rawls's principle of fair equality of opportunity.
summary: In this work we use Equal Oppportunity (EO) doctrines from political philosophy to make explicit the normative judgements embedded in different conceptions of algorithmic fairness. We contrast formal EO approaches that narrowly focus on fair contests at discrete decision points, with substantive EO doctrines that look at people's fair life chances more holistically over the course of a lifetime. We use this taxonomy to provide a moral interpretation of the impossibility results as the incompatibility between different conceptions of a fair contest -- foward-looking versus backward-looking -- when people do not have fair life chances. We use this result to motivate substantive conceptions of algorithmic fairness and outline two plausible procedures based on the luck-egalitarian doctrine of EO, and Rawls's principle of fair equality of opportunity.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们使用政治哲学中的平等机会（EO）学说来明确嵌入不同算法公平概念中的规范判断。我们对比了正式的平等机会方法和实质性平等机会原则，前者狭隘地关注离散决策点的公平竞争，后者更全面地审视人们一生中的公平生活机会。我们使用这种分类法来对不可能结果提供道德解释，即当人们没有公平的生活机会时，公平竞争的不同概念之间的不相容性（前瞻性与回顾性）。我们利用这一结果来激发算法公平性的实质性概念，并根据 EO 的运气均等主义原则和罗尔斯的公平机会均等原则概述了两个看似合理的程序。

AI.tldr: 本文通过政治哲学中的平等机会（EO）原则，探讨算法公平性的规范性判断，对比形式化与实质性EO理论，提出基于运气平等主义和罗尔斯机会平等原则的算法公平性实现方法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法公平性概念存在局限性，如不可能性定理揭示的矛盾，需从规范性角度重新审视公平性内涵，以解决实际应用中因生命机会不平等导致的冲突。
AI.method: 运用政治哲学中的EO理论构建分类框架，对比形式化EO（关注决策点公平）与实质性EO（关注终身机会公平），结合运气平等主义与罗尔斯原则设计算法公平性实现路径。
AI.result: 证明了当生命机会不平等时，前向/后向视角的公平性概念存在不可调和矛盾，并提出两种基于实质性公平的算法设计程序。
AI.conclusion: 算法公平性需超越形式化框架，从生命机会的实质性平等出发，通过运气平等主义与罗尔斯原则指导的程序实现更公正的算法决策。

search_text: Towards Substantive Conceptions of Algorithmic Fairness: Normative Guidance from Equal Opportunity Doctrines 走向算法公平的实质性概念：来自平等机会主义的规范指导 In this work we use Equal Oppportunity (EO) doctrines from political philosophy to make explicit the normative judgements embedded in different conceptions of algorithmic fairness. We contrast formal EO approaches that narrowly focus on fair contests at discrete decision points, with substantive EO doctrines that look at people's fair life chances more holistically over the course of a lifetime. We use this taxonomy to provide a moral interpretation of the impossibility results as the incompatibility between different conceptions of a fair contest -- foward-looking versus backward-looking -- when people do not have fair life chances. We use this result to motivate substantive conceptions of algorithmic fairness and outline two plausible procedures based on the luck-egalitarian doctrine of EO, and Rawls's principle of fair equality of opportunity. 在这项工作中，我们使用政治哲学中的平等机会（EO）学说来明确嵌入不同算法公平概念中的规范判断。我们对比了正式的平等机会方法和实质性平等机会原则，前者狭隘地关注离散决策点的公平竞争，后者更全面地审视人们一生中的公平生活机会。我们使用这种分类法来对不可能结果提供道德解释，即当人们没有公平的生活机会时，公平竞争的不同概念之间的不相容性（前瞻性与回顾性）。我们利用这一结果来激发算法公平性的实质性概念，并根据 EO 的运气均等主义原则和罗尔斯的公平机会均等原则概述了两个看似合理的程序。 本文通过政治哲学中的平等机会（EO）原则，探讨算法公平性的规范性判断，对比形式化与实质性EO理论，提出基于运气平等主义和罗尔斯机会平等原则的算法公平性实现方法。 Falaah Arif Khan,Eleni Manis,Julia Stoyanovich cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Ant Hill Colonization optimization algorithm(AHCOA) for controlling the side lobe of a uniform linear array
title_zh: 用于控制均匀线性阵列旁瓣的蚂蚁山殖民优化算法（AHCOA）
abstract: This paper aims to introduce the Ant hill colonization optimization algorithm(AHCOA) to the electromagnetics and antenna community. The ant hill is built by special species of ants known as formicas ants(also meadow ants, fire ants and harvester ants). AHCOA is a novel new nature inspired algorithm mimicking how the ants built and sustain the ant hill for their survival and sustenance for many years. This problem solves constrained and unconstrained optimization problems with wide capability in diverse fields. AHCOA is used by writing equations of volumetric analysis of the ant hill mould the manner in which the structure is architected. In this paper, we have shown how AHCOA is better than the previous paper on ant lion optimizer for controlling side lobe in antenna pattern synthesis in paper [1]. The potential of AHCOA in synthesizing and analyzing for d/ varying from 1.1,0.6,0.5,0.3 and 0.1 linear array is also illustrated. Antenna side lobe level minimization is compared with ant lion optimizer showing why AHCOA is better than the previously simulated ant lion optimizer for side lobe control. The results show why linear arrays are better synthesized for AHCOA then other algorithms used in planar arrays. This paper shows why AHCOA is a strong candidate for antenna optimization used in linear arrays.

abstract_zh: 本文旨在向电磁学和天线界介绍蚂蚁山殖民优化算法（AHCOA）。蚂蚁山是由被称为福米卡蚁（也称为草甸蚁、火蚁和收割蚁）的特殊蚂蚁种类建造的。 AHCOA 是一种新颖的受自然启发的算法，模仿蚂蚁如何建造和维持蚁丘以供其生存和维持多年。该问题解决了约束和无约束优化问题，在不同领域具有广泛的能力。 AHCOA 通过编写蚁丘模型的体积分析方程来使用，即结构的构建方式。在本文中，我们展示了 AHCOA 如何优于文献 [1] 中关于控制天线方向图合成中旁瓣的蚁狮优化器的论文。还说明了 AHCOA 在合成和分析 d/ 为 1.1、0.6、0.5、0.3 和 0.1 线性阵列方面的潜力。将天线旁瓣电平最小化与蚁狮优化器进行比较，显示了为什么 AHCOA 比之前模拟的蚁狮优化器在旁瓣控制方面更好。结果表明，为什么 AHCOA 的线性阵列比平面阵列中使用的其他算法更好。本文说明了为什么 AHCOA 是线性阵列中使用的天线优化的有力候选者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出蚁山殖民优化算法（AHCOA）用于控制均匀线阵的旁瓣，并展示其相较于蚁狮优化器的优势。
AI.motivation: 为了解决传统优化算法在控制天线旁瓣时的不足，提出基于蚁群行为的AHCOA算法以提高优化效果。
AI.method: 采用蚁山殖民优化算法（AHCOA），通过建立蚁山结构的体积分析方程，优化均匀线阵的旁瓣控制，并与蚁狮优化器进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AHCOA在不同d/值的均匀线阵中有效降低了旁瓣电平，优于蚁狮优化器，且线阵合成效果优于平面阵列的其他算法。
AI.conclusion: AHCOA在控制均匀线阵旁瓣方面表现出优越性，是天线优化设计中的有效算法。

title: Exploring Generative Adversarial Networks for Text-to-Image Generation with Evolution Strategies
title_zh: 利用进化策略探索文本到图像生成的生成对抗网络
abstract: In the context of generative models, text-to-image generation achieved impressive results in recent years. Models using different approaches were proposed and trained in huge datasets of pairs of texts and images. However, some methods rely on pre-trained models such as Generative Adversarial Networks, searching through the latent space of the generative model by using a gradient-based approach to update the latent vector, relying on loss functions such as the cosine similarity. In this work, we follow a different direction by proposing the use of Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy to explore the latent space of Generative Adversarial Networks. We compare this approach to the one using Adam and a hybrid strategy. We design an experimental study to compare the three approaches using different text inputs for image generation by adapting an evaluation method based on the projection of the resulting samples into a two-dimensional grid to inspect the diversity of the distributions. The results evidence that the evolutionary method achieves more diversity in the generation of samples, exploring different regions of the resulting grids. Besides, we show that the hybrid method combines the explored areas of the gradient-based and evolutionary approaches, leveraging the quality of the results.
summary: In the context of generative models, text-to-image generation achieved impressive results in recent years. Models using different approaches were proposed and trained in huge datasets of pairs of texts and images. However, some methods rely on pre-trained models such as Generative Adversarial Networks, searching through the latent space of the generative model by using a gradient-based approach to update the latent vector, relying on loss functions such as the cosine similarity. In this work, we follow a different direction by proposing the use of Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy to explore the latent space of Generative Adversarial Networks. We compare this approach to the one using Adam and a hybrid strategy. We design an experimental study to compare the three approaches using different text inputs for image generation by adapting an evaluation method based on the projection of the resulting samples into a two-dimensional grid to inspect the diversity of the distributions. The results evidence that the evolutionary method achieves more diversity in the generation of samples, exploring different regions of the resulting grids. Besides, we show that the hybrid method combines the explored areas of the gradient-based and evolutionary approaches, leveraging the quality of the results.
abstract_zh: 在生成模型的背景下，文本到图像的生成近年来取得了令人印象深刻的成果。使用不同方法的模型被提出并在文本和图像对的巨大数据集中进行训练。然而，一些方法依赖于预训练的模型，例如生成对抗网络，通过使用基于梯度的方法来搜索生成模型的潜在空间来更新潜在向量，依赖于余弦相似度等损失函数。在这项工作中，我们遵循不同的方向，提出使用协方差矩阵适应进化策略来探索生成对抗网络的潜在空间。我们将这种方法与使用 Adam 和混合策略的方法进行比较。我们设计了一项实验研究，通过采用基于将结果样本投影到二维网格中的评估方法来检查分布的多样性，来比较使用不同文本输入进行图像生成的三种方法。结果证明，进化方法在样本生成方面实现了更多多样性，探索了所得网格的不同区域。此外，我们表明混合方法结合了基于梯度和进化方法的探索领域，充分利用了结果的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨使用协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）探索生成对抗网络（GAN）的潜在空间，以改进文本到图像生成的多样性，并与基于梯度的Adam方法及混合策略进行比较。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成方法依赖预训练模型和梯度下降优化，可能受限于局部最优解，难以充分探索潜在空间的多样性。
AI.method: 提出采用CMA-ES优化GAN潜在空间，设计实验对比CMA-ES、Adam及混合策略，通过将生成样本投影到二维网格评估分布多样性。
AI.result: 进化策略在生成样本多样性上表现更优，探索了更多潜在空间区域；混合策略结合了梯度方法与进化方法的优势。
AI.conclusion: CMA-ES能有效提升生成多样性，混合策略可平衡生成质量与多样性，为文本到图像生成提供新思路。

search_text: Exploring Generative Adversarial Networks for Text-to-Image Generation with Evolution Strategies 利用进化策略探索文本到图像生成的生成对抗网络 In the context of generative models, text-to-image generation achieved impressive results in recent years. Models using different approaches were proposed and trained in huge datasets of pairs of texts and images. However, some methods rely on pre-trained models such as Generative Adversarial Networks, searching through the latent space of the generative model by using a gradient-based approach to update the latent vector, relying on loss functions such as the cosine similarity. In this work, we follow a different direction by proposing the use of Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy to explore the latent space of Generative Adversarial Networks. We compare this approach to the one using Adam and a hybrid strategy. We design an experimental study to compare the three approaches using different text inputs for image generation by adapting an evaluation method based on the projection of the resulting samples into a two-dimensional grid to inspect the diversity of the distributions. The results evidence that the evolutionary method achieves more diversity in the generation of samples, exploring different regions of the resulting grids. Besides, we show that the hybrid method combines the explored areas of the gradient-based and evolutionary approaches, leveraging the quality of the results. 在生成模型的背景下，文本到图像的生成近年来取得了令人印象深刻的成果。使用不同方法的模型被提出并在文本和图像对的巨大数据集中进行训练。然而，一些方法依赖于预训练的模型，例如生成对抗网络，通过使用基于梯度的方法来搜索生成模型的潜在空间来更新潜在向量，依赖于余弦相似度等损失函数。在这项工作中，我们遵循不同的方向，提出使用协方差矩阵适应进化策略来探索生成对抗网络的潜在空间。我们将这种方法与使用 Adam 和混合策略的方法进行比较。我们设计了一项实验研究，通过采用基于将结果样本投影到二维网格中的评估方法来检查分布的多样性，来比较使用不同文本输入进行图像生成的三种方法。结果证明，进化方法在样本生成方面实现了更多多样性，探索了所得网格的不同区域。此外，我们表明混合方法结合了基于梯度和进化方法的探索领域，充分利用了结果的质量。 本文探讨使用协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）探索生成对抗网络（GAN）的潜在空间，以改进文本到图像生成的多样性，并与基于梯度的Adam方法及混合策略进行比较。 Victor Costa,Nuno Lourenço,João Correia,Penousal Machado cs.NE

authors_text: Amine Mohamed Aboussalah,Min-Jae Kwon,Raj G Patel,Cheng Chi,Chi-Guhn Lee
title: Don't overfit the history -- Recursive time series data augmentation
title_zh: 不要过度拟合历史——递归时间序列数据增强
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2023 Resubmitted here due to major change in proofs following conference submission
comments: Accepted to ICLR 2023 Resubmitted here due to major change in proofs following conference submission
abstract: Time series observations can be seen as realizations of an underlying dynamical system governed by rules that we typically do not know. For time series learning tasks, we need to understand that we fit our model on available data, which is a unique realized history. Training on a single realization often induces severe overfitting lacking generalization. To address this issue, we introduce a general recursive framework for time series augmentation, which we call Recursive Interpolation Method, denoted as RIM. New samples are generated using a recursive interpolation function of all previous values in such a way that the enhanced samples preserve the original inherent time series dynamics. We perform theoretical analysis to characterize the proposed RIM and to guarantee its test performance. We apply RIM to diverse real world time series cases to achieve strong performance over non-augmented data on regression, classification, and reinforcement learning tasks.
summary: Time series observations can be seen as realizations of an underlying dynamical system governed by rules that we typically do not know. For time series learning tasks, we need to understand that we fit our model on available data, which is a unique realized history. Training on a single realization often induces severe overfitting lacking generalization. To address this issue, we introduce a general recursive framework for time series augmentation, which we call Recursive Interpolation Method, denoted as RIM. New samples are generated using a recursive interpolation function of all previous values in such a way that the enhanced samples preserve the original inherent time series dynamics. We perform theoretical analysis to characterize the proposed RIM and to guarantee its test performance. We apply RIM to diverse real world time series cases to achieve strong performance over non-augmented data on regression, classification, and reinforcement learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 时间序列观察可以被视为由我们通常不知道的规则控制的底层动力系统的实现。对于时间序列学习任务，我们需要了解我们的模型适合可用数据，这是一个独特的已实现的历史。对单一实现的训练通常会导致严重的过度拟合，缺乏泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种用于时间序列增强的通用递归框架，我们将其称为递归插值方法，表示为 RIM。使用所有先前值的递归插值函数生成新样本，从而增强的样本保留原始固有的时间序列动态。我们进行理论分析来表征所提出的 RIM 并保证其测试性能。我们将 RIM 应用于各种现实世界时间序列案例，以在回归、分类和强化学习任务上实现优于非增强数据的强大性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种递归插值方法（RIM），用于时间序列数据增强，以解决模型过拟合问题并提高泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 由于时间序列数据通常来自单一历史实现，直接训练容易导致过拟合，缺乏泛化能力，因此需要有效的数据增强方法。
AI.method: 提出递归插值方法（RIM），通过递归插值函数生成新样本，保留原始时间序列的内在动力学特性。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界时间序列任务（回归、分类、强化学习）中，RIM显著优于未增强数据的性能。
AI.conclusion: RIM有效缓解了时间序列模型的过拟合问题，提升了在多种任务中的泛化能力和性能。

title: Humans Social Relationship Classification during Accompaniment
title_zh: 伴奏时人类社会关系分类
abstract: This paper presents the design of deep learning architectures which allow to classify the social relationship existing between two people who are walking in a side-by-side formation into four possible categories --colleagues, couple, family or friendship. The models are developed using Neural Networks or Recurrent Neural Networks to achieve the classification and are trained and evaluated using a database of readings obtained from humans performing an accompaniment process in an urban environment. The best achieved model accomplishes a relatively good accuracy in the classification problem and its results enhance partially the outcomes from a previous study [1]. Furthermore, the model proposed shows its future potential to improve its efficiency and to be implemented in a real robot.
summary: This paper presents the design of deep learning architectures which allow to classify the social relationship existing between two people who are walking in a side-by-side formation into four possible categories --colleagues, couple, family or friendship. The models are developed using Neural Networks or Recurrent Neural Networks to achieve the classification and are trained and evaluated using a database of readings obtained from humans performing an accompaniment process in an urban environment. The best achieved model accomplishes a relatively good accuracy in the classification problem and its results enhance partially the outcomes from a previous study [1]. Furthermore, the model proposed shows its future potential to improve its efficiency and to be implemented in a real robot.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了深度学习架构的设计，该架构允许将并排行走的两个人之间存在的社会关系分为四种可能的类别：同事、情侣、家庭或友谊。这些模型是使用神经网络或循环神经网络开发的，以实现分类，并使用从人类在城市环境中执行伴奏过程中获得的读数数据库进行训练和评估。最好的模型在分类问题上实现了相对较好的准确性，其结果部分增强了先前研究的结果 [1]。此外，所提出的模型显示了其未来提高效率和在真实机器人中实施的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了深度学习架构，用于分类两人并肩行走时的社会关系（同事、情侣、家人或朋友）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在社交关系分类任务中存在准确率不足的问题，需开发更高效的模型以支持机器人应用。
AI.method: 采用神经网络和循环神经网络，基于城市环境中人类陪同过程的数据库进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 最佳模型达到相对较高的分类准确率，部分超越了先前研究[1]，并展现出在实际机器人中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效提升了分类性能，未来可进一步优化效率并实现机器人部署。

authors_text: Bradley C. A. Brown,Anthony L. Caterini,Brendan Leigh Ross,Jesse C. Cresswell,Gabriel Loaiza-Ganem
title: Verifying the Union of Manifolds Hypothesis for Image Data
title_zh: 验证图像数据的流形并集假设
abstract: Deep learning has had tremendous success at learning low-dimensional representations of high-dimensional data. This success would be impossible if there was no hidden low-dimensional structure in data of interest; this existence is posited by the manifold hypothesis, which states that the data lies on an unknown manifold of low intrinsic dimension. In this paper, we argue that this hypothesis does not properly capture the low-dimensional structure typically present in image data. Assuming that data lies on a single manifold implies intrinsic dimension is identical across the entire data space, and does not allow for subregions of this space to have a different number of factors of variation. To address this deficiency, we consider the union of manifolds hypothesis, which states that data lies on a disjoint union of manifolds of varying intrinsic dimensions. We empirically verify this hypothesis on commonly-used image datasets, finding that indeed, observed data lies on a disconnected set and that intrinsic dimension is not constant. We also provide insights into the implications of the union of manifolds hypothesis in deep learning, both supervised and unsupervised, showing that designing models with an inductive bias for this structure improves performance across classification and generative modelling tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/UoMH.
summary: Deep learning has had tremendous success at learning low-dimensional representations of high-dimensional data. This success would be impossible if there was no hidden low-dimensional structure in data of interest; this existence is posited by the manifold hypothesis, which states that the data lies on an unknown manifold of low intrinsic dimension. In this paper, we argue that this hypothesis does not properly capture the low-dimensional structure typically present in image data. Assuming that data lies on a single manifold implies intrinsic dimension is identical across the entire data space, and does not allow for subregions of this space to have a different number of factors of variation. To address this deficiency, we consider the union of manifolds hypothesis, which states that data lies on a disjoint union of manifolds of varying intrinsic dimensions. We empirically verify this hypothesis on commonly-used image datasets, finding that indeed, observed data lies on a disconnected set and that intrinsic dimension is not constant. We also provide insights into the implications of the union of manifolds hypothesis in deep learning, both supervised and unsupervised, showing that designing models with an inductive bias for this structure improves performance across classification and generative modelling tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/UoMH.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在学习高维数据的低维表示方面取得了巨大成功。如果感兴趣的数据中没有隐藏的低维结构，这种成功是不可能的；这种存在是由流形假说提出的，该假说指出数据位于低内在维度的未知流形上。在本文中，我们认为该假设没有正确捕获图像数据中通常存在的低维结构。假设数据位于单个流形上意味着内在维度在整个数据空间中是相同的，并且不允许该空间的子区域具有不同数量的变化因素。为了解决这个缺陷，我们考虑流形并集假设，该假设指出数据位于不同内在维度的流形的不相交并集上。我们在常用图像数据集上凭经验验证了这一假设，发现观察到的数据确实位于不连通的集合上，并且内在维度不是恒定的。我们还深入探讨了流形联合假设在监督和无监督深度学习中的影响，表明为这种结构设计具有归纳偏差的模型可以提高分类和生成建模任务的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/UoMH 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文验证图像数据是否符合'流形联合假设'，即数据分布在多个不同内在维度的流形上。
AI.motivation: 传统流形假设认为数据内在维度恒定，但图像数据常存在局部区域维度差异，需更灵活的假设。
AI.method: 在常用图像数据集上进行实证分析，验证数据是否分布在不同内在维度的离散流形集合中。
AI.result: 实验证实图像数据确实存在于非连通集合中，且内在维度随数据区域变化而非恒定。
AI.conclusion: 为深度学习模型设计符合'流形联合假设'的归纳偏置可提升分类和生成任务性能。

search_text: Verifying the Union of Manifolds Hypothesis for Image Data 验证图像数据的流形并集假设 Deep learning has had tremendous success at learning low-dimensional representations of high-dimensional data. This success would be impossible if there was no hidden low-dimensional structure in data of interest; this existence is posited by the manifold hypothesis, which states that the data lies on an unknown manifold of low intrinsic dimension. In this paper, we argue that this hypothesis does not properly capture the low-dimensional structure typically present in image data. Assuming that data lies on a single manifold implies intrinsic dimension is identical across the entire data space, and does not allow for subregions of this space to have a different number of factors of variation. To address this deficiency, we consider the union of manifolds hypothesis, which states that data lies on a disjoint union of manifolds of varying intrinsic dimensions. We empirically verify this hypothesis on commonly-used image datasets, finding that indeed, observed data lies on a disconnected set and that intrinsic dimension is not constant. We also provide insights into the implications of the union of manifolds hypothesis in deep learning, both supervised and unsupervised, showing that designing models with an inductive bias for this structure improves performance across classification and generative modelling tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/UoMH. 深度学习在学习高维数据的低维表示方面取得了巨大成功。如果感兴趣的数据中没有隐藏的低维结构，这种成功是不可能的；这种存在是由流形假说提出的，该假说指出数据位于低内在维度的未知流形上。在本文中，我们认为该假设没有正确捕获图像数据中通常存在的低维结构。假设数据位于单个流形上意味着内在维度在整个数据空间中是相同的，并且不允许该空间的子区域具有不同数量的变化因素。为了解决这个缺陷，我们考虑流形并集假设，该假设指出数据位于不同内在维度的流形的不相交并集上。我们在常用图像数据集上凭经验验证了这一假设，发现观察到的数据确实位于不连通的集合上，并且内在维度不是恒定的。我们还深入探讨了流形联合假设在监督和无监督深度学习中的影响，表明为这种结构设计具有归纳偏差的模型可以提高分类和生成建模任务的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/UoMH 获取。 该论文验证图像数据是否符合'流形联合假设'，即数据分布在多个不同内在维度的流形上。 Bradley C. A. Brown,Anthony L. Caterini,Brendan Leigh Ross,Jesse C. Cresswell,Gabriel Loaiza-Ganem stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Physical Interaction and Manipulation of the Environment using Aerial Robots
title_zh: 使用空中机器人进行物理交互和环境操纵
comment: Robotics Ph.D. Dissertation - Carnegie Mellon University Robotics Institute, May 2022 https://www.ri.cmu.edu/publications/physical-interaction-and-manipulation-of-the-environment-using-aerial-robots/
comments: Robotics Ph.D. Dissertation - Carnegie Mellon University Robotics Institute, May 2022 https://www.ri.cmu.edu/publications/physical-interaction-and-manipulation-of-the-environment-using-aerial-robots/
abstract: The physical interaction of aerial robots with their environment has countless potential applications and is an emerging area with many open challenges. Fully-actuated multirotors have been introduced to tackle some of these challenges. They provide complete control over position and orientation and eliminate the need for attaching a multi-DoF manipulation arm to the robot. However, there are many open problems before they can be used in real-world applications. Researchers have introduced some methods for physical interaction in limited settings. Their experiments primarily use prototype-level software without an efficient path to integration with real-world applications. We describe a new cost-effective solution for integrating these robots with the existing software and hardware flight systems for real-world applications and expand it to physical interaction applications. On the other hand, the existing control approaches for fully-actuated robots assume conservative limits for the thrusts and moments available to the robot. Using conservative assumptions for these already-inefficient robots makes their interactions even less optimal and may even result in many feasible physical interaction applications becoming infeasible. This work proposes a real-time method for estimating the complete set of instantaneously available forces and moments that robots can use to optimize their physical interaction performance. Finally, many real-world applications where aerial robots can improve the existing manual solutions deal with deformable objects. However, the perception and planning for their manipulation is still challenging. This research explores how aerial physical interaction can be extended to deformable objects. It provides a detection method suitable for manipulating deformable one-dimensional objects and introduces a new perspective on planning the manipulation of these objects.
summary: The physical interaction of aerial robots with their environment has countless potential applications and is an emerging area with many open challenges. Fully-actuated multirotors have been introduced to tackle some of these challenges. They provide complete control over position and orientation and eliminate the need for attaching a multi-DoF manipulation arm to the robot. However, there are many open problems before they can be used in real-world applications. Researchers have introduced some methods for physical interaction in limited settings. Their experiments primarily use prototype-level software without an efficient path to integration with real-world applications. We describe a new cost-effective solution for integrating these robots with the existing software and hardware flight systems for real-world applications and expand it to physical interaction applications. On the other hand, the existing control approaches for fully-actuated robots assume conservative limits for the thrusts and moments available to the robot. Using conservative assumptions for these already-inefficient robots makes their interactions even less optimal and may even result in many feasible physical interaction applications becoming infeasible. This work proposes a real-time method for estimating the complete set of instantaneously available forces and moments that robots can use to optimize their physical interaction performance. Finally, many real-world applications where aerial robots can improve the existing manual solutions deal with deformable objects. However, the perception and planning for their manipulation is still challenging. This research explores how aerial physical interaction can be extended to deformable objects. It provides a detection method suitable for manipulating deformable one-dimensional objects and introduces a new perspective on planning the manipulation of these objects.
abstract_zh: 空中机器人与其环境的物理交互具有无数的潜在应用，并且是一个充满挑战的新兴领域。全驱动多旋翼飞行器的出现是为了解决其中一些挑战。它们提供对位置和方向的完全控制，并且无需将多自由度操纵臂连接到机器人。然而，在将它们用于实际应用之前，还存在许多悬而未决的问题。研究人员引入了一些在有限环境下进行身体互动的方法。他们的实验主要使用原型级软件，没有与实际应用程序集成的有效途径。我们描述了一种新的经济高效的解决方案，用于将这些机器人与现有的软件和硬件飞行系统集成以用于实际应用，并将其扩展到物理交互应用。另一方面，现有的全驱动机器人控制方法对机器人可用的推力和力矩假设了保守的限制。对这些已经低效的机器人使用保守的假设会使它们的交互变得更不理想，甚至可能导致许多可行的物理交互应用变得不可行。这项工作提出了一种实时方法，用于估计机器人可以用来优化其物理交互性能的全套瞬时可用力和力矩。最后，空中机器人可以改进处理可变形物体的现有手动解决方案的许多实际应用。然而，对其操纵的认知和规划仍然具有挑战性。这项研究探讨了如何将空中物理交互扩展到可变形物体。它提供了一种适合操纵可变形一维物体的检测方法，并为规划这些物体的操纵引入了新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于空中机器人与环境进行物理交互和操作的新方法，特别是在处理可变形物体时。
AI.motivation: 尽管全驱动多旋翼无人机在物理交互方面具有潜力，但现有方法在实际应用中面临许多挑战，如软件集成效率低、控制策略保守以及对可变形物体的感知和规划困难。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种实时估计机器人可用力和力矩的方法，并将其应用于实际环境中的物理交互任务，同时探索了针对可变形一维物体的检测和操作规划方法。
AI.result: 该研究提供了一种成本效益高的集成方案，提高了空中机器人在物理交互任务中的性能，并提出了针对可变形物体的检测和规划方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为实际应用中空中机器人与环境的物理交互提供了有效的解决方案，并拓展了其在可变形物体操作中的应用前景。

title: Perfusion imaging in deep prostate cancer detection from mp-MRI: can we take advantage of it?
title_zh: mp-MRI 检测深部前列腺癌的灌注成像：我们可以利用它吗？
comment: ef:19th IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI), Mar 2022, Kolkata, India. pp.1-5
comments: ef:19th IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI), Mar 2022, Kolkata, India. pp.1-5
abstract: To our knowledge, all deep computer-aided detection and diagnosis (CAD) systems for prostate cancer (PCa) detection consider bi-parametric magnetic resonance imaging (bp-MRI) only, including T2w and ADC sequences while excluding the 4D perfusion sequence,which is however part of standard clinical protocols for this diagnostic task. In this paper, we question strategies to integrate information from perfusion imaging in deep neural architectures. To do so, we evaluate several ways to encode the perfusion information in a U-Net like architecture, also considering early versus mid fusion strategies. We compare performance of multiparametric MRI (mp-MRI) models with the baseline bp-MRI model based on a private dataset of 219 mp-MRI exams. Perfusion maps derived from dynamic contrast enhanced MR exams are shown to positively impact segmentation and grading performance of PCa lesions, especially the 3D MR volume corresponding to the maximum slope of the wash-in curve as well as Tmax perfusion maps. The latter mp-MRI models indeed outperform the bp-MRI one whatever the fusion strategy, with Cohen's kappa score of 0.318$\pm$0.019 for the bp-MRI model and 0.378 $\pm$ 0.033 for the model including the maximum slope with a mid fusion strategy, also achieving competitive Cohen's kappa score compared to state of the art.
summary: To our knowledge, all deep computer-aided detection and diagnosis (CAD) systems for prostate cancer (PCa) detection consider bi-parametric magnetic resonance imaging (bp-MRI) only, including T2w and ADC sequences while excluding the 4D perfusion sequence,which is however part of standard clinical protocols for this diagnostic task. In this paper, we question strategies to integrate information from perfusion imaging in deep neural architectures. To do so, we evaluate several ways to encode the perfusion information in a U-Net like architecture, also considering early versus mid fusion strategies. We compare performance of multiparametric MRI (mp-MRI) models with the baseline bp-MRI model based on a private dataset of 219 mp-MRI exams. Perfusion maps derived from dynamic contrast enhanced MR exams are shown to positively impact segmentation and grading performance of PCa lesions, especially the 3D MR volume corresponding to the maximum slope of the wash-in curve as well as Tmax perfusion maps. The latter mp-MRI models indeed outperform the bp-MRI one whatever the fusion strategy, with Cohen's kappa score of 0.318$\pm$0.019 for the bp-MRI model and 0.378 $\pm$ 0.033 for the model including the maximum slope with a mid fusion strategy, also achieving competitive Cohen's kappa score compared to state of the art.
abstract_zh: 据我们所知，所有用于前列腺癌（PCa）检测的深度计算机辅助检测和诊断（CAD）系统仅考虑双参数磁共振成像（bp-MRI），包括T2w和ADC序列，而排除4D灌注序列，然而这是该诊断任务的标准临床方案的一部分。在本文中，我们质疑将灌注成像信息整合到深度神经架构中的策略。为此，我们评估了在类似 U-Net 的架构中编码灌注信息的几种方法，同时还考虑了早期与中期融合策略。我们将多参数 MRI (mp-MRI) 模型的性能与基于 219 个 mp-MRI 检查的私有数据集的基线 bp-MRI 模型进行比较。动态对比增强 MR 检查得出的灌注图对 PCa 病变的分割和分级性能产生积极影响，特别是与洗入曲线最大斜率相对应的 3D MR 体积以及 Tmax 灌注图。无论融合策略如何，后者的 mp-MRI 模型确实优于 bp-MRI，bp-MRI 模型的 Cohen kappa 分数为 0.318$\pm$0.019，而包含中间融合策略的最大斜率的模型为 0.378 $\pm$0.033，与现有技术相比，也实现了具有竞争力的 Cohen's kappa 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在使用多参数磁共振成像（mp-MRI）检测前列腺癌（PCa）时，如何利用灌注成像信息来提高深度学习模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 目前大多数深度学习辅助检测和诊断系统仅使用双参数MRI（bp-MRI）进行前列腺癌检测，而忽略了灌注成像这一标准临床协议的一部分。因此，本文旨在研究如何将灌注成像信息整合到深度神经网络架构中以提高检测效果。
AI.method: 作者在U-Net架构中评估了多种编码灌注信息的方法，并比较了不同融合策略（早期融合和中期融合）下mp-MRI模型与基线bp-MRI模型的性能。
AI.result: 结果显示，结合灌注信息的mp-MRI模型在分割和分级性能上优于bp-MRI模型，其中最大上升曲线斜率和Tmax灌注图对性能提升最为显著。
AI.conclusion: 灌注成像信息可以有效提升深度学习模型在前列腺癌检测中的性能，尤其是在使用最大上升曲线斜率和Tmax灌注图时，且表现与当前最先进的方法相当。

ai_content.result: 结果显示，结合灌注信息的mp-MRI模型在分割和分级性能上优于bp-MRI模型，其中最大上升曲线斜率和Tmax灌注图对性能提升最为显著。
ai_content.conclusion: 灌注成像信息可以有效提升深度学习模型在前列腺癌检测中的性能，尤其是在使用最大上升曲线斜率和Tmax灌注图时，且表现与当前最先进的方法相当。

search_text: Perfusion imaging in deep prostate cancer detection from mp-MRI: can we take advantage of it? mp-MRI 检测深部前列腺癌的灌注成像：我们可以利用它吗？ To our knowledge, all deep computer-aided detection and diagnosis (CAD) systems for prostate cancer (PCa) detection consider bi-parametric magnetic resonance imaging (bp-MRI) only, including T2w and ADC sequences while excluding the 4D perfusion sequence,which is however part of standard clinical protocols for this diagnostic task. In this paper, we question strategies to integrate information from perfusion imaging in deep neural architectures. To do so, we evaluate several ways to encode the perfusion information in a U-Net like architecture, also considering early versus mid fusion strategies. We compare performance of multiparametric MRI (mp-MRI) models with the baseline bp-MRI model based on a private dataset of 219 mp-MRI exams. Perfusion maps derived from dynamic contrast enhanced MR exams are shown to positively impact segmentation and grading performance of PCa lesions, especially the 3D MR volume corresponding to the maximum slope of the wash-in curve as well as Tmax perfusion maps. The latter mp-MRI models indeed outperform the bp-MRI one whatever the fusion strategy, with Cohen's kappa score of 0.318$\pm$0.019 for the bp-MRI model and 0.378 $\pm$ 0.033 for the model including the maximum slope with a mid fusion strategy, also achieving competitive Cohen's kappa score compared to state of the art. 据我们所知，所有用于前列腺癌（PCa）检测的深度计算机辅助检测和诊断（CAD）系统仅考虑双参数磁共振成像（bp-MRI），包括T2w和ADC序列，而排除4D灌注序列，然而这是该诊断任务的标准临床方案的一部分。在本文中，我们质疑将灌注成像信息整合到深度神经架构中的策略。为此，我们评估了在类似 U-Net 的架构中编码灌注信息的几种方法，同时还考虑了早期与中期融合策略。我们将多参数 MRI (mp-MRI) 模型的性能与基于 219 个 mp-MRI 检查的私有数据集的基线 bp-MRI 模型进行比较。动态对比增强 MR 检查得出的灌注图对 PCa 病变的分割和分级性能产生积极影响，特别是与洗入曲线最大斜率相对应的 3D MR 体积以及 Tmax 灌注图。无论融合策略如何，后者的 mp-MRI 模型确实优于 bp-MRI，bp-MRI 模型的 Cohen kappa 分数为 0.318$\pm$0.019，而包含中间融合策略的最大斜率的模型为 0.378 $\pm$0.033，与现有技术相比，也实现了具有竞争力的 Cohen's kappa 分数。 本文探讨了在使用多参数磁共振成像（mp-MRI）检测前列腺癌（PCa）时，如何利用灌注成像信息来提高深度学习模型的性能。 Audrey Duran,Gaspard Dussert,Carole Lartizien eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Pablo Villalobos,Jaime Sevilla,Tamay Besiroglu,Lennart Heim,Anson Ho,Marius Hobbhahn
title: Machine Learning Model Sizes and the Parameter Gap
title_zh: 机器学习模型大小和参数差距
abstract: We study trends in model size of notable machine learning systems over time using a curated dataset. From 1950 to 2018, model size in language models increased steadily by seven orders of magnitude. The trend then accelerated, with model size increasing by another five orders of magnitude in just 4 years from 2018 to 2022. Vision models grew at a more constant pace, totaling 7 orders of magnitude of growth between 1950 and 2022. We also identify that, since 2020, there have been many language models below 20B parameters, many models above 70B parameters, but a scarcity of models in the 20-70B parameter range. We refer to that scarcity as the parameter gap. We provide some stylized facts about the parameter gap and propose a few hypotheses to explain it. The explanations we favor are: (a) increasing model size beyond 20B parameters requires adopting different parallelism techniques, which makes mid-sized models less cost-effective, (b) GPT-3 was one order of magnitude larger than previous language models, and researchers afterwards primarily experimented with bigger models to outperform it. While these dynamics likely exist, and we believe they play some role in generating the gap, we don't have high confidence that there are no other, more important dynamics at play.
summary: We study trends in model size of notable machine learning systems over time using a curated dataset. From 1950 to 2018, model size in language models increased steadily by seven orders of magnitude. The trend then accelerated, with model size increasing by another five orders of magnitude in just 4 years from 2018 to 2022. Vision models grew at a more constant pace, totaling 7 orders of magnitude of growth between 1950 and 2022. We also identify that, since 2020, there have been many language models below 20B parameters, many models above 70B parameters, but a scarcity of models in the 20-70B parameter range. We refer to that scarcity as the parameter gap. We provide some stylized facts about the parameter gap and propose a few hypotheses to explain it. The explanations we favor are: (a) increasing model size beyond 20B parameters requires adopting different parallelism techniques, which makes mid-sized models less cost-effective, (b) GPT-3 was one order of magnitude larger than previous language models, and researchers afterwards primarily experimented with bigger models to outperform it. While these dynamics likely exist, and we believe they play some role in generating the gap, we don't have high confidence that there are no other, more important dynamics at play.
abstract_zh: 我们使用精选的数据集研究著名机器学习系统的模型大小随时间的变化趋势。从 1950 年到 2018 年，语言模型的模型大小稳步增长了七个数量级。然后这一趋势加速，从 2018 年到 2022 年的短短 4 年里，模型大小又增加了 5 个数量级。视觉模型的增长速度更加稳定，从 1950 年到 2022 年总共增长了 7 个数量级。我们还发现，自 2020 年以来，有许多低于 20B 参数的语言模型，许多模型高于 70B 参数，但在 20-70B 参数范围内的模型很少。我们将这种稀缺性称为参数差距。我们提供了一些关于参数差距的典型事实，并提出了一些假设来解释它。我们赞成的解释是：（a）将模型大小增加到超过 20B 参数需要采用不同的并行技术，这使得中型模型的成本效益降低，（b）GPT-3 比以前的语言模型大一个数量级，研究人员后来主要尝试使用更大的模型来超越它。虽然这些动力可能存在，而且我们相信它们在产生差距方面发挥了一定作用，但我们没有很高的信心认为没有其他更重要的动力在起作用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了1950年至2022年间机器学习模型规模的增长趋势，并分析了语言模型和视觉模型的参数增长差异，提出了参数缺口现象及其可能原因。
AI.motivation: 随着模型规模的指数级增长，研究者希望了解模型参数数量的变化趋势，以及为何在20B至70B参数区间出现模型稀缺现象（参数缺口）。
AI.method: 通过构建历史数据集，分析语言模型和视觉模型的参数增长曲线，结合行业案例提出参数缺口的成因假设。
AI.result: 语言模型参数量从1950年到2018年增长7个数量级，2018-2022年再增5个数量级；视觉模型增长更平稳。20B-70B参数区间模型稀缺，称为参数缺口。
AI.conclusion: 参数缺口可能由并行计算技术门槛和GPT-3的标杆效应导致，但存在其他潜在因素，需进一步研究验证。

title: Tensor networks in machine learning
title_zh: 机器学习中的张量网络
abstract: A tensor network is a type of decomposition used to express and approximate large arrays of data. A given data-set, quantum state or higher dimensional multi-linear map is factored and approximated by a composition of smaller multi-linear maps. This is reminiscent to how a Boolean function might be decomposed into a gate array: this represents a special case of tensor decomposition, in which the tensor entries are replaced by 0, 1 and the factorisation becomes exact. The collection of associated techniques are called, tensor network methods: the subject developed independently in several distinct fields of study, which have more recently become interrelated through the language of tensor networks. The tantamount questions in the field relate to expressability of tensor networks and the reduction of computational overheads. A merger of tensor networks with machine learning is natural. On the one hand, machine learning can aid in determining a factorization of a tensor network approximating a data set. On the other hand, a given tensor network structure can be viewed as a machine learning model. Herein the tensor network parameters are adjusted to learn or classify a data-set. In this survey we recover the basics of tensor networks and explain the ongoing effort to develop the theory of tensor networks in machine learning.
summary: A tensor network is a type of decomposition used to express and approximate large arrays of data. A given data-set, quantum state or higher dimensional multi-linear map is factored and approximated by a composition of smaller multi-linear maps. This is reminiscent to how a Boolean function might be decomposed into a gate array: this represents a special case of tensor decomposition, in which the tensor entries are replaced by 0, 1 and the factorisation becomes exact. The collection of associated techniques are called, tensor network methods: the subject developed independently in several distinct fields of study, which have more recently become interrelated through the language of tensor networks. The tantamount questions in the field relate to expressability of tensor networks and the reduction of computational overheads. A merger of tensor networks with machine learning is natural. On the one hand, machine learning can aid in determining a factorization of a tensor network approximating a data set. On the other hand, a given tensor network structure can be viewed as a machine learning model. Herein the tensor network parameters are adjusted to learn or classify a data-set. In this survey we recover the basics of tensor networks and explain the ongoing effort to develop the theory of tensor networks in machine learning.
abstract_zh: 张量网络是一种用于表达和近似大型数据数组的分解类型。给定的数据集、量子态或更高维的多线性映射被分解并通过更小的多线性映射的组合来近似。这让人想起布尔函数如何分解为门数组：这代表张量分解的特殊情况，其中张量条目被 0、1 替换，并且因式分解变得精确。相关技术的集合称为张量网络方法：该学科在几个不同的研究领域独立发展，最近这些领域通过张量网络语言变得相互关联。该领域的同等问题涉及张量网络的可表达性和计算开销的减少。张量网络与机器学习的合并是很自然的。一方面，机器学习可以帮助确定近似数据集的张量网络的因式分解。另一方面，给定的张量网络结构可以被视为机器学习模型。这里调整张量网络参数以学习或分类数据集。在本次调查中，我们回顾了张量网络的基础知识，并解释了在机器学习中发展张量网络理论的持续努力。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了张量网络在机器学习中的应用，探讨了张量网络的分解方法及其与机器学习的结合。
AI.motivation: 张量网络作为一种分解方法，能够有效地表示和近似高维数据，而机器学习在数据建模和分类方面具有优势，因此两者的结合具有重要意义。
AI.method: 本文通过回顾张量网络的基本概念，并结合机器学习的方法，探讨了如何利用张量网络进行数据集的分解和分类。
AI.result: 本文总结了张量网络在机器学习中的理论发展和应用进展，并指出了当前研究中的一些关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 张量网络与机器学习的结合为高维数据的处理提供了新的方法，但仍需进一步研究其表达能力和计算效率的优化。

motivation: 张量网络作为一种分解方法，能够有效地表示和近似高维数据，而机器学习在数据建模和分类方面具有优势，因此两者的结合具有重要意义。
method: 本文通过回顾张量网络的基本概念，并结合机器学习的方法，探讨了如何利用张量网络进行数据集的分解和分类。
result: 本文总结了张量网络在机器学习中的理论发展和应用进展，并指出了当前研究中的一些关键问题。
conclusion: 张量网络与机器学习的结合为高维数据的处理提供了新的方法，但仍需进一步研究其表达能力和计算效率的优化。
search_text: Tensor networks in machine learning 机器学习中的张量网络 A tensor network is a type of decomposition used to express and approximate large arrays of data. A given data-set, quantum state or higher dimensional multi-linear map is factored and approximated by a composition of smaller multi-linear maps. This is reminiscent to how a Boolean function might be decomposed into a gate array: this represents a special case of tensor decomposition, in which the tensor entries are replaced by 0, 1 and the factorisation becomes exact. The collection of associated techniques are called, tensor network methods: the subject developed independently in several distinct fields of study, which have more recently become interrelated through the language of tensor networks. The tantamount questions in the field relate to expressability of tensor networks and the reduction of computational overheads. A merger of tensor networks with machine learning is natural. On the one hand, machine learning can aid in determining a factorization of a tensor network approximating a data set. On the other hand, a given tensor network structure can be viewed as a machine learning model. Herein the tensor network parameters are adjusted to learn or classify a data-set. In this survey we recover the basics of tensor networks and explain the ongoing effort to develop the theory of tensor networks in machine learning. 张量网络是一种用于表达和近似大型数据数组的分解类型。给定的数据集、量子态或更高维的多线性映射被分解并通过更小的多线性映射的组合来近似。这让人想起布尔函数如何分解为门数组：这代表张量分解的特殊情况，其中张量条目被 0、1 替换，并且因式分解变得精确。相关技术的集合称为张量网络方法：该学科在几个不同的研究领域独立发展，最近这些领域通过张量网络语言变得相互关联。该领域的同等问题涉及张量网络的可表达性和计算开销的减少。张量网络与机器学习的合并是很自然的。一方面，机器学习可以帮助确定近似数据集的张量网络的因式分解。另一方面，给定的张量网络结构可以被视为机器学习模型。这里调整张量网络参数以学习或分类数据集。在本次调查中，我们回顾了张量网络的基础知识，并解释了在机器学习中发展张量网络理论的持续努力。 本文综述了张量网络在机器学习中的应用，探讨了张量网络的分解方法及其与机器学习的结合。 Richik Sengupta,Soumik Adhikary,Ivan Oseledets,Jacob Biamonte quant-ph,cond-mat.dis-nn,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sang Keun Choe,Willie Neiswanger,Pengtao Xie,Eric Xing
title: Betty: An Automatic Differentiation Library for Multilevel Optimization
title_zh: Betty：用于多级优化的自动微分库
abstract: Gradient-based multilevel optimization (MLO) has gained attention as a framework for studying numerous problems, ranging from hyperparameter optimization and meta-learning to neural architecture search and reinforcement learning. However, gradients in MLO, which are obtained by composing best-response Jacobians via the chain rule, are notoriously difficult to implement and memory/compute intensive. We take an initial step towards closing this gap by introducing Betty, a software library for large-scale MLO. At its core, we devise a novel dataflow graph for MLO, which allows us to (1) develop efficient automatic differentiation for MLO that reduces the computational complexity from O(d^3) to O(d^2), (2) incorporate systems support such as mixed-precision and data-parallel training for scalability, and (3) facilitate implementation of MLO programs of arbitrary complexity while allowing a modular interface for diverse algorithmic and systems design choices. We empirically demonstrate that Betty can be used to implement an array of MLO programs, while also observing up to 11% increase in test accuracy, 14% decrease in GPU memory usage, and 20% decrease in training wall time over existing implementations on multiple benchmarks. We also showcase that Betty enables scaling MLO to models with hundreds of millions of parameters. We open-source the code at https://github.com/leopard-ai/betty.
summary: Gradient-based multilevel optimization (MLO) has gained attention as a framework for studying numerous problems, ranging from hyperparameter optimization and meta-learning to neural architecture search and reinforcement learning. However, gradients in MLO, which are obtained by composing best-response Jacobians via the chain rule, are notoriously difficult to implement and memory/compute intensive. We take an initial step towards closing this gap by introducing Betty, a software library for large-scale MLO. At its core, we devise a novel dataflow graph for MLO, which allows us to (1) develop efficient automatic differentiation for MLO that reduces the computational complexity from O(d^3) to O(d^2), (2) incorporate systems support such as mixed-precision and data-parallel training for scalability, and (3) facilitate implementation of MLO programs of arbitrary complexity while allowing a modular interface for diverse algorithmic and systems design choices. We empirically demonstrate that Betty can be used to implement an array of MLO programs, while also observing up to 11% increase in test accuracy, 14% decrease in GPU memory usage, and 20% decrease in training wall time over existing implementations on multiple benchmarks. We also showcase that Betty enables scaling MLO to models with hundreds of millions of parameters. We open-source the code at https://github.com/leopard-ai/betty.
abstract_zh: 基于梯度的多级优化（MLO）作为研究众多问题的框架而受到关注，从超参数优化和元学习到神经架构搜索和强化学习。然而，MLO 中的梯度是通过链式法则组合最佳响应雅可比行列式获得的，其实现起来非常困难，并且需要大量内存/计算。我们为缩小这一差距迈出了第一步，引入了 Betty，一个用于大规模 MLO 的软件库。其核心是，我们为 MLO 设计了一种新颖的数据流图，它使我们能够 (1) 为 MLO 开发高效的自动微分，将计算复杂度从 O(d^3) 降低到 O(d^2)，(2) 合并系统支持，例如混合精度和数据并行训练以实现可扩展性，(3) 促进任意复杂度的 MLO 程序的实现，同时允许为不同的算法和系统设计选择提供模块化接口。我们凭经验证明，Betty 可用于实现一系列 MLO 程序，同时在多个基准测试中，与现有实现相比，测试精度提高了 11%，GPU 内存使用量减少了 14%，训练时间减少了 20%。我们还展示了 Betty 能够将 MLO 扩展到具有数亿参数的模型。我们在 https://github.com/leopard-ai/betty 开源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Betty库，用于解决多级优化（MLO）中的梯度计算难题，提升计算效率和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有MLO框架中梯度计算复杂度高（O(d³)）、内存消耗大且难以实现，限制了其在大规模问题中的应用。
AI.method: 设计新型数据流图，实现O(d²)复杂度的自动微分；集成混合精度训练和数据并行技术；提供模块化接口支持复杂MLO程序开发。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，测试准确率提升11%，GPU内存减少14%，训练时间缩短20%，并成功扩展至数亿参数模型。
AI.conclusion: Betty通过算法创新与系统优化有效解决了MLO的工程化难题，开源代码可推动该领域进一步发展。

title: A domain-specific language for describing machine learning datasets
title_zh: 用于描述机器学习数据集的特定领域语言
abstract: Datasets play a central role in the training and evaluation of machine learning (ML) models. But they are also the root cause of many undesired model behaviors, such as biased predictions. To overcome this situation, the ML community is proposing a data-centric cultural shift where data issues are given the attention they deserve, and more standard practices around the gathering and processing of datasets start to be discussed and established. So far, these proposals are mostly high-level guidelines described in natural language and, as such, they are difficult to formalize and apply to particular datasets. In this sense, and inspired by these proposals, we define a new domain-specific language (DSL) to precisely describe machine learning datasets in terms of their structure, data provenance, and social concerns. We believe this DSL will facilitate any ML initiative to leverage and benefit from this data-centric shift in ML (e.g., selecting the most appropriate dataset for a new project or better replicating other ML results). The DSL is implemented as a Visual Studio Code plugin, and it has been published under an open source license.
summary: Datasets play a central role in the training and evaluation of machine learning (ML) models. But they are also the root cause of many undesired model behaviors, such as biased predictions. To overcome this situation, the ML community is proposing a data-centric cultural shift where data issues are given the attention they deserve, and more standard practices around the gathering and processing of datasets start to be discussed and established. So far, these proposals are mostly high-level guidelines described in natural language and, as such, they are difficult to formalize and apply to particular datasets. In this sense, and inspired by these proposals, we define a new domain-specific language (DSL) to precisely describe machine learning datasets in terms of their structure, data provenance, and social concerns. We believe this DSL will facilitate any ML initiative to leverage and benefit from this data-centric shift in ML (e.g., selecting the most appropriate dataset for a new project or better replicating other ML results). The DSL is implemented as a Visual Studio Code plugin, and it has been published under an open source license.
abstract_zh: 数据集在机器学习 (ML) 模型的训练和评估中发挥着核心作用。但它们也是许多不良模型行为（例如有偏差的预测）的根本原因。为了克服这种情况，机器学习社区提出了一种以数据为中心的文化转变，其中数据问题得到应有的关注，并开始讨论和建立围绕数据集收集和处理的更多标准实践。到目前为止，这些建议大多是用自然语言描述的高级指南，因此它们很难形式化并应用于特定的数据集。从这个意义上说，并受到这些提案的启发，我们定义了一种新的领域特定语言（DSL）来精确描述机器学习数据集的结构、数据来源和社会​​关注点。我们相信，该 DSL 将促进任何 ML 计划利用 ML 中这种以数据为中心的转变并从中受益（例如，为新项目选择最合适的数据集或更好地复制其他 ML 结果）。 DSL 作为 Visual Studio Code 插件实现，并且已在开源许可下发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种领域特定语言（DSL）以精确描述机器学习数据集的结构、数据来源及社会问题，推动数据为中心的机器学习实践。
AI.motivation: 解决机器学习模型中因数据集问题导致的偏差等不良行为，推动数据为中心的文化转变，需形式化方法规范数据集描述。
AI.method: 设计并实现一种DSL，用于描述数据集的结构、来源及社会问题，并开发为Visual Studio Code插件，开源发布。
AI.result: 该DSL作为工具支持数据集的精确描述，促进数据选择与结果复现，助力数据驱动的机器学习实践。
AI.conclusion: 通过形式化数据集描述，该DSL有效推动机器学习领域的数据为中心转型，提升模型可靠性与可复现性。

title: Scoring Rules for Performative Binary Prediction
title_zh: 执行二元预测的评分规则
comment: 4 pages, accepted to workshop on Strategic Machine Learning at NeurIPS 2021
comments: 4 pages, accepted to workshop on Strategic Machine Learning at NeurIPS 2021
abstract: We construct a model of expert prediction where predictions can influence the state of the world. Under this model, we show through theoretical and numerical results that proper scoring rules can incentivize experts to manipulate the world with their predictions. We also construct a simple class of scoring rules that avoids this problem.
summary: We construct a model of expert prediction where predictions can influence the state of the world. Under this model, we show through theoretical and numerical results that proper scoring rules can incentivize experts to manipulate the world with their predictions. We also construct a simple class of scoring rules that avoids this problem.
abstract_zh: 我们构建了一个专家预测模型，其中预测可以影响世界状况。在这个模型下，我们通过理论和数值结果表明，适当的评分规则可以激励专家通过他们的预测来操纵世界。我们还构建了一类简单的评分规则来避免这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在预测可能影响世界状态的情况下，如何设计评分规则以避免专家通过预测操纵现实的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统评分规则可能激励专家通过操纵世界状态来获得更高分数，导致预测结果失真，需设计避免此问题的评分规则。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和数值实验，证明现有评分规则的缺陷，并构建一种简单评分规则类以消除操纵激励。
AI.result: 理论与数值结果表明，新设计的评分规则能有效防止专家操纵世界状态，同时保持预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的评分规则解决了预测行为影响现实时的激励扭曲问题，为相关领域提供可行解决方案。
