search_text: Scoring Rules for Performative Binary Prediction 执行二元预测的评分规则 We construct a model of expert prediction where predictions can influence the state of the world. Under this model, we show through theoretical and numerical results that proper scoring rules can incentivize experts to manipulate the world with their predictions. We also construct a simple class of scoring rules that avoids this problem. 我们构建了一个专家预测模型，其中预测可以影响世界状况。在这个模型下，我们通过理论和数值结果表明，适当的评分规则可以激励专家通过他们的预测来操纵世界。我们还构建了一类简单的评分规则来避免这个问题。 本文研究了在预测可能影响世界状态的情况下，如何设计评分规则以避免专家通过预测操纵现实的问题。 Alan Chan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Liang Li,Siwei Wang,Xinwang Liu,En Zhu,Li Shen,Kenli Li,Keqin Li
title: Local Sample-weighted Multiple Kernel Clustering with Consensus Discriminative Graph
title_zh: 具有共识判别图的局部样本加权多核聚类
abstract: Multiple kernel clustering (MKC) is committed to achieving optimal information fusion from a set of base kernels. Constructing precise and local kernel matrices is proved to be of vital significance in applications since the unreliable distant-distance similarity estimation would degrade clustering per-formance. Although existing localized MKC algorithms exhibit improved performance compared to globally-designed competi-tors, most of them widely adopt KNN mechanism to localize kernel matrix by accounting for τ -nearest neighbors. However, such a coarse manner follows an unreasonable strategy that the ranking importance of different neighbors is equal, which is impractical in applications. To alleviate such problems, this paper proposes a novel local sample-weighted multiple kernel clustering (LSWMKC) model. We first construct a consensus discriminative affinity graph in kernel space, revealing the latent local structures. Further, an optimal neighborhood kernel for the learned affinity graph is output with naturally sparse property and clear block diagonal structure. Moreover, LSWMKC im-plicitly optimizes adaptive weights on different neighbors with corresponding samples. Experimental results demonstrate that our LSWMKC possesses better local manifold representation and outperforms existing kernel or graph-based clustering algo-rithms. The source code of LSWMKC can be publicly accessed from https://github.com/liliangnudt/LSWMKC.
summary: Multiple kernel clustering (MKC) is committed to achieving optimal information fusion from a set of base kernels. Constructing precise and local kernel matrices is proved to be of vital significance in applications since the unreliable distant-distance similarity estimation would degrade clustering per-formance. Although existing localized MKC algorithms exhibit improved performance compared to globally-designed competi-tors, most of them widely adopt KNN mechanism to localize kernel matrix by accounting for τ -nearest neighbors. However, such a coarse manner follows an unreasonable strategy that the ranking importance of different neighbors is equal, which is impractical in applications. To alleviate such problems, this paper proposes a novel local sample-weighted multiple kernel clustering (LSWMKC) model. We first construct a consensus discriminative affinity graph in kernel space, revealing the latent local structures. Further, an optimal neighborhood kernel for the learned affinity graph is output with naturally sparse property and clear block diagonal structure. Moreover, LSWMKC im-plicitly optimizes adaptive weights on different neighbors with corresponding samples. Experimental results demonstrate that our LSWMKC possesses better local manifold representation and outperforms existing kernel or graph-based clustering algo-rithms. The source code of LSWMKC can be publicly accessed from https://github.com/liliangnudt/LSWMKC.
abstract_zh: 多核聚类（MKC）致力于从一组基本核中实现最佳信息融合。事实证明，构造精确的局部核矩阵在应用中具有重要意义，因为不可靠的远距离相似性估计会降低聚类性能。尽管现有的局部 MKC 算法与全局设计的竞争对手相比表现出更好的性能，但它们大多数广泛采用 KNN 机制通过考虑 τ 最近邻来局部化核矩阵。然而，这种粗略的方式遵循不合理的策略，即不同邻居的排序重要性相等，这在应用中是不切实际的。为了缓解此类问题，本文提出了一种新颖的局部样本加权多核聚类（LSWMKC）模型。我们首先在内核空间中构建一个一致的判别亲和图，揭示潜在的局部结构。此外，输出了学习到的亲和图的最佳邻域核，具有自然稀疏的特性和清晰的块对角线结构。此外，LSWMKC 隐式地优化了具有相应样本的不同邻居的自适应权重。实验结果表明，我们的 LSWMKC 具有更好的局部流形表示，并且优于现有的基于内核或基于图的聚类算法。 LSWMKC 的源代码可以从 https://github.com/liliangnudt/LSWMKC 公开访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种局部样本加权的多核聚类方法（LSWMKC），通过构建共识判别亲和图优化局部流形表示，提升聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有局部多核聚类算法采用KNN机制时，对不同邻居的重要性权重处理不合理，导致聚类效果受限。
AI.method: 构建核空间共识判别亲和图揭示局部结构，输出具有稀疏性和块对角结构的最优邻域核，并隐式优化样本的自适应邻居权重。
AI.result: 实验表明LSWMKC在局部流形表示和聚类性能上优于现有核或图聚类算法。
AI.conclusion: LSWMKC通过合理建模局部样本权重和结构信息，有效提升了多核聚类的准确性与鲁棒性。

title: Automating the Design and Development of Gradient Descent Trained Expert System Networks
title_zh: 梯度下降训练专家系统网络的自动化设计和开发
abstract: Prior work introduced a gradient descent trained expert system that conceptually combines the learning capabilities of neural networks with the understandability and defensible logic of an expert system. This system was shown to be able to learn patterns from data and to perform decision-making at levels rivaling those reported by neural network systems. The principal limitation of the approach, though, was the necessity for the manual development of a rule-fact network (which is then trained using backpropagation). This paper proposes a technique for overcoming this significant limitation, as compared to neural networks. Specifically, this paper proposes the use of larger and denser-than-application need rule-fact networks which are trained, pruned, manually reviewed and then re-trained for use. Multiple types of networks are evaluated under multiple operating conditions and these results are presented and assessed. Based on these individual experimental condition assessments, the proposed technique is evaluated. The data presented shows that error rates as low as 3.9% (mean, 1.2% median) can be obtained, demonstrating the efficacy of this technique for many applications.
summary: Prior work introduced a gradient descent trained expert system that conceptually combines the learning capabilities of neural networks with the understandability and defensible logic of an expert system. This system was shown to be able to learn patterns from data and to perform decision-making at levels rivaling those reported by neural network systems. The principal limitation of the approach, though, was the necessity for the manual development of a rule-fact network (which is then trained using backpropagation). This paper proposes a technique for overcoming this significant limitation, as compared to neural networks. Specifically, this paper proposes the use of larger and denser-than-application need rule-fact networks which are trained, pruned, manually reviewed and then re-trained for use. Multiple types of networks are evaluated under multiple operating conditions and these results are presented and assessed. Based on these individual experimental condition assessments, the proposed technique is evaluated. The data presented shows that error rates as low as 3.9% (mean, 1.2% median) can be obtained, demonstrating the efficacy of this technique for many applications.
abstract_zh: 先前的工作引入了梯度下降训练的专家系统，该系统在概念上将神经网络的学习能力与专家系统的可理解性和可防御逻辑结合起来。该系统被证明能够从数据中学习模式，并以与神经网络系统报告的水平相媲美的水平执行决策。然而，该方法的主要限制是需要手动开发规则事实网络（然后使用反向传播进行训练）。与神经网络相比，本文提出了一种克服这一重大限制的技术。具体来说，本文建议使用比应用程序需要的更大、更密集的规则事实网络，这些网络经过训练、修剪、手动审查，然后重新训练以供使用。在多种操作条件下评估多种类型的网络，并呈现和评估这些结果。根据这些单独的实验条件评估，对所提出的技术进行评估。所提供的数据显示，可以获得低至 3.9% 的错误率（平均数，中位数 1.2%），证明了该技术在许多应用中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化设计和开发梯度下降训练专家系统网络的技术，通过优化规则-事实网络的构建流程提升系统性能。
AI.motivation: 现有专家系统需手动构建规则-事实网络，耗时且限制了模型表现，需通过自动化方法降低人工干预并提升准确性。
AI.method: 采用更大更密集的规则-事实网络，经训练、修剪、人工审查及再训练流程，并在多场景下评估不同网络类型的效果。
AI.result: 实验显示错误率低至3.9%（均值1.2%，中位数1.2%），验证了该方法在多种应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该技术通过自动化流程显著降低错误率，兼顾模型性能与可解释性，为专家系统开发提供高效解决方案。

The data presented shows that error rates as low as 3.9% (mean, 1.2% median) can be obtained, demonstrating the efficacy of this technique for many applications. 先前的工作引入了梯度下降训练的专家系统，该系统在概念上将神经网络的学习能力与专家系统的可理解性和可防御逻辑结合起来。该系统被证明能够从数据中学习模式，并以与神经网络系统报告的水平相媲美的水平执行决策。然而，该方法的主要限制是需要手动开发规则事实网络（然后使用反向传播进行训练）。与神经网络相比，本文提出了一种克服这一重大限制的技术。具体来说，本文建议使用比应用程序需要的更大、更密集的规则事实网络，这些网络经过训练、修剪、手动审查，然后重新训练以供使用。在多种操作条件下评估多种类型的网络，并呈现和评估这些结果。根据这些单独的实验条件评估，对所提出的技术进行评估。所提供的数据显示，可以获得低至 3.9% 的错误率（平均数，中位数 1.2%），证明了该技术在许多应用中的有效性。 本文提出一种自动化设计和开发梯度下降训练专家系统网络的技术，通过优化规则-事实网络的构建流程提升系统性能。 Jeremy Straub cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Efficient fine-grained road segmentation using superpixel-based CNN and CRF models
title_zh: 使用基于超像素的 CNN 和 CRF 模型进行高效的细粒度道路分割
comment: 7 pages,4 figures, Original language: English, Publication status: Published - 2018 Publisher: CENPARMI, Centre for Pattern Recognition and Machine Intelligence Concordia University, Montreal, Canada Pages:512-517, ISBN (Electronic): 978-1-895193-04-6 Conference: International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence ICPRAI 2018 - Montreal, Quebec, Canada
comments: 7 pages,4 figures, Original language: English, Publication status: Published - 2018 Publisher: CENPARMI, Centre for Pattern Recognition and Machine Intelligence Concordia University, Montreal, Canada Pages:512-517, ISBN (Electronic): 978-1-895193-04-6 Conference: International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence ICPRAI 2018 - Montreal, Quebec, Canada
abstract: Towards a safe and comfortable driving, road scene segmentation is a rudimentary problem in camera-based advance driver assistance systems (ADAS). Despite of the great achievement of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) for semantic segmentation task, the high computational efforts of CNN based methods is still a challenging area. In recent work, we proposed a novel approach to utilise the advantages of CNNs for the task of road segmentation at reasonable computational effort. The runtime benefits from using irregular super pixels as basis for the input for the CNN rather than the image grid, which tremendously reduces the input size. Although, this method achieved remarkable low computational time in both training and testing phases, the lower resolution of the super pixel domain yields naturally lower accuracy compared to high cost state of the art methods. In this work, we focus on a refinement of the road segmentation utilising a Conditional Random Field (CRF).The refinement procedure is limited to the super pixels touching the predicted road boundary to keep the additional computational effort low. Reducing the input to the super pixel domain allows the CNNs structure to stay small and efficient to compute while keeping the advantage of convolutional layers and makes them eligible for ADAS. Applying CRF compensate the trade off between accuracy and computational efficiency. The proposed system obtained comparable performance among the top performing algorithms on the KITTI road benchmark and its fast inference makes it particularly suitable for realtime applications.

Despite of the great achievement of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) for semantic segmentation task, the high computational efforts of CNN based methods is still a challenging area. In recent work, we proposed a novel approach to utilise the advantages of CNNs for the task of road segmentation at reasonable computational effort. The runtime benefits from using irregular super pixels as basis for the input for the CNN rather than the image grid, which tremendously reduces the input size. Although, this method achieved remarkable low computational time in both training and testing phases, the lower resolution of the super pixel domain yields naturally lower accuracy compared to high cost state of the art methods. In this work, we focus on a refinement of the road segmentation utilising a Conditional Random Field (CRF).The refinement procedure is limited to the super pixels touching the predicted road boundary to keep the additional computational effort low. Reducing the input to the super pixel domain allows the CNNs structure to stay small and efficient to compute while keeping the advantage of convolutional layers and makes them eligible for ADAS. Applying CRF compensate the trade off between accuracy and computational efficiency. The proposed system obtained comparable performance among the top performing algorithms on the KITTI road benchmark and its fast inference makes it particularly suitable for realtime applications.
abstract_zh: 为了实现安全舒适的驾驶，道路场景分割是基于摄像头的高级驾驶员辅助系统 (ADAS) 中的一个基本问题。尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在语义分割任务方面取得了巨大成就，但基于 CNN 的方法的高计算量仍然是一个具有挑战性的领域。在最近的工作中，我们提出了一种新方法，以合理的计算量利用 CNN 的优势来完成道路分割任务。运行时受益于使用不规则的超像素作为 CNN 输入的基础，而不是图像网格，这极大地减少了输入大小。尽管该方法在训练和测试阶段都实现了显着的低计算时间，但与高成本的现有技术方法相比，超像素域的较低分辨率自然会产生较低的精度。在这项工作中，我们专注于利用条件随机场（CRF）对道路分割进行细化。细化过程仅限于接触预测道路边界的超像素，以保持较低的额外计算量。减少超像素域的输入可以使 CNN 结构保持小型化和高效计算，同时保持卷积层的优势，并使它们适合 ADAS。应用 CRF 补偿准确性和计算效率之间的权衡。所提出的系统在 KITTI 道路基准测试中获得了与顶级性能算法相当的性能，并且其快速推理使其特别适合实时应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合超像素CNN与CRF的道路分割方法，在保证计算效率的同时提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN道路分割方法计算量大，而超像素输入虽降低计算量但牺牲精度，需寻找效率与精度的平衡方案。
AI.method: 采用超像素作为CNN输入减少计算量，通过CRF仅优化预测道路边界附近的超像素区域以提升精度。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中达到顶级算法的性能水平，且推理速度适合实时应用。
AI.conclusion: 超像素CNN与CRF结合有效平衡了计算效率与分割精度，适用于ADAS实时道路分割场景。

title: Learning Haptic-based Object Pose Estimation for In-hand Manipulation Control with Underactuated Robotic Hands
title_zh: 学习基于触觉的物体姿态估计，用于欠驱动机器人手的手动操纵控制
abstract: Unlike traditional robotic hands, underactuated compliant hands are challenging to model due to inherent uncertainties. Consequently, pose estimation of a grasped object is usually performed based on visual perception. However, visual perception of the hand and object can be limited in occluded or partly-occluded environments. In this paper, we aim to explore the use of haptics, i.e., kinesthetic and tactile sensing, for pose estimation and in-hand manipulation with underactuated hands. Such haptic approach would mitigate occluded environments where line-of-sight is not always available. We put an emphasis on identifying the feature state representation of the system that does not include vision and can be obtained with simple and low-cost hardware. For tactile sensing, therefore, we propose a low-cost and flexible sensor that is mostly 3D printed along with the finger-tip and can provide implicit contact information. Taking a two-finger underactuated hand as a test-case, we analyze the contribution of kinesthetic and tactile features along with various regression models to the accuracy of the predictions. Furthermore, we propose a Model Predictive Control (MPC) approach which utilizes the pose estimation to manipulate objects to desired states solely based on haptics. We have conducted a series of experiments that validate the ability to estimate poses of various objects with different geometry, stiffness and texture, and show manipulation to goals in the workspace with relatively high accuracy.

Consequently, pose estimation of a grasped object is usually performed based on visual perception. However, visual perception of the hand and object can be limited in occluded or partly-occluded environments. In this paper, we aim to explore the use of haptics, i.e., kinesthetic and tactile sensing, for pose estimation and in-hand manipulation with underactuated hands. Such haptic approach would mitigate occluded environments where line-of-sight is not always available. We put an emphasis on identifying the feature state representation of the system that does not include vision and can be obtained with simple and low-cost hardware. For tactile sensing, therefore, we propose a low-cost and flexible sensor that is mostly 3D printed along with the finger-tip and can provide implicit contact information. Taking a two-finger underactuated hand as a test-case, we analyze the contribution of kinesthetic and tactile features along with various regression models to the accuracy of the predictions. Furthermore, we propose a Model Predictive Control (MPC) approach which utilizes the pose estimation to manipulate objects to desired states solely based on haptics. We have conducted a series of experiments that validate the ability to estimate poses of various objects with different geometry, stiffness and texture, and show manipulation to goals in the workspace with relatively high accuracy.
abstract_zh: 与传统的机器人手不同，欠驱动的顺应手由于固有的不确定性而难以建模。因此，抓取物体的姿态估计通常是基于视觉感知来执行的。然而，在遮挡或部分遮挡的环境中，手和物体的视觉感知可能会受​​到限制。在本文中，我们的目标是探索触觉（即动觉和触觉传感）在姿势估计和手部驱动不足的手动操作中的使用。这种触觉方法将缓解视线并不总是可用的遮挡环境。我们重点关注识别系统的特征状态表示，该表示不包括视觉，并且可以通过简单且低成本的硬件获得。因此，对于触觉传感，我们提出了一种低成本且灵活的传感器，该传感器主要与指尖一起 3D 打印，可以提供隐式接触信息。以两指欠驱动手作为测试用例，我们分析了动觉和触觉特征以及各种回归模型对预测准确性的贡献。此外，我们提出了一种模型预测控制（MPC）方法，该方法利用姿势估计仅基于触觉将对象操纵到所需状态。我们进行了一系列实验，验证了估计具有不同几何形状、刚度和纹理的各种物体的姿势的能力，并以相对较高的精度展示了对工作空间中目标的操纵。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用触觉传感技术（动觉与触觉）实现欠驱动机械手的手中物体姿态估计与操作控制，以解决视觉感知在遮挡环境下的局限性。
AI.motivation: 欠驱动机械手因模型不确定性难以精确建模，传统视觉感知在遮挡场景中效果受限，需探索无需视觉的低成本触觉感知方案以提升操作鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计3D打印低成本触觉传感器获取接触信息，结合动觉特征与回归模型分析姿态估计效果，并提出基于估计结果的模型预测控制（MPC）实现目标操作。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法对不同几何形状、刚度和纹理物体的高精度姿态估计能力，并成功实现目标状态的手中操作控制。
AI.conclusion: 触觉感知方案可有效替代视觉在遮挡场景下的物体姿态估计，为低成本、高鲁棒性的欠驱动机械手操作控制提供了可行方案。

Taking a two-finger underactuated hand as a test-case, we analyze the contribution of kinesthetic and tactile features along with various regression models to the accuracy of the predictions. Furthermore, we propose a Model Predictive Control (MPC) approach which utilizes the pose estimation to manipulate objects to desired states solely based on haptics. We have conducted a series of experiments that validate the ability to estimate poses of various objects with different geometry, stiffness and texture, and show manipulation to goals in the workspace with relatively high accuracy. 与传统的机器人手不同，欠驱动的顺应手由于固有的不确定性而难以建模。因此，抓取物体的姿态估计通常是基于视觉感知来执行的。然而，在遮挡或部分遮挡的环境中，手和物体的视觉感知可能会受​​到限制。在本文中，我们的目标是探索触觉（即动觉和触觉传感）在姿势估计和手部驱动不足的手动操作中的使用。这种触觉方法将缓解视线并不总是可用的遮挡环境。我们重点关注识别系统的特征状态表示，该表示不包括视觉，并且可以通过简单且低成本的硬件获得。因此，对于触觉传感，我们提出了一种低成本且灵活的传感器，该传感器主要与指尖一起 3D 打印，可以提供隐式接触信息。以两指欠驱动手作为测试用例，我们分析了动觉和触觉特征以及各种回归模型对预测准确性的贡献。此外，我们提出了一种模型预测控制（MPC）方法，该方法利用姿势估计仅基于触觉将对象操纵到所需状态。我们进行了一系列实验，验证了估计具有不同几何形状、刚度和纹理的各种物体的姿势的能力，并以相对较高的精度展示了对工作空间中目标的操纵。 本文研究如何利用触觉传感技术（动觉与触觉）实现欠驱动机械手的手中物体姿态估计与操作控制，以解决视觉感知在遮挡环境下的局限性。 Osher Azulay,Inbar Ben-David,Avishai Sintov cs.RO

title: From algorithms to connectivity and back: finding a giant component in random k-SAT
title_zh: 从算法到连接再返回：在随机 k-SAT 中找到一个巨大的组成部分
abstract: We take an algorithmic approach to studying the solution space geometry of relatively sparse random and bounded degree $k$-CNFs for large $k$. In the course of doing so, we establish that with high probability, a random $k$-CNF $Φ$ with $n$ variables and clause density $α= m/n \lesssim 2^{k/6}$ has a giant component of solutions that are connected in a graph where solutions are adjacent if they have Hamming distance $O_k(\log n)$ and that a similar result holds for bounded degree $k$-CNFs at similar densities. We are also able to deduce looseness results for random and bounded degree $k$-CNFs in a similar regime. Although our main motivation was understanding the geometry of the solution space, our methods have algorithmic implications. Towards that end, we construct an idealized block dynamics that samples solutions from a random $k$-CNF $Φ$ with density $α= m/n \lesssim 2^{k/52}$. We show this Markov chain can with high probability be implemented in polynomial time and by leveraging spectral independence, we also observe that it mixes relatively fast, giving a polynomial time algorithm to with high probability sample a uniformly random solution to a random $k$-CNF. Our work suggests that the natural route to pinning down when a giant component exists is to develop sharper algorithms for sampling solutions in random $k$-CNFs.
summary: We take an algorithmic approach to studying the solution space geometry of relatively sparse random and bounded degree $k$-CNFs for large $k$. In the course of doing so, we establish that with high probability, a random $k$-CNF $Φ$ with $n$ variables and clause density $α= m/n \lesssim 2^{k/6}$ has a giant component of solutions that are connected in a graph where solutions are adjacent if they have Hamming distance $O_k(\log n)$ and that a similar result holds for bounded degree $k$-CNFs at similar densities. We are also able to deduce looseness results for random and bounded degree $k$-CNFs in a similar regime. Although our main motivation was understanding the geometry of the solution space, our methods have algorithmic implications. Towards that end, we construct an idealized block dynamics that samples solutions from a random $k$-CNF $Φ$ with density $α= m/n \lesssim 2^{k/52}$. We show this Markov chain can with high probability be implemented in polynomial time and by leveraging spectral independence, we also observe that it mixes relatively fast, giving a polynomial time algorithm to with high probability sample a uniformly random solution to a random $k$-CNF. Our work suggests that the natural route to pinning down when a giant component exists is to develop sharper algorithms for sampling solutions in random $k$-CNFs.
abstract_zh: 我们采用算法方法来研究较大 $k$ 的相对稀疏随机和有界度 $k$-CNF 的解空间几何。在此过程中，我们以高概率确定，具有 $n$ 变量和子句密度 $α= m/n \lesssim 2^{k/6}$ 的随机 $k$-CNF $Φ$ 具有在图中连接的解的巨大组成部分，其中如果解具有汉明距离 $O_k(\log n)$，则解是相邻的，并且类似的结果适用于相似密度下的有界度 $k$-CNF。我们还能够在类似的情况下推导出随机和有界度 $k$-CNF 的松散结果。尽管我们的主要动机是了解解空间的几何形状，但我们的方法具有算法含义。为此，我们构建了一个理想化的块动力学，从密度为 $α= m/n \lesssim 2^{k/52}$ 的随机 $k$-CNF $Φ$ 中采样解决方案。我们证明这个马尔可夫链可以高概率在多项式时间内实现，并且通过利用谱独立性，我们还观察到它混合相对较快，为高概率样本提供多项式时间算法到随机 $k$-CNF 的均匀随机解。我们的工作表明，确定巨型组件何时存在的自然途径是开发更清晰的算法，用于随机 $k$-CNF 中的采样解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文通过算法方法研究稀疏随机和有限度k-CNF公式解空间的几何结构，证明在特定密度下存在巨型解组件，并构建了高效采样算法。
AI.motivation: 理解随机k-SAT问题解空间的几何特性对于设计高效算法至关重要，同时探索解组件连接性与算法性能之间的关系。
AI.method: 采用算法分析方法，结合概率技术与马尔可夫链采样，构建基于块动态的采样算法，并利用谱独立性证明其快速混合特性。
AI.result: 证明当子句密度α≤2^{k/6}时，随机k-CNF公式以高概率存在巨型解组件；构造的采样算法可在多项式时间内均匀生成解。
AI.conclusion: 巨型解组件的存在性研究需依赖更精确的采样算法，本文方法为理论分析与算法设计提供了新视角。

title: Physically-Feasible Repair of Reactive, Linear Temporal Logic-based, High-Level Tasks
title_zh: 反应式、基于线性时序逻辑的高级任务的物理可行修复
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
comments: 16 pages, 9 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
abstract: A typical approach to creating complex robot behaviors is to compose atomic controllers, or skills, such that the resulting behavior satisfies a high-level task; however, when a task cannot be accomplished with a given set of skills, it is difficult to know how to modify the skills to make the task possible. We present a method for combining symbolic repair with physical feasibility-checking and implementation to automatically modify existing skills such that the robot can execute a previously infeasible task. We encode robot skills in Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formulas that capture both safety constraints and goals for reactive tasks. Furthermore, our encoding captures the full skill execution, as opposed to prior work where only the state of the world before and after the skill is executed are considered. Our repair algorithm suggests symbolic modifications, then attempts to physically implement the suggestions by modifying the original skills subject to LTL constraints derived from the symbolic repair. If skills are not physically possible, we automatically provide additional constraints for the symbolic repair. We demonstrate our approach with a Baxter and a Clearpath Jackal.
summary: A typical approach to creating complex robot behaviors is to compose atomic controllers, or skills, such that the resulting behavior satisfies a high-level task; however, when a task cannot be accomplished with a given set of skills, it is difficult to know how to modify the skills to make the task possible. We present a method for combining symbolic repair with physical feasibility-checking and implementation to automatically modify existing skills such that the robot can execute a previously infeasible task. We encode robot skills in Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formulas that capture both safety constraints and goals for reactive tasks. Furthermore, our encoding captures the full skill execution, as opposed to prior work where only the state of the world before and after the skill is executed are considered. Our repair algorithm suggests symbolic modifications, then attempts to physically implement the suggestions by modifying the original skills subject to LTL constraints derived from the symbolic repair. If skills are not physically possible, we automatically provide additional constraints for the symbolic repair. We demonstrate our approach with a Baxter and a Clearpath Jackal.
abstract_zh: 创建复杂机器人行为的典型方法是组合原子控制器或技能，以便最终的行为满足高级任务；然而，当某项任务无法用一组给定的技能完成时，就很难知道如何修改技能以使任务成为可能。我们提出了一种将符号修复与物理可行性检查和实施相结合的方法，以自动修改现有技能，使机器人能够执行以前不可行的任务。我们用线性时序逻辑 (LTL) 公式对机器人技能进行编码，该公式捕获安全约束和反应任务的目标。此外，我们的编码捕获了完整的技能执行，这与之前的工作相反，之前的工作仅考虑执行技能之前和之后的世界状态。我们的修复算法建议符号修改，然后尝试通过修改受符号修复派生的 LTL 约束的原始技能来物理实施这些建议。如果技能在物理上不可行，我们会自动为符号修复提供额外的约束。我们用 Baxter 和 Clearpath Jackal 演示了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合符号修复与物理可行性验证的方法，自动修改机器人技能以实现原本不可行的高层任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在任务无法完成时难以确定如何调整技能，需自动化的修复方案确保任务可执行性。
AI.method: 使用线性时态逻辑(LTL)编码机器人技能，通过符号修复生成修改建议并验证物理可行性，若不可行则动态添加约束。
AI.result: 在Baxter和Clearpath Jackal机器人上验证了方法的有效性，成功修复了原本不可行的高层任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过符号与物理层面的协同修复，为机器人高层任务规划提供了自动化的解决方案。

authors_text: Davoud Ataee Tarzanagh,Parvin Nazari,Bojian Hou,Li Shen,Laura Balzano
title: Online Bilevel Optimization: Regret Analysis of Online Alternating Gradient Methods
title_zh: 在线双层优化：在线交替梯度方法的遗憾分析
comment: Published at AISTATS 2024. V7: minor edits to the statement of Lemma 18 and Assumption A
comments: Published at AISTATS 2024. V7: minor edits to the statement of Lemma 18 and Assumption A
abstract: This paper introduces \textit{online bilevel optimization} in which a sequence of time-varying bilevel problems is revealed one after the other. We extend the known regret bounds for online single-level algorithms to the bilevel setting. Specifically, we provide new notions of \textit{bilevel regret}, develop an online alternating time-averaged gradient method that is capable of leveraging smoothness, and give regret bounds in terms of the path-length of the inner and outer minimizer sequences.
summary: This paper introduces \textit{online bilevel optimization} in which a sequence of time-varying bilevel problems is revealed one after the other. We extend the known regret bounds for online single-level algorithms to the bilevel setting. Specifically, we provide new notions of \textit{bilevel regret}, develop an online alternating time-averaged gradient method that is capable of leveraging smoothness, and give regret bounds in terms of the path-length of the inner and outer minimizer sequences.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 \textit{在线双层优化}，其中一系列时变双层问题被一个接一个地揭示。我们将在线单级算法的已知后悔界限扩展到双层设置。具体来说，我们提供了 \textit{bilevelregret} 的新概念，开发了一种能够利用平滑度的在线交替时间平均梯度方法，并根据内部和外部最小化序列的路径长度给出遗憾界限。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在线双层优化问题，扩展了单层算法的遗憾界，并提出新的在线交替梯度方法。
AI.motivation: 传统单层优化方法难以处理动态变化的双层问题，需新的理论框架和算法来应对时间序列变化。
AI.method: 提出在线交替时间平均梯度法，结合平滑性假设，分析内外部解的路径长度。
AI.result: 建立了基于内外部解路径长度的遗憾界，扩展了单层结果到双层场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文为在线双层优化提供了理论分析和有效算法，推动了动态优化问题的研究。

search_text: Online Bilevel Optimization: Regret Analysis of Online Alternating Gradient Methods 在线双层优化：在线交替梯度方法的遗憾分析 This paper introduces \textit{online bilevel optimization} in which a sequence of time-varying bilevel problems is revealed one after the other. We extend the known regret bounds for online single-level algorithms to the bilevel setting. Specifically, we provide new notions of \textit{bilevel regret}, develop an online alternating time-averaged gradient method that is capable of leveraging smoothness, and give regret bounds in terms of the path-length of the inner and outer minimizer sequences. 本文介绍了 \textit{在线双层优化}，其中一系列时变双层问题被一个接一个地揭示。我们将在线单级算法的已知后悔界限扩展到双层设置。具体来说，我们提供了 \textit{bilevelregret} 的新概念，开发了一种能够利用平滑度的在线交替时间平均梯度方法，并根据内部和外部最小化序列的路径长度给出遗憾界限。 本文主要研究在线双层优化问题，扩展了单层算法的遗憾界，并提出新的在线交替梯度方法。 Davoud Ataee Tarzanagh,Parvin Nazari,Bojian Hou,Li Shen,Laura Balzano math.OC,cs.DS,cs.LG

title: Comments on "Testing Conditional Independence of Discrete Distributions"
title_zh: 对“测试离散分布的条件独立性”的评论
abstract: In this short note, we identify and address an error in the proof of Theorem 1.3 in Canonne et al. (2018), a recent breakthrough in conditional independence testing. After correcting the error, we show that the general sample complexity result established in Canonne et al. (2018) remains the same.
summary: In this short note, we identify and address an error in the proof of Theorem 1.3 in Canonne et al. (2018), a recent breakthrough in conditional independence testing. After correcting the error, we show that the general sample complexity result established in Canonne et al. (2018) remains the same.
abstract_zh: 在这篇简短的笔记中，我们识别并解决了 Canonne 等人的定理 1.3 证明中的错误。 （2018），条件独立性测试的最新突破。纠正错误后，我们证明了 Canonne 等人建立的一般样本复杂性结果。 (2018) remains the same.

AI.tldr: 本文指出了Canonne等人（2018）论文中定理1.3证明中的一个错误，并进行了修正。
AI.motivation: Canonne等人（2018）的论文在条件独立性测试领域取得了重要进展，但其中的证明存在错误，需要修正以确保结果的正确性。
AI.method: 作者识别并修正了原论文中定理1.3的证明错误，然后验证了总体样本复杂度结果仍然有效。
AI.result: 在修正错误后，原论文中关于一般样本复杂度的结果保持不变。
AI.conclusion: 尽管存在证明错误，但原论文的主要结论依然成立，修正后的结果保持不变。

title: Non-Adaptive Edge Counting and Sampling via Bipartite Independent Set Queries
title_zh: 通过二分独立集查询进行非自适应边缘计数和采样
abstract: We study the problem of estimating the number of edges in an $n$-vertex graph, accessed via the Bipartite Independent Set query model introduced by Beame et al. (ITCS '18). In this model, each query returns a Boolean, indicating the existence of at least one edge between two specified sets of nodes. We present a non-adaptive algorithm that returns a $(1\pm ε)$ relative error approximation to the number of edges, with query complexity $\tilde O(ε^{-5}\log^{5} n )$, where $\tilde O(\cdot)$ hides $\textrm{poly}(\log \log n)$ dependencies. This is the first non-adaptive algorithm in this setting achieving $\textrm{poly}(1/ε,\log n)$ query complexity. Prior work requires $Ω(\log^2 n)$ rounds of adaptivity. We avoid this by taking a fundamentally different approach, inspired by work on single-pass streaming algorithms. Moreover, for constant $ε$, our query complexity significantly improves on the best known adaptive algorithm due to Bhattacharya et al. (STACS '22), which requires $O(ε^{-2} \log^{11} n)$ queries. Building on our edge estimation result, we give the first non-adaptive algorithm for outputting a nearly uniformly sampled edge with query complexity $\tilde O(ε^{-6} \log^{6} n)$, improving on the works of Dell et al. (SODA '20) and Bhattacharya et al. (STACS '22), which require $Ω(\log^3 n)$ rounds of adaptivity. Finally, as a consequence of our edge sampling algorithm, we obtain a $\tilde O(n\log^ 8 n)$ query algorithm for connectivity, using two rounds of adaptivity. This improves on a three-round algorithm of Assadi et al. (ESA '21) and is tight; there is no non-adaptive algorithm for connectivity making $o(n^2)$ queries.

In this model, each query returns a Boolean, indicating the existence of at least one edge between two specified sets of nodes. We present a non-adaptive algorithm that returns a $(1\pm ε)$ relative error approximation to the number of edges, with query complexity $\tilde O(ε^{-5}\log^{5} n )$, where $\tilde O(\cdot)$ hides $\textrm{poly}(\log \log n)$ dependencies. This is the first non-adaptive algorithm in this setting achieving $\textrm{poly}(1/ε,\log n)$ query complexity. Prior work requires $Ω(\log^2 n)$ rounds of adaptivity. We avoid this by taking a fundamentally different approach, inspired by work on single-pass streaming algorithms. Moreover, for constant $ε$, our query complexity significantly improves on the best known adaptive algorithm due to Bhattacharya et al. (STACS '22), which requires $O(ε^{-2} \log^{11} n)$ queries. Building on our edge estimation result, we give the first non-adaptive algorithm for outputting a nearly uniformly sampled edge with query complexity $\tilde O(ε^{-6} \log^{6} n)$, improving on the works of Dell et al. (SODA '20) and Bhattacharya et al. (STACS '22), which require $Ω(\log^3 n)$ rounds of adaptivity. Finally, as a consequence of our edge sampling algorithm, we obtain a $\tilde O(n\log^ 8 n)$ query algorithm for connectivity, using two rounds of adaptivity. This improves on a three-round algorithm of Assadi et al. (ESA '21) and is tight; there is no non-adaptive algorithm for connectivity making $o(n^2)$ queries.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了估计 $n$ 顶点图中边数的问题，通过 Beame 等人引入的二部独立集查询模型访问。 （ITCS '18）。在此模型中，每个查询返回一个布尔值，指示两个指定的节点集之间至少存在一条边。我们提出了一种非自适应算法，它返回 $(1\pm ε)$ 相对误差近似于边数，查询复杂度为 $\tilde O(ε^{-5}\log^{5} n )$，其中 $\tilde O(\cdot)$ 隐藏 $\textrm{poly}(\log \log n)$ 依赖性。这是此设置中第一个实现 $\textrm{poly}(1/ε,\log n)$ 查询复杂度的非自适应算法。之前的工作需要 $Ω(\log^2 n)$ 轮适应性。受到单通道流算法工作的启发，我们采取了一种根本不同的方法来避免这种情况。此外，对于常数 $ε$，我们的查询复杂性显着提高了 Bhattacharya 等人提出的最著名的自适应算法。 (STACS '22)，需要 $O(ε^{-2} \log^{11} n)$ 查询。基于我们的边缘估计结果，我们给出了第一个非自适应算法，用于输出查询复杂度为 $\tilde O(ε^{-6} \log^{6} n)$ 的几乎均匀采样的边缘，改进了 Dell 等人的工作。 （SODA '20）和 Bhattacharya 等人。 (STACS '22)，需要 $Ω(\log^3 n)$ 轮适应性。最后，作为边缘采样算法的结果，我们使用两轮自适应获得了 $\tilde O(n\log^ 8 n)$ 连接查询算法。这改进了 Assadi 等人的三轮算法。 (ESA '21) 并且很紧；没有用于进行 $o(n^2)$ 查询的连接的非自适应算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在通过二分图独立集查询模型访问的图中，使用非自适应算法估计边数和采样边的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要多轮自适应查询，而本文旨在开发无需自适应的算法，以降低查询复杂度并减少轮次。
AI.method: 受单次流算法启发，设计非自适应算法，通过二分图独立集查询模型直接估计边数并采样边。
AI.result: 提出首个非自适应边估计算法，复杂度为Õ(ε⁻⁵ log⁵ n)，并改进边采样和连通性算法的查询效率。
AI.conclusion: 非自适应方法在查询复杂度和轮次上优于现有自适应算法，且连通性算法的查询下界已达到紧致性。

authors_text: Yingchen Yu,Fangneng Zhan,Rongliang Wu,Jiahui Zhang,Shijian Lu,Miaomiao Cui,Xuansong Xie,Xian-Sheng Hua,Chunyan Miao
title: Towards Counterfactual Image Manipulation via CLIP
title_zh: 通过 CLIP 进行反事实图像处理
comment: This paper has been accepted to ACM MM 2022, code may be found here: https://github.com/yingchen001/CF-CLIP
comments: This paper has been accepted to ACM MM 2022, code may be found here: https://github.com/yingchen001/CF-CLIP
abstract: Leveraging StyleGAN's expressivity and its disentangled latent codes, existing methods can achieve realistic editing of different visual attributes such as age and gender of facial images. An intriguing yet challenging problem arises: Can generative models achieve counterfactual editing against their learnt priors? Due to the lack of counterfactual samples in natural datasets, we investigate this problem in a text-driven manner with Contrastive-Language-Image-Pretraining (CLIP), which can offer rich semantic knowledge even for various counterfactual concepts. Different from in-domain manipulation, counterfactual manipulation requires more comprehensive exploitation of semantic knowledge encapsulated in CLIP as well as more delicate handling of editing directions for avoiding being stuck in local minimum or undesired editing. To this end, we design a novel contrastive loss that exploits predefined CLIP-space directions to guide the editing toward desired directions from different perspectives. In addition, we design a simple yet effective scheme that explicitly maps CLIP embeddings (of target text) to the latent space and fuses them with latent codes for effective latent code optimization and accurate editing. Extensive experiments show that our design achieves accurate and realistic editing while driving by target texts with various counterfactual concepts.
summary: Leveraging StyleGAN's expressivity and its disentangled latent codes, existing methods can achieve realistic editing of different visual attributes such as age and gender of facial images. An intriguing yet challenging problem arises: Can generative models achieve counterfactual editing against their learnt priors? Due to the lack of counterfactual samples in natural datasets, we investigate this problem in a text-driven manner with Contrastive-Language-Image-Pretraining (CLIP), which can offer rich semantic knowledge even for various counterfactual concepts. Different from in-domain manipulation, counterfactual manipulation requires more comprehensive exploitation of semantic knowledge encapsulated in CLIP as well as more delicate handling of editing directions for avoiding being stuck in local minimum or undesired editing. To this end, we design a novel contrastive loss that exploits predefined CLIP-space directions to guide the editing toward desired directions from different perspectives. In addition, we design a simple yet effective scheme that explicitly maps CLIP embeddings (of target text) to the latent space and fuses them with latent codes for effective latent code optimization and accurate editing. Extensive experiments show that our design achieves accurate and realistic editing while driving by target texts with various counterfactual concepts.
abstract_zh: 利用 StyleGAN 的表现力及其解开的潜在代码，现有方法可以实现对不同视觉属性（例如面部图像的年龄和性别）的真实编辑。一个有趣但具有挑战性的问题出现了：生成模型能否根据其学到的先验实现反事实编辑？由于自然数据集中缺乏反事实样本，我们使用对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）以文本驱动的方式研究这个问题，即使对于各种反事实概念也可以提供丰富的语义知识。与域内操纵不同，反事实操纵需要更全面地利用 CLIP 中封装的语义知识，以及更精细地处理编辑方向，以避免陷入局部最小或不需要的编辑。为此，我们设计了一种新颖的对比损失，它利用预定义的 CLIP 空间方向来引导从不同角度朝所需方向进行编辑。此外，我们设计了一个简单而有效的方案，将（目标文本的）CLIP 嵌入显式映射到潜在空间，并将它们与潜在代码融合，以实现有效的潜在代码优化和准确编辑。大量的实验表明，我们的设计在通过具有各种反事实概念的目标文本驱动的同时实现了准确和真实的编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CLIP的反事实图像编辑方法，通过结合StyleGAN和CLIP的语义知识实现对图像的精准编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以实现反事实编辑（如修改不存在于训练数据中的属性），而CLIP能提供丰富的语义知识，可解决反事实样本缺失的问题。
AI.method: 设计对比损失利用CLIP空间方向引导编辑，并提出将目标文本的CLIP嵌入映射到潜在空间与潜在代码融合的优化方案。
AI.result: 实验表明方法能根据各种反事实概念的文本驱动实现准确且逼真的图像编辑。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合CLIP语义知识与StyleGAN，提出的新方法有效解决了反事实图像编辑的挑战，实现了高质量编辑效果。

search_text: Towards Counterfactual Image Manipulation via CLIP 通过 CLIP 进行反事实图像处理 Leveraging StyleGAN's expressivity and its disentangled latent codes, existing methods can achieve realistic editing of different visual attributes such as age and gender of facial images. An intriguing yet challenging problem arises: Can generative models achieve counterfactual editing against their learnt priors? Due to the lack of counterfactual samples in natural datasets, we investigate this problem in a text-driven manner with Contrastive-Language-Image-Pretraining (CLIP), which can offer rich semantic knowledge even for various counterfactual concepts. Different from in-domain manipulation, counterfactual manipulation requires more comprehensive exploitation of semantic knowledge encapsulated in CLIP as well as more delicate handling of editing directions for avoiding being stuck in local minimum or undesired editing. To this end, we design a novel contrastive loss that exploits predefined CLIP-space directions to guide the editing toward desired directions from different perspectives. In addition, we design a simple yet effective scheme that explicitly maps CLIP embeddings (of target text) to the latent space and fuses them with latent codes for effective latent code optimization and accurate editing. Extensive experiments show that our design achieves accurate and realistic editing while driving by target texts with various counterfactual concepts. 利用 StyleGAN 的表现力及其解开的潜在代码，现有方法可以实现对不同视觉属性（例如面部图像的年龄和性别）的真实编辑。一个有趣但具有挑战性的问题出现了：生成模型能否根据其学到的先验实现反事实编辑？由于自然数据集中缺乏反事实样本，我们使用对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）以文本驱动的方式研究这个问题，即使对于各种反事实概念也可以提供丰富的语义知识。与域内操纵不同，反事实操纵需要更全面地利用 CLIP 中封装的语义知识，以及更精细地处理编辑方向，以避免陷入局部最小或不需要的编辑。为此，我们设计了一种新颖的对比损失，它利用预定义的 CLIP 空间方向来引导从不同角度朝所需方向进行编辑。此外，我们设计了一个简单而有效的方案，将（目标文本的）CLIP 嵌入显式映射到潜在空间，并将它们与潜在代码融合，以实现有效的潜在代码优化和准确编辑。大量的实验表明，我们的设计在通过具有各种反事实概念的目标文本驱动的同时实现了准确和真实的编辑。 本文提出一种基于CLIP的反事实图像编辑方法，通过结合StyleGAN和CLIP的语义知识实现对图像的精准编辑。 Yingchen Yu,Fangneng Zhan,Rongliang Wu,Jiahui Zhang,Shijian Lu,Miaomiao Cui,Xuansong Xie,Xian-Sheng Hua,Chunyan Miao cs.CV

title: Multi-View Object Pose Refinement With Differentiable Renderer
title_zh: 使用可微分渲染器进行多视图对象姿势细化
abstract: This paper introduces a novel multi-view 6 DoF object pose refinement approach focusing on improving methods trained on synthetic data. It is based on the DPOD detector, which produces dense 2D-3D correspondences between the model vertices and the image pixels in each frame. We have opted for the use of multiple frames with known relative camera transformations, as it allows introduction of geometrical constraints via an interpretable ICP-like loss function. The loss function is implemented with a differentiable renderer and is optimized iteratively. We also demonstrate that a full detection and refinement pipeline, which is trained solely on synthetic data, can be used for auto-labeling real data. We perform quantitative evaluation on LineMOD, Occlusion, Homebrewed and YCB-V datasets and report excellent performance in comparison to the state-of-the-art methods trained on the synthetic and real data. We demonstrate empirically that our approach requires only a few frames and is robust to close camera locations and noise in extrinsic camera calibration, making its practical usage easier and more ubiquitous.
summary: This paper introduces a novel multi-view 6 DoF object pose refinement approach focusing on improving methods trained on synthetic data. It is based on the DPOD detector, which produces dense 2D-3D correspondences between the model vertices and the image pixels in each frame. We have opted for the use of multiple frames with known relative camera transformations, as it allows introduction of geometrical constraints via an interpretable ICP-like loss function. The loss function is implemented with a differentiable renderer and is optimized iteratively. We also demonstrate that a full detection and refinement pipeline, which is trained solely on synthetic data, can be used for auto-labeling real data. We perform quantitative evaluation on LineMOD, Occlusion, Homebrewed and YCB-V datasets and report excellent performance in comparison to the state-of-the-art methods trained on the synthetic and real data. We demonstrate empirically that our approach requires only a few frames and is robust to close camera locations and noise in extrinsic camera calibration, making its practical usage easier and more ubiquitous.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的多视图 6 DoF 对象姿态细化方法，重点是改进在合成数据上训练的方法。它基于 DPOD 检测器，可在模型顶点和每帧中的图像像素之间产生密集的 2D-3D 对应关系。我们选择使用具有已知相对相机变换的多帧，因为它允许通过可解释的类 ICP 损失函数引入几何约束。损失函数通过可微渲染器实现并迭代优化。我们还证明，仅针对合成数据进行训练的完整检测和细化管道可用于自动标记真实数据。我们对 LineMOD、Occlusion、Homebrewed 和 YCB-V 数据集进行定量评估，并报告与在合成数据和真实数据上训练的最先进方法相比具有出色的性能。我们凭经验证明，我们的方法只需要几帧，并且对于关闭相机位置和外部相机校准中的噪声具有鲁棒性，使其实际使用更容易、更普遍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微渲染器的多视角6自由度物体姿态优化方法，通过合成数据训练实现对真实数据的自动标注。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在真实场景中存在姿态估计误差，且依赖大量真实标注数据，而合成数据训练方法难以直接迁移应用。
AI.method: 基于DPOD检测器生成2D-3D对应关系，利用多帧已知相机变换的几何约束，设计可微渲染器实现的ICP-like损失函数进行迭代优化。
AI.result: 在LineMOD、Occlusion等数据集上优于现有方法，仅需少量帧且对相机噪声和近距离拍摄具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法降低了真实数据标注需求，提升了姿态优化的实用性和泛化能力，为多视角视觉任务提供新思路。

title: DPODv2: Dense Correspondence-Based 6 DoF Pose Estimation
title_zh: DPODv2：基于密集对应的 6 DoF 姿态估计
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 2021
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 2021
abstract: We propose a three-stage 6 DoF object detection method called DPODv2 (Dense Pose Object Detector) that relies on dense correspondences. We combine a 2D object detector with a dense correspondence estimation network and a multi-view pose refinement method to estimate a full 6 DoF pose. Unlike other deep learning methods that are typically restricted to monocular RGB images, we propose a unified deep learning network allowing different imaging modalities to be used (RGB or Depth). Moreover, we propose a novel pose refinement method, that is based on differentiable rendering. The main concept is to compare predicted and rendered correspondences in multiple views to obtain a pose which is consistent with predicted correspondences in all views. Our proposed method is evaluated rigorously on different data modalities and types of training data in a controlled setup. The main conclusions is that RGB excels in correspondence estimation, while depth contributes to the pose accuracy if good 3D-3D correspondences are available. Naturally, their combination achieves the overall best performance. We perform an extensive evaluation and an ablation study to analyze and validate the results on several challenging datasets. DPODv2 achieves excellent results on all of them while still remaining fast and scalable independent of the used data modality and the type of training data
summary: We propose a three-stage 6 DoF object detection method called DPODv2 (Dense Pose Object Detector) that relies on dense correspondences. We combine a 2D object detector with a dense correspondence estimation network and a multi-view pose refinement method to estimate a full 6 DoF pose. Unlike other deep learning methods that are typically restricted to monocular RGB images, we propose a unified deep learning network allowing different imaging modalities to be used (RGB or Depth). Moreover, we propose a novel pose refinement method, that is based on differentiable rendering. The main concept is to compare predicted and rendered correspondences in multiple views to obtain a pose which is consistent with predicted correspondences in all views. Our proposed method is evaluated rigorously on different data modalities and types of training data in a controlled setup. The main conclusions is that RGB excels in correspondence estimation, while depth contributes to the pose accuracy if good 3D-3D correspondences are available. Naturally, their combination achieves the overall best performance. We perform an extensive evaluation and an ablation study to analyze and validate the results on several challenging datasets. DPODv2 achieves excellent results on all of them while still remaining fast and scalable independent of the used data modality and the type of training data
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种称为 DPODv2（密集姿势对象检测器）的三阶段 6 DoF 对象检测方法，该方法依赖于密集对应关系。我们将 2D 目标检测器与密集对应估计网络和多视图姿态细化方法相结合来估计完整的 6 DoF 姿态。与其他通常仅限于单目 RGB 图像的深度学习方法不同，我们提出了一个统一的深度学习网络，允许使用不同的成像模式（RGB 或深度）。此外，我们提出了一种基于可微渲染的新颖的姿态细化方法。主要概念是比较多个视图中的预测对应关系和渲染对应关系，以获得与所有视图中的预测对应关系一致的姿势。我们提出的方法在受控设置中针对不同的数据模式和训练数据类型进行了严格评估。主要结论是 RGB 在对应估计方面表现出色，而如果存在良好的 3D-3D 对应，则深度有助于姿势精度。自然地，他们的组合达到了整体最佳性能。我们进行了广泛的评估和消融研究，以分析和验证几个具有挑战性的数据集的结果。 DPODv2 在所有这些方面都取得了出色的结果，同时仍然保持快速和可扩展性，独立于所使用的数据模态和训练数据类型

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于密集对应关系的6自由度目标位姿估计方法DPODv2，通过结合2D检测器、密集对应估计网络和多视角位姿优化，实现跨模态（RGB或深度）的高效位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法通常局限于单目RGB图像，无法充分利用深度信息。本文旨在设计一种统一框架，兼容多种成像模态，并通过密集对应关系提升位姿估计精度。
AI.method: 采用三阶段方法：1) 2D目标检测；2) 密集对应估计网络生成像素级匹配；3) 基于可微渲染的多视角位姿优化，通过比较预测与渲染的对应关系实现跨视角一致性。
AI.result: 在多种数据模态和训练数据下，RGB在对应估计中表现最佳，深度数据在具备高质量3D-3D对应时提升位姿精度，二者结合取得最优性能。方法在多个挑战数据集上均取得优异结果，且保持高效可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DPODv2通过融合RGB与深度模态优势，在保持速度的同时实现了跨场景的高精度6DoF位姿估计，验证了密集对应与可微渲染联合优化的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于密集对应关系的6自由度目标位姿估计方法DPODv2，通过结合2D检测器、密集对应估计网络和多视角位姿优化，实现跨模态（RGB或深度）的高效位姿估计。

ai_content.result: 在多种数据模态和训练数据下，RGB在对应估计中表现最佳，深度数据在具备高质量3D-3D对应时提升位姿精度，二者结合取得最优性能。方法在多个挑战数据集上均取得优异结果，且保持高效可扩展性。
ai_content.conclusion: DPODv2通过融合RGB与深度模态优势，在保持速度的同时实现了跨场景的高精度6DoF位姿估计，验证了密集对应与可微渲染联合优化的有效性。

search_text: DPODv2: Dense Correspondence-Based 6 DoF Pose Estimation DPODv2：基于密集对应的 6 DoF 姿态估计 We propose a three-stage 6 DoF object detection method called DPODv2 (Dense Pose Object Detector) that relies on dense correspondences. We combine a 2D object detector with a dense correspondence estimation network and a multi-view pose refinement method to estimate a full 6 DoF pose. Unlike other deep learning methods that are typically restricted to monocular RGB images, we propose a unified deep learning network allowing different imaging modalities to be used (RGB or Depth). Moreover, we propose a novel pose refinement method, that is based on differentiable rendering. The main concept is to compare predicted and rendered correspondences in multiple views to obtain a pose which is consistent with predicted correspondences in all views. Our proposed method is evaluated rigorously on different data modalities and types of training data in a controlled setup. The main conclusions is that RGB excels in correspondence estimation, while depth contributes to the pose accuracy if good 3D-3D correspondences are available. Naturally, their combination achieves the overall best performance. We perform an extensive evaluation and an ablation study to analyze and validate the results on several challenging datasets. DPODv2 achieves excellent results on all of them while still remaining fast and scalable independent of the used data modality and the type of training data 我们提出了一种称为 DPODv2（密集姿势对象检测器）的三阶段 6 DoF 对象检测方法，该方法依赖于密集对应关系。我们将 2D 目标检测器与密集对应估计网络和多视图姿态细化方法相结合来估计完整的 6 DoF 姿态。与其他通常仅限于单目 RGB 图像的深度学习方法不同，我们提出了一个统一的深度学习网络，允许使用不同的成像模式（RGB 或深度）。此外，我们提出了一种基于可微渲染的新颖的姿态细化方法。主要概念是比较多个视图中的预测对应关系和渲染对应关系，以获得与所有视图中的预测对应关系一致的姿势。我们提出的方法在受控设置中针对不同的数据模式和训练数据类型进行了严格评估。主要结论是 RGB 在对应估计方面表现出色，而如果存在良好的 3D-3D 对应，则深度有助于姿势精度。自然地，他们的组合达到了整体最佳性能。我们进行了广泛的评估和消融研究，以分析和验证几个具有挑战性的数据集的结果。 DPODv2 在所有这些方面都取得了出色的结果，同时仍然保持快速和可扩展性，独立于所使用的数据模态和训练数据类型 本文提出了一种基于密集对应关系的6自由度目标位姿估计方法DPODv2，通过结合2D检测器、密集对应估计网络和多视角位姿优化，实现跨模态（RGB或深度）的高效位姿估计。 Ivan Shugurov,Sergey Zakharov,Slobodan Ilic cs.CV

authors_text: Jiazhi Guan,Hang Zhou,Zhibin Hong,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang,Chengbin Quan,Youjian Zhao
title: Delving into Sequential Patches for Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 深入研究用于 Deepfake 检测的序列补丁
abstract: Recent advances in face forgery techniques produce nearly visually untraceable deepfake videos, which could be leveraged with malicious intentions. As a result, researchers have been devoted to deepfake detection. Previous studies have identified the importance of local low-level cues and temporal information in pursuit to generalize well across deepfake methods, however, they still suffer from robustness problem against post-processings. In this work, we propose the Local- & Temporal-aware Transformer-based Deepfake Detection (LTTD) framework, which adopts a local-to-global learning protocol with a particular focus on the valuable temporal information within local sequences. Specifically, we propose a Local Sequence Transformer (LST), which models the temporal consistency on sequences of restricted spatial regions, where low-level information is hierarchically enhanced with shallow layers of learned 3D filters. Based on the local temporal embeddings, we then achieve the final classification in a global contrastive way. Extensive experiments on popular datasets validate that our approach effectively spots local forgery cues and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Recent advances in face forgery techniques produce nearly visually untraceable deepfake videos, which could be leveraged with malicious intentions. As a result, researchers have been devoted to deepfake detection. Previous studies have identified the importance of local low-level cues and temporal information in pursuit to generalize well across deepfake methods, however, they still suffer from robustness problem against post-processings. In this work, we propose the Local- & Temporal-aware Transformer-based Deepfake Detection (LTTD) framework, which adopts a local-to-global learning protocol with a particular focus on the valuable temporal information within local sequences. Specifically, we propose a Local Sequence Transformer (LST), which models the temporal consistency on sequences of restricted spatial regions, where low-level information is hierarchically enhanced with shallow layers of learned 3D filters. Based on the local temporal embeddings, we then achieve the final classification in a global contrastive way. Extensive experiments on popular datasets validate that our approach effectively spots local forgery cues and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 人脸伪造技术的最新进展产生了视觉上几乎无法追踪的深度伪造视频，这些视频可能被恶意利用。因此，研究人员一直致力于深度伪造检测。先前的研究已经确定了局部低级线索和时间信息的重要性，以求在深度伪造方法中得到很好的泛化，然而，它们仍然面临着后处理的鲁棒性问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于局部和时间感知变压器的 Deepfake 检测（LTTD）框架，该框架采用局部到全局的学习协议，特别关注局部序列中有价值的时间信息。具体来说，我们提出了一种局部序列变换器（LST），它对受限空间区域序列的时间一致性进行建模，其中低级信息通过学习的 3D 滤波器的浅层进行分层增强。基于局部时间嵌入，我们以全局对比的方式实现最终分类。对流行数据集的大量实验验证了我们的方法可以有效地发现本地伪造线索并实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部与时间感知Transformer的深度伪造检测框架LTTD，通过建模局部序列中的时间一致性来提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在面对深度伪造视频的后处理攻击时存在鲁棒性不足的问题，需更有效利用局部低级线索与时间信息。
AI.method: 设计局部序列Transformer（LST）模块，在受限空间区域建模时间一致性，并通过3D滤波器分层增强低级特征，最终采用全局对比学习进行分类。
AI.result: 在多个主流数据集上验证，该方法能有效捕捉局部伪造线索，达到当前最优性能（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合局部到全局的学习协议与时间感知机制，LTTD框架显著提升了深度伪造检测的鲁棒性，尤其在对抗后处理攻击时表现优异。

authors_text: Mathias Lindholm,Ronald Richman,Andreas Tsanakas,Mario V. Wüthrich
title: A multi-task network approach for calculating discrimination-free insurance prices
title_zh: 计算无歧视保险价格的多任务网络方法
abstract: In applications of predictive modeling, such as insurance pricing, indirect or proxy discrimination is an issue of major concern. Namely, there exists the possibility that protected policyholder characteristics are implicitly inferred from non-protected ones by predictive models, and are thus having an undesirable (or illegal) impact on prices. A technical solution to this problem relies on building a best-estimate model using all policyholder characteristics (including protected ones) and then averaging out the protected characteristics for calculating individual prices. However, such approaches require full knowledge of policyholders' protected characteristics, which may in itself be problematic. Here, we address this issue by using a multi-task neural network architecture for claim predictions, which can be trained using only partial information on protected characteristics, and it produces prices that are free from proxy discrimination. We demonstrate the use of the proposed model and we find that its predictive accuracy is comparable to a conventional feedforward neural network (on full information). However, this multi-task network has clearly superior performance in the case of partially missing policyholder information.
summary: In applications of predictive modeling, such as insurance pricing, indirect or proxy discrimination is an issue of major concern. Namely, there exists the possibility that protected policyholder characteristics are implicitly inferred from non-protected ones by predictive models, and are thus having an undesirable (or illegal) impact on prices. A technical solution to this problem relies on building a best-estimate model using all policyholder characteristics (including protected ones) and then averaging out the protected characteristics for calculating individual prices. However, such approaches require full knowledge of policyholders' protected characteristics, which may in itself be problematic. Here, we address this issue by using a multi-task neural network architecture for claim predictions, which can be trained using only partial information on protected characteristics, and it produces prices that are free from proxy discrimination. We demonstrate the use of the proposed model and we find that its predictive accuracy is comparable to a conventional feedforward neural network (on full information). However, this multi-task network has clearly superior performance in the case of partially missing policyholder information.
abstract_zh: 在预测模型的应用中，例如保险定价，间接或代理歧视是一个主要关注的问题。也就是说，存在这样的可能性：受保护的投保人特征是通过预测模型从不受保护的投保人特征中隐式推断出来的，从而对价格产生不良（或非法）影响。此问题的技术解决方案依赖于使用所有投保人特征（包括受保护特征）构建最佳估计模型，然后对受保护特征进行平均以计算个人价格。然而，此类方法需要充分了解投保人受保护的特征，这本身可能存在问题。在这里，我们通过使用多任务神经网络架构进行索赔预测来解决这个问题，该架构可以仅使用受保护特征的部分信息进行训练，并且产生不受代理歧视的价格。我们演示了所提出的模型的使用，我们发现其预测准确性与传统的前馈神经网络（在完整信息上）相当。然而，这种多任务网络在部分丢失投保人信息的情况下具有明显优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务神经网络方法，用于在保险定价中避免间接歧视，通过部分受保护特征信息计算无歧视的保费。
AI.motivation: 在保险定价等预测建模应用中，受保护特征可能被隐含推断导致间接歧视，传统方法需完整受保护特征数据，存在隐私和可行性问题。
AI.method: 设计多任务神经网络架构，仅利用部分受保护特征信息进行训练，通过任务间共享表示学习消除代理歧视，生成无偏保费。
AI.result: 模型预测精度与全信息前馈神经网络相当，且在受保人信息部分缺失时表现更优，有效避免了代理歧视风险。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不依赖完整敏感数据的前提下，通过多任务学习实现公平保险定价，为解决算法歧视问题提供了可行技术路径。

result: 模型预测精度与全信息前馈神经网络相当，且在受保人信息部分缺失时表现更优，有效避免了代理歧视风险。
conclusion: 该方法在不依赖完整敏感数据的前提下，通过多任务学习实现公平保险定价，为解决算法歧视问题提供了可行技术路径。
search_text: A multi-task network approach for calculating discrimination-free insurance prices 计算无歧视保险价格的多任务网络方法 In applications of predictive modeling, such as insurance pricing, indirect or proxy discrimination is an issue of major concern. Namely, there exists the possibility that protected policyholder characteristics are implicitly inferred from non-protected ones by predictive models, and are thus having an undesirable (or illegal) impact on prices. A technical solution to this problem relies on building a best-estimate model using all policyholder characteristics (including protected ones) and then averaging out the protected characteristics for calculating individual prices. However, such approaches require full knowledge of policyholders' protected characteristics, which may in itself be problematic. Here, we address this issue by using a multi-task neural network architecture for claim predictions, which can be trained using only partial information on protected characteristics, and it produces prices that are free from proxy discrimination. We demonstrate the use of the proposed model and we find that its predictive accuracy is comparable to a conventional feedforward neural network (on full information). However, this multi-task network has clearly superior performance in the case of partially missing policyholder information. 在预测模型的应用中，例如保险定价，间接或代理歧视是一个主要关注的问题。也就是说，存在这样的可能性：受保护的投保人特征是通过预测模型从不受保护的投保人特征中隐式推断出来的，从而对价格产生不良（或非法）影响。此问题的技术解决方案依赖于使用所有投保人特征（包括受保护特征）构建最佳估计模型，然后对受保护特征进行平均以计算个人价格。然而，此类方法需要充分了解投保人受保护的特征，这本身可能存在问题。在这里，我们通过使用多任务神经网络架构进行索赔预测来解决这个问题，该架构可以仅使用受保护特征的部分信息进行训练，并且产生不受代理歧视的价格。我们演示了所提出的模型的使用，我们发现其预测准确性与传统的前馈神经网络（在完整信息上）相当。然而，这种多任务网络在部分丢失投保人信息的情况下具有明显优越的性能。 本文提出一种多任务神经网络方法，用于在保险定价中避免间接歧视，通过部分受保护特征信息计算无歧视的保费。 Mathias Lindholm,Ronald Richman,Andreas Tsanakas,Mario V. Wüthrich cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CE,q-fin.ST,stat.AP

authors_text: Nicholas Konz,Hanxue Gu,Haoyu Dong,Maciej A. Mazurowski
title: The Intrinsic Manifolds of Radiological Images and their Role in Deep Learning
title_zh: 放射图像的内在流形及其在深度学习中的作用
comment: preprint version, accepted for MICCAI 2022 (25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention). 8 pages (+ author names + references + supplementary), 4 figures. Code available at https://github.com/mazurowski-lab/radiologyintrinsicmanifolds
comments: preprint version, accepted for MICCAI 2022 (25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention). 8 pages (+ author names + references + supplementary), 4 figures. Code available at https://github.com/mazurowski-lab/radiologyintrinsicmanifolds
abstract: The manifold hypothesis is a core mechanism behind the success of deep learning, so understanding the intrinsic manifold structure of image data is central to studying how neural networks learn from the data. Intrinsic dataset manifolds and their relationship to learning difficulty have recently begun to be studied for the common domain of natural images, but little such research has been attempted for radiological images. We address this here. First, we compare the intrinsic manifold dimensionality of radiological and natural images. We also investigate the relationship between intrinsic dimensionality and generalization ability over a wide range of datasets. Our analysis shows that natural image datasets generally have a higher number of intrinsic dimensions than radiological images. However, the relationship between generalization ability and intrinsic dimensionality is much stronger for medical images, which could be explained as radiological images having intrinsic features that are more difficult to learn. These results give a more principled underpinning for the intuition that radiological images can be more challenging to apply deep learning to than natural image datasets common to machine learning research. We believe rather than directly applying models developed for natural images to the radiological imaging domain, more care should be taken to developing architectures and algorithms that are more tailored to the specific characteristics of this domain. The research shown in our paper, demonstrating these characteristics and the differences from natural images, is an important first step in this direction.

Intrinsic dataset manifolds and their relationship to learning difficulty have recently begun to be studied for the common domain of natural images, but little such research has been attempted for radiological images. We address this here. First, we compare the intrinsic manifold dimensionality of radiological and natural images. We also investigate the relationship between intrinsic dimensionality and generalization ability over a wide range of datasets. Our analysis shows that natural image datasets generally have a higher number of intrinsic dimensions than radiological images. However, the relationship between generalization ability and intrinsic dimensionality is much stronger for medical images, which could be explained as radiological images having intrinsic features that are more difficult to learn. These results give a more principled underpinning for the intuition that radiological images can be more challenging to apply deep learning to than natural image datasets common to machine learning research. We believe rather than directly applying models developed for natural images to the radiological imaging domain, more care should be taken to developing architectures and algorithms that are more tailored to the specific characteristics of this domain. The research shown in our paper, demonstrating these characteristics and the differences from natural images, is an important first step in this direction.
abstract_zh: 流形假设是深度学习成功背后的核心机制，因此了解图像数据的内在流形结构对于研究神经网络如何从数据中学习至关重要。最近开始针对自然图像的公共领域研究内在数据集流形及其与学习难度的关系，但很少有人尝试针对放射图像进行此类研究。 We address this here.首先，我们比较放射图像和自然图像的内在流形维度。我们还研究了各种数据集的内在维度和泛化能力之间的关系。我们的分析表明，自然图像数据集通常比放射图像具有更多的内在维度。然而，对于医学图像来说，泛化能力和内在维度之间的关系要强得多，这可以解释为具有更难以学习的内在特征的放射图像。这些结果为直觉提供了更有原则的基础，即应用深度学习比机器学习研究中常见的自然图像数据集更具挑战性。我们认为，与其直接将针对自然图像开发的模型应用于放射成像领域，不如更加谨慎地开发更适合该领域具体特征的架构和算法。我们论文中展示的研究展示了这些特征以及与自然图像的差异，是朝这个方向迈出的重要的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文研究放射科图像的内在流形结构及其对深度学习的影响，比较其与自然图像的差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管自然图像的流形特性已被广泛研究，但放射科图像的相关研究不足，而深度学习在医学图像上的应用效果存在挑战，需明确其内在机制。
AI.method: 通过比较放射科图像与自然图像的内在流形维度，并分析不同数据集上泛化能力与内在维度的关系，验证两者差异及影响。
AI.result: 自然图像的内在维度高于放射科图像，但后者泛化能力与内在维度的关联性更强，表明医学图像特征更难学习。
AI.conclusion: 应针对放射科图像特点设计定制化模型，而非直接套用自然图像模型，本文研究为该方向提供理论依据。

authors_text: Wenjie Li,Juncheng Li,Guangwei Gao,Jiantao Zhou,Jian Yang,Guo-Jun Qi
title: Cross-receptive Focused Inference Network for Lightweight Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于轻量级图像超分辨率的交叉接收聚焦推理网络
comment: IEEE Transactions on Multimedia, 13 pages, 13 figures
comments: IEEE Transactions on Multimedia, 13 pages, 13 figures
abstract: Recently, Transformer-based methods have shown impressive performance in single image super-resolution (SISR) tasks due to the ability of global feature extraction. However, the capabilities of Transformers that need to incorporate contextual information to extract features dynamically are neglected. To address this issue, we propose a lightweight Cross-receptive Focused Inference Network (CFIN) that consists of a cascade of CT Blocks mixed with CNN and Transformer. Specifically, in the CT block, we first propose a CNN-based Cross-Scale Information Aggregation Module (CIAM) to enable the model to better focus on potentially helpful information to improve the efficiency of the Transformer phase. Then, we design a novel Cross-receptive Field Guided Transformer (CFGT) to enable the selection of contextual information required for reconstruction by using a modulated convolutional kernel that understands the current semantic information and exploits the information interaction within different self-attention. Extensive experiments have shown that our proposed CFIN can effectively reconstruct images using contextual information, and it can strike a good balance between computational cost and model performance as an efficient model. Source codes will be available at https://github.com/IVIPLab/CFIN.
summary: Recently, Transformer-based methods have shown impressive performance in single image super-resolution (SISR) tasks due to the ability of global feature extraction. However, the capabilities of Transformers that need to incorporate contextual information to extract features dynamically are neglected. To address this issue, we propose a lightweight Cross-receptive Focused Inference Network (CFIN) that consists of a cascade of CT Blocks mixed with CNN and Transformer. Specifically, in the CT block, we first propose a CNN-based Cross-Scale Information Aggregation Module (CIAM) to enable the model to better focus on potentially helpful information to improve the efficiency of the Transformer phase. Then, we design a novel Cross-receptive Field Guided Transformer (CFGT) to enable the selection of contextual information required for reconstruction by using a modulated convolutional kernel that understands the current semantic information and exploits the information interaction within different self-attention. Extensive experiments have shown that our proposed CFIN can effectively reconstruct images using contextual information, and it can strike a good balance between computational cost and model performance as an efficient model. Source codes will be available at https://github.com/IVIPLab/CFIN.
abstract_zh: 最近，由于全局特征提取的能力，基于 Transformer 的方法在单图像超分辨率（SISR）任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，Transformers 需要结合上下文信息来动态提取特征的能力被忽略了。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种轻量级的交叉接收聚焦推理网络（CFIN），它由与 CNN 和 Transformer 混合的级联 CT 块组成。具体来说，在CT块中，我们首先提出了基于CNN的跨尺度信息聚合模块（CIAM），使模型能够更好地关注潜在有用的信息，从而提高Transformer阶段的效率。然后，我们设计了一种新颖的交叉感受场引导变压器（CFGT），通过使用调制卷积核来选择重建所需的上下文信息，该卷积核理解当前的语义信息并利用不同自注意力内的信息交互。大量实验表明，我们提出的 CFIN 可以使用上下文信息有效地重建图像，并且作为一种高效模型，它可以在计算成本和模型性能之间取得良好的平衡。源代码可在 https://github.com/IVIPLab/CFIN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级图像超分辨率网络CFIN，结合CNN与Transformer优势以提升效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在图像超分辨率中表现优异，但其动态提取上下文特征的能力未被充分挖掘，需设计更高效的模型。
AI.method: 设计CFIN网络，包含混合CNN与Transformer的CT块，其中CIAM模块聚合跨尺度信息，CFGT模块通过调制卷积核选择性提取上下文信息。
AI.result: 实验表明CFIN在计算成本与模型性能间取得良好平衡，能有效利用上下文信息进行图像重建。
AI.conclusion: CFIN通过融合CNN与Transformer的优势，实现了高效的轻量级图像超分辨率，验证了上下文信息交互的重要性。

title: Private Matrix Approximation and Geometry of Unitary Orbits

abstract: Consider the following optimization problem: Given $n \times n$ matrices $A$ and $Λ$, maximize $\langle A, UΛU^*\rangle$ where $U$ varies over the unitary group $\mathrm{U}(n)$. This problem seeks to approximate $A$ by a matrix whose spectrum is the same as $Λ$ and, by setting $Λ$ to be appropriate diagonal matrices, one can recover matrix approximation problems such as PCA and rank-$k$ approximation. We study the problem of designing differentially private algorithms for this optimization problem in settings where the matrix $A$ is constructed using users' private data. We give efficient and private algorithms that come with upper and lower bounds on the approximation error. Our results unify and improve upon several prior works on private matrix approximation problems. They rely on extensions of packing/covering number bounds for Grassmannians to unitary orbits which should be of independent interest.

We study the problem of designing differentially private algorithms for this optimization problem in settings where the matrix $A$ is constructed using users' private data. We give efficient and private algorithms that come with upper and lower bounds on the approximation error. Our results unify and improve upon several prior works on private matrix approximation problems. They rely on extensions of packing/covering number bounds for Grassmannians to unitary orbits which should be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 考虑以下优化问题：给定 $n \times n$ 矩阵 $A$ 和 $Λ$，最大化 $\langle A, UΛU^*\rangle$，其中 $U$ 在酉群 $\mathrm{U}(n)$ 上变化。该问题试图通过一个谱与$Λ$相同的矩阵来近似$A$，并且通过将$Λ$设置为适当的对角矩阵，可以恢复矩阵近似问题，例如PCA和rank-$k$近似。我们研究了在使用用户私有数据构造矩阵 $A$ 的设置中为该优化问题设计差分私有算法的问题。我们给出了高效且私有的算法，该算法具有近似误差的上限和下限。我们的结果统一并改进了之前关于私有矩阵近似问题的几项工作。他们依赖于格拉斯曼主义者将堆积/覆盖数界限扩展到单一轨道，这应该具有独立的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在保护用户隐私的前提下，通过酉变换对矩阵进行逼近的优化问题，并设计差分私有算法解决该问题。
AI.motivation: 当矩阵由用户私有数据构建时，传统矩阵逼近方法可能泄露敏感信息，需在保证隐私的同时实现高效逼近。
AI.method: 通过扩展Grassmannian的填充/覆盖数界至酉轨道，设计差分私有算法并分析其近似误差的上下界。
AI.result: 提出高效私有算法，统一改进了PCA和秩-k逼近等经典问题的隐私保护方法，并提供了几何分析的新视角。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为私有矩阵逼近提供了理论保证和算法框架，其几何分析方法具有独立研究价值。

authors_text: Mallesham Dasari,Ramanujan K Sheshadri,Karthikeyan Sundaresan,Samir R. Das
title: RoVaR: Robust Multi-agent Tracking through Dual-layer Diversity in Visual and RF Sensor Fusion
title_zh: RoVaR：通过视觉和射频传感器融合的双层多样性实现稳健的多智能体跟踪
abstract: The plethora of sensors in our commodity devices provides a rich substrate for sensor-fused tracking. Yet, today's solutions are unable to deliver robust and high tracking accuracies across multiple agents in practical, everyday environments - a feature central to the future of immersive and collaborative applications. This can be attributed to the limited scope of diversity leveraged by these fusion solutions, preventing them from catering to the multiple dimensions of accuracy, robustness (diverse environmental conditions) and scalability (multiple agents) simultaneously. In this work, we take an important step towards this goal by introducing the notion of dual-layer diversity to the problem of sensor fusion in multi-agent tracking. We demonstrate that the fusion of complementary tracking modalities, - passive/relative (e.g., visual odometry) and active/absolute tracking (e.g., infrastructure-assisted RF localization) offer a key first layer of diversity that brings scalability while the second layer of diversity lies in the methodology of fusion, where we bring together the complementary strengths of algorithmic (for robustness) and data-driven (for accuracy) approaches. RoVaR is an embodiment of such a dual-layer diversity approach that intelligently attends to cross-modal information using algorithmic and data-driven techniques that jointly share the burden of accurately tracking multiple agents in the wild. Extensive evaluations reveal RoVaR's multi-dimensional benefits in terms of tracking accuracy (median of 15cm), robustness (in unseen environments), light weight (runs in real-time on mobile platforms such as Jetson Nano/TX2), to enable practical multi-agent immersive applications in everyday environments.
summary: The plethora of sensors in our commodity devices provides a rich substrate for sensor-fused tracking. Yet, today's solutions are unable to deliver robust and high tracking accuracies across multiple agents in practical, everyday environments - a feature central to the future of immersive and collaborative applications. This can be attributed to the limited scope of diversity leveraged by these fusion solutions, preventing them from catering to the multiple dimensions of accuracy, robustness (diverse environmental conditions) and scalability (multiple agents) simultaneously. In this work, we take an important step towards this goal by introducing the notion of dual-layer diversity to the problem of sensor fusion in multi-agent tracking. We demonstrate that the fusion of complementary tracking modalities, - passive/relative (e.g., visual odometry) and active/absolute tracking (e.g., infrastructure-assisted RF localization) offer a key first layer of diversity that brings scalability while the second layer of diversity lies in the methodology of fusion, where we bring together the complementary strengths of algorithmic (for robustness) and data-driven (for accuracy) approaches. RoVaR is an embodiment of such a dual-layer diversity approach that intelligently attends to cross-modal information using algorithmic and data-driven techniques that jointly share the burden of accurately tracking multiple agents in the wild. Extensive evaluations reveal RoVaR's multi-dimensional benefits in terms of tracking accuracy (median of 15cm), robustness (in unseen environments), light weight (runs in real-time on mobile platforms such as Jetson Nano/TX2), to enable practical multi-agent immersive applications in everyday environments.
abstract_zh: 我们的商品设备中的大量传感器为传感器融合跟踪提供了丰富的基础。然而，当今的解决方案无法在实际的日常环境中跨多个代理提供强大且高的跟踪精度 - 这是未来沉浸式和协作应用程序的核心功能。这可以归因于这些融合解决方案利用的多样性范围有限，导致它们无法同时满足准确性、鲁棒性（不同环境条件）和可扩展性（多个代理）的多个维度。在这项工作中，我们通过将双层多样性的概念引入到多智能体跟踪中的传感器融合问题中，朝着这一目标迈出了重要的一步。我们证明，互补跟踪模式的融合，被动/相对（例如，视觉里程计）和主动/绝对跟踪（例如，基础设施辅助射频定位）提供了关键的第一层多样性，带来了可扩展性，而第二层多样性则在于融合方法，我们将算法（为了鲁棒性）和数据驱动（为了准确性）方法的互补优势结合在一起。 RoVaR 是这种双层多样性方法的一个实施例，该方法使用算法和数据驱动技术智能地处理跨模式信息，共同分担在野外准确跟踪多个代理的负担。广泛的评估揭示了 RoVaR 在跟踪精度（中位数为 15 厘米）、鲁棒性（在看不见的环境中）、重量轻（在 Jetson Nano/TX2 等移动平台上实时运行）方面的多维优势，可在日常环境中实现实用的多智能体沉浸式应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoVaR方法，通过视觉和RF传感器的双层多样性融合，实现多智能体的鲁棒跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有传感器融合方案在复杂环境中难以同时满足多智能体跟踪的准确性、鲁棒性和可扩展性需求。
AI.method: 引入双层多样性：第一层融合被动相对定位（视觉里程计）与主动绝对定位（RF定位）；第二层结合算法鲁棒性与数据驱动精度，通过跨模态注意力机制实现智能体跟踪。
AI.result: 在真实环境中实现15cm中位数跟踪精度，支持未知环境鲁棒性，可在Jetson Nano等移动平台实时运行。
AI.conclusion: 双层多样性框架有效平衡了多智能体跟踪的精度、鲁棒性与可扩展性，为沉浸式应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Audrey Cui,Ali Jahanian,Agata Lapedriza,Antonio Torralba,Shahin Mahdizadehaghdam,Rohit Kumar,David Bau
title: Local Relighting of Real Scenes
title_zh: 真实场景的局部重新照明
abstract: We introduce the task of local relighting, which changes a photograph of a scene by switching on and off the light sources that are visible within the image. This new task differs from the traditional image relighting problem, as it introduces the challenge of detecting light sources and inferring the pattern of light that emanates from them. We propose an approach for local relighting that trains a model without supervision of any novel image dataset by using synthetically generated image pairs from another model. Concretely, we collect paired training images from a stylespace-manipulated GAN; then we use these images to train a conditional image-to-image model. To benchmark local relighting, we introduce Lonoff, a collection of 306 precisely aligned images taken in indoor spaces with different combinations of lights switched on. We show that our method significantly outperforms baseline methods based on GAN inversion. Finally, we demonstrate extensions of our method that control different light sources separately. We invite the community to tackle this new task of local relighting.
summary: We introduce the task of local relighting, which changes a photograph of a scene by switching on and off the light sources that are visible within the image. This new task differs from the traditional image relighting problem, as it introduces the challenge of detecting light sources and inferring the pattern of light that emanates from them. We propose an approach for local relighting that trains a model without supervision of any novel image dataset by using synthetically generated image pairs from another model. Concretely, we collect paired training images from a stylespace-manipulated GAN; then we use these images to train a conditional image-to-image model. To benchmark local relighting, we introduce Lonoff, a collection of 306 precisely aligned images taken in indoor spaces with different combinations of lights switched on. We show that our method significantly outperforms baseline methods based on GAN inversion. Finally, we demonstrate extensions of our method that control different light sources separately. We invite the community to tackle this new task of local relighting.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了局部重新照明的任务，它通过打开和关闭图像中可见的光源来改变场景的照片。这项新任务与传统的图像重新照明问题不同，因为它引入了检测光源并推断光源发出的光模式的挑战。我们提出了一种局部重新照明的方法，通过使用从另一个模型合成生成的图像对来训练模型，而无需监督任何新颖的图像数据集。具体来说，我们从风格空间操纵的 GAN 中收集配对训练图像；然后我们使用这些图像来训练条件图像到图像模型。为了对局部重新照明进行基准测试，我们引入了 Lonoff，这是在打开不同灯光组合的室内空间中拍摄的 306 张精确对齐的图像的集合。我们表明，我们的方法明显优于基于 GAN 反演的基线方法。最后，我们演示了单独控制不同光源的方法的扩展。我们邀请社区来解决本地重新照明的新任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出局部重照明任务，通过开关图像中可见光源改变真实场景照片的光照效果。
AI.motivation: 传统图像重照明难以处理多光源场景，且缺乏对光源检测与光照模式推理的直接控制方法。
AI.method: 利用风格空间操作的GAN生成合成图像对训练条件图像转换模型，并构建Lonoff数据集进行基准测试。
AI.result: 方法在局部重照明任务中显著优于基于GAN反转的基线，可独立控制不同光源。
AI.conclusion: 提出局部重照明新任务，提供数据集与方法，推动相关研究发展。

search_text: Local Relighting of Real Scenes 真实场景的局部重新照明 We introduce the task of local relighting, which changes a photograph of a scene by switching on and off the light sources that are visible within the image. This new task differs from the traditional image relighting problem, as it introduces the challenge of detecting light sources and inferring the pattern of light that emanates from them. We propose an approach for local relighting that trains a model without supervision of any novel image dataset by using synthetically generated image pairs from another model. Concretely, we collect paired training images from a stylespace-manipulated GAN; then we use these images to train a conditional image-to-image model. To benchmark local relighting, we introduce Lonoff, a collection of 306 precisely aligned images taken in indoor spaces with different combinations of lights switched on. We show that our method significantly outperforms baseline methods based on GAN inversion. Finally, we demonstrate extensions of our method that control different light sources separately. We invite the community to tackle this new task of local relighting. 我们介绍了局部重新照明的任务，它通过打开和关闭图像中可见的光源来改变场景的照片。这项新任务与传统的图像重新照明问题不同，因为它引入了检测光源并推断光源发出的光模式的挑战。我们提出了一种局部重新照明的方法，通过使用从另一个模型合成生成的图像对来训练模型，而无需监督任何新颖的图像数据集。具体来说，我们从风格空间操纵的 GAN 中收集配对训练图像；然后我们使用这些图像来训练条件图像到图像模型。为了对局部重新照明进行基准测试，我们引入了 Lonoff，这是在打开不同灯光组合的室内空间中拍摄的 306 张精确对齐的图像的集合。我们表明，我们的方法明显优于基于 GAN 反演的基线方法。最后，我们演示了单独控制不同光源的方法的扩展。我们邀请社区来解决本地重新照明的新任务。 本文提出局部重照明任务，通过开关图像中可见光源改变真实场景照片的光照效果。 Audrey Cui,Ali Jahanian,Agata Lapedriza,Antonio Torralba,Shahin Mahdizadehaghdam,Rohit Kumar,David Bau cs.CV,cs.GR

title: A Survey of Recent Machine Learning Solutions for Ship Collision Avoidance and Mission Planning
title_zh: 最新船舶防撞和任务规划机器学习解决方案调查
comment: ef:14th IFAC Conference on Control Applications in Marine Systems, Robotics and Vehicles, September 14-16 2022
comments: ef:14th IFAC Conference on Control Applications in Marine Systems, Robotics and Vehicles, September 14-16 2022
abstract: Machine Learning (ML) techniques have gained significant traction as a means of improving the autonomy of marine vehicles over the last few years. This article surveys the recent ML approaches utilised for ship collision avoidance (COLAV) and mission planning. Following an overview of the ever-expanding ML exploitation for maritime vehicles, key topics in the mission planning of ships are outlined. Notable papers with direct and indirect applications to the COLAV subject are technically reviewed and compared. Critiques, challenges, and future directions are also identified. The outcome clearly demonstrates the thriving research in this field, even though commercial marine ships incorporating machine intelligence able to perform autonomously under all operating conditions are still a long way off.

The outcome clearly demonstrates the thriving research in this field, even though commercial marine ships incorporating machine intelligence able to perform autonomously under all operating conditions are still a long way off.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，机器学习 (ML) 技术作为提高海洋车辆自主性的一种手段获得了巨大的关注。本文调查了最近用于船舶防撞 (COLAV) 和任务规划的机器学习方法。在概述了海上车辆不断扩展的机器学习开发之后，概述了船舶任务规划中的关键主题。对直接和间接应用于 COLAV 主题的著名论文进行了技术审查和比较。还确定了批评、挑战和未来方向。结果清楚地表明了该领域研究的蓬勃发展，尽管距离实现能够在所有操作条件下自主执行机器智能的商业船舶还有很长的路要走。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了近年来用于船舶避碰（COLAV）和任务规划的机器学习方法，分析了关键技术并指出了未来方向。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习技术的发展，其在提升船舶自主性方面的潜力引发关注，需系统梳理现有方法及挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，总结ML在船舶避碰与任务规划中的应用，技术评审关键论文并对比分析其优缺点。
AI.result: 结果显示该领域研究活跃，但具备全场景自主能力的商用船舶仍需长期技术突破。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习为船舶自主化提供新思路，但需解决复杂环境适应性、安全验证等核心问题。
