title: Lessons Learnt from Deploying ARI in Residential Care
title_zh: 在住宅护理中部署 ARI 的经验教训
comment: in TRAITS Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2206.08270) held in conjuntion with Companion of the 2022 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction, March 2022, Pages Pages 1284-1286
comments: in TRAITS Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2206.08270) held in conjuntion with Companion of the 2022 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction, March 2022, Pages Pages 1284-1286
abstract: This paper describes the final prototype of an assistive robot used for increasing engagement of older adults in the context of SHAPES project. It then highlights lessons learned from hands-on training during the first phases of the pilots at Clinica Humana and Can Granada residence in Mallorca (Spain).
summary: This paper describes the final prototype of an assistive robot used for increasing engagement of older adults in the context of SHAPES project. It then highlights lessons learned from hands-on training during the first phases of the pilots at Clinica Humana and Can Granada residence in Mallorca (Spain).
abstract_zh: 本文描述了辅助机器人的最终原型，该机器人用于在 SHAPES 项目中提高老年人的参与度。然后重点介绍了在马略卡岛（西班牙）的 Clinica Humana 和 Can Granada 住宅试点第一阶段的实践培训中吸取的经验教训。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SHAPES项目中用于提升老年人参与度的辅助机器人ARIA的最终原型，并总结了在西班牙养老院试点期间的实际部署经验。
AI.motivation: 通过部署辅助机器人增强养老院老年人的社交互动与活动参与度，缓解其孤独感与认知退化问题。
AI.method: 开发ARIA机器人原型，结合养老院实际环境进行多阶段试点测试，收集护理人员与老年人的反馈数据。
AI.result: 识别出机器人设计、用户培训及长期接受度等关键挑战，为后续迭代提供实践依据。
AI.conclusion: 实际部署凸显了技术适配性与人文关怀结合的重要性，需在机器人设计中强化个性化交互与持续用户支持机制。

title: TREE-G: Decision Trees Contesting Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: TREE-G：决策树与图神经网络的竞争
abstract: When dealing with tabular data, models based on decision trees are a popular choice due to their high accuracy on these data types, their ease of application, and explainability properties. However, when it comes to graph-structured data, it is not clear how to apply them effectively, in a way that incorporates the topological information with the tabular data available on the vertices of the graph. To address this challenge, we introduce TREE-G. TREE-G modifies standard decision trees, by introducing a novel split function that is specialized for graph data. Not only does this split function incorporate the node features and the topological information, but it also uses a novel pointer mechanism that allows split nodes to use information computed in previous splits. Therefore, the split function adapts to the predictive task and the graph at hand. We analyze the theoretical properties of TREE-G and demonstrate its benefits empirically on multiple graph and vertex prediction benchmarks. In these experiments, TREE-G consistently outperforms other tree-based models and often outperforms other graph-learning algorithms such as Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and Graph Kernels, sometimes by large margins. Moreover, TREE-Gs models and their predictions can be explained and visualized
summary: When dealing with tabular data, models based on decision trees are a popular choice due to their high accuracy on these data types, their ease of application, and explainability properties. However, when it comes to graph-structured data, it is not clear how to apply them effectively, in a way that incorporates the topological information with the tabular data available on the vertices of the graph. To address this challenge, we introduce TREE-G. TREE-G modifies standard decision trees, by introducing a novel split function that is specialized for graph data. Not only does this split function incorporate the node features and the topological information, but it also uses a novel pointer mechanism that allows split nodes to use information computed in previous splits. Therefore, the split function adapts to the predictive task and the graph at hand. We analyze the theoretical properties of TREE-G and demonstrate its benefits empirically on multiple graph and vertex prediction benchmarks. In these experiments, TREE-G consistently outperforms other tree-based models and often outperforms other graph-learning algorithms such as Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and Graph Kernels, sometimes by large margins. Moreover, TREE-Gs models and their predictions can be explained and visualized
abstract_zh: 在处理表格数据时，基于决策树的模型是一种流行的选择，因为它们对这些数据类型的准确性高、易于应用且具有可解释性。然而，当涉及图结构数据时，尚不清楚如何有效地应用它们，将拓扑信息与图顶点上可用的表格数据结合起来。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 TREE-G。 TREE-G 通过引入专门用于图数据的新颖分割函数来修改标准决策树。该分割函数不仅结合了节点特征和拓扑信息，而且还使用了一种新颖的指针机制，允许分割节点使用先前分割中计算的信息。因此，分割函数适应预测任务和手头的图表。我们分析了 TREE-G 的理论特性，并在多个图和顶点预测基准上凭经验证明了其优势。在这些实验中，TREE-G 始终优于其他基于树的模型，并且常常优于其他图学习算法，例如图神经网络 (GNN) 和图内核，有时甚至大幅领先。此外，TREE-Gs 模型及其预测可以解释和可视化

AI.tldr: 提出TREE-G方法，通过改进决策树以处理图结构数据并挑战图神经网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 决策树在表格数据表现优异，但难以有效结合图数据的拓扑信息，需新方法解决此问题。
AI.method: 设计针对图数据的分裂函数，结合节点特征与拓扑信息，并引入指针机制复用先前分裂信息。
AI.result: 在多个图预测基准中，TREE-G优于其他树模型及GNNs、图核等算法，且模型具备可解释性。
AI.conclusion: TREE-G理论分析与实验验证了其有效性，为图数据提供可解释且高性能的决策树解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 提出TREE-G方法，通过改进决策树以处理图结构数据并挑战图神经网络的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 决策树在表格数据表现优异，但难以有效结合图数据的拓扑信息，需新方法解决此问题。
ai_content.method: 设计针对图数据的分裂函数，结合节点特征与拓扑信息，并引入指针机制复用先前分裂信息。
ai_content.result: 在多个图预测基准中，TREE-G优于其他树模型及GNNs、图核等算法，且模型具备可解释性。
ai_content.conclusion: TREE-G理论分析与实验验证了其有效性，为图数据提供可解释且高性能的决策树解决方案。

search_text: TREE-G: Decision Trees Contesting Graph Neural Networks TREE-G：决策树与图神经网络的竞争 When dealing with tabular data, models based on decision trees are a popular choice due to their high accuracy on these data types, their ease of application, and explainability properties. However, when it comes to graph-structured data, it is not clear how to apply them effectively, in a way that incorporates the topological information with the tabular data available on the vertices of the graph. To address this challenge, we introduce TREE-G. TREE-G modifies standard decision trees, by introducing a novel split function that is specialized for graph data. Not only does this split function incorporate the node features and the topological information, but it also uses a novel pointer mechanism that allows split nodes to use information computed in previous splits. Therefore, the split function adapts to the predictive task and the graph at hand. We analyze the theoretical properties of TREE-G and demonstrate its benefits empirically on multiple graph and vertex prediction benchmarks. In these experiments, TREE-G consistently outperforms other tree-based models and often outperforms other graph-learning algorithms such as Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and Graph Kernels, sometimes by large margins. Moreover, TREE-Gs models and their predictions can be explained and visualized 在处理表格数据时，基于决策树的模型是一种流行的选择，因为它们对这些数据类型的准确性高、易于应用且具有可解释性。然而，当涉及图结构数据时，尚不清楚如何有效地应用它们，将拓扑信息与图顶点上可用的表格数据结合起来。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 TREE-G。 TREE-G 通过引入专门用于图数据的新颖分割函数来修改标准决策树。该分割函数不仅结合了节点特征和拓扑信息，而且还使用了一种新颖的指针机制，允许分割节点使用先前分割中计算的信息。因此，分割函数适应预测任务和手头的图表。我们分析了 TREE-G 的理论特性，并在多个图和顶点预测基准上凭经验证明了其优势。在这些实验中，TREE-G 始终优于其他基于树的模型，并且常常优于其他图学习算法，例如图神经网络 (GNN) 和图内核，有时甚至大幅领先。此外，TREE-Gs 模型及其预测可以解释和可视化 提出TREE-G方法，通过改进决策树以处理图结构数据并挑战图神经网络的性能。 Maya Bechler-Speicher,Amir Globerson,Ran Gilad-Bachrach cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zihang Lin,Chaolei Tan,Jian-Fang Hu,Zhi Jin,Tiancai Ye,Wei-Shi Zheng
title: STVGFormer: Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding with Static-Dynamic Cross-Modal Understanding
title_zh: STVGFormer：具有静态-动态跨模态理解的时空视频接地
comment: Technical report. The 1st place solution in the HC-STVG track of the 4th Person in Context Challenge(2022)
comments: Technical report. The 1st place solution in the HC-STVG track of the 4th Person in Context Challenge(2022)
abstract: In this technical report, we introduce our solution to human-centric spatio-temporal video grounding task. We propose a concise and effective framework named STVGFormer, which models spatiotemporal visual-linguistic dependencies with a static branch and a dynamic branch. The static branch performs cross-modal understanding in a single frame and learns to localize the target object spatially according to intra-frame visual cues like object appearances. The dynamic branch performs cross-modal understanding across multiple frames. It learns to predict the starting and ending time of the target moment according to dynamic visual cues like motions. Both the static and dynamic branches are designed as cross-modal transformers. We further design a novel static-dynamic interaction block to enable the static and dynamic branches to transfer useful and complementary information from each other, which is shown to be effective to improve the prediction on hard cases. Our proposed method achieved 39.6% vIoU and won the first place in the HC-STVG track of the 4th Person in Context Challenge.
summary: In this technical report, we introduce our solution to human-centric spatio-temporal video grounding task. We propose a concise and effective framework named STVGFormer, which models spatiotemporal visual-linguistic dependencies with a static branch and a dynamic branch. The static branch performs cross-modal understanding in a single frame and learns to localize the target object spatially according to intra-frame visual cues like object appearances. The dynamic branch performs cross-modal understanding across multiple frames. It learns to predict the starting and ending time of the target moment according to dynamic visual cues like motions. Both the static and dynamic branches are designed as cross-modal transformers. We further design a novel static-dynamic interaction block to enable the static and dynamic branches to transfer useful and complementary information from each other, which is shown to be effective to improve the prediction on hard cases. Our proposed method achieved 39.6% vIoU and won the first place in the HC-STVG track of the 4th Person in Context Challenge.
abstract_zh: 在本技术报告中，我们介绍了以人为中心的时空视频接地任务的解决方案。我们提出了一个名为 STVGFormer 的简洁有效的框架，它用静态分支和动态分支对时空视觉语言依赖关系进行建模。静态分支在单帧中执行跨模态理解，并学习根据帧内视觉线索（如对象外观）在空间上定位目标对象。动态分支执行跨多个框架的跨模式理解。它学习根据运动等动态视觉线索来预测目标时刻的开始和结束时间。静态和动态分支都被设计为跨模式变压器。我们进一步设计了一种新颖的静态-动态交互块，使静态和动态分支能够相互传递有用且互补的信息，这被证明可以有效提高对困难情况的预测。我们提出的方法实现了 39.6% 的 vIoU，并在第四届 Person in Context Challenge 的 HC-STVG 赛道上获得了第一名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STVGFormer框架，解决以人为中心的时空视频定位任务，通过静态与动态跨模态理解实现精准时空定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效融合视频中的静态视觉线索（如物体外观）与动态视觉线索（如运动轨迹），导致复杂场景下定位精度不足。
AI.method: 设计包含静态分支（单帧跨模态定位）和动态分支（多帧时序预测）的双分支架构，并引入静态-动态交互模块促进信息互补。
AI.result: 在HC-STVG赛道中以39.6%的vIoU指标获得第一名，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 静态-动态跨模态交互机制有效提升了复杂场景下的时空定位能力，为视频理解任务提供了新思路。

title: "Curse of rarity" for autonomous vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的“稀缺诅咒”
abstract: In this paper, we reveal that the rarity of safety-critical events in high-dimensional driving environments is the root cause of the safety challenge for autonomous vehicle development. We formulate it as "curse of rarity" (CoR) because it occurs ubiquitously in various safety-critical systems such as medical diagnosis and aerospace systems.
summary: In this paper, we reveal that the rarity of safety-critical events in high-dimensional driving environments is the root cause of the safety challenge for autonomous vehicle development. We formulate it as "curse of rarity" (CoR) because it occurs ubiquitously in various safety-critical systems such as medical diagnosis and aerospace systems.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们揭示了高维驾驶环境中安全关键事件的罕见性是自动驾驶汽车开发面临安全挑战的根本原因。我们将其表述为“稀有诅咒”（CoR），因为它普遍存在于各种安全关键系统中，例如医疗诊断和航空航天系统。

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了自动驾驶车辆开发中安全关键事件的稀有性是安全挑战的根本原因，并将其定义为'稀有性诅咒'(CoR)。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要应对高维驾驶环境中罕见但关键的安全事件，而现有方法难以有效处理此类低概率事件带来的风险。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和跨领域案例研究（如医疗诊断和航空航天系统），将安全关键事件的稀有性抽象为普遍存在的'稀有性诅咒'概念。
AI.result: 证实了安全关键事件的稀有性会导致数据不足和模型训练困难，成为自动驾驶系统安全验证的核心瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 解决'稀有性诅咒'需要开发新的数据增强方法和风险评估框架，以应对自动驾驶等安全关键系统的稀有事件挑战。

authors_text: Sanghamitra Dutta,Jason Long,Saumitra Mishra,Cecilia Tilli,Daniele Magazzeni
title: Robust Counterfactual Explanations for Tree-Based Ensembles
title_zh: 基于树的集成的稳健反事实解释
abstract: Counterfactual explanations inform ways to achieve a desired outcome from a machine learning model. However, such explanations are not robust to certain real-world changes in the underlying model (e.g., retraining the model, changing hyperparameters, etc.), questioning their reliability in several applications, e.g., credit lending. In this work, we propose a novel strategy -- that we call RobX -- to generate robust counterfactuals for tree-based ensembles, e.g., XGBoost. Tree-based ensembles pose additional challenges in robust counterfactual generation, e.g., they have a non-smooth and non-differentiable objective function, and they can change a lot in the parameter space under retraining on very similar data. We first introduce a novel metric -- that we call Counterfactual Stability -- that attempts to quantify how robust a counterfactual is going to be to model changes under retraining, and comes with desirable theoretical properties. Our proposed strategy RobX works with any counterfactual generation method (base method) and searches for robust counterfactuals by iteratively refining the counterfactual generated by the base method using our metric Counterfactual Stability. We compare the performance of RobX with popular counterfactual generation methods (for tree-based ensembles) across benchmark datasets. The results demonstrate that our strategy generates counterfactuals that are significantly more robust (nearly 100% validity after actual model changes) and also realistic (in terms of local outlier factor) over existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Counterfactual explanations inform ways to achieve a desired outcome from a machine learning model. However, such explanations are not robust to certain real-world changes in the underlying model (e.g., retraining the model, changing hyperparameters, etc.), questioning their reliability in several applications, e.g., credit lending. In this work, we propose a novel strategy -- that we call RobX -- to generate robust counterfactuals for tree-based ensembles, e.g., XGBoost. Tree-based ensembles pose additional challenges in robust counterfactual generation, e.g., they have a non-smooth and non-differentiable objective function, and they can change a lot in the parameter space under retraining on very similar data. We first introduce a novel metric -- that we call Counterfactual Stability -- that attempts to quantify how robust a counterfactual is going to be to model changes under retraining, and comes with desirable theoretical properties. Our proposed strategy RobX works with any counterfactual generation method (base method) and searches for robust counterfactuals by iteratively refining the counterfactual generated by the base method using our metric Counterfactual Stability. We compare the performance of RobX with popular counterfactual generation methods (for tree-based ensembles) across benchmark datasets. The results demonstrate that our strategy generates counterfactuals that are significantly more robust (nearly 100% validity after actual model changes) and also realistic (in terms of local outlier factor) over existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 反事实解释提供了从机器学习模型中实现预期结果的方法。然而，这样的解释对于底层模型中的某些现实世界变化（例如，重新训练模型、更改超参数等）来说并不稳健，从而质疑它们在信用贷款等多种应用中的可靠性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的策略——我们称之为 RobX——为基于树的集成生成强大的反事实，例如 XGBoost。基于树的集成在鲁棒的反事实生成中提出了额外的挑战，例如，它们具有非平滑且不可微的目标函数，并且在非常相似的数据上进行再训练时，它们可以在参数空间中发生很大变化。我们首先引入一种新颖的指标——我们称之为反事实稳定性——它试图量化反事实对再训练下的变化建模的鲁棒性，并具有理想的理论属性。我们提出的策略 RobX 适用于任何反事实生成方法（基本方法），并通过使用我们的度量反事实稳定性迭代细化基本方法生成的反事实来搜索稳健的反事实。我们在基准数据集上将 RobX 的性能与流行的反事实生成方法（针对基于树的集成）进行比较。结果表明，我们的策略生成的反事实比现有最先进的方法更加稳健（实际模型更改后几乎 100% 的有效性）并且也更现实（就局部异常值因素而言）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RobX的新策略，用于生成对树集成模型（如XGBoost）具有鲁棒性的反事实解释。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释在模型重新训练或超参数调整等实际变化下可靠性不足，影响其在信贷等关键领域的应用。
AI.method: 引入Counterfactual Stability指标量化反事实鲁棒性，并通过迭代优化框架RobX结合任意基础方法生成更稳健的反事实。
AI.result: 实验表明RobX生成的反事实在模型变化后有效性达近100%，且局部离群因子更合理，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: RobX通过稳定性指标和迭代优化有效提升了树集成模型反事实解释的鲁棒性与现实性，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Robust Counterfactual Explanations for Tree-Based Ensembles 基于树的集成的稳健反事实解释 Counterfactual explanations inform ways to achieve a desired outcome from a machine learning model. However, such explanations are not robust to certain real-world changes in the underlying model (e.g., retraining the model, changing hyperparameters, etc.), questioning their reliability in several applications, e.g., credit lending. In this work, we propose a novel strategy -- that we call RobX -- to generate robust counterfactuals for tree-based ensembles, e.g., XGBoost. Tree-based ensembles pose additional challenges in robust counterfactual generation, e.g., they have a non-smooth and non-differentiable objective function, and they can change a lot in the parameter space under retraining on very similar data. We first introduce a novel metric -- that we call Counterfactual Stability -- that attempts to quantify how robust a counterfactual is going to be to model changes under retraining, and comes with desirable theoretical properties. Our proposed strategy RobX works with any counterfactual generation method (base method) and searches for robust counterfactuals by iteratively refining the counterfactual generated by the base method using our metric Counterfactual Stability. We compare the performance of RobX with popular counterfactual generation methods (for tree-based ensembles) across benchmark datasets. The results demonstrate that our strategy generates counterfactuals that are significantly more robust (nearly 100% validity after actual model changes) and also realistic (in terms of local outlier factor) over existing state-of-the-art methods. 反事实解释提供了从机器学习模型中实现预期结果的方法。然而，这样的解释对于底层模型中的某些现实世界变化（例如，重新训练模型、更改超参数等）来说并不稳健，从而质疑它们在信用贷款等多种应用中的可靠性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的策略——我们称之为 RobX——为基于树的集成生成强大的反事实，例如 XGBoost。基于树的集成在鲁棒的反事实生成中提出了额外的挑战，例如，它们具有非平滑且不可微的目标函数，并且在非常相似的数据上进行再训练时，它们可以在参数空间中发生很大变化。我们首先引入一种新颖的指标——我们称之为反事实稳定性——它试图量化反事实对再训练下的变化建模的鲁棒性，并具有理想的理论属性。我们提出的策略 RobX 适用于任何反事实生成方法（基本方法），并通过使用我们的度量反事实稳定性迭代细化基本方法生成的反事实来搜索稳健的反事实。我们在基准数据集上将 RobX 的性能与流行的反事实生成方法（针对基于树的集成）进行比较。结果表明，我们的策略生成的反事实比现有最先进的方法更加稳健（实际模型更改后几乎 100% 的有效性）并且也更现实（就局部异常值因素而言）。 本文提出了一种名为RobX的新策略，用于生成对树集成模型（如XGBoost）具有鲁棒性的反事实解释。 Sanghamitra Dutta,Jason Long,Saumitra Mishra,Cecilia Tilli,Daniele Magazzeni cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

title: Characterizing disruptions in online gaming behavior following software patches
title_zh: 描述软件补丁后在线游戏行为中断的特征
abstract: Multiplayer online games are ideal settings for studying the effects of technological disruptions on social behavior. Software patches to online games cause significant changes to the game's rules and require players to develop new strategies to cope with these disruptions. We surveyed players, analyzed the content of software patch notes, and analyzed changes to the character selection behaviors in more than 53 million matches of Dota 2 in the days before and after software patches over a 30-month period. We found that the severity of patches is correlated with the magnitude of behavioral changes following a patch. We discuss the opportunities of leveraging software patches to online games as a valuable but overlooked empirical instrument for measuring behavioral dynamics.
summary: Multiplayer online games are ideal settings for studying the effects of technological disruptions on social behavior. Software patches to online games cause significant changes to the game's rules and require players to develop new strategies to cope with these disruptions. We surveyed players, analyzed the content of software patch notes, and analyzed changes to the character selection behaviors in more than 53 million matches of Dota 2 in the days before and after software patches over a 30-month period. We found that the severity of patches is correlated with the magnitude of behavioral changes following a patch. We discuss the opportunities of leveraging software patches to online games as a valuable but overlooked empirical instrument for measuring behavioral dynamics.
abstract_zh: 多人在线游戏是研究技术颠覆对社会行为影响的理想环境。在线游戏的软件补丁会导致游戏规则发生重大变化，并要求玩家制定新的策略来应对这些干扰。我们对玩家进行了调查，分析了软件补丁说明的内容，并分析了 30 个月内软件补丁前后超过 5300 万场 Dota 2 比赛中角色选择行为的变化。我们发现补丁的严重程度与补丁后行为变化的程度相关。我们讨论了利用在线游戏软件补丁作为衡量行为动态的有价值但被忽视的经验工具的机会。

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了软件补丁对多人在线游戏行为的影响，通过调查玩家、分析补丁说明及Dota 2比赛数据，探讨补丁严重程度与行为变化的关系。
AI.motivation: 利用游戏软件补丁作为技术中断的可控变量，研究其对玩家行为动态的影响，为社会行为研究提供新的实证工具。
AI.method: 通过问卷调查、补丁内容分析及5300万场Dota 2比赛的角色选择行为数据，对比补丁前后的行为变化，持续30个月追踪分析。
AI.result: 发现补丁严重程度与玩家行为变化幅度呈正相关，重大补丁导致更显著的角色选择策略调整。
AI.conclusion: 游戏补丁可作为测量技术中断对社会行为影响的潜在实证工具，为行为研究提供新视角。

ai_content.tldr: 本研究分析了软件补丁对多人在线游戏行为的影响，通过调查玩家、分析补丁说明及Dota 2比赛数据，探讨补丁严重程度与行为变化的关系。

title: Polynomial Time Near-Time-Optimal Multi-Robot Path Planning in Three Dimensions with Applications to Large-Scale UAV Coordination
title_zh: 三维多项式时间近时最优多机器人路径规划及其在大规模无人机协调中的应用
comment: Accepted by IROS2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2201.08976
comments: Accepted by IROS2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2201.08976
abstract: For enabling efficient, large-scale coordination of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) under the labeled setting, in this work, we develop the first polynomial time algorithm for the reconfiguration of many moving bodies in three-dimensional spaces, with provable $1.x$ asymptotic makespan optimality guarantee under high robot density. More precisely, on an $m_1\times m_2 \times m_3$ grid, $m_1\ge m_2\ge m_3$, our method computes solutions for routing up to $\frac{m_1m_2m_3}{3}$ uniquely labeled robots with uniformly randomly distributed start and goal configurations within a makespan of $m_1 + 2m_2 +2m_3+o(m_1)$, with high probability. Because the makespan lower bound for such instances is $m_1 + m_2+m_3 - o(m_1)$, also with high probability, as $m_1 \to \infty$, $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3}$ optimality guarantee is achieved. $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3} \in (1, \frac{5}{3}]$, yielding $1.x$ optimality. In contrast, it is well-known that multi-robot path planning is NP-hard to optimally solve. In numerical evaluations, our method readily scales to support the motion planning of over $100,000$ robots in 3D while simultaneously achieving $1.x$ optimality. We demonstrate the application of our method in coordinating many quadcopters in both simulation and hardware experiments.
summary: For enabling efficient, large-scale coordination of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) under the labeled setting, in this work, we develop the first polynomial time algorithm for the reconfiguration of many moving bodies in three-dimensional spaces, with provable $1.x$ asymptotic makespan optimality guarantee under high robot density. More precisely, on an $m_1\times m_2 \times m_3$ grid, $m_1\ge m_2\ge m_3$, our method computes solutions for routing up to $\frac{m_1m_2m_3}{3}$ uniquely labeled robots with uniformly randomly distributed start and goal configurations within a makespan of $m_1 + 2m_2 +2m_3+o(m_1)$, with high probability. Because the makespan lower bound for such instances is $m_1 + m_2+m_3 - o(m_1)$, also with high probability, as $m_1 \to \infty$, $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3}$ optimality guarantee is achieved. $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3} \in (1, \frac{5}{3}]$, yielding $1.x$ optimality. In contrast, it is well-known that multi-robot path planning is NP-hard to optimally solve. In numerical evaluations, our method readily scales to support the motion planning of over $100,000$ robots in 3D while simultaneously achieving $1.x$ optimality. We demonstrate the application of our method in coordinating many quadcopters in both simulation and hardware experiments.
abstract_zh: 为了在标记设置下实现无人机（UAV）的高效、大规模协调，在这项工作中，我们开发了第一个多项式时间算法，用于在三维空间中重新配置许多移动体，并在高机器人密度下证明了 $1.x$ 渐近完工时间最优性保证。更准确地说，在 $m_1\times m_2 \times m_3$ 网格 $m_1\ge m_2\ge m_3$ 上，我们的方法以高概率在 $m_1 + 2m_2 +2m_3+o(m_1)$ 的完成时间内计算路由到 $\frac{m_1m_2m_3}{3}$ 唯一标记的机器人的解决方案，这些机器人具有均匀随机分布的起始和目标配置。因为此类实例的完工时间下限为 $m_1 + m_2+m_3 - o(m_1)$，也很有可能，因为 $m_1 \to \infty$，因此实现了 $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3}$ 最优性保证。 $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3} \in (1, \frac{5}{3}]$，产生 $1.x$ 最优性。相比之下，众所周知，多机器人路径规划是 NP 难最优求解的。在数值评估中，我们的方法可以轻松扩展以支持超过 100,000$ 机器人的 3D 运动规划，同时实现我们展示了我们的方法在模拟和硬件实验中协调许多四轴飞行器的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于三维空间中大规模无人机的近时间最优路径规划，具有可证明的优化保证。
AI.motivation: 多机器人路径规划在高密度场景下具有NP难特性，传统方法难以处理大规模无人机编队的高效协调需求。
AI.method: 基于三维网格划分，设计首个多项式时间算法，通过随机分布起点终点配置，确保最多1/3网格体积的机器人路径规划，其makespan满足特定优化比值。
AI.result: 算法可在10万级无人机规模下实现1.x优化比的路径规划，仿真与硬件实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模三维无人机编队提供了高效、近最优的路径规划方案，突破了传统NP难问题的计算限制。

ai_content_json.result: 算法可在10万级无人机规模下实现1.x优化比的路径规划，仿真与硬件实验验证了方法的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法为大规模三维无人机编队提供了高效、近最优的路径规划方案，突破了传统NP难问题的计算限制。

tldr: 本文提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于三维空间中大规模无人机的近时间最优路径规划，具有可证明的优化保证。
motivation: 多机器人路径规划在高密度场景下具有NP难特性，传统方法难以处理大规模无人机编队的高效协调需求。
method: 基于三维网格划分，设计首个多项式时间算法，通过随机分布起点终点配置，确保最多1/3网格体积的机器人路径规划，其makespan满足特定优化比值。
result: 算法可在10万级无人机规模下实现1.x优化比的路径规划，仿真与硬件实验验证了方法的有效性。
conclusion: 该方法为大规模三维无人机编队提供了高效、近最优的路径规划方案，突破了传统NP难问题的计算限制。
search_text: Polynomial Time Near-Time-Optimal Multi-Robot Path Planning in Three Dimensions with Applications to Large-Scale UAV Coordination 三维多项式时间近时最优多机器人路径规划及其在大规模无人机协调中的应用 For enabling efficient, large-scale coordination of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) under the labeled setting, in this work, we develop the first polynomial time algorithm for the reconfiguration of many moving bodies in three-dimensional spaces, with provable $1.x$ asymptotic makespan optimality guarantee under high robot density. More precisely, on an $m_1\times m_2 \times m_3$ grid, $m_1\ge m_2\ge m_3$, our method computes solutions for routing up to $\frac{m_1m_2m_3}{3}$ uniquely labeled robots with uniformly randomly distributed start and goal configurations within a makespan of $m_1 + 2m_2 +2m_3+o(m_1)$, with high probability. Because the makespan lower bound for such instances is $m_1 + m_2+m_3 - o(m_1)$, also with high probability, as $m_1 \to \infty$, $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3}$ optimality guarantee is achieved. $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3} \in (1, \frac{5}{3}]$, yielding $1.x$ optimality. In contrast, it is well-known that multi-robot path planning is NP-hard to optimally solve. In numerical evaluations, our method readily scales to support the motion planning of over $100,000$ robots in 3D while simultaneously achieving $1.x$ optimality. We demonstrate the application of our method in coordinating many quadcopters in both simulation and hardware experiments. 为了在标记设置下实现无人机（UAV）的高效、大规模协调，在这项工作中，我们开发了第一个多项式时间算法，用于在三维空间中重新配置许多移动体，并在高机器人密度下证明了 $1.x$ 渐近完工时间最优性保证。更准确地说，在 $m_1\times m_2 \times m_3$ 网格 $m_1\ge m_2\ge m_3$ 上，我们的方法以高概率在 $m_1 + 2m_2 +2m_3+o(m_1)$ 的完成时间内计算路由到 $\frac{m_1m_2m_3}{3}$ 唯一标记的机器人的解决方案，这些机器人具有均匀随机分布的起始和目标配置。因为此类实例的完工时间下限为 $m_1 + m_2+m_3 - o(m_1)$，也很有可能，因为 $m_1 \to \infty$，因此实现了 $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3}$ 最优性保证。 $\frac{m_1+2m_2+2m_3}{m_1+m_2+m_3} \in (1, \frac{5}{3}]$，产生 $1.x$ 最优性。相比之下，众所周知，多机器人路径规划是 NP 难最优求解的。在数值评估中，我们的方法可以轻松扩展以支持超过 100,000$ 机器人的 3D 运动规划，同时实现我们展示了我们的方法在模拟和硬件实验中协调许多四轴飞行器的应用。 本文提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于三维空间中大规模无人机的近时间最优路径规划，具有可证明的优化保证。 Teng Guo,Siwei Feng,Jingjin Yu cs.RO

authors_text: Finlay McKinnon,David Ada Adama,Pedro Machado,Isibor Kennedy Ihianle
title: Real-Time Gesture Recognition with Virtual Glove Markers
title_zh: 使用虚拟手套标记进行实时手势识别
abstract: Due to the universal non-verbal natural communication approach that allows for effective communication between humans, gesture recognition technology has been steadily developing over the previous few decades. Many different strategies have been presented in research articles based on gesture recognition to try to create an effective system to send non-verbal natural communication information to computers, using both physical sensors and computer vision. Hyper accurate real-time systems, on the other hand, have only recently began to occupy the study field, with each adopting a range of methodologies due to past limits such as usability, cost, speed, and accuracy. A real-time computer vision-based human-computer interaction tool for gesture recognition applications that acts as a natural user interface is proposed. Virtual glove markers on users hands will be created and used as input to a deep learning model for the real-time recognition of gestures. The results obtained show that the proposed system would be effective in real-time applications including social interaction through telepresence and rehabilitation.
summary: Due to the universal non-verbal natural communication approach that allows for effective communication between humans, gesture recognition technology has been steadily developing over the previous few decades. Many different strategies have been presented in research articles based on gesture recognition to try to create an effective system to send non-verbal natural communication information to computers, using both physical sensors and computer vision. Hyper accurate real-time systems, on the other hand, have only recently began to occupy the study field, with each adopting a range of methodologies due to past limits such as usability, cost, speed, and accuracy. A real-time computer vision-based human-computer interaction tool for gesture recognition applications that acts as a natural user interface is proposed. Virtual glove markers on users hands will be created and used as input to a deep learning model for the real-time recognition of gestures. The results obtained show that the proposed system would be effective in real-time applications including social interaction through telepresence and rehabilitation.
abstract_zh: 由于通用的非语言自然交流方法允许人与人之间进行有效的交流，手势识别技术在过去的几十年里一直在稳步发展。基于手势识别的研究文章提出了许多不同的策略，试图创建一个有效的系统，使用物理传感器和计算机视觉向计算机发送非语言自然通信信息。另一方面，超精确实时系统最近才开始占据研究领域，由于过去的可用性、成本、速度和准确性等限制，每个系统都采用了一系列方法。提出了一种基于实时计算机视觉的人机交互工具，用于手势识别应用，充当自然用户界面。用户手上的虚拟手套标记将被创建并用作深度学习模型的输入，以实时识别手势。获得的结果表明，所提出的系统在实时应用中是有效的，包括通过远程呈现和康复进行的社交互动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟手套标记和深度学习的实时手势识别系统，作为自然用户界面用于人机交互。
AI.motivation: 尽管手势识别技术已有数十年发展，但高精度实时系统因可用性、成本、速度和精度等限制尚未普及，需探索更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过在用户手部创建虚拟手套标记，将其作为输入数据喂入深度学习模型，结合计算机视觉实现实时手势识别。
AI.result: 实验表明该系统在远程社交互动和康复等实时应用场景中具有有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自然人机交互提供了可行方案，尤其适用于需要实时手势输入的场景。

title: An Unsupervised STDP-based Spiking Neural Network Inspired By Biologically Plausible Learning Rules and Connections
title_zh: 受生物学上合理的学习规则和连接启发的基于 STDP 的无监督尖峰神经网络
abstract: The backpropagation algorithm has promoted the rapid development of deep learning, but it relies on a large amount of labeled data and still has a large gap with how humans learn. The human brain can quickly learn various conceptual knowledge in a self-organized and unsupervised manner, accomplished through coordinating various learning rules and structures in the human brain. Spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP) is a general learning rule in the brain, but spiking neural networks (SNNs) trained with STDP alone is inefficient and perform poorly. In this paper, taking inspiration from short-term synaptic plasticity, we design an adaptive synaptic filter and introduce the adaptive spiking threshold as the neuron plasticity to enrich the representation ability of SNNs. We also introduce an adaptive lateral inhibitory connection to adjust the spikes balance dynamically to help the network learn richer features. To speed up and stabilize the training of unsupervised spiking neural networks, we design a samples temporal batch STDP (STB-STDP), which updates weights based on multiple samples and moments. By integrating the above three adaptive mechanisms and STB-STDP, our model greatly accelerates the training of unsupervised spiking neural networks and improves the performance of unsupervised SNNs on complex tasks. Our model achieves the current state-of-the-art performance of unsupervised STDP-based SNNs in the MNIST and FashionMNIST datasets. Further, we tested on the more complex CIFAR10 dataset, and the results fully illustrate the superiority of our algorithm. Our model is also the first work to apply unsupervised STDP-based SNNs to CIFAR10. At the same time, in the small-sample learning scenario, it will far exceed the supervised ANN using the same structure.

The human brain can quickly learn various conceptual knowledge in a self-organized and unsupervised manner, accomplished through coordinating various learning rules and structures in the human brain. Spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP) is a general learning rule in the brain, but spiking neural networks (SNNs) trained with STDP alone is inefficient and perform poorly. In this paper, taking inspiration from short-term synaptic plasticity, we design an adaptive synaptic filter and introduce the adaptive spiking threshold as the neuron plasticity to enrich the representation ability of SNNs. We also introduce an adaptive lateral inhibitory connection to adjust the spikes balance dynamically to help the network learn richer features. To speed up and stabilize the training of unsupervised spiking neural networks, we design a samples temporal batch STDP (STB-STDP), which updates weights based on multiple samples and moments. By integrating the above three adaptive mechanisms and STB-STDP, our model greatly accelerates the training of unsupervised spiking neural networks and improves the performance of unsupervised SNNs on complex tasks. Our model achieves the current state-of-the-art performance of unsupervised STDP-based SNNs in the MNIST and FashionMNIST datasets. Further, we tested on the more complex CIFAR10 dataset, and the results fully illustrate the superiority of our algorithm. Our model is also the first work to apply unsupervised STDP-based SNNs to CIFAR10. At the same time, in the small-sample learning scenario, it will far exceed the supervised ANN using the same structure.
abstract_zh: 反向传播算法推动了深度学习的快速发展，但其依赖于大量标记数据，与人类的学习方式仍有较大差距。人脑能够以自组织、无监督的方式快速学习各种概念性知识，这是通过协调人脑内的各种学习规则和结构来完成的。尖峰时序依赖性可塑性 (STDP) 是大脑中的一般学习规则，但仅用 STDP 训练的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 效率低下且性能不佳。本文受到短期突触可塑性的启发，设计了一种自适应突触滤波器，并引入自适应尖峰阈值作为神经元可塑性，以丰富 SNN 的表示能力。我们还引入了自适应横向抑制连接来动态调整尖峰平衡，以帮助网络学习更丰富的特征。为了加速和稳定无监督尖峰神经网络的训练，我们设计了样本时间批量 STDP（STB-STDP），它根据多个样本和时刻更新权重。通过集成上述三种自适应机制和STB-STDP，我们的模型极大地加速了无监督尖峰神经网络的训练，并提高了无监督SNN在复杂任务上的性能。我们的模型在 MNIST 和 FashionMNIST 数据集中实现了基于 STDP 的无监督 SNN 的当前最先进的性能。进一步，我们在更复杂的CIFAR10数据集上进行了测试，结果充分说明了我们算法的优越性。我们的模型也是第一个将基于 STDP 的无监督 SNN 应用于 CIFAR10 的工作。同时，在小样本学习场景下，将远远超过使用相同结构的有监督ANN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于STDP的无监督脉冲神经网络模型，通过引入生物可解释的学习机制提升网络性能。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播算法依赖大量标注数据且效率低下，而人脑可通过无监督方式快速学习。现有STDP训练的SNN效率不足，需借鉴生物学习规则改进。
AI.method: 设计自适应突触滤波器与脉冲阈值，引入动态侧向抑制连接，并提出基于时间批次的STB-STDP算法，整合三类自适应机制加速训练。
AI.result: 在MNIST/FashionMNIST数据集达到SOTA性能，首次将无监督STDP-SNN应用于CIFAR10，并在小样本场景下超越同结构监督ANN。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过生物启发机制显著提升无监督SNN的训练效率与复杂任务表现，验证了其在神经形态计算中的潜力。

Our model achieves the current state-of-the-art performance of unsupervised STDP-based SNNs in the MNIST and FashionMNIST datasets. Further, we tested on the more complex CIFAR10 dataset, and the results fully illustrate the superiority of our algorithm. Our model is also the first work to apply unsupervised STDP-based SNNs to CIFAR10. At the same time, in the small-sample learning scenario, it will far exceed the supervised ANN using the same structure. 反向传播算法推动了深度学习的快速发展，但其依赖于大量标记数据，与人类的学习方式仍有较大差距。人脑能够以自组织、无监督的方式快速学习各种概念性知识，这是通过协调人脑内的各种学习规则和结构来完成的。尖峰时序依赖性可塑性 (STDP) 是大脑中的一般学习规则，但仅用 STDP 训练的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 效率低下且性能不佳。本文受到短期突触可塑性的启发，设计了一种自适应突触滤波器，并引入自适应尖峰阈值作为神经元可塑性，以丰富 SNN 的表示能力。我们还引入了自适应横向抑制连接来动态调整尖峰平衡，以帮助网络学习更丰富的特征。为了加速和稳定无监督尖峰神经网络的训练，我们设计了样本时间批量 STDP（STB-STDP），它根据多个样本和时刻更新权重。通过集成上述三种自适应机制和STB-STDP，我们的模型极大地加速了无监督尖峰神经网络的训练，并提高了无监督SNN在复杂任务上的性能。我们的模型在 MNIST 和 FashionMNIST 数据集中实现了基于 STDP 的无监督 SNN 的当前最先进的性能。进一步，我们在更复杂的CIFAR10数据集上进行了测试，结果充分说明了我们算法的优越性。我们的模型也是第一个将基于 STDP 的无监督 SNN 应用于 CIFAR10 的工作。同时，在小样本学习场景下，将远远超过使用相同结构的有监督ANN。 本文提出一种基于STDP的无监督脉冲神经网络模型，通过引入生物可解释的学习机制提升网络性能。 Yiting Dong,Dongcheng Zhao,Yang Li,Yi Zeng cs.NE

authors_text: Ana Lucic,Sheeraz Ahmad,Amanda Furtado Brinhosa,Vera Liao,Himani Agrawal,Umang Bhatt,Krishnaram Kenthapadi,Alice Xiang,Maarten de Rijke,Nicholas Drabowski
title: Towards the Use of Saliency Maps for Explaining Low-Quality Electrocardiograms to End Users
title_zh: 使用显着图向最终用户解释低质量心电图
comment: Accepted to ICML 2022 Workshop on Interpretable ML in Healthcare
comments: Accepted to ICML 2022 Workshop on Interpretable ML in Healthcare
abstract: When using medical images for diagnosis, either by clinicians or artificial intelligence (AI) systems, it is important that the images are of high quality. When an image is of low quality, the medical exam that produced the image often needs to be redone. In telemedicine, a common problem is that the quality issue is only flagged once the patient has left the clinic, meaning they must return in order to have the exam redone. This can be especially difficult for people living in remote regions, who make up a substantial portion of the patients at Portal Telemedicina, a digital healthcare organization based in Brazil. In this paper, we report on ongoing work regarding (i) the development of an AI system for flagging and explaining low-quality medical images in real-time, (ii) an interview study to understand the explanation needs of stakeholders using the AI system at OurCompany, and, (iii) a longitudinal user study design to examine the effect of including explanations on the workflow of the technicians in our clinics. To the best of our knowledge, this would be the first longitudinal study on evaluating the effects of XAI methods on end-users -- stakeholders that use AI systems but do not have AI-specific expertise. We welcome feedback and suggestions on our experimental setup.

When an image is of low quality, the medical exam that produced the image often needs to be redone. In telemedicine, a common problem is that the quality issue is only flagged once the patient has left the clinic, meaning they must return in order to have the exam redone. This can be especially difficult for people living in remote regions, who make up a substantial portion of the patients at Portal Telemedicina, a digital healthcare organization based in Brazil. In this paper, we report on ongoing work regarding (i) the development of an AI system for flagging and explaining low-quality medical images in real-time, (ii) an interview study to understand the explanation needs of stakeholders using the AI system at OurCompany, and, (iii) a longitudinal user study design to examine the effect of including explanations on the workflow of the technicians in our clinics. To the best of our knowledge, this would be the first longitudinal study on evaluating the effects of XAI methods on end-users -- stakeholders that use AI systems but do not have AI-specific expertise. We welcome feedback and suggestions on our experimental setup.
abstract_zh: 当临床医生或人工智能 (AI) 系统使用医学图像进行诊断时，图像的高质量非常重要。当图像质量较低时，生成图像的医疗检查通常需要重新进行。在远程医疗中，一个常见的问题是，只有在患者离开诊所后才会标记质量问题，这意味着他们必须返回才能重做检查。对于居住在偏远地区的人们来说，这可能尤其困难，他们占巴西数字医疗组织 Portal Telemedicina 患者的很大一部分。在本文中，我们报告了正在进行的工作：(i) 开发用于实时标记和解释低质量医学图像的人工智能系统，(ii) 进行访谈研究，以了解在 OurCompany 使用人工智能系统的利益相关者的解释需求，以及 (iii) 纵向用户研究设计，以检查包括对我们诊所技术人员工作流程的解释的影响。据我们所知，这将是第一个评估 XAI 方法对最终用户（使用人工智能系统但不具备人工智能专业知识的利益相关者）影响的纵向研究。我们欢迎对我们的实验设置提供反馈和建议。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一个AI系统，利用显著性图实时标记并解释低质量心电图（ECG），同时研究利益相关者的解释需求及对技术人员工作流程的影响。
AI.motivation: 在远程医疗中，低质量医疗图像常导致患者需重复检查，尤其对偏远地区患者造成不便。现有系统无法在患者离开后及时标记问题，需改进AI解释性以提升效率。
AI.method: 开发实时AI系统检测低质量ECG并生成显著性图解释；通过访谈研究利益相关者需求；设计纵向用户研究分析解释对技术人员工作流程的影响。
AI.result: 目前为初步研究阶段，尚未公布具体结果，但提出首个针对非AI专家用户评估可解释AI（XAI）效果的纵向研究框架。
AI.conclusion: 该研究强调了在医疗AI中提供可解释性的重要性，尤其是对非技术用户的影响，为未来改进远程医疗流程提供了研究方向。

title: Variational Flow Graphical Model
title_zh: 变分流图形模型
abstract: This paper introduces a novel approach to embed flow-based models with hierarchical structures. The proposed framework is named Variational Flow Graphical (VFG) Model. VFGs learn the representation of high dimensional data via a message-passing scheme by integrating flow-based functions through variational inference. By leveraging the expressive power of neural networks, VFGs produce a representation of the data using a lower dimension, thus overcoming the drawbacks of many flow-based models, usually requiring a high dimensional latent space involving many trivial variables. Aggregation nodes are introduced in the VFG models to integrate forward-backward hierarchical information via a message passing scheme. Maximizing the evidence lower bound (ELBO) of data likelihood aligns the forward and backward messages in each aggregation node achieving a consistency node state. Algorithms have been developed to learn model parameters through gradient updating regarding the ELBO objective. The consistency of aggregation nodes enable VFGs to be applicable in tractable inference on graphical structures. Besides representation learning and numerical inference, VFGs provide a new approach for distribution modeling on datasets with graphical latent structures. Additionally, theoretical study shows that VFGs are universal approximators by leveraging the implicitly invertible flow-based structures. With flexible graphical structures and superior excessive power, VFGs could potentially be used to improve probabilistic inference. In the experiments, VFGs achieves improved evidence lower bound (ELBO) and likelihood values on multiple datasets.

VFGs learn the representation of high dimensional data via a message-passing scheme by integrating flow-based functions through variational inference. By leveraging the expressive power of neural networks, VFGs produce a representation of the data using a lower dimension, thus overcoming the drawbacks of many flow-based models, usually requiring a high dimensional latent space involving many trivial variables. Aggregation nodes are introduced in the VFG models to integrate forward-backward hierarchical information via a message passing scheme. Maximizing the evidence lower bound (ELBO) of data likelihood aligns the forward and backward messages in each aggregation node achieving a consistency node state. Algorithms have been developed to learn model parameters through gradient updating regarding the ELBO objective. The consistency of aggregation nodes enable VFGs to be applicable in tractable inference on graphical structures. Besides representation learning and numerical inference, VFGs provide a new approach for distribution modeling on datasets with graphical latent structures. Additionally, theoretical study shows that VFGs are universal approximators by leveraging the implicitly invertible flow-based structures. With flexible graphical structures and superior excessive power, VFGs could potentially be used to improve probabilistic inference. In the experiments, VFGs achieves improved evidence lower bound (ELBO) and likelihood values on multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种嵌入具有分层结构的基于流的模型的新方法。所提出的框架被称为变分流图形（VFG）模型。 VFG 通过变分推理集成基于流的函数，通过消息传递方案学习高维数据的表示。通过利用神经网络的表达能力，VFG 使用较低维度生成数据表示，从而克服了许多基于流的模型的缺点，这些模型通常需要涉及许多琐碎变量的高维潜在空间。 VFG模型中引入聚合节点，通过消息传递方案集成前向-后向分层信息。最大化数据可能性的证据下界（ELBO）可以对齐每个聚合节点中的前向和后向消息，从而实现一致性节点状态。已经开发出通过关于 ELBO 目标的梯度更新来学习模型参数的算法。聚合节点的一致性使得VFG适用于图形结构的易于处理的推理。除了表示学习和数值推理之外，VFG 还提供了一种对具有图形潜在结构的数据集进行分布建模的新方法。此外，理论研究表明，VFG 通过利用隐式可逆的基于流的结构，是通用逼近器。凭借灵活的图形结构和卓越的超能力，VFG 有可能用于改进概率推理。在实验中，VFG 在多个数据集上实现了改进的证据下限 (ELBO) 和似然值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为变分流图模型（VFG）的新框架，通过结合流模型与分层结构解决高维数据表示问题。
AI.motivation: 现有流模型常需高维潜在空间且包含冗余变量，而分层结构可提升表示效率，故需融合二者优势。
AI.method: 通过消息传递机制整合流函数与变分推断，引入聚合节点实现前向-后向信息对齐，并以ELBO最大化优化参数。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上取得更高的ELBO值和似然值，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: VFG通过灵活的图结构和强表达能力，为概率推断和图潜结构分布建模提供了新方法。

Additionally, theoretical study shows that VFGs are universal approximators by leveraging the implicitly invertible flow-based structures. With flexible graphical structures and superior excessive power, VFGs could potentially be used to improve probabilistic inference. In the experiments, VFGs achieves improved evidence lower bound (ELBO) and likelihood values on multiple datasets. 本文介绍了一种嵌入具有分层结构的基于流的模型的新方法。所提出的框架被称为变分流图形（VFG）模型。 VFG 通过变分推理集成基于流的函数，通过消息传递方案学习高维数据的表示。通过利用神经网络的表达能力，VFG 使用较低维度生成数据表示，从而克服了许多基于流的模型的缺点，这些模型通常需要涉及许多琐碎变量的高维潜在空间。 VFG模型中引入聚合节点，通过消息传递方案集成前向-后向分层信息。最大化数据可能性的证据下界（ELBO）可以对齐每个聚合节点中的前向和后向消息，从而实现一致性节点状态。已经开发出通过关于 ELBO 目标的梯度更新来学习模型参数的算法。聚合节点的一致性使得VFG适用于图形结构的易于处理的推理。除了表示学习和数值推理之外，VFG 还提供了一种对具有图形潜在结构的数据集进行分布建模的新方法。此外，理论研究表明，VFG 通过利用隐式可逆的基于流的结构，是通用逼近器。凭借灵活的图形结构和卓越的超能力，VFG 有可能用于改进概率推理。在实验中，VFG 在多个数据集上实现了改进的证据下限 (ELBO) 和似然值。 本文提出一种名为变分流图模型（VFG）的新框架，通过结合流模型与分层结构解决高维数据表示问题。 Shaogang Ren,Belhal Karimi,Dingcheng Li,Ping Li stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jakub Pomykala,Francisco de Lemos,Isibor Kennedy Ihianle,David Ada Adama,Pedro Machado
title: Deep Learning approach for Classifying Trusses and Runners of Strawberries
title_zh: 用于对草莓桁架和横梁进行分类的深度学习方法
abstract: The use of artificial intelligence in the agricultural sector has been growing at a rapid rate to automate farming activities. Emergent farming technologies focus on mapping and classification of plants, fruits, diseases, and soil types. Although, assisted harvesting and pruning applications using deep learning algorithms are in the early development stages, there is a demand for solutions to automate such processes. This paper proposes the use of Deep Learning for the classification of trusses and runners of strawberry plants using semantic segmentation and dataset augmentation. The proposed approach is based on the use of noises (i.e. Gaussian, Speckle, Poisson and Salt-and-Pepper) to artificially augment the dataset and compensate the low number of data samples and increase the overall classification performance. The results are evaluated using mean average of precision, recall and F1 score. The proposed approach achieved 91%, 95% and 92% on precision, recall and F1 score, respectively, for truss detection using the ResNet101 with dataset augmentation utilising Salt-and-Pepper noise; and 83%, 53% and 65% on precision, recall and F1 score, respectively, for truss detection using the ResNet50 with dataset augmentation utilising Poisson noise.
summary: The use of artificial intelligence in the agricultural sector has been growing at a rapid rate to automate farming activities. Emergent farming technologies focus on mapping and classification of plants, fruits, diseases, and soil types. Although, assisted harvesting and pruning applications using deep learning algorithms are in the early development stages, there is a demand for solutions to automate such processes. This paper proposes the use of Deep Learning for the classification of trusses and runners of strawberry plants using semantic segmentation and dataset augmentation. The proposed approach is based on the use of noises (i.e. Gaussian, Speckle, Poisson and Salt-and-Pepper) to artificially augment the dataset and compensate the low number of data samples and increase the overall classification performance. The results are evaluated using mean average of precision, recall and F1 score. The proposed approach achieved 91%, 95% and 92% on precision, recall and F1 score, respectively, for truss detection using the ResNet101 with dataset augmentation utilising Salt-and-Pepper noise; and 83%, 53% and 65% on precision, recall and F1 score, respectively, for truss detection using the ResNet50 with dataset augmentation utilising Poisson noise.
abstract_zh: 人工智能在农业领域的应用一直在快速增长，以实现农业活动的自动化。新兴农业技术侧重于植物、水果、疾病和土壤类型的绘图和分类。尽管使用深度学习算法的辅助收割和修剪应用程序还处于早期开发阶段，但仍需要解决方案来实现此类过程的自动化。本文提出使用深度学习，通过语义分割和数据集增强对草莓植物的桁架和横梁进行分类。所提出的方法基于使用噪声（即高斯噪声、散斑噪声、泊松噪声和椒盐噪声）来人为地增强数据集并补偿数据样本数量较少并提高整体分类性能。使用准确率、召回率和 F1 分数的平均值来评估结果。所提出的方法使用 ResNet101 进行桁架检测，并利用椒盐噪声进行数据集增强，在精确度、召回率和 F1 分数上分别达到 91%、95% 和 92%；使用 ResNet50 进行桁架检测，并利用泊松噪声进行数据集增强，精度、召回率和 F1 分数分别为 83%、53% 和 65%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的草莓植株的桁架和匍匐茎分类方法，利用语义分割和数据增强技术。
AI.motivation: 农业领域亟需自动化解决方案以提高采摘和修剪效率，而现有深度学习方法在数据量不足时表现有限。
AI.method: 采用ResNet101/50模型结合语义分割，并通过高斯、斑点、泊松和椒盐噪声进行数据增强以扩充数据集。
AI.result: ResNet101在椒盐噪声增强下实现91%精度、95%召回率和92% F1分数；ResNet50在泊松噪声增强下表现较低（83%、53%、65%）。
AI.conclusion: 噪声数据增强显著提升分类性能，尤其ResNet101结合椒盐噪声方案效果最佳，为草莓植株自动化识别提供有效途径。

title: Open- and Closed-Loop Neural Network Verification using Polynomial Zonotopes
title_zh: 使用多项式区域范围的开环和闭环神经网络验证
abstract: We present a novel approach to efficiently compute tight non-convex enclosures of the image through neural networks with ReLU, sigmoid, or hyperbolic tangent activation functions. In particular, we abstract the input-output relation of each neuron by a polynomial approximation, which is evaluated in a set-based manner using polynomial zonotopes. While our approach can also can be beneficial for open-loop neural network verification, our main application is reachability analysis of neural network controlled systems, where polynomial zonotopes are able to capture the non-convexity caused by the neural network as well as the system dynamics. This results in a superior performance compared to other methods, as we demonstrate on various benchmarks.
summary: We present a novel approach to efficiently compute tight non-convex enclosures of the image through neural networks with ReLU, sigmoid, or hyperbolic tangent activation functions. In particular, we abstract the input-output relation of each neuron by a polynomial approximation, which is evaluated in a set-based manner using polynomial zonotopes. While our approach can also can be beneficial for open-loop neural network verification, our main application is reachability analysis of neural network controlled systems, where polynomial zonotopes are able to capture the non-convexity caused by the neural network as well as the system dynamics. This results in a superior performance compared to other methods, as we demonstrate on various benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过具有 ReLU、Sigmoid 或双曲正切激活函数的神经网络来有效计算图像的紧密非凸包围。特别是，我们通过多项式近似来抽象每个神经元的输入输出关系，并使用多项式区域以基于集合的方式进行评估。虽然我们的方法也有利于开环神经网络验证，但我们的主要应用是神经网络控制系统的可达性分析，其中多项式区域能够捕获由神经网络以及系统动力学引起的非凸性。正如我们在各种基准测试中所证明的那样，与其他方法相比，这会带来卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用多项式zonotope高效计算神经网络图像紧致非凸包围的方法，适用于ReLU、Sigmoid等激活函数的神经网络验证。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理神经网络引起的非凸性及系统动态特性，导致验证精度和效率不足。
AI.method: 通过多项式逼近每个神经元的输入输出关系，并基于多项式zonotope进行集值计算，结合神经网络控制系统的可达性分析。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中表现优于其他方法，验证性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效捕捉神经网络及系统动态的非凸性，为神经网络验证提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: S. A. Rizvi,P. Cicalese,S. V. Seshan,S. Sciascia,J. U. Becker,H. V. Nguyen
title: Histopathology DatasetGAN: Synthesizing Large-Resolution Histopathology Datasets
title_zh: 组织病理学数据集GAN：合成高分辨率组织病理学数据集
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 1 table. Submitted to IEEE SPMB conference
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, 1 table. Submitted to IEEE SPMB conference
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods are enabling an increasing number of deep learning models to be trained on image datasets in domains where labels are difficult to obtain. These methods, however, struggle to scale to the high resolution of medical imaging datasets, where they are critical for achieving good generalization on label-scarce medical image datasets. In this work, we propose the Histopathology DatasetGAN (HDGAN) framework, an extension of the DatasetGAN semi-supervised framework for image generation and segmentation that scales well to large-resolution histopathology images. We make several adaptations from the original framework, including updating the generative backbone, selectively extracting latent features from the generator, and switching to memory-mapped arrays. These changes reduce the memory consumption of the framework, improving its applicability to medical imaging domains. We evaluate HDGAN on a thrombotic microangiopathy high-resolution tile dataset, demonstrating strong performance on the high-resolution image-annotation generation task. We hope that this work enables more application of deep learning models to medical datasets, in addition to encouraging more exploration of self-supervised frameworks within the medical imaging domain.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods are enabling an increasing number of deep learning models to be trained on image datasets in domains where labels are difficult to obtain. These methods, however, struggle to scale to the high resolution of medical imaging datasets, where they are critical for achieving good generalization on label-scarce medical image datasets. In this work, we propose the Histopathology DatasetGAN (HDGAN) framework, an extension of the DatasetGAN semi-supervised framework for image generation and segmentation that scales well to large-resolution histopathology images. We make several adaptations from the original framework, including updating the generative backbone, selectively extracting latent features from the generator, and switching to memory-mapped arrays. These changes reduce the memory consumption of the framework, improving its applicability to medical imaging domains. We evaluate HDGAN on a thrombotic microangiopathy high-resolution tile dataset, demonstrating strong performance on the high-resolution image-annotation generation task. We hope that this work enables more application of deep learning models to medical datasets, in addition to encouraging more exploration of self-supervised frameworks within the medical imaging domain.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 方法使越来越多的深度学习模型能够在难以获得标签的领域中的图像数据集上进行训练。然而，这些方法很难扩展到高分辨率的医学成像数据集，而它们对于在标签稀缺的医学图像数据集上实现良好的泛化至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了组织病理学数据集 GAN (HDGAN) 框架，这是用于图像生成和分割的 DatasetGAN 半监督框架的扩展，可以很好地扩展到高分辨率组织病理学图像。我们对原始框架进行了一些调整，包括更新生成主干、有选择地从生成器中提取潜在特征以及切换到内存映射数组。这些变化减少了框架的内存消耗，提高了其在医学成像领域的适用性。我们在血栓性微血管病高分辨率图块数据集上评估 HDGAN，展示了在高分辨率图像注释生成任务上的强大性能。我们希望这项工作能够使深度学习模型更多地应用于医学数据集，同时鼓励在医学成像领域对自我监督框架进行更多探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Histopathology DatasetGAN（HDGAN）框架，用于生成高分辨率病理学图像数据集，以解决医学图像领域标签稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习方法在高分辨率医学图像领域面临扩展困难，而高分辨率数据对模型泛化能力至关重要。
AI.method: 改进DatasetGAN框架，包括更新生成器主干网络、选择性提取潜在特征以及采用内存映射数组技术以降低内存消耗。
AI.result: 在血栓性微血管病高分辨率数据集上验证，HDGAN在高分辨率图像-注释生成任务中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该工作推动深度学习模型在医疗数据集的应用，并鼓励探索医学影像领域的自监督框架。

search_text: Histopathology DatasetGAN: Synthesizing Large-Resolution Histopathology Datasets 组织病理学数据集GAN：合成高分辨率组织病理学数据集 Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods are enabling an increasing number of deep learning models to be trained on image datasets in domains where labels are difficult to obtain. These methods, however, struggle to scale to the high resolution of medical imaging datasets, where they are critical for achieving good generalization on label-scarce medical image datasets. In this work, we propose the Histopathology DatasetGAN (HDGAN) framework, an extension of the DatasetGAN semi-supervised framework for image generation and segmentation that scales well to large-resolution histopathology images. We make several adaptations from the original framework, including updating the generative backbone, selectively extracting latent features from the generator, and switching to memory-mapped arrays. These changes reduce the memory consumption of the framework, improving its applicability to medical imaging domains. We evaluate HDGAN on a thrombotic microangiopathy high-resolution tile dataset, demonstrating strong performance on the high-resolution image-annotation generation task. We hope that this work enables more application of deep learning models to medical datasets, in addition to encouraging more exploration of self-supervised frameworks within the medical imaging domain. 自监督学习 (SSL) 方法使越来越多的深度学习模型能够在难以获得标签的领域中的图像数据集上进行训练。然而，这些方法很难扩展到高分辨率的医学成像数据集，而它们对于在标签稀缺的医学图像数据集上实现良好的泛化至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了组织病理学数据集 GAN (HDGAN) 框架，这是用于图像生成和分割的 DatasetGAN 半监督框架的扩展，可以很好地扩展到高分辨率组织病理学图像。我们对原始框架进行了一些调整，包括更新生成主干、有选择地从生成器中提取潜在特征以及切换到内存映射数组。这些变化减少了框架的内存消耗，提高了其在医学成像领域的适用性。我们在血栓性微血管病高分辨率图块数据集上评估 HDGAN，展示了在高分辨率图像注释生成任务上的强大性能。我们希望这项工作能够使深度学习模型更多地应用于医学数据集，同时鼓励在医学成像领域对自我监督框架进行更多探索。 本文提出Histopathology DatasetGAN（HDGAN）框架，用于生成高分辨率病理学图像数据集，以解决医学图像领域标签稀缺问题。 S. A. Rizvi,P. Cicalese,S. V. Seshan,S. Sciascia,J. U. Becker,H. V. Nguyen eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yang Li,Xiang He,Yiting Dong,Qingqun Kong,Yi Zeng
title: Spike Calibration: Fast and Accurate Conversion of Spiking Neural Network for Object Detection and Segmentation
title_zh: 尖峰校准：用于目标检测和分割的尖峰神经网络的快速准确转换
abstract: Spiking neural network (SNN) has been attached to great importance due to the properties of high biological plausibility and low energy consumption on neuromorphic hardware. As an efficient method to obtain deep SNN, the conversion method has exhibited high performance on various large-scale datasets. However, it typically suffers from severe performance degradation and high time delays. In particular, most of the previous work focuses on simple classification tasks while ignoring the precise approximation to ANN output. In this paper, we first theoretically analyze the conversion errors and derive the harmful effects of time-varying extremes on synaptic currents. We propose the Spike Calibration (SpiCalib) to eliminate the damage of discrete spikes to the output distribution and modify the LIPooling to allow conversion of the arbitrary MaxPooling layer losslessly. Moreover, Bayesian optimization for optimal normalization parameters is proposed to avoid empirical settings. The experimental results demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance on classification, object detection, and segmentation tasks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time to obtain SNN comparable to ANN on these tasks simultaneously. Moreover, we only need 1/50 inference time of the previous work on the detection task and can achieve the same performance under 0.492$\times$ energy consumption of ANN on the segmentation task.
summary: Spiking neural network (SNN) has been attached to great importance due to the properties of high biological plausibility and low energy consumption on neuromorphic hardware. As an efficient method to obtain deep SNN, the conversion method has exhibited high performance on various large-scale datasets. However, it typically suffers from severe performance degradation and high time delays. In particular, most of the previous work focuses on simple classification tasks while ignoring the precise approximation to ANN output. In this paper, we first theoretically analyze the conversion errors and derive the harmful effects of time-varying extremes on synaptic currents. We propose the Spike Calibration (SpiCalib) to eliminate the damage of discrete spikes to the output distribution and modify the LIPooling to allow conversion of the arbitrary MaxPooling layer losslessly. Moreover, Bayesian optimization for optimal normalization parameters is proposed to avoid empirical settings. The experimental results demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance on classification, object detection, and segmentation tasks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time to obtain SNN comparable to ANN on these tasks simultaneously. Moreover, we only need 1/50 inference time of the previous work on the detection task and can achieve the same performance under 0.492$\times$ energy consumption of ANN on the segmentation task.
abstract_zh: Spiking neural network (SNN) has been attached to great importance due to the properties of high biological plausibility and low energy consumption on neuromorphic hardware.作为一种获得深度SNN的有效方法，该转换方法在各种大规模数据集上表现出了高性能。然而，它通常会遭受严重的性能下降和高时间延迟的影响。特别是，之前的大部分工作都集中在简单的分类任务上，而忽略了对 ANN 输出的精确逼近。 In this paper, we first theoretically analyze the conversion errors and derive the harmful effects of time-varying extremes on synaptic currents.我们提出尖峰校准（SpiCalib）来消除离散尖峰对输出分布的损害，并修改 LIPooling 以允许任意 MaxPooling 层无损转换。此外，提出了最佳归一化参数的贝叶斯优化以避免经验设置。实验结果证明了在分类、对象检测和分割任务上的最先进的性能。据我们所知，这是第一次在这些任务上同时获得与 ANN 相当的 SNN。此外，我们在检测任务上只需要之前工作的 1/50 推理时间，并且在分割任务上 ANN 的 0.492$\times$ 能耗下就能达到相同的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为Spike Calibration（SpiCalib）的方法，用于快速且准确地将人工神经网络（ANN）转换为脉冲神经网络（SNN），以应用于目标检测和分割任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管SNN因其高生物合理性和低能耗而受到重视，但其转换方法通常面临性能下降和高时间延迟的问题，且大多数工作集中在简单分类任务上，忽略了对ANN输出的精确逼近。
AI.method: 本文通过理论分析转换误差，推导出时间变化的极端值对突触电流的有害影响，并提出Spike Calibration方法以消除离散脉冲对输出分布的损害。同时，修改LIPooling以无损地转换任意MaxPooling层，并提出贝叶斯优化方法以避免经验设置。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在分类、目标检测和分割任务上均表现出最先进的性能。这是首次在这些任务上同时获得与ANN相当的SNN性能，且检测任务的推理时间仅为先前工作的1/50，分割任务的能耗仅为ANN的0.492倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的SpiCalib方法显著提升了SNN的性能，使其在多个任务上达到与ANN相当的水平，同时大幅降低了推理时间和能耗。

title: YOLOv7: Trainable bag-of-freebies sets new state-of-the-art for real-time object detectors
title_zh: YOLOv7：可训练的免费赠品袋为实时物体检测器设置了新的最先进技术
abstract: YOLOv7 surpasses all known object detectors in both speed and accuracy in the range from 5 FPS to 160 FPS and has the highest accuracy 56.8% AP among all known real-time object detectors with 30 FPS or higher on GPU V100. YOLOv7-E6 object detector (56 FPS V100, 55.9% AP) outperforms both transformer-based detector SWIN-L Cascade-Mask R-CNN (9.2 FPS A100, 53.9% AP) by 509% in speed and 2% in accuracy, and convolutional-based detector ConvNeXt-XL Cascade-Mask R-CNN (8.6 FPS A100, 55.2% AP) by 551% in speed and 0.7% AP in accuracy, as well as YOLOv7 outperforms: YOLOR, YOLOX, Scaled-YOLOv4, YOLOv5, DETR, Deformable DETR, DINO-5scale-R50, ViT-Adapter-B and many other object detectors in speed and accuracy. Moreover, we train YOLOv7 only on MS COCO dataset from scratch without using any other datasets or pre-trained weights. Source code is released in https://github.com/WongKinYiu/yolov7.
summary: YOLOv7 surpasses all known object detectors in both speed and accuracy in the range from 5 FPS to 160 FPS and has the highest accuracy 56.8% AP among all known real-time object detectors with 30 FPS or higher on GPU V100. YOLOv7-E6 object detector (56 FPS V100, 55.9% AP) outperforms both transformer-based detector SWIN-L Cascade-Mask R-CNN (9.2 FPS A100, 53.9% AP) by 509% in speed and 2% in accuracy, and convolutional-based detector ConvNeXt-XL Cascade-Mask R-CNN (8.6 FPS A100, 55.2% AP) by 551% in speed and 0.7% AP in accuracy, as well as YOLOv7 outperforms: YOLOR, YOLOX, Scaled-YOLOv4, YOLOv5, DETR, Deformable DETR, DINO-5scale-R50, ViT-Adapter-B and many other object detectors in speed and accuracy. Moreover, we train YOLOv7 only on MS COCO dataset from scratch without using any other datasets or pre-trained weights. Source code is released in https://github.com/WongKinYiu/yolov7.
abstract_zh: YOLOv7 在 5 FPS 到 160 FPS 范围内的速度和精度都超过了所有已知的目标检测器，并且在 GPU V100 上 30 FPS 或更高的所有已知实时目标检测器中具有最高的精度 56.8% AP。 YOLOv7-E6 物体检测器（56 FPS V100，55.9% AP）的速度优于基于 Transformer 的检测器 SWIN-L Cascade-Mask R-CNN（9.2 FPS A100，53.9% AP）509% 的速度和 2% 的精度，以及基于卷积的检测器 ConvNeXt-XL Cascade-Mask R-CNN（8.6 FPS A100，53.9% AP）。 55.2% AP）的速度提高了 551%，精度提高了 0.7% AP，并且 YOLOv7 在速度和精度方面优于：YOLOR、YOLOX、Scaled-YOLOv4、YOLOv5、DETR、Deformable DETR、DINO-5scale-R50、ViT-Adapter-B 和许多其他物体检测器。此外，我们仅在 MS COCO 数据集上从头开始训练 YOLOv7，而不使用任何其他数据集或预训练权重。源代码发布于 https://github.com/WongKinYiu/yolov7。

AI.tldr: 本文提出YOLOv7实时目标检测器，在速度和精度上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 开发一种无需预训练权重且在实时速度范围内（5-160 FPS）兼具高精度的目标检测模型。
AI.method: 通过可训练的'免费参数包'优化架构，仅基于MS COCO数据集从零训练，不依赖其他数据集或预训练权重。
AI.result: YOLOv7-E6在V100 GPU上实现56 FPS/55.9% AP，较Transformer和卷积基模型分别快509%/551%，精度领先2%/0.7%。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv7在实时检测领域建立新基准，证明了其高效架构设计和纯数据驱动训练的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出YOLOv7实时目标检测器，在速度和精度上超越现有方法。
motivation: 开发一种无需预训练权重且在实时速度范围内（5-160 FPS）兼具高精度的目标检测模型。
method: 通过可训练的'免费参数包'优化架构，仅基于MS COCO数据集从零训练，不依赖其他数据集或预训练权重。
result: YOLOv7-E6在V100 GPU上实现56 FPS/55.9% AP，较Transformer和卷积基模型分别快509%/551%，精度领先2%/0.7%。
conclusion: YOLOv7在实时检测领域建立新基准，证明了其高效架构设计和纯数据驱动训练的有效性。
search_text: YOLOv7: Trainable bag-of-freebies sets new state-of-the-art for real-time object detectors YOLOv7：可训练的免费赠品袋为实时物体检测器设置了新的最先进技术 YOLOv7 surpasses all known object detectors in both speed and accuracy in the range from 5 FPS to 160 FPS and has the highest accuracy 56.8% AP among all known real-time object detectors with 30 FPS or higher on GPU V100. YOLOv7-E6 object detector (56 FPS V100, 55.9% AP) outperforms both transformer-based detector SWIN-L Cascade-Mask R-CNN (9.2 FPS A100, 53.9% AP) by 509% in speed and 2% in accuracy, and convolutional-based detector ConvNeXt-XL Cascade-Mask R-CNN (8.6 FPS A100, 55.2% AP) by 551% in speed and 0.7% AP in accuracy, as well as YOLOv7 outperforms: YOLOR, YOLOX, Scaled-YOLOv4, YOLOv5, DETR, Deformable DETR, DINO-5scale-R50, ViT-Adapter-B and many other object detectors in speed and accuracy. Moreover, we train YOLOv7 only on MS COCO dataset from scratch without using any other datasets or pre-trained weights. Source code is released in https://github.com/WongKinYiu/yolov7. YOLOv7 在 5 FPS 到 160 FPS 范围内的速度和精度都超过了所有已知的目标检测器，并且在 GPU V100 上 30 FPS 或更高的所有已知实时目标检测器中具有最高的精度 56.8% AP。 YOLOv7-E6 物体检测器（56 FPS V100，55.9% AP）的速度优于基于 Transformer 的检测器 SWIN-L Cascade-Mask R-CNN（9.2 FPS A100，53.9% AP）509% 的速度和 2% 的精度，以及基于卷积的检测器 ConvNeXt-XL Cascade-Mask R-CNN（8.6 FPS A100，53.9% AP）。 55.2% AP）的速度提高了 551%，精度提高了 0.7% AP，并且 YOLOv7 在速度和精度方面优于：YOLOR、YOLOX、Scaled-YOLOv4、YOLOv5、DETR、Deformable DETR、DINO-5scale-R50、ViT-Adapter-B 和许多其他物体检测器。此外，我们仅在 MS COCO 数据集上从头开始训练 YOLOv7，而不使用任何其他数据集或预训练权重。源代码发布于 https://github.com/WongKinYiu/yolov7。 本文提出YOLOv7实时目标检测器，在速度和精度上超越现有方法。 Chien-Yao Wang,Alexey Bochkovskiy,Hong-Yuan Mark Liao cs.CV

authors_text: Minghang Zheng,Dejie Yang,Zhongjie Ye,Ting Lei,Yuxin Peng,Yang Liu
title: Team PKU-WICT-MIPL PIC Makeup Temporal Video Grounding Challenge 2022 Technical Report
title_zh: PKU-WICT-MIPL PIC Makeup Temporal Video Grounding Challenge 2022 技术报告
comment: 2st Place in PIC Makeup Temporal Video Grounding (MTVG) Challenge in ACM-MM 2022
comments: 2st Place in PIC Makeup Temporal Video Grounding (MTVG) Challenge in ACM-MM 2022
abstract: In this technical report, we briefly introduce the solutions of our team `PKU-WICT-MIPL' for the PIC Makeup Temporal Video Grounding (MTVG) Challenge in ACM-MM 2022. Given an untrimmed makeup video and a step query, the MTVG aims to localize a temporal moment of the target makeup step in the video. To tackle this task, we propose a phrase relationship mining framework to exploit the temporal localization relationship relevant to the fine-grained phrase and the whole sentence. Besides, we propose to constrain the localization results of different step sentence queries to not overlap with each other through a dynamic programming algorithm. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our final submission ranked 2nd on the leaderboard, with only a 0.55\% gap from the first.
summary: In this technical report, we briefly introduce the solutions of our team `PKU-WICT-MIPL' for the PIC Makeup Temporal Video Grounding (MTVG) Challenge in ACM-MM 2022. Given an untrimmed makeup video and a step query, the MTVG aims to localize a temporal moment of the target makeup step in the video. To tackle this task, we propose a phrase relationship mining framework to exploit the temporal localization relationship relevant to the fine-grained phrase and the whole sentence. Besides, we propose to constrain the localization results of different step sentence queries to not overlap with each other through a dynamic programming algorithm. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our final submission ranked 2nd on the leaderboard, with only a 0.55\% gap from the first.
abstract_zh: 在本技术报告中，我们简要介绍了我们团队“PKU-WICT-MIPL”针对 ACM-MM 2022 PIC 化妆临时视频接地（MTVG）挑战赛的解决方案。给定未修剪的化妆视频和步骤查询，MTVG 旨在定位视频中目标化妆步骤的时间时刻。为了解决这个任务，我们提出了一个短语关系挖掘框架来利用与细粒度短语和整个句子相关的时间本地化关系。此外，我们建议通过动态规划算法来约束不同步骤句子查询的定位结果不相互重叠。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。我们最终提交的作品在排行榜上排名第二，与第一名的差距只有 0.55\%。

AI.tldr: 本论文主要解决ACM-MM 2022中PIC Makeup Temporal Video Grounding挑战赛中的时间定位问题，即在未剪辑的化妆视频中定位特定化妆步骤的时间片段。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理细粒度短语与整体句子的时间关系及避免不同步骤查询定位结果重叠方面存在不足，需提出更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出短语关系挖掘框架以利用细粒度短语与整体句子的时间关系，并采用动态规划算法约束不同步骤查询的定位结果不重叠。
AI.result: 最终提交在排行榜上排名第二，与第一名仅相差0.55%。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果验证了所提方法的有效性，表明框架在时间定位任务中具有较高的准确性。

authors_text: Huiyu Duan,Guangtao Zhai,Xiongkuo Min,Yucheng Zhu,Yi Fang,Xiaokang Yang
title: Perceptual Quality Assessment of Omnidirectional Images
title_zh: 全向图像的感知质量评估
abstract: Omnidirectional images and videos can provide immersive experience of real-world scenes in Virtual Reality (VR) environment. We present a perceptual omnidirectional image quality assessment (IQA) study in this paper since it is extremely important to provide a good quality of experience under the VR environment. We first establish an omnidirectional IQA (OIQA) database, which includes 16 source images and 320 distorted images degraded by 4 commonly encountered distortion types, namely JPEG compression, JPEG2000 compression, Gaussian blur and Gaussian noise. Then a subjective quality evaluation study is conducted on the OIQA database in the VR environment. Considering that humans can only see a part of the scene at one movement in the VR environment, visual attention becomes extremely important. Thus we also track head and eye movement data during the quality rating experiments. The original and distorted omnidirectional images, subjective quality ratings, and the head and eye movement data together constitute the OIQA database. State-of-the-art full-reference (FR) IQA measures are tested on the OIQA database, and some new observations different from traditional IQA are made.
summary: Omnidirectional images and videos can provide immersive experience of real-world scenes in Virtual Reality (VR) environment. We present a perceptual omnidirectional image quality assessment (IQA) study in this paper since it is extremely important to provide a good quality of experience under the VR environment. We first establish an omnidirectional IQA (OIQA) database, which includes 16 source images and 320 distorted images degraded by 4 commonly encountered distortion types, namely JPEG compression, JPEG2000 compression, Gaussian blur and Gaussian noise. Then a subjective quality evaluation study is conducted on the OIQA database in the VR environment. Considering that humans can only see a part of the scene at one movement in the VR environment, visual attention becomes extremely important. Thus we also track head and eye movement data during the quality rating experiments. The original and distorted omnidirectional images, subjective quality ratings, and the head and eye movement data together constitute the OIQA database. State-of-the-art full-reference (FR) IQA measures are tested on the OIQA database, and some new observations different from traditional IQA are made.
abstract_zh: 全方位图像和视频可以在虚拟现实（VR）环境中提供真实世界场景的沉浸式体验。我们在本文中提出了感知全向图像质量评估（IQA）研究，因为在 VR 环境下提供良好的体验质量极其重要。我们首先建立了一个全向IQA（OIQA）数据库，其中包括16张源图像和320张通过4种常见失真类型（即JPEG压缩、JPEG2000压缩、高斯模糊和高斯噪声）降级的失真图像。然后在VR环境下对OIQA数据库进行主观质量评价研究。考虑到人类在 VR 环境中一次移动只能看到场景的一部分，视觉注意力就变得极其重要。因此，我们还在质量评级实验期间跟踪头部和眼睛运动数据。原始和扭曲的全向图像、主观质量评分以及头部和眼球运动数据共同构成了O​​IQA数据库。最先进的全参考（FR）IQA 测量在 OIQA 数据库上进行了测试，并得出了一些不同于传统 IQA 的新观察结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全景图像感知质量评估方法，并构建了包含原始图像、失真图像及主观评分数据的OIQA数据库。
AI.motivation: 虚拟现实环境中全景图像的质量直接影响用户体验，但传统图像质量评估方法难以适应全景场景的特殊性。
AI.method: 构建包含16张源图像和320张经JPEG压缩、JPEG2000压缩、高斯模糊和噪声四种失真类型的全景图像数据库，并在VR环境中进行主观质量评估实验，同步采集头部和眼动数据。
AI.result: 测试了最新全参考IQA指标在OIQA数据库上的表现，发现与传统IQA存在差异，验证了视觉注意力在全景质量评估中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: OIQA数据库为VR环境下的全景图像质量研究提供了基准数据，揭示了传统IQA方法在全景场景中的局限性。

title: Low-Level Force-Control of MR-Hydrostatic Actuators
title_zh: MR 静液压执行器的低级力控制
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters ( Volume: 6, Issue: 2, April 2021)
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters ( Volume: 6, Issue: 2, April 2021)
abstract: Precise and high-fidelity force control is critical for new generations of robots that interact with humans and unknown environments. Mobile robots, such as wearable devices and legged robots, must also be lightweight to accomplish their function. Hydrostatic transmissions have been proposed as a promising strategy for meeting these two challenging requirements. In previous publications, it was shown that using magnetorheological (MR) actuators coupled with hydrostatic transmissions provides high power density and great open-loop human-robot interactions. Still, the open-loop force fidelity at low and high frequencies are decreased by the transmission's dynamics and by nonlinear friction. This letter compares control strategies for MR-hydrostatic actuator systems to increase its torque fidelity, defined as the bandwidth (measured vs desired torque reference) and transparency (minimizing the undesired forces reflected to the end effector when backdriving the robot). Four control approaches are developed and compared experimentally: (1) Open-loop control with friction compensation; (2) non-collocated pressure feedback; (3) collocated pressure feedback; (4) LQGI state feedback. A dither strategy is also implemented to smoothen ball screw friction. Results show that approaches (1), (2) and (3) can increase the performances but are facing compromises, while approach (4) can simultaneously improve all metrics. These results show the potential of using control schemes for improving the force control performance of robots using tethered architectures, addressing issues such as transmission dynamics and friction.
summary: Precise and high-fidelity force control is critical for new generations of robots that interact with humans and unknown environments. Mobile robots, such as wearable devices and legged robots, must also be lightweight to accomplish their function. Hydrostatic transmissions have been proposed as a promising strategy for meeting these two challenging requirements. In previous publications, it was shown that using magnetorheological (MR) actuators coupled with hydrostatic transmissions provides high power density and great open-loop human-robot interactions. Still, the open-loop force fidelity at low and high frequencies are decreased by the transmission's dynamics and by nonlinear friction. This letter compares control strategies for MR-hydrostatic actuator systems to increase its torque fidelity, defined as the bandwidth (measured vs desired torque reference) and transparency (minimizing the undesired forces reflected to the end effector when backdriving the robot). Four control approaches are developed and compared experimentally: (1) Open-loop control with friction compensation; (2) non-collocated pressure feedback; (3) collocated pressure feedback; (4) LQGI state feedback. A dither strategy is also implemented to smoothen ball screw friction. Results show that approaches (1), (2) and (3) can increase the performances but are facing compromises, while approach (4) can simultaneously improve all metrics. These results show the potential of using control schemes for improving the force control performance of robots using tethered architectures, addressing issues such as transmission dynamics and friction.
abstract_zh: 精确和高保真力控制对于与人类和未知环境交互的新一代机器人至关重要。移动机器人，例如可穿戴设备和腿式机器人，也必须重量轻才能完成其功能。静液压传动装置已被提出作为满足这两个具有挑战性的要求的有前景的策略。在之前的出版物中，研究表明，使用磁流变 (MR) 执行器与静液压传动装置相结合可提供高功率密度和良好的开环人机交互。尽管如此，低频和高频下的开环力保真度仍会因传动装置的动态特性和非线性摩擦而降低。这封信比较了 MR 静液压执行器系统的控制策略，以提高其扭矩保真度，定义为带宽（测量值与所需扭矩参考值）和透明度（在反向驱动机器人时最大限度地减少反射到末端执行器的不需要的力）。开发了四种控制方法并进行了实验比较：（1）带摩擦补偿的开环控制； (2)非并置压力反馈； (3)配置压力反馈； (4)LQGI状态反馈。还实施了抖动策略来平滑滚珠丝杠摩擦。结果表明，方法（1）、（2）和（3）可以提高性能，但面临妥协，而方法（4）可以同时改善所有指标。这些结果表明，使用控制方案来提高使用系留架构的机器人的力控制性能，解决传动动力学和摩擦等问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究磁流变-静液作动器的低层次力控方法，以提高机器人与人类及未知环境交互时的力控制精度。
AI.motivation: 新一代机器人需要精确且高保真度的力控制以实现与人类和未知环境的安全交互，而传统液压系统存在动态响应和非线性摩擦导致的控制精度下降问题。
AI.method: 提出四种控制策略：开环摩擦补偿控制、非共位压力反馈、共位压力反馈及LQGI状态反馈，并结合抖动策略优化丝杠摩擦。
AI.result: 实验表明前三种方法在性能提升上存在权衡，而LQGI方法能同时优化带宽和透明度等关键指标。
AI.conclusion: 控制策略可有效提升 tethered 架构机器人的力控制性能，解决传动动力学与摩擦引起的控制难题。

Four control approaches are developed and compared experimentally: (1) Open-loop control with friction compensation; (2) non-collocated pressure feedback; (3) collocated pressure feedback; (4) LQGI state feedback. A dither strategy is also implemented to smoothen ball screw friction. authors_text: Ozan Heydt,Simeon Kublenz,Patrice Ossona de Mendez,Sebastian Siebertz,Alexandre Vigny
title: Distributed domination on sparse graph classes
title_zh: 稀疏图类的分布式支配
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.14506, arXiv:2012.02701
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.14506, arXiv:2012.02701
abstract: We show that the dominating set problem admits a constant factor approximation in a constant number of rounds in the LOCAL model of distributed computing on graph classes with bounded expansion. This generalizes a result of Czygrinow et al. for graphs with excluded topological minors to very general classes of uniformly sparse graphs. We demonstrate how our general algorithm can be modified and fine-tuned to compute an ($11+ε$)-approximation (for any $ε>0)$ of a minimum dominating set on planar graphs. This improves on the previously best known approximation factor of 52 on planar graphs, which was achieved by an elegant and simple algorithm of Lenzen et al.
summary: We show that the dominating set problem admits a constant factor approximation in a constant number of rounds in the LOCAL model of distributed computing on graph classes with bounded expansion. This generalizes a result of Czygrinow et al. for graphs with excluded topological minors to very general classes of uniformly sparse graphs. We demonstrate how our general algorithm can be modified and fine-tuned to compute an ($11+ε$)-approximation (for any $ε>0)$ of a minimum dominating set on planar graphs. This improves on the previously best known approximation factor of 52 on planar graphs, which was achieved by an elegant and simple algorithm of Lenzen et al.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，在具有有界扩展的图类分布式计算的 LOCAL 模型中，支配集问题在恒定轮数中承认恒定因子近似。这概括了 Czygrinow 等人的结果。对于排除拓扑次要图的图到非常一般的均匀稀疏图类。我们演示了如何修改和微调我们的通用算法，以计算平面图上最小支配集的 ($11+ε$) 近似值（对于任何 $ε>0）$。这改进了先前最著名的平面图近似因子 52，这是通过 Lenzen 等人的优雅而简单的算法实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在稀疏图类中分布式计算支配集问题的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 支配集问题在分布式计算中具有重要应用，但现有算法在稀疏图类中的性能和适用范围有限，需改进近似比和扩展图类范围。
AI.method: 提出基于LOCAL模型的常数因子近似算法，适用于有界扩展图类，并针对平面图优化算法参数以提升近似精度。
AI.result: 在稀疏图类中实现常数轮数常数因子近似，平面图近似比从52提升至11+ε（ε>0）。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为分布式支配集问题提供了更高效且通用的解决方案，尤其在平面图场景中显著优化了近似效果。
