authors_text: Wenliang Dai,Samuel Cahyawijaya,Tiezheng Yu,Elham J Barezi,Pascale Fung
title: Kaggle Competition: Cantonese Audio-Visual Speech Recognition for In-car Commands
title_zh: Kaggle 竞赛：车内命令粤语视听语音识别
abstract: With the rise of deep learning and intelligent vehicles, the smart assistant has become an essential in-car component to facilitate driving and provide extra functionalities. In-car smart assistants should be able to process general as well as car-related commands and perform corresponding actions, which eases driving and improves safety. However, in this research field, most datasets are in major languages, such as English and Chinese. There is a huge data scarcity issue for low-resource languages, hindering the development of research and applications for broader communities. Therefore, it is crucial to have more benchmarks to raise awareness and motivate the research in low-resource languages. To mitigate this problem, we collect a new dataset, namely Cantonese In-car Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (CI-AVSR), for in-car speech recognition in the Cantonese language with video and audio data. Together with it, we propose Cantonese Audio-Visual Speech Recognition for In-car Commands as a new challenge for the community to tackle low-resource speech recognition under in-car scenarios.
summary: With the rise of deep learning and intelligent vehicles, the smart assistant has become an essential in-car component to facilitate driving and provide extra functionalities. In-car smart assistants should be able to process general as well as car-related commands and perform corresponding actions, which eases driving and improves safety. However, in this research field, most datasets are in major languages, such as English and Chinese. There is a huge data scarcity issue for low-resource languages, hindering the development of research and applications for broader communities. Therefore, it is crucial to have more benchmarks to raise awareness and motivate the research in low-resource languages. To mitigate this problem, we collect a new dataset, namely Cantonese In-car Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (CI-AVSR), for in-car speech recognition in the Cantonese language with video and audio data. Together with it, we propose Cantonese Audio-Visual Speech Recognition for In-car Commands as a new challenge for the community to tackle low-resource speech recognition under in-car scenarios.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习和智能汽车的兴起，智能助手已成为促进驾驶和提供额外功能的重要车载组件。车内智能助手应该能够处理一般的以及与汽车相关的命令并执行相应的操作，从而简化驾驶并提高安全性。然而，在这个研究领域，大多数数据集都是主要语言，例如英语和中文。资源匮乏的语言存在巨大的数据稀缺问题，阻碍了更广泛社区的研究和应用的发展。因此，拥有更多基准来提高人们的认识并推动资源匮乏语言的研究至关重要。为了缓解这个问题，我们收集了一个新的数据集，即粤语车载视听语音识别（CI-AVSR），用于使用视频和音频数据进行粤语车内语音识别。与此一起，我们提出车载命令的粤语视听语音识别作为社区解决车内场景下低资源语音识别的新挑战。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了针对粤语车载场景的视听语音识别数据集CI-AVSR，并发起Kaggle竞赛以推动低资源语言的车载语音识别研究。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏低资源语言（如粤语）的车载语音数据，制约了智能车载助手在更多语言社区中的应用与发展。
AI.method: 收集包含音频和视频数据的粤语车载指令数据集CI-AVSR，并设计Kaggle竞赛作为研究挑战。
AI.result: 提出了首个粤语车载视听语音识别基准数据集，并通过竞赛形式吸引社区参与低资源语言语音识别研究。
AI.conclusion: 通过提供数据集和竞赛平台，为低资源语言的车载语音识别研究提供了新方向和基础支持。

motivation: 现有研究缺乏低资源语言（如粤语）的车载语音数据，制约了智能车载助手在更多语言社区中的应用与发展。
method: 收集包含音频和视频数据的粤语车载指令数据集CI-AVSR，并设计Kaggle竞赛作为研究挑战。
result: 提出了首个粤语车载视听语音识别基准数据集，并通过竞赛形式吸引社区参与低资源语言语音识别研究。
conclusion: 通过提供数据集和竞赛平台，为低资源语言的车载语音识别研究提供了新方向和基础支持。
search_text: Kaggle Competition: Cantonese Audio-Visual Speech Recognition for In-car Commands Kaggle 竞赛：车内命令粤语视听语音识别 With the rise of deep learning and intelligent vehicles, the smart assistant has become an essential in-car component to facilitate driving and provide extra functionalities. In-car smart assistants should be able to process general as well as car-related commands and perform corresponding actions, which eases driving and improves safety. However, in this research field, most datasets are in major languages, such as English and Chinese. There is a huge data scarcity issue for low-resource languages, hindering the development of research and applications for broader communities. Therefore, it is crucial to have more benchmarks to raise awareness and motivate the research in low-resource languages. To mitigate this problem, we collect a new dataset, namely Cantonese In-car Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (CI-AVSR), for in-car speech recognition in the Cantonese language with video and audio data. Together with it, we propose Cantonese Audio-Visual Speech Recognition for In-car Commands as a new challenge for the community to tackle low-resource speech recognition under in-car scenarios. 随着深度学习和智能汽车的兴起，智能助手已成为促进驾驶和提供额外功能的重要车载组件。车内智能助手应该能够处理一般的以及与汽车相关的命令并执行相应的操作，从而简化驾驶并提高安全性。然而，在这个研究领域，大多数数据集都是主要语言，例如英语和中文。资源匮乏的语言存在巨大的数据稀缺问题，阻碍了更广泛社区的研究和应用的发展。因此，拥有更多基准来提高人们的认识并推动资源匮乏语言的研究至关重要。为了缓解这个问题，我们收集了一个新的数据集，即粤语车载视听语音识别（CI-AVSR），用于使用视频和音频数据进行粤语车内语音识别。与此一起，我们提出车载命令的粤语视听语音识别作为社区解决车内场景下低资源语音识别的新挑战。 该论文介绍了针对粤语车载场景的视听语音识别数据集CI-AVSR，并发起Kaggle竞赛以推动低资源语言的车载语音识别研究。 Wenliang Dai,Samuel Cahyawijaya,Tiezheng Yu,Elham J Barezi,Pascale Fung cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Planning Courses for Student Success at the American College of Greece
title_zh: 希腊美国学院学生成功规划课程
abstract: We model the problem of optimizing the schedule of courses a student at the American College of Greece will need to take to complete their studies. We model all constraints set forth by the institution and the department, so that we guarantee the validity of all produced schedules. We formulate several different objectives to optimize in the resulting schedule, including fastest completion time, course difficulty balance, and so on, with a very important objective our model is capable of capturing being the maximization of the expected student GPA given their performance on passed courses using Machine Learning and Data Mining techniques. All resulting problems are Mixed Integer Linear Programming problems with a number of binary variables that is in the order of the maximum number of terms times the number of courses available for the student to take. The resulting Mathematical Programming problem is always solvable by the GUROBI solver in less than 10 seconds on a modern commercial off-the-self PC, whereas the manual process that was installed before used to take department heads that are designated as student advisors more than one hour of their time for every student and was resulting in sub-optimal schedules as measured by the objectives set forth.
summary: We model the problem of optimizing the schedule of courses a student at the American College of Greece will need to take to complete their studies. We model all constraints set forth by the institution and the department, so that we guarantee the validity of all produced schedules. We formulate several different objectives to optimize in the resulting schedule, including fastest completion time, course difficulty balance, and so on, with a very important objective our model is capable of capturing being the maximization of the expected student GPA given their performance on passed courses using Machine Learning and Data Mining techniques. All resulting problems are Mixed Integer Linear Programming problems with a number of binary variables that is in the order of the maximum number of terms times the number of courses available for the student to take. The resulting Mathematical Programming problem is always solvable by the GUROBI solver in less than 10 seconds on a modern commercial off-the-self PC, whereas the manual process that was installed before used to take department heads that are designated as student advisors more than one hour of their time for every student and was resulting in sub-optimal schedules as measured by the objectives set forth.
abstract_zh: 我们模拟了优化希腊美国学院学生完成学业所需课程安排的问题。我们对机构和部门规定的所有约束进行建模，以便保证所有生成的时间表的有效性。我们制定了几个不同的目标来优化最终的时间表，包括最快完成时间、课程难度平衡等，其中一个非常重要的目标是，我们的模型能够利用机器学习和数据挖掘技术，根据学生在通过的课程中的表现，实现预期学生 GPA 的最大化。所有产生的问题都是混合整数线性规划问题，具有许多二进制变量，这些变量的顺序是最大学期数乘以学生可以选修的课程数。由此产生的数学编程问题总是可以通过 GUROBI 求解器在现代商用独立 PC 上在不到 10 秒的时间内解决，而之前安装的手动流程需要为每个学生指定为学生顾问的系主任花费超过一小时的时间，并且导致按既定目标衡量的时间安排不理想。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为希腊美国学院的学生制定优化课程计划，以确保满足机构约束并最大化预期GPA。
AI.motivation: 传统手动制定课程计划耗时且效果不佳，需通过自动化方法提升效率与优化结果。
AI.method: 采用混合整数线性规划（MILP）建模，结合机器学习预测GPA，并使用GUROBI求解器快速计算。
AI.result: 模型可在10秒内生成符合约束的最优课程表，显著优于人工方法的子优解。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了课程规划的效率与质量，为学生成功完成学业提供可靠支持。

title: Gaze-Vergence-Controlled See-Through Vision in Augmented Reality
title_zh: 增强现实中的凝视聚散控制透视视觉
abstract: Augmented Reality (AR) see-through vision is an interesting research topic since it enables users to see through a wall and see the occluded objects. Most existing research focuses on the visual effects of see-through vision, while the interaction method is less studied. However, we argue that using common interaction modalities, e.g., midair click and speech, may not be the optimal way to control see-through vision. This is because when we want to see through something, it is physically related to our gaze depth/vergence and thus should be naturally controlled by the eyes. Following this idea, this paper proposes a novel gaze-vergence-controlled (GVC) see-through vision technique in AR. Since gaze depth is needed, we build a gaze tracking module with two infrared cameras and the corresponding algorithm and assemble it into the Microsoft HoloLens 2 to achieve gaze depth estimation. We then propose two different GVC modes for see-through vision to fit different scenarios. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our gaze depth estimation is efficient and accurate. By comparing with conventional interaction modalities, our GVC techniques are also shown to be superior in terms of efficiency and more preferred by users. Finally, we present four example applications of gaze-vergence-controlled see-through vision.
summary: Augmented Reality (AR) see-through vision is an interesting research topic since it enables users to see through a wall and see the occluded objects. Most existing research focuses on the visual effects of see-through vision, while the interaction method is less studied. However, we argue that using common interaction modalities, e.g., midair click and speech, may not be the optimal way to control see-through vision. This is because when we want to see through something, it is physically related to our gaze depth/vergence and thus should be naturally controlled by the eyes. Following this idea, this paper proposes a novel gaze-vergence-controlled (GVC) see-through vision technique in AR. Since gaze depth is needed, we build a gaze tracking module with two infrared cameras and the corresponding algorithm and assemble it into the Microsoft HoloLens 2 to achieve gaze depth estimation. We then propose two different GVC modes for see-through vision to fit different scenarios. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our gaze depth estimation is efficient and accurate. By comparing with conventional interaction modalities, our GVC techniques are also shown to be superior in terms of efficiency and more preferred by users. Finally, we present four example applications of gaze-vergence-controlled see-through vision.
abstract_zh: 增强现实（AR）透视视觉是一个有趣的研究课题，因为它使用户能够透过墙壁看到被遮挡的物体。现有研究大多集中在透视视觉的视觉效果上，而交互方式研究较少。然而，我们认为使用常见的交互方式（例如空中点击和语音）可能不是控制透视视觉的最佳方式。这是因为当我们想要看穿某物时，它与我们的凝视深度/聚散度物理上相关，因此应该由眼睛自然地控制。遵循这个想法，本文提出了一种新颖的 AR 中凝视聚散控制（GVC）透视视觉技术。由于需要注视深度，我们构建了一个由两个红外摄像头和相应算法组成的注视跟踪模块，并将其组装到Microsoft HoloLens 2中以实现注视深度估计。然后，我们提出了两种不同的 GVC 模式用于透视视觉，以适应不同的场景。大量的实验结果表明，我们的注视深度估计是高效且准确的。通过与传统的交互方式相比，我们的 GVC 技术在效率方面也表现出优越性，并且更受用户青睐。最后，我们提出了凝视聚散控制透视视觉的四个示例应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于凝视-汇聚控制的增强现实透视视觉技术，通过眼部追踪实现自然交互，并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有AR透视视觉研究侧重视觉效果，忽视交互方式；传统交互（如空中点击）无法自然映射透视需求，需探索更符合生理机制的控制方式。
AI.method: 构建双红外摄像头凝视追踪模块并集成至HoloLens 2，实现深度估计；提出两种GVC模式以适应不同场景。
AI.result: 凝视深度估计准确高效，用户实验表明GVC在效率和偏好度上优于传统交互方式，并展示四个应用案例。
AI.conclusion: GVC技术通过眼部生理信号实现自然交互，为AR透视视觉提供更高效且用户友好的解决方案。

title: Effective and Efficient Training for Sequential Recommendation using Recency Sampling
title_zh: 使用新近度抽样进行有效且高效的顺序推荐训练
comment: This full research paper is accepted at 16th ACM Conference on Recommender Systems (ACM RecSys)
comments: This full research paper is accepted at 16th ACM Conference on Recommender Systems (ACM RecSys)
abstract: Many modern sequential recommender systems use deep neural networks, which can effectively estimate the relevance of items but require a lot of time to train. Slow training increases expenses, hinders product development timescales and prevents the model from being regularly updated to adapt to changing user preferences. Training such sequential models involves appropriately sampling past user interactions to create a realistic training objective. The existing training objectives have limitations. For instance, next item prediction never uses the beginning of the sequence as a learning target, thereby potentially discarding valuable data. On the other hand, the item masking used by BERT4Rec is only weakly related to the goal of the sequential recommendation; therefore, it requires much more time to obtain an effective model. Hence, we propose a novel Recency-based Sampling of Sequences training objective that addresses both limitations. We apply our method to various recent and state-of-the-art model architectures - such as GRU4Rec, Caser, and SASRec. We show that the models enhanced with our method can achieve performances exceeding or very close to stateof-the-art BERT4Rec, but with much less training time.
summary: Many modern sequential recommender systems use deep neural networks, which can effectively estimate the relevance of items but require a lot of time to train. Slow training increases expenses, hinders product development timescales and prevents the model from being regularly updated to adapt to changing user preferences. Training such sequential models involves appropriately sampling past user interactions to create a realistic training objective. The existing training objectives have limitations. For instance, next item prediction never uses the beginning of the sequence as a learning target, thereby potentially discarding valuable data. On the other hand, the item masking used by BERT4Rec is only weakly related to the goal of the sequential recommendation; therefore, it requires much more time to obtain an effective model. Hence, we propose a novel Recency-based Sampling of Sequences training objective that addresses both limitations. We apply our method to various recent and state-of-the-art model architectures - such as GRU4Rec, Caser, and SASRec. We show that the models enhanced with our method can achieve performances exceeding or very close to stateof-the-art BERT4Rec, but with much less training time.
abstract_zh: 许多现代顺序推荐系统使用深度神经网络，可以有效地估计项目的相关性，但需要大量时间进行训练。缓慢的训练会增加费用，阻碍产品开发时间，并妨碍模型定期更新以适应不断变化的用户偏好。训练此类顺序模型涉及对过去的用户交互进行适当采样，以创建现实的训练目标。现有的培训目标存在局限性。例如，下一项预测从不使用序列的开头作为学习目标，从而可能会丢弃有价值的数据。另一方面，BERT4Rec 使用的项目屏蔽与顺序推荐的目标只有微弱的相关性；因此，需要更多的时间来获得有效的模型。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的基于新近度的序列采样训练目标来解决这两个限制。我们将我们的方法应用于各种最新和最先进的模型架构 - 例如 GRU4Rec、Caser 和 SASRec。我们表明，使用我们的方法增强的模型可以实现超过或非常接近最先进的 BERT4Rec 的性能，但训练时间要少得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于近期采样的序列推荐模型训练方法，以提高训练效率并克服现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度序列推荐模型训练耗时长，且目标函数存在缺陷，如忽略序列起始部分或与推荐目标关联弱，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计基于近期采样的训练目标（Recency-based Sampling of Sequences），通过有效利用序列历史数据改进模型训练过程。
AI.result: 在GRU4Rec、Caser和SASRec等模型上验证，性能接近或超越BERT4Rec，但训练时间显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保证推荐效果的同时显著提升训练效率，为序列推荐模型优化提供新思路。

search_text: Effective and Efficient Training for Sequential Recommendation using Recency Sampling 使用新近度抽样进行有效且高效的顺序推荐训练 Many modern sequential recommender systems use deep neural networks, which can effectively estimate the relevance of items but require a lot of time to train. Slow training increases expenses, hinders product development timescales and prevents the model from being regularly updated to adapt to changing user preferences. Hence, we propose a novel Recency-based Sampling of Sequences training objective that addresses both limitations. We apply our method to various recent and state-of-the-art model architectures - such as GRU4Rec, Caser, and SASRec. We show that the models enhanced with our method can achieve performances exceeding or very close to stateof-the-art BERT4Rec, but with much less training time. 许多现代顺序推荐系统使用深度神经网络，可以有效地估计项目的相关性，但需要大量时间进行训练。缓慢的训练会增加费用，阻碍产品开发时间，并妨碍模型定期更新以适应不断变化的用户偏好。训练此类顺序模型涉及对过去的用户交互进行适当采样，以创建现实的训练目标。现有的培训目标存在局限性。例如，下一项预测从不使用序列的开头作为学习目标，从而可能会丢弃有价值的数据。另一方面，BERT4Rec 使用的项目屏蔽与顺序推荐的目标只有微弱的相关性；因此，需要更多的时间来获得有效的模型。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的基于新近度的序列采样训练目标来解决这两个限制。我们将我们的方法应用于各种最新和最先进的模型架构 - 例如 GRU4Rec、Caser 和 SASRec。我们表明，使用我们的方法增强的模型可以实现超过或非常接近最先进的 BERT4Rec 的性能，但训练时间要少得多。 本文提出一种基于近期采样的序列推荐模型训练方法，以提高训练效率并克服现有方法的局限性。 Aleksandr Petrov,Craig Macdonald cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Takehiro Ito,Yuni Iwamasa,Naonori Kakimura,Naoyuki Kamiyama,Yusuke Kobayashi,Yuta Nozaki,Yoshio Okamoto,Kenta Ozeki
title: Reforming an Envy-Free Matching
title_zh: 改革无嫉妒匹配
abstract: We consider the problem of reforming an envy-free matching when each agent is assigned a single item. Given an envy-free matching, we consider an operation to exchange the item of an agent with an unassigned item preferred by the agent that results in another envy-free matching. We repeat this operation as long as we can. We prove that the resulting envy-free matching is uniquely determined up to the choice of an initial envy-free matching, and can be found in polynomial time. We call the resulting matching a reformist envy-free matching, and then we study a shortest sequence to obtain the reformist envy-free matching from an initial envy-free matching. We prove that a shortest sequence is computationally hard to obtain even when each agent accepts at most four items and each item is accepted by at most three agents. On the other hand, we give polynomial-time algorithms when each agent accepts at most three items or each item is accepted by at most two agents. Inapproximability and fixed-parameter (in)tractability are also discussed.
summary: We consider the problem of reforming an envy-free matching when each agent is assigned a single item. Given an envy-free matching, we consider an operation to exchange the item of an agent with an unassigned item preferred by the agent that results in another envy-free matching. We repeat this operation as long as we can. We prove that the resulting envy-free matching is uniquely determined up to the choice of an initial envy-free matching, and can be found in polynomial time. We call the resulting matching a reformist envy-free matching, and then we study a shortest sequence to obtain the reformist envy-free matching from an initial envy-free matching. We prove that a shortest sequence is computationally hard to obtain even when each agent accepts at most four items and each item is accepted by at most three agents. On the other hand, we give polynomial-time algorithms when each agent accepts at most three items or each item is accepted by at most two agents. Inapproximability and fixed-parameter (in)tractability are also discussed.
abstract_zh: 当每个智能体被分配一个项目时，我们考虑改革无嫉妒匹配的问题。给定无嫉妒匹配，我们考虑将代理的项目与代理首选的未分配项目交换的操作，从而导致另一个无嫉妒匹配。 We repeat this operation as long as we can.我们证明，最终的无嫉妒匹配是由初始无嫉妒匹配的选择唯一确定的，并且可以在多项式时间内找到。我们将得到的匹配称为改革派无嫉妒匹配，然后我们研究最短序列以从初始无嫉妒匹配中获得改革派无嫉妒匹配。我们证明，即使每个代理最多接受四个项目并且每个项目最多被三个代理接受，最短序列在计算上也很难获得。另一方面，当每个代理最多接受三个项目或每个项目最多被两个代理接受时，我们给出多项式时间算法。还讨论了不可近似性和固定参数（不可处理）的可处理性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在初始 envy-free 匹配基础上通过交换操作改进匹配的方法，最终得到唯一的 reformist envy-free 匹配，并分析了其计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有 envy-free 匹配可能存在改进空间，需通过交换操作在保持 envy-free 性质的前提下优化匹配结果，同时探讨此类改进的计算可行性。
AI.method: 通过证明交换操作的收敛性，建立 polynomial 时间算法求解 reformist envy-free 匹配；分析最短交换序列的计算复杂性，并针对不同约束条件设计多项式算法。
AI.result: 证明 reformist envy-free 匹配的唯一性及多项式可解性；证明最短交换序列在部分约束下计算困难，但在低接受度约束下可多项式求解；讨论近似不可解性与参数复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 改进 envy-free 匹配的计算复杂性依赖于约束条件，部分场景存在高效算法，为匹配机制设计提供了理论依据与计算边界分析。

title: Adversarial Robustness of Visual Dialog
title_zh: 视觉对话的对抗鲁棒性
abstract: Adversarial robustness evaluates the worst-case performance scenario of a machine learning model to ensure its safety and reliability. This study is the first to investigate the robustness of visually grounded dialog models towards textual attacks. These attacks represent a worst-case scenario where the input question contains a synonym which causes the previously correct model to return a wrong answer. Using this scenario, we first aim to understand how multimodal input components contribute to model robustness. Our results show that models which encode dialog history are more robust, and when launching an attack on history, model prediction becomes more uncertain. This is in contrast to prior work which finds that dialog history is negligible for model performance on this task. We also evaluate how to generate adversarial test examples which successfully fool the model but remain undetected by the user/software designer. We find that the textual, as well as the visual context are important to generate plausible worst-case scenarios.
summary: Adversarial robustness evaluates the worst-case performance scenario of a machine learning model to ensure its safety and reliability. This study is the first to investigate the robustness of visually grounded dialog models towards textual attacks. These attacks represent a worst-case scenario where the input question contains a synonym which causes the previously correct model to return a wrong answer. Using this scenario, we first aim to understand how multimodal input components contribute to model robustness. Our results show that models which encode dialog history are more robust, and when launching an attack on history, model prediction becomes more uncertain. This is in contrast to prior work which finds that dialog history is negligible for model performance on this task. We also evaluate how to generate adversarial test examples which successfully fool the model but remain undetected by the user/software designer. We find that the textual, as well as the visual context are important to generate plausible worst-case scenarios.
abstract_zh: 对抗鲁棒性评估机器学习模型最坏情况的性能场景，以确保其安全性和可靠性。这项研究首次调查了基于视觉的对话模型对文本攻击的鲁棒性。这些攻击代表了最坏的情况，其中输入问题包含同义词，导致先前正确的模型返回错误答案。使用这个场景，我们首先旨在了解多模态输入组件如何有助于模型的鲁棒性。我们的结果表明，对对话历史进行编码的模型更加稳健，并且当对历史发起攻击时，模型预测变得更加不确定。这与之前的工作形成鲜明对比，之前的工作发现对话历史对于该任务的模型性能可以忽略不计。我们还评估如何生成成功欺骗模型但不被用户/软件设计者发现的对抗性测试示例。我们发现文本和视觉上下文对于生成可能的最坏情况场景很重要。

AI.tldr: 该论文首次研究视觉对话模型对文本攻击的鲁棒性，分析多模态输入组件对模型鲁棒性的影响，并生成能欺骗模型且不易被检测的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 确保机器学习模型在最坏情况下的安全性和可靠性，探索文本攻击如何影响视觉对话模型，并揭示对话历史等输入组件对模型鲁棒性的贡献。
AI.method: 通过构造包含同义词的文本攻击，测试模型性能；分析对话历史编码对鲁棒性的影响；评估生成对抗样本的方法，确保其对模型的有效性和对用户的隐蔽性。
AI.result: 编码对话历史的模型更鲁棒，攻击历史信息会增加模型不确定性；文本和视觉上下文均对生成有效对抗样本至关重要，与以往认为对话历史不重要的结论相矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 对话历史对模型鲁棒性具有关键作用，生成对抗样本需结合文本与视觉上下文，未来需提升视觉对话系统的鲁棒性以应对潜在攻击。

search_text: Adversarial Robustness of Visual Dialog 视觉对话的对抗鲁棒性 Adversarial robustness evaluates the worst-case performance scenario of a machine learning model to ensure its safety and reliability. This study is the first to investigate the robustness of visually grounded dialog models towards textual attacks. These attacks represent a worst-case scenario where the input question contains a synonym which causes the previously correct model to return a wrong answer. Using this scenario, we first aim to understand how multimodal input components contribute to model robustness. Our results show that models which encode dialog history are more robust, and when launching an attack on history, model prediction becomes more uncertain. This is in contrast to prior work which finds that dialog history is negligible for model performance on this task. We also evaluate how to generate adversarial test examples which successfully fool the model but remain undetected by the user/software designer. We find that the textual, as well as the visual context are important to generate plausible worst-case scenarios. 对抗鲁棒性评估机器学习模型最坏情况的性能场景，以确保其安全性和可靠性。这项研究首次调查了基于视觉的对话模型对文本攻击的鲁棒性。这些攻击代表了最坏的情况，其中输入问题包含同义词，导致先前正确的模型返回错误答案。使用这个场景，我们首先旨在了解多模态输入组件如何有助于模型的鲁棒性。我们的结果表明，对对话历史进行编码的模型更加稳健，并且当对历史发起攻击时，模型预测变得更加不确定。这与之前的工作形成鲜明对比，之前的工作发现对话历史对于该任务的模型性能可以忽略不计。我们还评估如何生成成功欺骗模型但不被用户/软件设计者发现的对抗性测试示例。我们发现文本和视觉上下文对于生成可能的最坏情况场景很重要。 该论文首次研究视觉对话模型对文本攻击的鲁棒性，分析多模态输入组件对模型鲁棒性的影响，并生成能欺骗模型且不易被检测的对抗样本。 Lu Yu,Verena Rieser cs.CV,cs.MM

title: On the Complexity of Rational Verification
title_zh: 论理性验证的复杂性
comment: Preprint submitted to Annals of Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence
comments: Preprint submitted to Annals of Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Rational verification refers to the problem of checking which temporal logic properties hold of a concurrent multiagent system, under the assumption that agents in the system choose strategies that form a game-theoretic equilibrium. Rational verification can be understood as a counterpart to model checking for multiagent systems, but while classical model checking can be done in polynomial time for some temporal logic specification languages such as CTL, and polynomial space with LTL specifications, rational verification is much harder: the key decision problems for rational verification are 2EXPTIME-complete with LTL specifications, even when using explicit-state system representations. Against this background, our contributions in this paper are threefold. First, we show that the complexity of rational verification can be greatly reduced by restricting specifications to GR(1), a fragment of LTL that can represent a broad and practically useful class of response properties of reactive systems. In particular, we show that for a number of relevant settings, rational verification can be done in polynomial space and even in polynomial time. Second, we provide improved complexity results for rational verification when considering players' goals given by mean-payoff utility functions; arguably the most widely used approach for quantitative objectives in concurrent and multiagent systems. Finally, we consider the problem of computing outcomes that satisfy social welfare constraints. To this end, we consider both utilitarian and egalitarian social welfare and show that computing such outcomes is either PSPACE-complete or NP-complete.
summary: Rational verification refers to the problem of checking which temporal logic properties hold of a concurrent multiagent system, under the assumption that agents in the system choose strategies that form a game-theoretic equilibrium. Rational verification can be understood as a counterpart to model checking for multiagent systems, but while classical model checking can be done in polynomial time for some temporal logic specification languages such as CTL, and polynomial space with LTL specifications, rational verification is much harder: the key decision problems for rational verification are 2EXPTIME-complete with LTL specifications, even when using explicit-state system representations. Against this background, our contributions in this paper are threefold. First, we show that the complexity of rational verification can be greatly reduced by restricting specifications to GR(1), a fragment of LTL that can represent a broad and practically useful class of response properties of reactive systems. In particular, we show that for a number of relevant settings, rational verification can be done in polynomial space and even in polynomial time. Second, we provide improved complexity results for rational verification when considering players' goals given by mean-payoff utility functions; arguably the most widely used approach for quantitative objectives in concurrent and multiagent systems. Finally, we consider the problem of computing outcomes that satisfy social welfare constraints. To this end, we consider both utilitarian and egalitarian social welfare and show that computing such outcomes is either PSPACE-complete or NP-complete.
abstract_zh: 理性验证是指在系统中的代理选择形成博弈论均衡的策略的假设下，检查并发多代理系统的时序逻辑属性是否成立的问题。理性验证可以理解为多智能体系统模型检查的对应部分，但是对于某些时序逻辑规范语言（例如 CTL）和具有 LTL 规范的多项式空间，经典模型检查可以在多项式时间内完成，但理性验证要困难得多：理性验证的关键决策问题在 LTL 规范下是 2EXPTIME 完成的，即使使用显式状态系统表示也是如此。在此背景下，我们在本文中的贡献有三个方面。首先，我们证明，通过将规范限制在 GR(1) 上，可以大大降低理性验证的复杂性，GR(1) 是 LTL 的一个片段，可以代表反应系统的一类广泛且实用的响应属性。特别是，我们表明，对于许多相关设置，可以在多项式空间甚至多项式时间内完成理性验证。其次，在考虑平均收益效用函数给出的玩家目标时，我们为理性验证提供了改进的复杂性结果；可以说是并发和多智能体系统中最广泛使用的定量目标方法。最后，我们考虑满足社会福利约束的计算结果的问题。为此，我们考虑了功利主义和平等主义的社会福利，并表明计算这些结果要么是 PSPACE 完全的，要么是 NP 完全的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究理性验证的计算复杂性，探讨在多智能体系统中验证时序逻辑属性的难度，并提出降低复杂性的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统模型检测在多智能体系统中效率较高，但理性验证需考虑博弈均衡策略，导致复杂度显著上升，亟需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过限制规范语言为GR(1)片段、分析平均收益效用函数及社会福利约束，分别研究不同场景下的复杂度表现。
AI.result: GR(1)规范下理性验证复杂度降至多项式空间甚至时间；平均收益目标下复杂度优化；社会福利计算呈现PSPACE或NP完备性。
AI.conclusion: 通过规范限制和目标函数优化可有效降低理性验证难度，但其复杂性仍显著高于传统模型检测，需结合具体场景选择方法。

authors_text: Yuanzhi Duan,Yue Zhou,Peng He,Qiang Liu,Shukai Duan,Xiaofang Hu
title: Network Pruning via Feature Shift Minimization
title_zh: 通过特征转移最小化进行网络修剪
abstract: Channel pruning is widely used to reduce the complexity of deep network models. Recent pruning methods usually identify which parts of the network to discard by proposing a channel importance criterion. However, recent studies have shown that these criteria do not work well in all conditions. In this paper, we propose a novel Feature Shift Minimization (FSM) method to compress CNN models, which evaluates the feature shift by converging the information of both features and filters. Specifically, we first investigate the compression efficiency with some prevalent methods in different layer-depths and then propose the feature shift concept. Then, we introduce an approximation method to estimate the magnitude of the feature shift, since it is difficult to compute it directly. Besides, we present a distribution-optimization algorithm to compensate for the accuracy loss and improve the network compression efficiency. The proposed method yields state-of-the-art performance on various benchmark networks and datasets, verified by extensive experiments. Our codes are available at: https://github.com/lscgx/FSM.
summary: Channel pruning is widely used to reduce the complexity of deep network models. Recent pruning methods usually identify which parts of the network to discard by proposing a channel importance criterion. However, recent studies have shown that these criteria do not work well in all conditions. In this paper, we propose a novel Feature Shift Minimization (FSM) method to compress CNN models, which evaluates the feature shift by converging the information of both features and filters. Specifically, we first investigate the compression efficiency with some prevalent methods in different layer-depths and then propose the feature shift concept. Then, we introduce an approximation method to estimate the magnitude of the feature shift, since it is difficult to compute it directly. Besides, we present a distribution-optimization algorithm to compensate for the accuracy loss and improve the network compression efficiency. The proposed method yields state-of-the-art performance on various benchmark networks and datasets, verified by extensive experiments. Our codes are available at: https://github.com/lscgx/FSM.
abstract_zh: 通道剪枝被广泛用于降低深度网络模型的复杂性。最近的修剪方法通常通过提出信道重要性标准来确定要丢弃网络的哪些部分。然而，最近的研究表明，这些标准并不适用于所有情况。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的特征偏移最小化（FSM）方法来压缩 CNN 模型，该方法通过融合特征和滤波器的信息来评估特征偏移。具体来说，我们首先研究一些流行方法在不同层深度的压缩效率，然后提出特征移位概念。然后，我们引入一种近似方法来估计特征偏移的幅度，因为很难直接计算它。此外，我们提出了一种分布优化算法来补偿精度损失并提高网络压缩效率。所提出的方法在各种基准网络和数据集上产生了最先进的性能，并经过大量实验的验证。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/lscgx/FSM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为特征偏移最小化（FSM）的新方法，用于通过压缩卷积神经网络（CNN）模型来减少计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有的通道剪枝方法依赖于通道重要性准则，但这些准则在不同条件下效果不佳，因此需要更可靠的压缩策略。
AI.method: 通过分析不同深度层的压缩效率，提出特征偏移概念，并设计近似方法估算特征偏移量，结合分布优化算法补偿精度损失。
AI.result: 在多个基准网络和数据集上实现了最先进的压缩性能，实验验证了方法的有效性，并提供了开源代码。
AI.conclusion: FSM方法通过最小化特征偏移有效提升了网络压缩效率，为深度模型优化提供了新思路。

result: 在多个基准网络和数据集上实现了最先进的压缩性能，实验验证了方法的有效性，并提供了开源代码。
conclusion: FSM方法通过最小化特征偏移有效提升了网络压缩效率，为深度模型优化提供了新思路。
search_text: Network Pruning via Feature Shift Minimization 通过特征转移最小化进行网络修剪 Channel pruning is widely used to reduce the complexity of deep network models. Recent pruning methods usually identify which parts of the network to discard by proposing a channel importance criterion. However, recent studies have shown that these criteria do not work well in all conditions. In this paper, we propose a novel Feature Shift Minimization (FSM) method to compress CNN models, which evaluates the feature shift by converging the information of both features and filters. Specifically, we first investigate the compression efficiency with some prevalent methods in different layer-depths and then propose the feature shift concept. Then, we introduce an approximation method to estimate the magnitude of the feature shift, since it is difficult to compute it directly. Besides, we present a distribution-optimization algorithm to compensate for the accuracy loss and improve the network compression efficiency. The proposed method yields state-of-the-art performance on various benchmark networks and datasets, verified by extensive experiments. Our codes are available at: https://github.com/lscgx/FSM. 通道剪枝被广泛用于降低深度网络模型的复杂性。最近的修剪方法通常通过提出信道重要性标准来确定要丢弃网络的哪些部分。然而，最近的研究表明，这些标准并不适用于所有情况。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的特征偏移最小化（FSM）方法来压缩 CNN 模型，该方法通过融合特征和滤波器的信息来评估特征偏移。具体来说，我们首先研究一些流行方法在不同层深度的压缩效率，然后提出特征移位概念。然后，我们引入一种近似方法来估计特征偏移的幅度，因为很难直接计算它。此外，我们提出了一种分布优化算法来补偿精度损失并提高网络压缩效率。所提出的方法在各种基准网络和数据集上产生了最先进的性能，并经过大量实验的验证。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/lscgx/FSM。 本文提出了一种名为特征偏移最小化（FSM）的新方法，用于通过压缩卷积神经网络（CNN）模型来减少计算复杂度。 Yuanzhi Duan,Yue Zhou,Peng He,Qiang Liu,Shukai Duan,Xiaofang Hu cs.CV

title: Context Sensing Attention Network for Video-based Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于基于视频的人员重新识别的上下文感知注意网络
abstract: Video-based person re-identification (ReID) is challenging due to the presence of various interferences in video frames. Recent approaches handle this problem using temporal aggregation strategies. In this work, we propose a novel Context Sensing Attention Network (CSA-Net), which improves both the frame feature extraction and temporal aggregation steps. First, we introduce the Context Sensing Channel Attention (CSCA) module, which emphasizes responses from informative channels for each frame. These informative channels are identified with reference not only to each individual frame, but also to the content of the entire sequence. Therefore, CSCA explores both the individuality of each frame and the global context of the sequence. Second, we propose the Contrastive Feature Aggregation (CFA) module, which predicts frame weights for temporal aggregation. Here, the weight for each frame is determined in a contrastive manner: i.e., not only by the quality of each individual frame, but also by the average quality of the other frames in a sequence. Therefore, it effectively promotes the contribution of relatively good frames. Extensive experimental results on four datasets show that CSA-Net consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Video-based person re-identification (ReID) is challenging due to the presence of various interferences in video frames. Recent approaches handle this problem using temporal aggregation strategies. In this work, we propose a novel Context Sensing Attention Network (CSA-Net), which improves both the frame feature extraction and temporal aggregation steps. First, we introduce the Context Sensing Channel Attention (CSCA) module, which emphasizes responses from informative channels for each frame. These informative channels are identified with reference not only to each individual frame, but also to the content of the entire sequence. Therefore, CSCA explores both the individuality of each frame and the global context of the sequence. Second, we propose the Contrastive Feature Aggregation (CFA) module, which predicts frame weights for temporal aggregation. Here, the weight for each frame is determined in a contrastive manner: i.e., not only by the quality of each individual frame, but also by the average quality of the other frames in a sequence. Therefore, it effectively promotes the contribution of relatively good frames. Extensive experimental results on four datasets show that CSA-Net consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 由于视频帧中存在各种干扰，基于视频的行人重新识别（ReID）具有挑战性。最近的方法使用时间聚合策略来处理这个问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的上下文感知注意网络（CSA-Net），它改进了帧特征提取和时间聚合步骤。首先，我们介绍上下文感知通道注意（CSCA）模块，该模块强调每个帧的信息通道的响应。这些信息通道不仅参考每个单独的帧，而且参考整个序列的内容来识别。因此，CSCA 探索了每个帧的个性和序列的全局背景。其次，我们提出了对比特征聚合（CFA）模块，它预测时间聚合的帧权重。这里，每个帧的权重以对比方式确定：即，不仅由每个单独帧的质量决定，而且还由序列中其他帧的平均质量决定。因此，它有效地促进了相对优秀的框架的贡献。对四个数据集的广泛实验结果表明，CSA-Net 始终达到最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文感知注意力网络（CSA-Net）的视频人物重识别方法，以应对视频帧中的干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理视频人物重识别时，难以有效应对视频帧中的各种干扰，且未充分结合帧的个体特征与序列全局上下文信息。
AI.method: 设计包含上下文感知通道注意力（CSCA）模块和对比特征聚合（CFA）模块的CSA-Net。CSCA通过帧与序列全局信息联合筛选关键通道，CFA通过对比学习为帧分配权重以增强优质帧贡献。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上实验表明，CSA-Net在视频人物重识别任务中持续取得最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合帧级个体特征与序列全局上下文，并采用对比学习优化时序聚合，CSA-Net有效提升了视频人物重识别的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Zhennan Wang,Kehan Li,Runyi Yu,Yian Zhao,Pengchong Qiao,Chang Liu,Fan Xu,Xiangyang Ji,Guoli Song,Jie Chen
title: $L_2$BN: Enhancing Batch Normalization by Equalizing the $L_2$ Norms of Features
title_zh: $L_2$BN：通过均衡特征的 $L_2$ 范数来增强批量归一化
abstract: In this paper, we analyze batch normalization from the perspective of discriminability and find the disadvantages ignored by previous studies: the difference in $l_2$ norms of sample features can hinder batch normalization from obtaining more distinguished inter-class features and more compact intra-class features. To address this issue, we propose a simple yet effective method to equalize the $l_2$ norms of sample features. Concretely, we $l_2$-normalize each sample feature before feeding them into batch normalization, and therefore the features are of the same magnitude. Since the proposed method combines the $l_2$ normalization and batch normalization, we name our method $L_2$BN. The $L_2$BN can strengthen the compactness of intra-class features and enlarge the discrepancy of inter-class features. The $L_2$BN is easy to implement and can exert its effect without any additional parameters or hyper-parameters. We evaluate the effectiveness of $L_2$BN through extensive experiments with various models on image classification and acoustic scene classification tasks. The results demonstrate that the $L_2$BN can boost the generalization ability of various neural network models and achieve considerable performance improvements.
summary: In this paper, we analyze batch normalization from the perspective of discriminability and find the disadvantages ignored by previous studies: the difference in $l_2$ norms of sample features can hinder batch normalization from obtaining more distinguished inter-class features and more compact intra-class features. To address this issue, we propose a simple yet effective method to equalize the $l_2$ norms of sample features. Concretely, we $l_2$-normalize each sample feature before feeding them into batch normalization, and therefore the features are of the same magnitude. Since the proposed method combines the $l_2$ normalization and batch normalization, we name our method $L_2$BN. The $L_2$BN can strengthen the compactness of intra-class features and enlarge the discrepancy of inter-class features. The $L_2$BN is easy to implement and can exert its effect without any additional parameters or hyper-parameters. We evaluate the effectiveness of $L_2$BN through extensive experiments with various models on image classification and acoustic scene classification tasks. The results demonstrate that the $L_2$BN can boost the generalization ability of various neural network models and achieve considerable performance improvements.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们从可区分性的角度分析批归一化，发现了先前研究忽略的缺点：样本特征$l_2$范数的差异会阻碍批归一化获得更区分的类间特征和更紧凑的类内特征。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来均衡样本特征的 $l_2$ 范数。具体来说，我们在将每个样本特征输入批量标准化之前对其进行 $l_2$ 标准化，因此这些特征具有相同的量级。由于所提出的方法结合了 $l_2$ 标准化和批量标准化，因此我们将我们的方法命名为 $L_2$BN。 $L_2$BN可以加强类内特征的紧凑性并放大类间特征的差异。 $L_2$BN实现起来很简单，不需要任何额外的参数或者超参数就可以发挥其效果。我们通过对图像分类和声学场景分类任务的各种模型进行广泛的实验来评估 $L_2$BN 的有效性。结果表明，$L_2$BN 可以提高各种神经网络模型的泛化能力，并实现可观的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为L2BN的新方法，通过等化样本特征的L2范数来增强批量归一化（Batch Normalization）的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统批量归一化未充分考虑样本特征L2范数差异对类别间可区分性和类别内紧凑性的影响，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 在特征输入批量归一化前，先对每个样本特征进行L2归一化，使特征幅度一致，从而结合L2归一化与批量归一化形成L2BN方法。
AI.result: 在图像分类和声学场景分类任务中，L2BN显著提升了多种神经网络模型的泛化能力与性能，且无需额外参数或超参数。
AI.conclusion: L2BN是一种简单有效的特征归一化方法，通过消除特征幅度差异增强了批量归一化效果，适用于多种深度学习任务。

authors_text: Kyra Ahrens,Matthias Kerzel,Jae Hee Lee,Cornelius Weber,Stefan Wermter
title: Knowing Earlier what Right Means to You: A Comprehensive VQA Dataset for Grounding Relative Directions via Multi-Task Learning
title_zh: 尽早了解正确对您意味着什么：通过多任务学习奠定相对方向的综合 VQA 数据集
comment: ef:IJCAI 2022 Workshop on Spatio-Temporal Reasoning and Learning
comments: ef:IJCAI 2022 Workshop on Spatio-Temporal Reasoning and Learning
abstract: Spatial reasoning poses a particular challenge for intelligent agents and is at the same time a prerequisite for their successful interaction and communication in the physical world. One such reasoning task is to describe the position of a target object with respect to the intrinsic orientation of some reference object via relative directions. In this paper, we introduce GRiD-A-3D, a novel diagnostic visual question-answering (VQA) dataset based on abstract objects. Our dataset allows for a fine-grained analysis of end-to-end VQA models' capabilities to ground relative directions. At the same time, model training requires considerably fewer computational resources compared with existing datasets, yet yields a comparable or even higher performance. Along with the new dataset, we provide a thorough evaluation based on two widely known end-to-end VQA architectures trained on GRiD-A-3D. We demonstrate that within a few epochs, the subtasks required to reason over relative directions, such as recognizing and locating objects in a scene and estimating their intrinsic orientations, are learned in the order in which relative directions are intuitively processed.
summary: Spatial reasoning poses a particular challenge for intelligent agents and is at the same time a prerequisite for their successful interaction and communication in the physical world. One such reasoning task is to describe the position of a target object with respect to the intrinsic orientation of some reference object via relative directions. In this paper, we introduce GRiD-A-3D, a novel diagnostic visual question-answering (VQA) dataset based on abstract objects. Our dataset allows for a fine-grained analysis of end-to-end VQA models' capabilities to ground relative directions. At the same time, model training requires considerably fewer computational resources compared with existing datasets, yet yields a comparable or even higher performance. Along with the new dataset, we provide a thorough evaluation based on two widely known end-to-end VQA architectures trained on GRiD-A-3D. We demonstrate that within a few epochs, the subtasks required to reason over relative directions, such as recognizing and locating objects in a scene and estimating their intrinsic orientations, are learned in the order in which relative directions are intuitively processed.
abstract_zh: 空间推理对智能体提出了特殊的挑战，同时也是它们在物理世界中成功交互和通信的先决条件。此类推理任务之一是通过相对方向描述目标对象相对于某个参考对象的固有方向的位置。在本文中，我们介绍了 GRiD-A-3D，一种基于抽象对象的新型诊断视觉问答（VQA）数据集。我们的数据集允许对端到端 VQA 模型确定相对方向的能力进行细粒度分析。同时，与现有数据集相比，模型训练需要的计算资源要少得多，但可以产生相当甚至更高的性能。除了新数据集之外，我们还根据在 GRiD-A-3D 上训练的两种广为人知的端到端 VQA 架构提供全面的评估。我们证明，在几个时期内，推理相对方向所需的子任务（例如识别和定位场景中的对象并估计其内在方向）是按照直观处理相对方向的顺序学习的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为GRiD-A-3D的新型视觉问答数据集，用于通过多任务学习分析智能体对相对方向的地面实况理解能力。
AI.motivation: 空间推理是智能体与物理世界交互的关键，但现有数据集计算成本高且难以细致分析相对方向理解能力，需更高效的数据集与方法。
AI.method: 构建基于抽象物体的GRiD-A-3D数据集，并采用多任务学习框架训练两个主流VQA模型，分析模型学习相对方向相关子任务（如物体识别、方向估计）的顺序。
AI.result: 模型在少量训练周期内即可掌握相对方向推理所需子任务，且数据集相比现有方案减少计算资源消耗的同时保持或提升性能。
AI.conclusion: GRiD-A-3D数据集为研究相对方向理解提供了高效工具，验证了多任务学习在分解复杂空间推理任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Jiahui Zhang,Fangneng Zhan,Rongliang Wu,Yingchen Yu,Wenqing Zhang,Bai Song,Xiaoqin Zhang,Shijian Lu
title: VMRF: View Matching Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: VMRF：查看匹配的神经辐射场
comment: This paper has been accepted to ACM MM 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted to ACM MM 2022
abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have demonstrated very impressive performance in novel view synthesis via implicitly modelling 3D representations from multi-view 2D images. However, most existing studies train NeRF models with either reasonable camera pose initialization or manually-crafted camera pose distributions which are often unavailable or hard to acquire in various real-world data. We design VMRF, an innovative view matching NeRF that enables effective NeRF training without requiring prior knowledge in camera poses or camera pose distributions. VMRF introduces a view matching scheme, which exploits unbalanced optimal transport to produce a feature transport plan for mapping a rendered image with randomly initialized camera pose to the corresponding real image. With the feature transport plan as the guidance, a novel pose calibration technique is designed which rectifies the initially randomized camera poses by predicting relative pose transformations between the pair of rendered and real images. Extensive experiments over a number of synthetic and real datasets show that the proposed VMRF outperforms the state-of-the-art qualitatively and quantitatively by large margins.
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have demonstrated very impressive performance in novel view synthesis via implicitly modelling 3D representations from multi-view 2D images. However, most existing studies train NeRF models with either reasonable camera pose initialization or manually-crafted camera pose distributions which are often unavailable or hard to acquire in various real-world data. We design VMRF, an innovative view matching NeRF that enables effective NeRF training without requiring prior knowledge in camera poses or camera pose distributions. VMRF introduces a view matching scheme, which exploits unbalanced optimal transport to produce a feature transport plan for mapping a rendered image with randomly initialized camera pose to the corresponding real image. With the feature transport plan as the guidance, a novel pose calibration technique is designed which rectifies the initially randomized camera poses by predicting relative pose transformations between the pair of rendered and real images. Extensive experiments over a number of synthetic and real datasets show that the proposed VMRF outperforms the state-of-the-art qualitatively and quantitatively by large margins.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 通过对多视图 2D 图像的 3D 表示进行隐式建模，在新颖的视图合成中表现出了非常令人印象深刻的性能。然而，大多数现有研究都使用合理的相机姿态初始化或手动设计的相机姿态分布来训练 NeRF 模型，而这些分布在各种现实世界数据中通常不可用或难以获取。我们设计了 VMRF，一种创新的视图匹配 NeRF，可以实现有效的 NeRF 训练，而不需要相机姿势或相机姿势分布的先验知识。 VMRF 引入了一种视图匹配方案，该方案利用不平衡的最佳传输来生成特征传输计划，用于将具有随机初始化相机姿势的渲染图像映射到相应的真实图像。以特征传输计划为指导，设计了一种新颖的姿态校准技术，该技术通过预测渲染图像和真实图像对之间的相对姿态变换来纠正最初随机的相机姿态。对大量合成数据集和真实数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的 VMRF 在定性和定量上都大幅优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VMRF方法，解决NeRF训练中对相机姿态先验知识的依赖问题，实现无需姿态初始化的视图匹配神经辐射场建模。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF方法依赖相机姿态初始化或人工设计的分布，但实际场景中这些信息往往难以获取，限制了方法在真实数据中的应用。
AI.method: 通过引入视图匹配方案，利用不平衡最优传输生成特征传输计划，将随机初始化的渲染图像映射到真实图像，并设计姿态校准技术预测渲染与真实图像间的相对姿态变换。
AI.result: 在多个合成与真实数据集上，VMRF在定性和定量指标上均显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: VMRF通过视图匹配与姿态校准技术，成功消除了NeRF训练对相机姿态先验的依赖，为实际场景应用提供了新思路。

title: Multimodal Hydrostatic Actuators for Wearable Robots: A Preliminary Assessment of Mass-Saving and Energy-Efficiency Opportunities
title_zh: 用于可穿戴机器人的多模式静液压执行器：对质量节省和能源效率机会的初步评估
abstract: Wearable robots are limited by their actuators performances because they must bear the weight of their own power system and energy source. This paper explores the idea of leveraging hybrid modes to meet multiple operating points with a lightweight and efficient system by using hydraulic valves to dynamically reconfigure the connections of a hydrostatic actuator. The analyzed opportunities consist in 1) switching between a highly geared power source or a fast power source, 2) dynamically connecting an energy accumulator and 3) using a locking mechanism for holding. Based on a knee exoskeleton case study analysis, results show that switching between gearing ratio can lead to a lighter and more efficient actuator. Also, results show that using an accumulator to provide a preload continuous force has great mass-saving potential, but does not reduce mass significantly if used as a power booster for short transients. Finally, using a locking valve can slightly reduce battery mass if the work cycle includes frequent stops. The operating principles of the proposed multimodal schemes are demonstrated with a one-DOF prototype.
summary: Wearable robots are limited by their actuators performances because they must bear the weight of their own power system and energy source. This paper explores the idea of leveraging hybrid modes to meet multiple operating points with a lightweight and efficient system by using hydraulic valves to dynamically reconfigure the connections of a hydrostatic actuator. The analyzed opportunities consist in 1) switching between a highly geared power source or a fast power source, 2) dynamically connecting an energy accumulator and 3) using a locking mechanism for holding. Based on a knee exoskeleton case study analysis, results show that switching between gearing ratio can lead to a lighter and more efficient actuator. Also, results show that using an accumulator to provide a preload continuous force has great mass-saving potential, but does not reduce mass significantly if used as a power booster for short transients. Finally, using a locking valve can slightly reduce battery mass if the work cycle includes frequent stops. The operating principles of the proposed multimodal schemes are demonstrated with a one-DOF prototype.
abstract_zh: 可穿戴机器人受到其执行器性能的限制，因为它们必须承受自身动力系统和能源的重量。本文探讨了利用混合模式通过使用液压阀动态重新配置静液压执行器的连接来满足轻量级高效系统的多个操作点的想法。分析的机会包括 1) 在高齿轮动力源或快速动力源之间切换，2) 动态连接蓄能器，以及 3) 使用锁定机构进行保持。基于膝外骨骼案例研究分析，结果表明，传动比之间的切换可以带来更轻、更高效的执行器。此外，结果表明，使用蓄能器提供预载连续力具有巨大的减重潜力，但如果用作短瞬态的功率放大器，则不会显着减少质量。最后，如果工作循环包括频繁停止，则使用锁定阀可以稍微减少电池质量。所提出的多模态方案的操作原理通过一自由度原型进行了演示。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过多模式液压执行器实现可穿戴机器人的轻量化和高效能的潜力。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴机器人受限于执行器需承载自身动力系统重量，传统方案难以兼顾轻量化与效率，需探索新型混合模式解决方案。
AI.method: 通过液压阀动态重构液压执行器连接，分析三种模式：变速比切换、蓄能器动态连接及锁定机构，并基于膝部外骨骼进行案例分析与单自由度原型演示。
AI.result: 变速比切换可提升轻量化与效率；蓄能器在持续预载力场景下具显著减重潜力，但短时功率增强效果有限；频繁停顿场景中锁定阀可略微降低电池重量。
AI.conclusion: 多模式液压方案为可穿戴机器人提供减重与节能新路径，但需根据具体工况选择适用模式，原型验证了理论可行性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了通过多模式液压执行器实现可穿戴机器人的轻量化和高效能的潜力。

search_text: Multimodal Hydrostatic Actuators for Wearable Robots: A Preliminary Assessment of Mass-Saving and Energy-Efficiency Opportunities 用于可穿戴机器人的多模式静液压执行器：对质量节省和能源效率机会的初步评估 Wearable robots are limited by their actuators performances because they must bear the weight of their own power system and energy source. This paper explores the idea of leveraging hybrid modes to meet multiple operating points with a lightweight and efficient system by using hydraulic valves to dynamically reconfigure the connections of a hydrostatic actuator. The analyzed opportunities consist in 1) switching between a highly geared power source or a fast power source, 2) dynamically connecting an energy accumulator and 3) using a locking mechanism for holding. Based on a knee exoskeleton case study analysis, results show that switching between gearing ratio can lead to a lighter and more efficient actuator. Also, results show that using an accumulator to provide a preload continuous force has great mass-saving potential, but does not reduce mass significantly if used as a power booster for short transients. Finally, using a locking valve can slightly reduce battery mass if the work cycle includes frequent stops. The operating principles of the proposed multimodal schemes are demonstrated with a one-DOF prototype. 可穿戴机器人受到其执行器性能的限制，因为它们必须承受自身动力系统和能源的重量。本文探讨了利用混合模式通过使用液压阀动态重新配置静液压执行器的连接来满足轻量级高效系统的多个操作点的想法。分析的机会包括 1) 在高齿轮动力源或快速动力源之间切换，2) 动态连接蓄能器，以及 3) 使用锁定机构进行保持。基于膝外骨骼案例研究分析，结果表明，传动比之间的切换可以带来更轻、更高效的执行器。此外，结果表明，使用蓄能器提供预载连续力具有巨大的减重潜力，但如果用作短瞬态的功率放大器，则不会显着减少质量。最后，如果工作循环包括频繁停止，则使用锁定阀可以稍微减少电池质量。所提出的多模态方案的操作原理通过一自由度原型进行了演示。 本文探讨了通过多模式液压执行器实现可穿戴机器人的轻量化和高效能的潜力。 Jeff Denis,Alex Lecavalier,Jean-Sebastien Plante,Alexandre Girard cs.RO

authors_text: Rodothea Myrsini Tsoupidi,Roberto Castañeda Lozano,Elena Troubitsyna,Panagiotis Papadimitratos
title: Securing Optimized Code Against Power Side Channels
title_zh: 确保优化代码免受电源侧通道影响
abstract: Side-channel attacks impose a serious threat to cryptographic algorithms, including widely employed ones, such as AES and RSA. These attacks take advantage of the algorithm implementation in hardware or software to extract secret information via side channels. Software masking is a mitigation approach against power side-channel attacks aiming at hiding the secret-revealing dependencies from the power footprint of a vulnerable implementation. However, this type of software mitigation often depends on general-purpose compilers, which do not preserve non-functional properties. Moreover, microarchitectural features, such as the memory bus and register reuse, may also leak secret information. These abstractions are not visible at the high-level implementation of the program. Instead, they are decided at compile time. To remedy these problems, security engineers often sacrifice code efficiency by turning off compiler optimization and/or performing local, post-compilation transformations. This paper proposes Secure by Construction Code Generation (SecCG), a constraint-based compiler approach that generates optimized yet secure against power side channels code. SecCG controls the quality of the mitigated program by efficiently searching the best possible low-level implementation according to a processor cost model. In our experiments with twelve masked cryptographic functions up to 100 lines of code on Mips32 and ARM Thumb, SecCG speeds up the generated code from 75% to 8 times compared to non-optimized secure code with an overhead of up to 7% compared to non-secure optimized code at the expense of a high compilation cost. In summary, this paper proposes a formal model to generate power side channel free low-level code.

These attacks take advantage of the algorithm implementation in hardware or software to extract secret information via side channels. Software masking is a mitigation approach against power side-channel attacks aiming at hiding the secret-revealing dependencies from the power footprint of a vulnerable implementation. However, this type of software mitigation often depends on general-purpose compilers, which do not preserve non-functional properties. Moreover, microarchitectural features, such as the memory bus and register reuse, may also leak secret information. These abstractions are not visible at the high-level implementation of the program. Instead, they are decided at compile time. To remedy these problems, security engineers often sacrifice code efficiency by turning off compiler optimization and/or performing local, post-compilation transformations. This paper proposes Secure by Construction Code Generation (SecCG), a constraint-based compiler approach that generates optimized yet secure against power side channels code. SecCG controls the quality of the mitigated program by efficiently searching the best possible low-level implementation according to a processor cost model. In our experiments with twelve masked cryptographic functions up to 100 lines of code on Mips32 and ARM Thumb, SecCG speeds up the generated code from 75% to 8 times compared to non-optimized secure code with an overhead of up to 7% compared to non-secure optimized code at the expense of a high compilation cost. In summary, this paper proposes a formal model to generate power side channel free low-level code.
abstract_zh: 旁道攻击对加密算法构成严重威胁，包括广泛使用的算法，例如 AES 和 RSA。这些攻击利用硬件或软件中的算法实现，通过侧通道提取秘密信息。软件屏蔽是一种针对电源侧信道攻击的缓解方法，旨在隐藏易受攻击的实现的电源足迹中泄露秘密的依赖关系。然而，这种类型的软件缓解措施通常依赖于通用编译器，而通用编译器不会保留非功能属性。此外，微架构特征，例如内存总线和寄存器重用，也可能泄露秘密信息。这些抽象在程序的高层实现中是不可见的。相反，它们是在编译时决定的。为了解决这些问题，安全工程师经常通过关闭编译器优化和/或执行本地编译后转换来牺牲代码效率。本文提出了安全构建代码生成 (SecCG)，这是一种基于约束的编译器方法，可生成针对电源侧通道的优化且安全的代码。 SecCG 通过根据处理器成本模型有效搜索最佳可能的低级实现来控制缓解程序的质量。在我们在 Mips32 和 ARM Thumb 上使用 12 个屏蔽加密函数（最多 100 行代码）进行的实验中，与非优化的安全代码相比，SecCG 将生成的代码速度从 75% 提高到 8 倍，与非安全优化的代码相比，开销高达 7%，但代价是高昂的编译成本。总之，本文提出了一种生成无功率侧信道低级代码的形式模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SecCG的编译器方法，旨在生成针对功耗侧信道攻击的优化安全代码。
AI.motivation: 现有软件掩盖技术依赖通用编译器，无法保留非功能属性，且微架构特性可能导致秘密泄露，需牺牲代码效率以确保安全。
AI.method: SecCG基于约束的编译器方法，通过处理器成本模型高效搜索最佳低级实现，平衡安全性和优化。
AI.result: 在Mips32和ARM Thumb上测试12个加密函数，SecCG生成的代码速度比非优化安全代码快75%-8倍，比非安全优化代码仅多7%开销，但编译成本较高。
AI.conclusion: SecCG提供了生成无功耗侧信道漏洞低级代码的形式化模型，在效率与安全间取得平衡，但需权衡编译成本。

title: Techniques for Generalized Colorful $k$-Center Problems
title_zh: 广义多彩 $k$ 中心问题的技术
abstract: Fair clustering enjoyed a surge of interest recently. One appealing way of integrating fairness aspects into classical clustering problems is by introducing multiple covering constraints. This is a natural generalization of the robust (or outlier) setting, which has been studied extensively and is amenable to a variety of classic algorithmic techniques. In contrast, for the case of multiple covering constraints (the so-called colorful setting), specialized techniques have only been developed recently for $k$-Center clustering variants, which is also the focus of this paper. While prior techniques assume covering constraints on the clients, they do not address additional constraints on the facilities, which has been extensively studied in non-colorful settings. In this paper, we present a quite versatile framework to deal with various constraints on the facilities in the colorful setting, by combining ideas from the iterative greedy procedure for Colorful $k$-Center by Inamdar and Varadarajan with new ingredients. To exemplify our framework, we show how it leads, for a constant number $γ$ of colors, to the first constant-factor approximations for both Colorful Matroid Supplier with respect to a linear matroid and Colorful Knapsack Supplier. In both cases, we readily get an $O(2^γ)$-approximation. Moreover, for Colorful Knapsack Supplier, we show that it is possible to obtain constant approximation guarantees that are independent of the number of colors $γ$, as long as $γ=O(1)$, which is needed to obtain a polynomial running time. More precisely, we obtain a $7$-approximation by extending a technique recently introduced by Jia, Sheth, and Svensson for Colorful $k$-Center.
summary: Fair clustering enjoyed a surge of interest recently. One appealing way of integrating fairness aspects into classical clustering problems is by introducing multiple covering constraints. This is a natural generalization of the robust (or outlier) setting, which has been studied extensively and is amenable to a variety of classic algorithmic techniques. In contrast, for the case of multiple covering constraints (the so-called colorful setting), specialized techniques have only been developed recently for $k$-Center clustering variants, which is also the focus of this paper. While prior techniques assume covering constraints on the clients, they do not address additional constraints on the facilities, which has been extensively studied in non-colorful settings. In this paper, we present a quite versatile framework to deal with various constraints on the facilities in the colorful setting, by combining ideas from the iterative greedy procedure for Colorful $k$-Center by Inamdar and Varadarajan with new ingredients. To exemplify our framework, we show how it leads, for a constant number $γ$ of colors, to the first constant-factor approximations for both Colorful Matroid Supplier with respect to a linear matroid and Colorful Knapsack Supplier. In both cases, we readily get an $O(2^γ)$-approximation. Moreover, for Colorful Knapsack Supplier, we show that it is possible to obtain constant approximation guarantees that are independent of the number of colors $γ$, as long as $γ=O(1)$, which is needed to obtain a polynomial running time. More precisely, we obtain a $7$-approximation by extending a technique recently introduced by Jia, Sheth, and Svensson for Colorful $k$-Center.
abstract_zh: 公平集群最近引起了人们的兴趣。将公平性方面整合到经典聚类问题中的一种有吸引力的方法是引入多重覆盖约束。这是鲁棒（或异常值）设置的自然概括，该设置已被广泛研究并且适用于各种经典算法技术。相比之下，对于多重覆盖约束的情况（所谓的彩色设置），最近才针对 $k$-Center 聚类变体开发了专门的技术，这也是本文的重点。虽然现有技术假设覆盖了对客户端的限制，但它们没有解决对设施的额外限制，这已在非彩色环境中进行了广泛研究。在本文中，我们提出了一个相当通用的框架，通过将 Inamdar 和 Varadarajan 的 Colorful $k$-Center 的迭代贪婪程序的思想与新成分相结合，来处理多彩环境中设施的各种约束。为了举例说明我们的框架，我们展示了对于恒定数量的 $γ$ 颜色，它如何导致彩色拟阵供应商相对于线性拟阵和彩色背包供应商的第一个常数因子近似。在这两种情况下，我们很容易得到 $O(2^γ)$ 近似值。此外，对于彩色背包供应商，我们证明只要$γ=O(1)$，就可以获得与颜色数量$γ$无关的常数近似保证，这是获得多项式运行时间所需的。更准确地说，我们通过扩展 Jia、Sheth 和 Svensson 最近为 Colorful $k$-Center 引入的一项技术，获得了 $7$ 的近似值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用框架，用于解决带有设施约束的广义彩色k-中心问题，并展示了其在彩色Matroid供应商和彩色Knapsack供应商问题上的应用。
AI.motivation: 公平聚类需要整合多覆盖约束，但现有方法仅针对客户约束，未解决设施约束问题。本文旨在填补这一空白，扩展彩色设置下的约束类型。
AI.method: 结合Inamdar和Varadarajan的迭代贪心算法与新成分，设计通用框架以处理设施约束，并扩展Jia等人的技术以实现常数近似比。
AI.result: 首次为彩色Matroid供应商和彩色Knapsack供应商问题提供了常数因子近似算法，分别达到O(2^γ)和7-近似比（当γ为常数时）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效处理多种设施约束，为彩色聚类问题提供了灵活且高效的解决方案，推动了公平聚类的研究边界。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用框架，用于解决带有设施约束的广义彩色k-中心问题，并展示了其在彩色Matroid供应商和彩色Knapsack供应商问题上的应用。
ai_content.motivation: 公平聚类需要整合多覆盖约束，但现有方法仅针对客户约束，未解决设施约束问题。本文旨在填补这一空白，扩展彩色设置下的约束类型。
ai_content.method: 结合Inamdar和Varadarajan的迭代贪心算法与新成分，设计通用框架以处理设施约束，并扩展Jia等人的技术以实现常数近似比。
ai_content.result: 首次为彩色Matroid供应商和彩色Knapsack供应商问题提供了常数因子近似算法，分别达到O(2^γ)和7-近似比（当γ为常数时）。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架有效处理多种设施约束，为彩色聚类问题提供了灵活且高效的解决方案，推动了公平聚类的研究边界。

search_text: Techniques for Generalized Colorful $k$-Center Problems 广义多彩 $k$ 中心问题的技术 Fair clustering enjoyed a surge of interest recently. One appealing way of integrating fairness aspects into classical clustering problems is by introducing multiple covering constraints. This is a natural generalization of the robust (or outlier) setting, which has been studied extensively and is amenable to a variety of classic algorithmic techniques. In contrast, for the case of multiple covering constraints (the so-called colorful setting), specialized techniques have only been developed recently for $k$-Center clustering variants, which is also the focus of this paper. While prior techniques assume covering constraints on the clients, they do not address additional constraints on the facilities, which has been extensively studied in non-colorful settings. In this paper, we present a quite versatile framework to deal with various constraints on the facilities in the colorful setting, by combining ideas from the iterative greedy procedure for Colorful $k$-Center by Inamdar and Varadarajan with new ingredients. To exemplify our framework, we show how it leads, for a constant number $γ$ of colors, to the first constant-factor approximations for both Colorful Matroid Supplier with respect to a linear matroid and Colorful Knapsack Supplier. In both cases, we readily get an $O(2^γ)$-approximation. Moreover, for Colorful Knapsack Supplier, we show that it is possible to obtain constant approximation guarantees that are independent of the number of colors $γ$, as long as $γ=O(1)$, which is needed to obtain a polynomial running time. More precisely, we obtain a $7$-approximation by extending a technique recently introduced by Jia, Sheth, and Svensson for Colorful $k$-Center. 公平集群最近引起了人们的兴趣。将公平性方面整合到经典聚类问题中的一种有吸引力的方法是引入多重覆盖约束。这是鲁棒（或异常值）设置的自然概括，该设置已被广泛研究并且适用于各种经典算法技术。相比之下，对于多重覆盖约束的情况（所谓的彩色设置），最近才针对 $k$-Center 聚类变体开发了专门的技术，这也是本文的重点。虽然现有技术假设覆盖了对客户端的限制，但它们没有解决对设施的额外限制，这已在非彩色环境中进行了广泛研究。在本文中，我们提出了一个相当通用的框架，通过将 Inamdar 和 Varadarajan 的 Colorful $k$-Center 的迭代贪婪程序的思想与新成分相结合，来处理多彩环境中设施的各种约束。为了举例说明我们的框架，我们展示了对于恒定数量的 $γ$ 颜色，它如何导致彩色拟阵供应商相对于线性拟阵和彩色背包供应商的第一个常数因子近似。在这两种情况下，我们很容易得到 $O(2^γ)$ 近似值。此外，对于彩色背包供应商，我们证明只要$γ=O(1)$，就可以获得与颜色数量$γ$无关的常数近似保证，这是获得多项式运行时间所需的。更准确地说，我们通过扩展 Jia、Sheth 和 Svensson 最近为 Colorful $k$-Center 引入的一项技术，获得了 $7$ 的近似值。 本文提出了一种通用框架，用于解决带有设施约束的广义彩色k-中心问题，并展示了其在彩色Matroid供应商和彩色Knapsack供应商问题上的应用。 Georg Anegg,Laura Vargas Koch,Rico Zenklusen cs.DS,math.OC

title: DenseHybrid: Hybrid Anomaly Detection for Dense Open-set Recognition
title_zh: DenseHybrid：用于密集开集识别的混合异常检测
abstract: Anomaly detection can be conceived either through generative modelling of regular training data or by discriminating with respect to negative training data. These two approaches exhibit different failure modes. Consequently, hybrid algorithms present an attractive research goal. Unfortunately, dense anomaly detection requires translational equivariance and very large input resolutions. These requirements disqualify all previous hybrid approaches to the best of our knowledge. We therefore design a novel hybrid algorithm based on reinterpreting discriminative logits as a logarithm of the unnormalized joint distribution $\hat{p}(\mathbf{x}, \mathbf{y})$. Our model builds on a shared convolutional representation from which we recover three dense predictions: i) the closed-set class posterior $P(\mathbf{y}|\mathbf{x})$, ii) the dataset posterior $P(d_{in}|\mathbf{x})$, iii) unnormalized data likelihood $\hat{p}(\mathbf{x})$. The latter two predictions are trained both on the standard training data and on a generic negative dataset. We blend these two predictions into a hybrid anomaly score which allows dense open-set recognition on large natural images. We carefully design a custom loss for the data likelihood in order to avoid backpropagation through the untractable normalizing constant $Z(θ)$. Experiments evaluate our contributions on standard dense anomaly detection benchmarks as well as in terms of open-mIoU - a novel metric for dense open-set performance. Our submissions achieve state-of-the-art performance despite neglectable computational overhead over the standard semantic segmentation baseline.
summary: Anomaly detection can be conceived either through generative modelling of regular training data or by discriminating with respect to negative training data. These two approaches exhibit different failure modes. Consequently, hybrid algorithms present an attractive research goal. Unfortunately, dense anomaly detection requires translational equivariance and very large input resolutions. These requirements disqualify all previous hybrid approaches to the best of our knowledge. We therefore design a novel hybrid algorithm based on reinterpreting discriminative logits as a logarithm of the unnormalized joint distribution $\hat{p}(\mathbf{x}, \mathbf{y})$. Our model builds on a shared convolutional representation from which we recover three dense predictions: i) the closed-set class posterior $P(\mathbf{y}|\mathbf{x})$, ii) the dataset posterior $P(d_{in}|\mathbf{x})$, iii) unnormalized data likelihood $\hat{p}(\mathbf{x})$. The latter two predictions are trained both on the standard training data and on a generic negative dataset. We blend these two predictions into a hybrid anomaly score which allows dense open-set recognition on large natural images. We carefully design a custom loss for the data likelihood in order to avoid backpropagation through the untractable normalizing constant $Z(θ)$. Experiments evaluate our contributions on standard dense anomaly detection benchmarks as well as in terms of open-mIoU - a novel metric for dense open-set performance. Our submissions achieve state-of-the-art performance despite neglectable computational overhead over the standard semantic segmentation baseline.
abstract_zh: 异常检测可以通过常规训练数据的生成建模或通过区分负面训练数据来设想。这两种方法表现出不同的故障模式。因此，混合算法提出了一个有吸引力的研究目标。不幸的是，密集异常检测需要平移等方差和非常大的输入分辨率。据我们所知，这些要求使之前所有的混合方法都失去了资格。因此，我们设计了一种新颖的混合算法，将判别逻辑重新解释为非标准化联合分布 $\hat{p}(\mathbf{x}, \mathbf{y})$ 的对数。我们的模型建立在共享卷积表示的基础上，从中恢复三个密集预测：i) 闭集类后验 $P(\mathbf{y}|\mathbf{x})$，ii) 数据集后验 $P(d_{in}|\mathbf{x})$，iii) 非归一化数据似然 $\hat{p}(\mathbf{x})$。后两个预测是在标准训练数据和通用负数据集上进行训练的。我们将这两个预测混合成一个混合异常分数，允许在大型自然图像上进行密集的开放集识别。我们仔细设计了数据似然度的自定义损失，以避免通过难以处理的归一化常数 $Z(θ)$ 进行反向传播。实验评估了我们对标准密集异常检测基准以及 open-mIoU（密集开放集性能的一种新颖指标）的贡献。尽管标准语义分割基线的计算开销可以忽略不计，但我们提交的内容仍实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DenseHybrid方法，通过结合生成模型与判别模型的优势，解决密集开放集场景下的异常检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有混合方法无法满足密集异常检测对平移等变性和高分辨率输入的要求，且生成模型与判别模型存在不同失效模式，需设计新方法融合两者优势。
AI.method: 将判别logits重新解释为未归一化联合分布的对数，构建共享卷积特征提取器，输出封闭集后验、数据集后验及未归一化数据似然，结合标准数据与负样本数据训练，设计定制损失函数避免归一化常数反向传播。
AI.result: 在密集异常检测基准测试及开放集mIoU指标上达到最优性能，计算开销接近标准分割基线。
AI.conclusion: DenseHybrid通过创新性混合框架有效提升了密集开放集异常检测性能，验证了生成与判别方法融合的可行性。

title: GFNet: Geometric Flow Network for 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: GFNet：用于 3D 点云语义分割的几何流网络
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (09/2022)
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (09/2022)
abstract: Point cloud semantic segmentation from projected views, such as range-view (RV) and bird's-eye-view (BEV), has been intensively investigated. Different views capture different information of point clouds and thus are complementary to each other. However, recent projection-based methods for point cloud semantic segmentation usually utilize a vanilla late fusion strategy for the predictions of different views, failing to explore the complementary information from a geometric perspective during the representation learning. In this paper, we introduce a geometric flow network (GFNet) to explore the geometric correspondence between different views in an align-before-fuse manner. Specifically, we devise a novel geometric flow module (GFM) to bidirectionally align and propagate the complementary information across different views according to geometric relationships under the end-to-end learning scheme. We perform extensive experiments on two widely used benchmark datasets, SemanticKITTI and nuScenes, to demonstrate the effectiveness of our GFNet for project-based point cloud semantic segmentation. Concretely, GFNet not only significantly boosts the performance of each individual view but also achieves state-of-the-art results over all existing projection-based models. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/haibo-qiu/GFNet}.
summary: Point cloud semantic segmentation from projected views, such as range-view (RV) and bird's-eye-view (BEV), has been intensively investigated. Different views capture different information of point clouds and thus are complementary to each other. However, recent projection-based methods for point cloud semantic segmentation usually utilize a vanilla late fusion strategy for the predictions of different views, failing to explore the complementary information from a geometric perspective during the representation learning. In this paper, we introduce a geometric flow network (GFNet) to explore the geometric correspondence between different views in an align-before-fuse manner. Specifically, we devise a novel geometric flow module (GFM) to bidirectionally align and propagate the complementary information across different views according to geometric relationships under the end-to-end learning scheme. We perform extensive experiments on two widely used benchmark datasets, SemanticKITTI and nuScenes, to demonstrate the effectiveness of our GFNet for project-based point cloud semantic segmentation. Concretely, GFNet not only significantly boosts the performance of each individual view but also achieves state-of-the-art results over all existing projection-based models. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/haibo-qiu/GFNet}.
abstract_zh: 来自投影视图（例如范围视图（RV）和鸟瞰图（BEV））的点云语义分割已得到深入研究。不同的视图捕获点云的不同信息，因此彼此互补。然而，最近基于投影的点云语义分割方法通常采用普通的后期融合策略来预测不同视图，未能在表示学习过程中从几何角度探索互补信息。在本文中，我们引入了几何流网络（GFNet），以融合前对齐的方式探索不同视图之间的几何对应关系。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的几何流模块（GFM），可以根据端到端学习方案下的几何关系在不同视图之间双向对齐和传播互补信息。我们对两个广泛使用的基准数据集 SemanticKITTI 和 nuScenes 进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们的 GFNet 对于基于项目的点云语义分割的有效性。具体而言，GFNet 不仅显着提高了每个单独视图的性能，而且还比所有现有的基于投影的模型实现了最先进的结果。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/haibo-qiu/GFNet} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何流网络（GFNet）的3D点云语义分割方法，通过融合多视角（如range-view和bird's-eye-view）的几何对应关系提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有投影视角语义分割方法通常采用简单的晚期融合策略，未能在表示学习阶段充分挖掘不同视角间的几何互补信息，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计几何流模块（GFM），通过双向对齐与传播机制，根据几何关系在端到端框架下融合多视角特征，实现先对齐后融合的策略。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes数据集上，GFNet显著提升各单视角性能，并在所有基于投影的模型中取得最优结果。
AI.conclusion: GFNet通过几何视角对齐与信息传播有效整合多视角互补性，为点云语义分割提供了新的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何流网络（GFNet）的3D点云语义分割方法，通过融合多视角（如range-view和bird's-eye-view）的几何对应关系提升分割性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有投影视角语义分割方法通常采用简单的晚期融合策略，未能在表示学习阶段充分挖掘不同视角间的几何互补信息，导致性能受限。
ai_content.method: 设计几何流模块（GFM），通过双向对齐与传播机制，根据几何关系在端到端框架下融合多视角特征，实现先对齐后融合的策略。
ai_content.result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes数据集上，GFNet显著提升各单视角性能，并在所有基于投影的模型中取得最优结果。
ai_content.conclusion: GFNet通过几何视角对齐与信息传播有效整合多视角互补性，为点云语义分割提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: GFNet: Geometric Flow Network for 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation GFNet：用于 3D 点云语义分割的几何流网络 Point cloud semantic segmentation from projected views, such as range-view (RV) and bird's-eye-view (BEV), has been intensively investigated. Different views capture different information of point clouds and thus are complementary to each other. However, recent projection-based methods for point cloud semantic segmentation usually utilize a vanilla late fusion strategy for the predictions of different views, failing to explore the complementary information from a geometric perspective during the representation learning. In this paper, we introduce a geometric flow network (GFNet) to explore the geometric correspondence between different views in an align-before-fuse manner. Specifically, we devise a novel geometric flow module (GFM) to bidirectionally align and propagate the complementary information across different views according to geometric relationships under the end-to-end learning scheme. We perform extensive experiments on two widely used benchmark datasets, SemanticKITTI and nuScenes, to demonstrate the effectiveness of our GFNet for project-based point cloud semantic segmentation. Concretely, GFNet not only significantly boosts the performance of each individual view but also achieves state-of-the-art results over all existing projection-based models. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/haibo-qiu/GFNet}. 来自投影视图（例如范围视图（RV）和鸟瞰图（BEV））的点云语义分割已得到深入研究。不同的视图捕获点云的不同信息，因此彼此互补。然而，最近基于投影的点云语义分割方法通常采用普通的后期融合策略来预测不同视图，未能在表示学习过程中从几何角度探索互补信息。在本文中，我们引入了几何流网络（GFNet），以融合前对齐的方式探索不同视图之间的几何对应关系。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的几何流模块（GFM），可以根据端到端学习方案下的几何关系在不同视图之间双向对齐和传播互补信息。我们对两个广泛使用的基准数据集 SemanticKITTI 和 nuScenes 进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们的 GFNet 对于基于项目的点云语义分割的有效性。具体而言，GFNet 不仅显着提高了每个单独视图的性能，而且还比所有现有的基于投影的模型实现了最先进的结果。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/haibo-qiu/GFNet} 获取。 本文提出一种基于几何流网络（GFNet）的3D点云语义分割方法，通过融合多视角（如range-view和bird's-eye-view）的几何对应关系提升分割性能。 Haibo Qiu,Baosheng Yu,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

title: Predicting is not Understanding: Recognizing and Addressing Underspecification in Machine Learning
title_zh: 预测不是理解：识别并解决机器学习中的规范不足问题
comment: Long version of a paper accepted at the 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV)
comments: Long version of a paper accepted at the 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV)
abstract: Machine learning (ML) models are typically optimized for their accuracy on a given dataset. However, this predictive criterion rarely captures all desirable properties of a model, in particular how well it matches a domain expert's understanding of a task. Underspecification refers to the existence of multiple models that are indistinguishable in their in-domain accuracy, even though they differ in other desirable properties such as out-of-distribution (OOD) performance. Identifying these situations is critical for assessing the reliability of ML models. We formalize the concept of underspecification and propose a method to identify and partially address it. We train multiple models with an independence constraint that forces them to implement different functions. They discover predictive features that are otherwise ignored by standard empirical risk minimization (ERM), which we then distill into a global model with superior OOD performance. Importantly, we constrain the models to align with the data manifold to ensure that they discover meaningful features. We demonstrate the method on multiple datasets in computer vision (collages, WILDS-Camelyon17, GQA) and discuss general implications of underspecification. Most notably, in-domain performance cannot serve for OOD model selection without additional assumptions.
summary: Machine learning (ML) models are typically optimized for their accuracy on a given dataset. However, this predictive criterion rarely captures all desirable properties of a model, in particular how well it matches a domain expert's understanding of a task. Underspecification refers to the existence of multiple models that are indistinguishable in their in-domain accuracy, even though they differ in other desirable properties such as out-of-distribution (OOD) performance. Identifying these situations is critical for assessing the reliability of ML models. We formalize the concept of underspecification and propose a method to identify and partially address it. We train multiple models with an independence constraint that forces them to implement different functions. They discover predictive features that are otherwise ignored by standard empirical risk minimization (ERM), which we then distill into a global model with superior OOD performance. Importantly, we constrain the models to align with the data manifold to ensure that they discover meaningful features. We demonstrate the method on multiple datasets in computer vision (collages, WILDS-Camelyon17, GQA) and discuss general implications of underspecification. Most notably, in-domain performance cannot serve for OOD model selection without additional assumptions.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 模型通常针对给定数据集的准确性进行优化。然而，这种预测标准很少能够捕获模型的所有所需属性，特别是它与领域专家对任务的理解的匹配程度。规格不足是指存在多个模型，尽管它们在其他所需属性（例如分布外（OOD）性能）方面存在差异，但在域内精度方面无法区分。识别这些情况对于评估机器学习模型的可靠性至关重要。我们形式化了规格不足的概念，并提出了一种识别和部分解决该问题的方法。我们训练具有独立约束的多个模型，迫使它们实现不同的功能。他们发现了标准经验风险最小化 (ERM) 所忽略的预测特征，然后我们将其提炼成具有卓越 OOD 性能的全局模型。重要的是，我们限制模型与数据流形保持一致，以确保它们发现有意义的特征。我们在计算机视觉中的多个数据集（拼贴画、WILDS-Camelyon17、GQA）上演示了该方法，并讨论了规格不足的一般含义。最值得注意的是，如果没有额外的假设，域内性能无法用于 OOD 模型选择。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨机器学习模型中因过度依赖预测准确性而导致的'欠规范性'问题，并提出通过多模型训练与知识蒸馏的方法提升模型的分布外泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型仅优化在域内数据的预测准确率，但可能忽略领域专家认知的其他关键特性，导致模型在分布外场景表现不佳，需识别并解决这种'欠规范性'问题。
AI.method: 通过强制多模型学习不同函数的独立性约束，挖掘标准经验风险最小化（ERM）忽略的预测特征，并将其蒸馏为具有更好分布外性能的全局模型，同时确保模型与数据流形对齐。
AI.result: 在多个计算机视觉数据集（如WILDS-Camelyon17、GQA）实验中验证了方法有效性，证明仅依赖域内性能无法可靠选择分布外表现优的模型。
AI.conclusion: 模型选择需超越单纯域内准确率指标，必须引入额外假设或方法（如本文提出的多模型蒸馏）以应对欠规范性问题，确保模型可靠性。
