authors_text: Haoning Wu,Chaofeng Chen,Jingwen Hou,Liang Liao,Annan Wang,Wenxiu Sun,Qiong Yan,Weisi Lin
title: FAST-VQA: Efficient End-to-end Video Quality Assessment with Fragment Sampling
title_zh: FAST-VQA：使用片段采样进行高效的端到端视频质量评估
abstract: Current deep video quality assessment (VQA) methods are usually with high computational costs when evaluating high-resolution videos. This cost hinders them from learning better video-quality-related representations via end-to-end training. Existing approaches typically consider naive sampling to reduce the computational cost, such as resizing and cropping. However, they obviously corrupt quality-related information in videos and are thus not optimal for learning good representations for VQA. Therefore, there is an eager need to design a new quality-retained sampling scheme for VQA. In this paper, we propose Grid Mini-patch Sampling (GMS), which allows consideration of local quality by sampling patches at their raw resolution and covers global quality with contextual relations via mini-patches sampled in uniform grids. These mini-patches are spliced and aligned temporally, named as fragments. We further build the Fragment Attention Network (FANet) specially designed to accommodate fragments as inputs. Consisting of fragments and FANet, the proposed FrAgment Sample Transformer for VQA (FAST-VQA) enables efficient end-to-end deep VQA and learns effective video-quality-related representations. It improves state-of-the-art accuracy by around 10% while reducing 99.5% FLOPs on 1080P high-resolution videos. The newly learned video-quality-related representations can also be transferred into smaller VQA datasets, boosting performance in these scenarios. Extensive experiments show that FAST-VQA has good performance on inputs of various resolutions while retaining high efficiency. We publish our code at https://github.com/timothyhtimothy/FAST-VQA.
summary: Current deep video quality assessment (VQA) methods are usually with high computational costs when evaluating high-resolution videos. This cost hinders them from learning better video-quality-related representations via end-to-end training. Existing approaches typically consider naive sampling to reduce the computational cost, such as resizing and cropping. However, they obviously corrupt quality-related information in videos and are thus not optimal for learning good representations for VQA. Therefore, there is an eager need to design a new quality-retained sampling scheme for VQA. In this paper, we propose Grid Mini-patch Sampling (GMS), which allows consideration of local quality by sampling patches at their raw resolution and covers global quality with contextual relations via mini-patches sampled in uniform grids. These mini-patches are spliced and aligned temporally, named as fragments. We further build the Fragment Attention Network (FANet) specially designed to accommodate fragments as inputs. Consisting of fragments and FANet, the proposed FrAgment Sample Transformer for VQA (FAST-VQA) enables efficient end-to-end deep VQA and learns effective video-quality-related representations. It improves state-of-the-art accuracy by around 10% while reducing 99.5% FLOPs on 1080P high-resolution videos. The newly learned video-quality-related representations can also be transferred into smaller VQA datasets, boosting performance in these scenarios. Extensive experiments show that FAST-VQA has good performance on inputs of various resolutions while retaining high efficiency. We publish our code at https://github.com/timothyhtimothy/FAST-VQA.
abstract_zh: 当前的深度视频质量评估（VQA）方法在评估高分辨率视频时通常具有较高的计算成本。这种成本阻碍了他们通过端到端训练学习更好的视频质量相关表示。现有方法通常考虑朴素采样以降低计算成本，例如调整大小和裁剪。然而，它们显然会破坏视频中与质量相关的信息，因此对于学习 VQA 的良好表示来说并不是最佳选择。因此，迫切需要为VQA设计一种新的保质采样方案。在本文中，我们提出网格小补丁采样（GMS），它允许通过以原始分辨率采样补丁来考虑局部质量，并通过在统一网格中采样的小补丁覆盖具有上下文关系的全局质量。这些小补丁在时间上被拼接和对齐，称为片段。我们进一步构建了专门设计用于容纳片段作为输入的片段注意网络（FANet）。所提出的用于 VQA 的 FrAgment Sample Transformer (FAST-VQA) 由片段和 FANet 组成，可实现高效的端到端深度 VQA 并学习有效的视频质量相关表示。它将 1080P 高分辨率视频的最先进准确度提高了约 10%，同时将 FLOP 减少了 99.5%。新学习的视频质量相关表示也可以转移到更小的 VQA 数据集中，从而提高这些场景中的性能。大量实验表明，FAST-VQA 在保持高效率的同时，对各种分辨率的输入都具有良好的性能。我们在 https://github.com/timothyhtimothy/FAST-VQA 发布我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAST-VQA方法，通过片段采样实现高效的端到端视频质量评估。
AI.motivation: 现有视频质量评估方法在处理高分辨率视频时计算成本高，且传统采样方法会破坏质量信息，影响模型学习效果。
AI.method: 设计网格小块采样（GMS）保留局部质量信息，并通过均匀网格采样覆盖全局质量。结合片段注意力网络（FANet）构建FAST-VQA模型，实现高效计算。
AI.result: 在1080P视频上减少99.5%计算量的同时提升约10%精度，且可迁移至小数据集提升性能。
AI.conclusion: FAST-VQA通过创新采样与网络设计，在保持高效率的同时实现了更优的视频质量评估效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出FAST-VQA方法，通过片段采样实现高效的端到端视频质量评估。
ai_content.motivation: 现有视频质量评估方法在处理高分辨率视频时计算成本高，且传统采样方法会破坏质量信息，影响模型学习效果。
ai_content.method: 设计网格小块采样（GMS）保留局部质量信息，并通过均匀网格采样覆盖全局质量。结合片段注意力网络（FANet）构建FAST-VQA模型，实现高效计算。
ai_content.result: 在1080P视频上减少99.5%计算量的同时提升约10%精度，且可迁移至小数据集提升性能。
ai_content.conclusion: FAST-VQA通过创新采样与网络设计，在保持高效率的同时实现了更优的视频质量评估效果。

search_text: FAST-VQA: Efficient End-to-end Video Quality Assessment with Fragment Sampling FAST-VQA：使用片段采样进行高效的端到端视频质量评估 Current deep video quality assessment (VQA) methods are usually with high computational costs when evaluating high-resolution videos. This cost hinders them from learning better video-quality-related representations via end-to-end training. Existing approaches typically consider naive sampling to reduce the computational cost, such as resizing and cropping. However, they obviously corrupt quality-related information in videos and are thus not optimal for learning good representations for VQA. Therefore, there is an eager need to design a new quality-retained sampling scheme for VQA. In this paper, we propose Grid Mini-patch Sampling (GMS), which allows consideration of local quality by sampling patches at their raw resolution and covers global quality with contextual relations via mini-patches sampled in uniform grids. These mini-patches are spliced and aligned temporally, named as fragments. We further build the Fragment Attention Network (FANet) specially designed to accommodate fragments as inputs. Consisting of fragments and FANet, the proposed FrAgment Sample Transformer for VQA (FAST-VQA) enables efficient end-to-end deep VQA and learns effective video-quality-related representations. It improves state-of-the-art accuracy by around 10% while reducing 99.5% FLOPs on 1080P high-resolution videos. The newly learned video-quality-related representations can also be transferred into smaller VQA datasets, boosting performance in these scenarios. Extensive experiments show that FAST-VQA has good performance on inputs of various resolutions while retaining high efficiency. We publish our code at https://github.com/timothyhtimothy/FAST-VQA. 当前的深度视频质量评估（VQA）方法在评估高分辨率视频时通常具有较高的计算成本。这种成本阻碍了他们通过端到端训练学习更好的视频质量相关表示。现有方法通常考虑朴素采样以降低计算成本，例如调整大小和裁剪。然而，它们显然会破坏视频中与质量相关的信息，因此对于学习 VQA 的良好表示来说并不是最佳选择。因此，迫切需要为VQA设计一种新的保质采样方案。在本文中，我们提出网格小补丁采样（GMS），它允许通过以原始分辨率采样补丁来考虑局部质量，并通过在统一网格中采样的小补丁覆盖具有上下文关系的全局质量。这些小补丁在时间上被拼接和对齐，称为片段。我们进一步构建了专门设计用于容纳片段作为输入的片段注意网络（FANet）。所提出的用于 VQA 的 FrAgment Sample Transformer (FAST-VQA) 由片段和 FANet 组成，可实现高效的端到端深度 VQA 并学习有效的视频质量相关表示。它将 1080P 高分辨率视频的最先进准确度提高了约 10%，同时将 FLOP 减少了 99.5%。新学习的视频质量相关表示也可以转移到更小的 VQA 数据集中，从而提高这些场景中的性能。大量实验表明，FAST-VQA 在保持高效率的同时，对各种分辨率的输入都具有良好的性能。我们在 https://github.com/timothyhtimothy/FAST-VQA 发布我们的代码。 本文提出FAST-VQA方法，通过片段采样实现高效的端到端视频质量评估。 Haoning Wu,Chaofeng Chen,Jingwen Hou,Liang Liao,Annan Wang,Wenxiu Sun,Qiong Yan,Weisi Lin cs.CV,cs.MM

title: Smart Education: Higher Education Instruction and the Internet of Things (IoT)
title_zh: 智慧教育：高等教育教学和物联网 (IoT)
abstract: The Internet of Things (IoT) has many applications in our daily lives. One aspect in particular is how the IoT is making a substantial impact on education and learning; as we move into the 'Smart Educational' era. This article explores how the IoT continues to transform the education landscape, from classrooms and assessments to culture and attitudes. Smart Education is a pivotal tool in the fight to meet the educational challenges of tomorrow. The IoT tools are getting used more and more often in the area of education, aiming to increase student engagement, satisfaction and quality of learning. IoT will reshape student culture and habits beyond belief. As Smart Education is more than just using technologies, it involves a whole range of factors, from the educational management through to the pedagogical techniques and effectiveness. Educators in the 21st century now have access to gamification, smart devices, data management, and immersive technologies. Enabling academics to gather a variety of information from students. Ranging from monitoring student engagement to adapting the learning strategies for improved learning effectiveness. Through Smart Education, educators will be able to better monitor the needs of individual students and adjust their learning load correspondingly (i.e., optimal learning environment/workload to support and prevent students failing). One of the biggest challenges for educators is how new technologies will address growing problems (engagement and achievement). The scale and pace of change (technological IoT era) is unprecedented. Typically, jobs students are trained for today will not be here tomorrow. Education is not just about knowledge acquisition, but also the digital skills, adaptability and creativity (essential, if students are to thrive in the new world).

abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 在我们的日常生活中有许多应用。一方面是物联网如何对教育和学习产生重大影响；随着我们进入“智慧教育”时代。本文探讨了物联网如何继续改变教育格局，从课堂和评估到文化和态度。智慧教育是应对未来教育挑战的关键工具。物联网工具在教育领域的使用越来越频繁，旨在提高学生的参与度、满意度和学习质量。物联网将重塑学生文化和习惯，令人难以置信。智慧教育不仅仅是技术的运用，它涉及从教育管理到教学技术和效果的一系列因素。 21 世纪的教育工作者现在可以使用游戏化、智能设备、数据管理和沉浸式技术。使学者能够从学生那里收集各种信息。从监控学生的参与度到调整学习策略以提高学习效率。通过智慧教育，教育工作者将能够更好地监控个别学生的需求并相应地调整他们的学习负荷（即支持和防止学生失败的最佳学习环境/工作量）。教育工作者面临的最大挑战之一是新技术如何解决日益严重的问题（参与度和成就）。变革（技术物联网时代）的规模和速度是前所未有的。通常，学生今天接受培训的工作明天就不会出现。教育不仅仅关乎知识获取，还关乎数字技能、适应能力和创造力（如果学生想要在新世界中茁壮成长，这是必不可少的）。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨物联网（IoT）如何通过智能教育技术重塑高等教育的教学模式、评估体系及学习文化，以应对未来教育挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着技术快速发展，传统教育模式难以满足学生对数字技能、适应力及创造力的需求，需借助IoT工具提升教学效果与学生参与度。
AI.method: 通过分析IoT在教育场景中的应用案例，结合教育管理、教学方法及数据分析等多维度，探讨其对学习体验与教育质量的影响。
AI.result: IoT技术能有效提升学生参与度与学习满意度，帮助教师实时监测学习状态并动态调整教学策略，优化个性化学习环境。
AI.conclusion: 智能教育是应对未来职业变革的关键，需通过IoT技术整合教学资源，培养学生的综合能力以适应快速变化的社会需求。

authors_text: Yifan Lu,Ziqi Zhang,Yuxin Chen,Chunfeng Yuan,Bing Li,Weiming Hu
title: PIC 4th Challenge: Semantic-Assisted Multi-Feature Encoding and Multi-Head Decoding for Dense Video Captioning
title_zh: PIC 第四届挑战赛：用于密集视频字幕的语义辅助多功能编码和多头解码
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, report of PIC 4th Challenge Accepted by PIC'22 workshop
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, report of PIC 4th Challenge Accepted by PIC'22 workshop
abstract: The task of Dense Video Captioning (DVC) aims to generate captions with timestamps for multiple events in one video. Semantic information plays an important role for both localization and description of DVC. We present a semantic-assisted dense video captioning model based on the encoding-decoding framework. In the encoding stage, we design a concept detector to extract semantic information, which is then fused with multi-modal visual features to sufficiently represent the input video. In the decoding stage, we design a classification head, paralleled with the localization and captioning heads, to provide semantic supervision. Our method achieves significant improvements on the YouMakeup dataset under DVC evaluation metrics and achieves high performance in the Makeup Dense Video Captioning (MDVC) task of PIC 4th Challenge.
summary: The task of Dense Video Captioning (DVC) aims to generate captions with timestamps for multiple events in one video. Semantic information plays an important role for both localization and description of DVC. We present a semantic-assisted dense video captioning model based on the encoding-decoding framework. In the encoding stage, we design a concept detector to extract semantic information, which is then fused with multi-modal visual features to sufficiently represent the input video. In the decoding stage, we design a classification head, paralleled with the localization and captioning heads, to provide semantic supervision. Our method achieves significant improvements on the YouMakeup dataset under DVC evaluation metrics and achieves high performance in the Makeup Dense Video Captioning (MDVC) task of PIC 4th Challenge.
abstract_zh: 密集视频字幕（DVC）的任务旨在为一个视频中的多个事件生成带有时间戳的字幕。语义信息对于DVC的定位和描述都起着重要作用。我们提出了一种基于编码解码框架的语义辅助密集视频字幕模型。 In the encoding stage, we design a concept detector to extract semantic information, which is then fused with multi-modal visual features to sufficiently represent the input video.在解码阶段，我们设计了一个分类头，与定位头和字幕头并行，以提供语义监督。 Our method achieves significant improvements on the YouMakeup dataset under DVC evaluation metrics and achieves high performance in the Makeup Dense Video Captioning (MDVC) task of PIC 4th Challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义辅助的密集视频字幕生成模型，通过多特征编码和多头解码提升视频事件定位与描述能力。
AI.motivation: 密集视频字幕生成需同时完成事件定位与描述，而现有方法未能充分融合语义信息，导致定位精度和描述准确性不足。
AI.method: 编码阶段设计概念检测器提取语义信息并与多模态视觉特征融合；解码阶段引入分类头与定位、字幕头并行结构，通过语义监督提升模型表现。
AI.result: 在YouMakeup数据集上显著优于现有方法，在PIC 4th Challenge的Makeup密集视频字幕任务中取得高分。
AI.conclusion: 语义信息与多模态特征的深度融合有效提升了密集视频字幕生成的性能，验证了该方法在实际任务中的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义辅助的密集视频字幕生成模型，通过多特征编码和多头解码提升视频事件定位与描述能力。

search_text: PIC 4th Challenge: Semantic-Assisted Multi-Feature Encoding and Multi-Head Decoding for Dense Video Captioning PIC 第四届挑战赛：用于密集视频字幕的语义辅助多功能编码和多头解码 The task of Dense Video Captioning (DVC) aims to generate captions with timestamps for multiple events in one video. Semantic information plays an important role for both localization and description of DVC. We present a semantic-assisted dense video captioning model based on the encoding-decoding framework. In the encoding stage, we design a concept detector to extract semantic information, which is then fused with multi-modal visual features to sufficiently represent the input video. In the decoding stage, we design a classification head, paralleled with the localization and captioning heads, to provide semantic supervision. Our method achieves significant improvements on the YouMakeup dataset under DVC evaluation metrics and achieves high performance in the Makeup Dense Video Captioning (MDVC) task of PIC 4th Challenge. 密集视频字幕（DVC）的任务旨在为一个视频中的多个事件生成带有时间戳的字幕。语义信息对于DVC的定位和描述都起着重要作用。我们提出了一种基于编码解码框架的语义辅助密集视频字幕模型。 In the encoding stage, we design a concept detector to extract semantic information, which is then fused with multi-modal visual features to sufficiently represent the input video.在解码阶段，我们设计了一个分类头，与定位头和字幕头并行，以提供语义监督。 Our method achieves significant improvements on the YouMakeup dataset under DVC evaluation metrics and achieves high performance in the Makeup Dense Video Captioning (MDVC) task of PIC 4th Challenge. 本文提出一种基于语义辅助的密集视频字幕生成模型，通过多特征编码和多头解码提升视频事件定位与描述能力。 Yifan Lu,Ziqi Zhang,Yuxin Chen,Chunfeng Yuan,Bing Li,Weiming Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Michael Kapralov,Akash Kumar,Silvio Lattanzi,Aida Mousavifar,Weronika Wrzos-Kaminska
title: Approximating Dasgupta Cost in Sublinear Time from a Few Random Seeds
title_zh: 从几个随机种子在亚线性时间内近似 Dasgupta 成本
abstract: Testing graph cluster structure has been a central object of study in property testing since the foundational work of Goldreich and Ron [STOC'96] on expansion testing, i.e. the problem of distinguishing between a single cluster (an expander) and a graph that is far from a single cluster. More generally, a $(k, ε)$-clusterable graph $G$ is a graph whose vertex set admits a partition into $k$ induced expanders, each with outer conductance bounded by $ε$. A recent line of work initiated by Czumaj, Peng and Sohler [STOC'15] has shown how to test whether a graph is close to $(k, ε)$-clusterable, and to locally determine which cluster a given vertex belongs to with misclassification rate $\approx ε$, but no sublinear time algorithms for learning the structure of inter-cluster connections are known. As a simple example, can one locally distinguish between the `cluster graph' forming a line and a clique? In this paper, we consider the problem of testing the hierarchical cluster structure of $(k, ε)$-clusterable graphs in sublinear time. Our measure of hierarchical clusterability is the well-established Dasgupta cost, and our main result is an algorithm that approximates Dasgupta cost of a $(k, ε)$-clusterable graph in sublinear time, using a small number of randomly chosen seed vertices for which cluster labels are known. Our main result is an $O(\sqrt{\log k})$ approximation to Dasgupta cost of $G$ in $\approx n^{1/2+O(ε)}$ time using $\approx n^{1/3}$ seeds, effectively giving a sublinear time simulation of the algorithm of Charikar and Chatziafratis [SODA'17] on clusterable graphs. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first result on approximating the hierarchical clustering properties of such graphs in sublinear time.

More generally, a $(k, ε)$-clusterable graph $G$ is a graph whose vertex set admits a partition into $k$ induced expanders, each with outer conductance bounded by $ε$. A recent line of work initiated by Czumaj, Peng and Sohler [STOC'15] has shown how to test whether a graph is close to $(k, ε)$-clusterable, and to locally determine which cluster a given vertex belongs to with misclassification rate $\approx ε$, but no sublinear time algorithms for learning the structure of inter-cluster connections are known. As a simple example, can one locally distinguish between the `cluster graph' forming a line and a clique? In this paper, we consider the problem of testing the hierarchical cluster structure of $(k, ε)$-clusterable graphs in sublinear time. Our measure of hierarchical clusterability is the well-established Dasgupta cost, and our main result is an algorithm that approximates Dasgupta cost of a $(k, ε)$-clusterable graph in sublinear time, using a small number of randomly chosen seed vertices for which cluster labels are known. Our main result is an $O(\sqrt{\log k})$ approximation to Dasgupta cost of $G$ in $\approx n^{1/2+O(ε)}$ time using $\approx n^{1/3}$ seeds, effectively giving a sublinear time simulation of the algorithm of Charikar and Chatziafratis [SODA'17] on clusterable graphs. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first result on approximating the hierarchical clustering properties of such graphs in sublinear time.
abstract_zh: 自从 Goldreich 和 Ron [STOC'96] 在扩展测试方面的基础工作以来，测试图簇结构一直是属性测试研究的中心对象，即区分单个簇（扩展器）和远离单个簇的图的问题。更一般地，$(k, ε)$ 聚类图 $G$ 是一个图，其顶点集允许划分为 $k$ 诱导扩展器，每个扩展器的外电导以 $ε$ 为界。最近由 Czumaj、Peng 和 Sohler 发起的一系列工作 [STOC'15] 展示了如何测试图是否接近 $(k, ε)$ 可聚类，并以错误分类率 $\approx ε$ 本地确定给定顶点属于哪个簇，但目前还没有用于学习簇间连接结构的亚线性时间算法。举一个简单的例子，人们能否在局部区分形成一条线的“簇图”和一个团？在本文中，我们考虑在亚线性时间内测试 $(k, ε)$ 可聚类图的层次聚类结构的问题。我们对分层可聚类性的度量是完善的 Dasgupta 成本，我们的主要结果是一种算法，该算法使用少量随机选择的簇标签已知的种子顶点，在亚线性时间内近似 $(k, ε)$ 可聚类图的 Dasgupta 成本。我们的主要结果是使用 $\approx n^{1/3}$ 种子在 $\approx n^{1/2+O(ε)}$ 时间内近似 $O(\sqrt{\log k})$ 的 Dasgupta 成本 $G$，有效地在可聚类图上给出 Charikar 和 Chatziafratis [SODA'17] 算法的亚线性时间模拟。据我们所知，我们的结果是在亚线性时间内近似此类图的层次聚类特性的第一个结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在亚线性时间内近似Dasgupta成本的问题，用于衡量(k,ε)-可聚类图的层次聚类结构。
AI.motivation: 现有工作能够测试图是否接近(k,ε)-可聚类并局部确定顶点所属簇，但缺乏亚线性时间算法来学习簇间连接结构，例如区分簇图是线形还是团形。因此需要一种亚线性时间方法近似层次聚类结构。
AI.method: 利用少量随机选取的种子顶点（其簇标签已知），在亚线性时间（约n^{1/2+O(ε)}）内，通过约n^{1/3}个种子，模拟Charikar和Chatziafratis的算法，实现对(k,ε)-可聚类图Dasgupta成本的O(√log k)近似。
AI.result: 提出了第一个在亚线性时间内近似可聚类图层次聚类性质的结果，达到了O(√log k)的近似比，运行时间约为n^{1/2+O(ε)}，使用约n^{1/3}个种子。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次实现了在亚线性时间内近似可聚类图的层次聚类结构，为后续研究提供了基础。

title: Is the U-Net Directional-Relationship Aware?
title_zh: U-Net 是否知道方向关系？
abstract: CNNs are often assumed to be capable of using contextual information about distinct objects (such as their directional relations) inside their receptive field. However, the nature and limits of this capacity has never been explored in full. We explore a specific type of relationship~-- directional~-- using a standard U-Net trained to optimize a cross-entropy loss function for segmentation. We train this network on a pretext segmentation task requiring directional relation reasoning for success and state that, with enough data and a sufficiently large receptive field, it succeeds to learn the proposed task. We further explore what the network has learned by analysing scenarios where the directional relationships are perturbed, and show that the network has learned to reason using these relationships.
summary: CNNs are often assumed to be capable of using contextual information about distinct objects (such as their directional relations) inside their receptive field. However, the nature and limits of this capacity has never been explored in full. We explore a specific type of relationship~-- directional~-- using a standard U-Net trained to optimize a cross-entropy loss function for segmentation. We train this network on a pretext segmentation task requiring directional relation reasoning for success and state that, with enough data and a sufficiently large receptive field, it succeeds to learn the proposed task. We further explore what the network has learned by analysing scenarios where the directional relationships are perturbed, and show that the network has learned to reason using these relationships.
abstract_zh: CNN 通常被认为能够使用其感受野内不同对象的上下文信息（例如它们的方向关系）。 However, the nature and limits of this capacity has never been explored in full.我们探索一种特定类型的关系~——方向性~——使用经过训练的标准 U-Net 来优化分割的交叉熵损失函数。我们在需要方向关系推理才能成功的借口分割任务上训练该网络，并指出，只要有足够的数据和足够大的感受野，它就能成功学习所提出的任务。我们通过分析方向关系受到干扰的场景进一步探索网络学到了什么，并表明网络已经学会使用这些关系进行推理。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨U-Net是否能够通过分割任务学习并利用方向关系这一上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）被认为能利用接收域内的上下文信息，但其对方向关系等特定关联的处理能力尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 使用标准U-Net模型，在需要方向关系推理的预训练分割任务上优化交叉熵损失函数，并通过扰动方向关系的场景分析网络学习到的内容。
AI.result: 实验表明，当数据充足且感受野足够大时，U-Net能够成功学习方向关系任务，且网络性能受方向关系扰动的影响验证了其学习效果。
AI.conclusion: U-Net在足够数据和感受野条件下可学习方向关系，揭示了方向关系在分割任务中作为上下文信息的重要性。

U-Net 是否知道方向关系？ CNNs are often assumed to be capable of using contextual information about distinct objects (such as their directional relations) inside their receptive field. However, the nature and limits of this capacity has never been explored in full. We explore a specific type of relationship~-- directional~-- using a standard U-Net trained to optimize a cross-entropy loss function for segmentation. We train this network on a pretext segmentation task requiring directional relation reasoning for success and state that, with enough data and a sufficiently large receptive field, it succeeds to learn the proposed task. We further explore what the network has learned by analysing scenarios where the directional relationships are perturbed, and show that the network has learned to reason using these relationships. CNN 通常被认为能够使用其感受野内不同对象的上下文信息（例如它们的方向关系）。 However, the nature and limits of this capacity has never been explored in full.我们探索一种特定类型的关系~——方向性~——使用经过训练的标准 U-Net 来优化分割的交叉熵损失函数。我们在需要方向关系推理才能成功的借口分割任务上训练该网络，并指出，只要有足够的数据和足够大的感受野，它就能成功学习所提出的任务。我们通过分析方向关系受到干扰的场景进一步探索网络学到了什么，并表明网络已经学会使用这些关系进行推理。 本文探讨U-Net是否能够通过分割任务学习并利用方向关系这一上下文信息。 Mateus Riva,Pietro Gori,Florian Yger,Isabelle Bloch cs.CV

authors_text: Daiki Nishioka,Takashi Tsuchiya,Wataru Namiki,Makoto Takayanagi,Masataka Imura,Yasuo Koide,Tohru Higuchi,Kazuya Terabe
title: Edge-Of-Chaos Learning Achieved by Ion-Electron Coupled Dynamics in an Ion-Gating Reservoir
title_zh: 通过离子门控储层中的离子电子耦合动力学实现混沌边缘学习
comment: 25 pages, 5 figures for main part and 4 figures for Supplementary information
comments: 25 pages, 5 figures for main part and 4 figures for Supplementary information
abstract: Physical reservoir computing has recently been attracting attention for its ability to significantly reduce the computational resources required to process time-series data. However, the physical reservoirs that have been reported to date have had insufficient expression power, and most of them have a large volume, which makes their practical application difficult. Herein we describe the development of a Li+-electrolyte based ion-gating reservoir (IGR), with ion-electron coupled dynamics, for use in high performance physical reservoir computing. A variety of synaptic responses were obtained in response to past experience, which responses were stored as transient charge density patterns in an electric double layer, at the Li+-electrolyte/diamond interface. Performance, which was tested using a nonlinear autoregressive moving-average (NARMA) task, was found to be excellent, with a NMSE of 0.023 for NARMA2, which is the highest for any physical reservoir reported to date. The maximum Lyapunov exponent of the IGR was 0.0083: the edge of chaos state enabling the best computational capacity. The IGR described herein opens the way for high-performance and integrated neural network devices.
summary: Physical reservoir computing has recently been attracting attention for its ability to significantly reduce the computational resources required to process time-series data. However, the physical reservoirs that have been reported to date have had insufficient expression power, and most of them have a large volume, which makes their practical application difficult. Herein we describe the development of a Li+-electrolyte based ion-gating reservoir (IGR), with ion-electron coupled dynamics, for use in high performance physical reservoir computing. A variety of synaptic responses were obtained in response to past experience, which responses were stored as transient charge density patterns in an electric double layer, at the Li+-electrolyte/diamond interface. Performance, which was tested using a nonlinear autoregressive moving-average (NARMA) task, was found to be excellent, with a NMSE of 0.023 for NARMA2, which is the highest for any physical reservoir reported to date. The maximum Lyapunov exponent of the IGR was 0.0083: the edge of chaos state enabling the best computational capacity. The IGR described herein opens the way for high-performance and integrated neural network devices.
abstract_zh: 物理油藏计算最近因其能够显着减少处理时间序列数据所需的计算资源而受到关注。然而，迄今为止已报道的物理储库表达能力不足，且大多体积较大，导致其实际应用存在困难。在此，我们描述了基于 Li+ 电解质的离子门控储层 (IGR) 的开发，该储层具有离子电子耦合动力学，可用于高性能物理储层计算。根据过去的经验获得了各种突触反应，这些反应被存储为 Li+-电解质/金刚石界面处双电层中的瞬态电荷密度模式。使用非线性自回归移动平均 (NARMA) 任务测试的性能非常出色，NARMA2 的 NMSE 为 0.023，这是迄今为止报告的所有物理油藏中最高的。 IGR 的最大李亚普诺夫指数为 0.0083：混沌状态的边缘，可实现最佳计算能力。本文描述的 IGR 为高性能和集成神经网络设备开辟了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于Li+电解质的离子门控储层（IGR），用于实现高性能的物理储层计算。
AI.motivation: 现有的物理储层计算资源消耗大且表达能力不足，难以实际应用，因此需要开发一种高性能的物理储层。
AI.method: 通过离子-电子耦合动力学，在Li+电解质/金刚石界面构建离子门控储层（IGR），利用电双层中存储的瞬时电荷密度模式进行学习。
AI.result: 在NARMA2任务中，IGR表现出优异性能，NMSE为0.023，是迄今为止报道的物理储层中最高的；其最大李雅普诺夫指数为0.0083，处于混沌边缘状态，具有最佳计算能力。
AI.conclusion: IGR为高性能和集成化神经网络设备提供了新的途径。

authors_text: Hideo Bannai,Keisuke Goto,Masakazu Ishihata,Shunsuke Kanda,Dominik Köppl,Takaaki Nishimoto
title: Computing NP-hard Repetitiveness Measures via MAX-SAT
title_zh: 通过 MAX-SAT 计算 NP 难重复性测量
comment: paper accepted to ESA 2022 (plus Appendix); corrected attribution of Python program for computing https://oeis.org/A339391
comments: paper accepted to ESA 2022 (plus Appendix); corrected attribution of Python program for computing https://oeis.org/A339391
abstract: Repetitiveness measures reveal profound characteristics of datasets, and give rise to compressed data structures and algorithms working in compressed space. Alas, the computation of some of these measures is NP-hard, and straight-forward computation is infeasible for datasets of even small sizes. Three such measures are the smallest size of a string attractor, the smallest size of a bidirectional macro scheme, and the smallest size of a straight-line program. While a vast variety of implementations for heuristically computing approximations exist, exact computation of these measures has received little to no attention. In this paper, we present MAX-SAT formulations that provide the first non-trivial implementations for exact computation of smallest string attractors, smallest bidirectional macro schemes, and smallest straight-line programs. Computational experiments show that our implementations work for texts of length up to a few hundred for straight-line programs and bidirectional macro schemes, and texts even over a million for string attractors.
summary: Repetitiveness measures reveal profound characteristics of datasets, and give rise to compressed data structures and algorithms working in compressed space. Alas, the computation of some of these measures is NP-hard, and straight-forward computation is infeasible for datasets of even small sizes. Three such measures are the smallest size of a string attractor, the smallest size of a bidirectional macro scheme, and the smallest size of a straight-line program. While a vast variety of implementations for heuristically computing approximations exist, exact computation of these measures has received little to no attention. In this paper, we present MAX-SAT formulations that provide the first non-trivial implementations for exact computation of smallest string attractors, smallest bidirectional macro schemes, and smallest straight-line programs. Computational experiments show that our implementations work for texts of length up to a few hundred for straight-line programs and bidirectional macro schemes, and texts even over a million for string attractors.
abstract_zh: 重复性度量揭示了数据集的深刻特征，并产生了在压缩空间中工作的压缩数据结构和算法。遗憾的是，其中一些度量的计算是 NP 困难的，并且即使对于小尺寸的数据集，直接计算也是不可行的。三个这样的度量是字符串吸引子的最小尺寸、双向宏方案的最小尺寸以及直线程序的最小尺寸。尽管存在多种启发式计算近似值的实现，但这些度量的精确计算几乎没有受到关注。在本文中，我们提出了 MAX-SAT 公式，它为最小串吸引子、最小双向宏方案和最小直线程序的精确计算提供了第一个重要的实现。计算实验表明，我们的实现适用于直线程序和双向宏方案的长度可达数百的文本，而字符串吸引子的文本甚至超过一百万。

AI.tldr: 本文通过MAX-SAT方法实现对三种NP难重复性度量（字符串吸引子、双向宏方案、直线程序）的精确计算。
AI.motivation: 现有启发式方法难以精确计算关键重复性度量，而精确计算对于压缩数据结构至关重要。
AI.method: 构建针对三种度量的MAX-SAT公式，并开发相应的求解算法实现精确计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法可处理长度达数百万的字符串吸引子计算，以及数百长度的其他两种度量计算。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出基于MAX-SAT的精确计算框架，为重复性度量研究提供了可行的算法实现方案。

authors_text: Xiangyang He,Yubo Tao,Shuoliu Yang,Haoran Dai,Hai Lin
title: voxel2vec: A Natural Language Processing Approach to Learning Distributed Representations for Scientific Data
title_zh: voxel2vec：学习科学数据分布式表示的自然语言处理方法
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transaction on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transaction on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG)
abstract: Relationships in scientific data, such as the numerical and spatial distribution relations of features in univariate data, the scalar-value combinations' relations in multivariate data, and the association of volumes in time-varying and ensemble data, are intricate and complex. This paper presents voxel2vec, a novel unsupervised representation learning model, which is used to learn distributed representations of scalar values/scalar-value combinations in a low-dimensional vector space. Its basic assumption is that if two scalar values/scalar-value combinations have similar contexts, they usually have high similarity in terms of features. By representing scalar values/scalar-value combinations as symbols, voxel2vec learns the similarity between them in the context of spatial distribution and then allows us to explore the overall association between volumes by transfer prediction. We demonstrate the usefulness and effectiveness of voxel2vec by comparing it with the isosurface similarity map of univariate data and applying the learned distributed representations to feature classification for multivariate data and to association analysis for time-varying and ensemble data.
summary: Relationships in scientific data, such as the numerical and spatial distribution relations of features in univariate data, the scalar-value combinations' relations in multivariate data, and the association of volumes in time-varying and ensemble data, are intricate and complex. This paper presents voxel2vec, a novel unsupervised representation learning model, which is used to learn distributed representations of scalar values/scalar-value combinations in a low-dimensional vector space. Its basic assumption is that if two scalar values/scalar-value combinations have similar contexts, they usually have high similarity in terms of features. By representing scalar values/scalar-value combinations as symbols, voxel2vec learns the similarity between them in the context of spatial distribution and then allows us to explore the overall association between volumes by transfer prediction. We demonstrate the usefulness and effectiveness of voxel2vec by comparing it with the isosurface similarity map of univariate data and applying the learned distributed representations to feature classification for multivariate data and to association analysis for time-varying and ensemble data.
abstract_zh: 科学数据中的关系，例如单变量数据中特征的数值和空间分布关系、多元数据中的标量组合关系、时变数据和集合数据中的体积关联等，是错综复杂的。本文提出了 voxel2vec，一种新颖的无监督表示学习模型，用于学习低维向量空间中标量值/标量值组合的分布式表示。其基本假设是，如果两个标量值/标量值组合具有相似的上下文，则它们通常在特征方面具有高度相似性。通过将标量值/标量值组合表示为符号，voxel2vec 在空间分布的背景下学习它们之间的相似性，然后允许我们通过转移预测探索体积之间的整体关联。我们通过将 voxel2vec 与单变量数据的等值面相似图进行比较，并将学习到的分布式表示应用于多变量数据的特征分类以及时变数据和集合数据的关联分析，证明了 voxel2vec 的有用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出voxel2vec模型，通过自然语言处理方法学习科学数据的分布式表示，以捕捉复杂的数据关系。
AI.motivation: 科学数据中的数值、空间分布及体积关联关系复杂，现有方法难以有效建模，需开发新型无监督学习框架。
AI.method: 基于NLP词向量思想，将标量值/组合表示为符号，在空间上下文中学习相似性，并通过迁移预测探索体积关联。
AI.result: 在单变量数据等值面相似性对比、多变量特征分类及时变数据关联分析中验证了模型的有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: voxel2vec成功捕捉科学数据的复杂关系，为多类型数据的表示学习提供了通用框架。

ai_content.tldr: 提出voxel2vec模型，通过自然语言处理方法学习科学数据的分布式表示，以捕捉复杂的数据关系。
ai_content.motivation: 科学数据中的数值、空间分布及体积关联关系复杂，现有方法难以有效建模，需开发新型无监督学习框架。
ai_content.method: 基于NLP词向量思想，将标量值/组合表示为符号，在空间上下文中学习相似性，并通过迁移预测探索体积关联。
ai_content.result: 在单变量数据等值面相似性对比、多变量特征分类及时变数据关联分析中验证了模型的有效性和实用性。
ai_content.conclusion: voxel2vec成功捕捉科学数据的复杂关系，为多类型数据的表示学习提供了通用框架。

search_text: voxel2vec: A Natural Language Processing Approach to Learning Distributed Representations for Scientific Data voxel2vec：学习科学数据分布式表示的自然语言处理方法 Relationships in scientific data, such as the numerical and spatial distribution relations of features in univariate data, the scalar-value combinations' relations in multivariate data, and the association of volumes in time-varying and ensemble data, are intricate and complex. This paper presents voxel2vec, a novel unsupervised representation learning model, which is used to learn distributed representations of scalar values/scalar-value combinations in a low-dimensional vector space. Its basic assumption is that if two scalar values/scalar-value combinations have similar contexts, they usually have high similarity in terms of features. By representing scalar values/scalar-value combinations as symbols, voxel2vec learns the similarity between them in the context of spatial distribution and then allows us to explore the overall association between volumes by transfer prediction. We demonstrate the usefulness and effectiveness of voxel2vec by comparing it with the isosurface similarity map of univariate data and applying the learned distributed representations to feature classification for multivariate data and to association analysis for time-varying and ensemble data. 科学数据中的关系，例如单变量数据中特征的数值和空间分布关系、多元数据中的标量组合关系、时变数据和集合数据中的体积关联等，是错综复杂的。本文提出了 voxel2vec，一种新颖的无监督表示学习模型，用于学习低维向量空间中标量值/标量值组合的分布式表示。其基本假设是，如果两个标量值/标量值组合具有相似的上下文，则它们通常在特征方面具有高度相似性。通过将标量值/标量值组合表示为符号，voxel2vec 在空间分布的背景下学习它们之间的相似性，然后允许我们通过转移预测探索体积之间的整体关联。我们通过将 voxel2vec 与单变量数据的等值面相似图进行比较，并将学习到的分布式表示应用于多变量数据的特征分类以及时变数据和集合数据的关联分析，证明了 voxel2vec 的有用性和有效性。 提出voxel2vec模型，通过自然语言处理方法学习科学数据的分布式表示，以捕捉复杂的数据关系。 Xiangyang He,Yubo Tao,Shuoliu Yang,Haoran Dai,Hai Lin cs.LG,cs.HC

authors_text: Rhys Newbury,Morris Gu,Lachlan Chumbley,Arsalan Mousavian,Clemens Eppner,Jürgen Leitner,Jeannette Bohg,Antonio Morales,Tamim Asfour,Danica Kragic,Dieter Fox,Akansel Cosgun
title: Deep Learning Approaches to Grasp Synthesis: A Review
title_zh: 掌握综合的深度学习方法：回顾
abstract: Grasping is the process of picking up an object by applying forces and torques at a set of contacts. Recent advances in deep-learning methods have allowed rapid progress in robotic object grasping. In this systematic review, we surveyed the publications over the last decade, with a particular interest in grasping an object using all 6 degrees of freedom of the end-effector pose. Our review found four common methodologies for robotic grasping: sampling-based approaches, direct regression, reinforcement learning, and exemplar approaches. Additionally, we found two `supporting methods` around grasping that use deep-learning to support the grasping process, shape approximation, and affordances. We have distilled the publications found in this systematic review (85 papers) into ten key takeaways we consider crucial for future robotic grasping and manipulation research. An online version of the survey is available at https://rhys-newbury.github.io/projects/6dof/
summary: Grasping is the process of picking up an object by applying forces and torques at a set of contacts. Recent advances in deep-learning methods have allowed rapid progress in robotic object grasping. In this systematic review, we surveyed the publications over the last decade, with a particular interest in grasping an object using all 6 degrees of freedom of the end-effector pose. Our review found four common methodologies for robotic grasping: sampling-based approaches, direct regression, reinforcement learning, and exemplar approaches. Additionally, we found two `supporting methods` around grasping that use deep-learning to support the grasping process, shape approximation, and affordances. We have distilled the publications found in this systematic review (85 papers) into ten key takeaways we consider crucial for future robotic grasping and manipulation research. An online version of the survey is available at https://rhys-newbury.github.io/projects/6dof/
abstract_zh: 抓取是通过在一组接触处施加力和扭矩来拾取物体的过程。深度学习方法的最新进展使得机器人物体抓取取得了快速进展。在这篇系统综述中，我们调查了过去十年的出版物，特别关注使用末端执行器姿势的所有 6 个自由度来抓取物体。我们的评论发现了机器人抓取的四种常见方法：基于采样的方法、直接回归、强化学习和示例方法。此外，我们发现了两种围绕抓取的“支持方法”，它们使用深度学习来支持抓取过程、形状近似和可供性。我们将这篇系统综述（85 篇论文）中发现的出版物提炼成十个我们认为对未来机器人抓取和操作研究至关重要的关键要点。该调查的在线版本可在 https://rhys-newbury.github.io/projects/6dof/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了过去十年中基于深度学习的机器人六自由度抓取合成方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习推动了机器人抓取技术的快速发展，但缺乏对6自由度抓取方法的系统性总结。
AI.method: 通过文献调研分类归纳，总结出四类核心方法及两种辅助技术，并提炼关键研究方向。
AI.result: 梳理85篇文献，提出四种主流方法（采样、回归、强化学习、示例法）及形状近似等辅助技术，总结十项关键研究启示。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升抓取性能，未来需关注多模态感知与物理仿真等方向，研究成果已在线发布。

title: Light-weight spatio-temporal graphs for segmentation and ejection fraction prediction in cardiac ultrasound
title_zh: 用于心脏超声分割和射血分数预测的轻量级时空图
abstract: Accurate and consistent predictions of echocardiography parameters are important for cardiovascular diagnosis and treatment. In particular, segmentations of the left ventricle can be used to derive ventricular volume, ejection fraction (EF) and other relevant measurements. In this paper we propose a new automated method called EchoGraphs for predicting ejection fraction and segmenting the left ventricle by detecting anatomical keypoints. Models for direct coordinate regression based on Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) are used to detect the keypoints. GCNs can learn to represent the cardiac shape based on local appearance of each keypoint, as well as global spatial and temporal structures of all keypoints combined. We evaluate our EchoGraphs model on the EchoNet benchmark dataset. Compared to semantic segmentation, GCNs show accurate segmentation and improvements in robustness and inference runtime. EF is computed simultaneously to segmentations and our method also obtains state-of-the-art ejection fraction estimation. Source code is available online: https://github.com/guybenyosef/EchoGraphs.
summary: Accurate and consistent predictions of echocardiography parameters are important for cardiovascular diagnosis and treatment. In particular, segmentations of the left ventricle can be used to derive ventricular volume, ejection fraction (EF) and other relevant measurements. In this paper we propose a new automated method called EchoGraphs for predicting ejection fraction and segmenting the left ventricle by detecting anatomical keypoints. Models for direct coordinate regression based on Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) are used to detect the keypoints. GCNs can learn to represent the cardiac shape based on local appearance of each keypoint, as well as global spatial and temporal structures of all keypoints combined. We evaluate our EchoGraphs model on the EchoNet benchmark dataset. Compared to semantic segmentation, GCNs show accurate segmentation and improvements in robustness and inference runtime. EF is computed simultaneously to segmentations and our method also obtains state-of-the-art ejection fraction estimation. Source code is available online: https://github.com/guybenyosef/EchoGraphs.
abstract_zh: 准确一致的超声心动图参数预测对于心血管诊断和治疗非常重要。特别是，左心室的分割可用于导出心室容积、射血分数 (EF) 和其他相关测量值。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 EchoGraphs 的新自动化方法，用于通过检测解剖关键点来预测射血分数并分割左心室。基于图卷积网络（GCN）的直接坐标回归模型用于检测关键点。 GCN 可以学习根据每个关键点的局部外观以及所有关键点组合的全局空间和时间结构来表示心脏形状。我们在 EchoNet 基准数据集上评估我们的 EchoGraphs 模型。与语义分割相比，GCN 显示了精确的分割以及鲁棒性和推理运行时间的改进。 EF 与分段同时计算，我们的方法还获得了最先进的射血分数估计。源代码可在线获取：https://github.com/guybenyosef/EchoGraphs。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级时空图网络EchoGraphs，用于心脏超声图像中的左心室分割和射血分数预测。
AI.motivation: 准确的超声心动图参数预测对心血管疾病诊断至关重要，但现有分割方法存在鲁棒性和计算效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 基于图卷积网络（GCN）构建坐标回归模型，通过检测解剖关键点实现左心室分割，同时捕捉局部特征与全局时空结构。
AI.result: 在EchoNet数据集上优于语义分割方法，分割准确率更高且推理速度更快，射血分数估计达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: EchoGraphs为心脏超声分析提供了高效且精准的解决方案，验证了图网络在医学影像任务中的有效性。

title: AI-enhanced iterative solvers for accelerating the solution of large scale parametrized systems
title_zh: 人工智能增强的迭代求解器可加速大规模参数化系统的求解
abstract: Recent advances in the field of machine learning open a new era in high performance computing. Applications of machine learning algorithms for the development of accurate and cost-efficient surrogates of complex problems have already attracted major attention from scientists. Despite their powerful approximation capabilities, however, surrogates cannot produce the `exact' solution to the problem. To address this issue, this paper exploits up-to-date ML tools and delivers customized iterative solvers of linear equation systems, capable of solving large-scale parametrized problems at any desired level of accuracy. Specifically, the proposed approach consists of the following two steps. At first, a reduced set of model evaluations is performed and the corresponding solutions are used to establish an approximate mapping from the problem's parametric space to its solution space using deep feedforward neural networks and convolutional autoencoders. This mapping serves a means to obtain very accurate initial predictions of the system's response to new query points at negligible computational cost. Subsequently, an iterative solver inspired by the Algebraic Multigrid method in combination with Proper Orthogonal Decomposition, termed POD-2G, is developed that successively refines the initial predictions towards the exact system solutions. The application of POD-2G as a standalone solver or as preconditioner in the context of preconditioned conjugate gradient methods is demonstrated on several numerical examples of large scale systems, with the results indicating its superiority over conventional iterative solution schemes.
summary: Recent advances in the field of machine learning open a new era in high performance computing. Applications of machine learning algorithms for the development of accurate and cost-efficient surrogates of complex problems have already attracted major attention from scientists. Despite their powerful approximation capabilities, however, surrogates cannot produce the `exact' solution to the problem. To address this issue, this paper exploits up-to-date ML tools and delivers customized iterative solvers of linear equation systems, capable of solving large-scale parametrized problems at any desired level of accuracy. Specifically, the proposed approach consists of the following two steps. At first, a reduced set of model evaluations is performed and the corresponding solutions are used to establish an approximate mapping from the problem's parametric space to its solution space using deep feedforward neural networks and convolutional autoencoders. This mapping serves a means to obtain very accurate initial predictions of the system's response to new query points at negligible computational cost. Subsequently, an iterative solver inspired by the Algebraic Multigrid method in combination with Proper Orthogonal Decomposition, termed POD-2G, is developed that successively refines the initial predictions towards the exact system solutions. The application of POD-2G as a standalone solver or as preconditioner in the context of preconditioned conjugate gradient methods is demonstrated on several numerical examples of large scale systems, with the results indicating its superiority over conventional iterative solution schemes.
abstract_zh: 机器学习领域的最新进展开启了高性能计算的新时代。应用机器学习算法来开发复杂问题的准确且经济高效的替代方案已经引起了科学家的广泛关注。然而，尽管代理具有强大的近似能力，但它们无法产生问题的“精确”解决方案。为了解决这个问题，本文利用最新的机器学习工具并提供线性方程系统的定制迭代求解器，能够以任何所需的精度水平求解大规模参数化问题。具体来说，所提出的方法包括以下两个步骤。首先，执行一组简化的模型评估，并使用相应的解决方案，使用深度前馈神经网络和卷积自动编码器建立从问题的参数空间到其解决方案空间的近似映射。这种映射提供了一种以可忽略的计算成本获得系统对新查询点响应的非常准确的初始预测的方法。随后，受代数多重网格方法与适当正交分解的启发，开发了一种迭代求解器（称为 POD-2G），该迭代求解器不断细化初始预测以实现精确的系统解。 POD-2G 作为独立求解器或预处理共轭梯度方法中的预处理器的应用在大型系统的几个数值示例中得到了演示，结果表明其优于传统迭代求解方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合人工智能的迭代求解器，用于加速大规模参数化系统的求解过程。
AI.motivation: 传统代理模型无法提供精确解，需结合机器学习与迭代方法以提高求解效率和精度。
AI.method: 利用深度前馈神经网络和卷积自编码器建立参数到解的映射，并开发POD-2G迭代求解器进行修正。
AI.result: 数值实验表明POD-2G作为独立求解器或预处理子优于传统迭代方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持精度的同时显著提升大规模参数化系统求解效率。

search_text: AI-enhanced iterative solvers for accelerating the solution of large scale parametrized systems 人工智能增强的迭代求解器可加速大规模参数化系统的求解 Recent advances in the field of machine learning open a new era in high performance computing. Applications of machine learning algorithms for the development of accurate and cost-efficient surrogates of complex problems have already attracted major attention from scientists. Despite their powerful approximation capabilities, however, surrogates cannot produce the `exact' solution to the problem. To address this issue, this paper exploits up-to-date ML tools and delivers customized iterative solvers of linear equation systems, capable of solving large-scale parametrized problems at any desired level of accuracy. Specifically, the proposed approach consists of the following two steps. At first, a reduced set of model evaluations is performed and the corresponding solutions are used to establish an approximate mapping from the problem's parametric space to its solution space using deep feedforward neural networks and convolutional autoencoders. This mapping serves a means to obtain very accurate initial predictions of the system's response to new query points at negligible computational cost. Subsequently, an iterative solver inspired by the Algebraic Multigrid method in combination with Proper Orthogonal Decomposition, termed POD-2G, is developed that successively refines the initial predictions towards the exact system solutions. The application of POD-2G as a standalone solver or as preconditioner in the context of preconditioned conjugate gradient methods is demonstrated on several numerical examples of large scale systems, with the results indicating its superiority over conventional iterative solution schemes. 机器学习领域的最新进展开启了高性能计算的新时代。应用机器学习算法来开发复杂问题的准确且经济高效的替代方案已经引起了科学家的广泛关注。然而，尽管代理具有强大的近似能力，但它们无法产生问题的“精确”解决方案。为了解决这个问题，本文利用最新的机器学习工具并提供线性方程系统的定制迭代求解器，能够以任何所需的精度水平求解大规模参数化问题。具体来说，所提出的方法包括以下两个步骤。首先，执行一组简化的模型评估，并使用相应的解决方案，使用深度前馈神经网络和卷积自动编码器建立从问题的参数空间到其解决方案空间的近似映射。这种映射提供了一种以可忽略的计算成本获得系统对新查询点响应的非常准确的初始预测的方法。随后，受代数多重网格方法与适当正交分解的启发，开发了一种迭代求解器（称为 POD-2G），该迭代求解器不断细化初始预测以实现精确的系统解。 POD-2G 作为独立求解器或预处理共轭梯度方法中的预处理器的应用在大型系统的几个数值示例中得到了演示，结果表明其优于传统迭代求解方案。 本文提出结合人工智能的迭代求解器，用于加速大规模参数化系统的求解过程。 Stefanos Nikolopoulos,Ioannis Kalogeris,Vissarion Papadopoulos,George Stavroulakis math.NA,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hongyu Zhou,Zheng Ge,Songtao Liu,Weixin Mao,Zeming Li,Haiyan Yu,Jian Sun
title: Dense Teacher: Dense Pseudo-Labels for Semi-supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 密集教师：用于半监督目标检测的密集伪标签
abstract: To date, the most powerful semi-supervised object detectors (SS-OD) are based on pseudo-boxes, which need a sequence of post-processing with fine-tuned hyper-parameters. In this work, we propose replacing the sparse pseudo-boxes with the dense prediction as a united and straightforward form of pseudo-label. Compared to the pseudo-boxes, our Dense Pseudo-Label (DPL) does not involve any post-processing method, thus retaining richer information. We also introduce a region selection technique to highlight the key information while suppressing the noise carried by dense labels. We name our proposed SS-OD algorithm that leverages the DPL as Dense Teacher. On COCO and VOC, Dense Teacher shows superior performance under various settings compared with the pseudo-box-based methods.
summary: To date, the most powerful semi-supervised object detectors (SS-OD) are based on pseudo-boxes, which need a sequence of post-processing with fine-tuned hyper-parameters. In this work, we propose replacing the sparse pseudo-boxes with the dense prediction as a united and straightforward form of pseudo-label. Compared to the pseudo-boxes, our Dense Pseudo-Label (DPL) does not involve any post-processing method, thus retaining richer information. We also introduce a region selection technique to highlight the key information while suppressing the noise carried by dense labels. We name our proposed SS-OD algorithm that leverages the DPL as Dense Teacher. On COCO and VOC, Dense Teacher shows superior performance under various settings compared with the pseudo-box-based methods.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，最强大的半监督目标检测器（SS-OD）基于伪框，需要一系列带有微调超参数的后处理。在这项工作中，我们建议用密集预测替换稀疏伪框，作为伪标签的统一且直接的形式。与伪框相比，我们的密集伪标签（DPL）不涉及任何后处理方法，因此保留了更丰富的信息。我们还引入了一种区域选择技术来突出关键信息，同时抑制密集标签携带的噪声。我们将我们提出的利用 DPL 的 SS-OD 算法命名为 Dense Teacher。在 COCO 和 VOC 上，与基于伪框的方法相比，Dense Teacher 在各种设置下都表现出了优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密集伪标签的半监督目标检测方法Dense Teacher，以替代传统伪框方法。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法依赖伪框需复杂后处理与调参，导致信息损失与效率低下。
AI.method: 采用密集预测生成统一伪标签（DPL），无需后处理；引入区域选择技术抑制噪声，构建Dense Teacher算法框架。
AI.result: 在COCO和VOC数据集上，Dense Teacher在不同设置下均优于基于伪框的半监督检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 密集伪标签与区域选择技术有效提升半监督目标检测性能，为该领域提供新思路。

title: Learning Regularized Multi-Scale Feature Flow for High Dynamic Range Imaging
title_zh: 学习高动态范围成像的正则化多尺度特征流
abstract: Reconstructing ghosting-free high dynamic range (HDR) images of dynamic scenes from a set of multi-exposure images is a challenging task, especially with large object motion and occlusions, leading to visible artifacts using existing methods. To address this problem, we propose a deep network that tries to learn multi-scale feature flow guided by the regularized loss. It first extracts multi-scale features and then aligns features from non-reference images. After alignment, we use residual channel attention blocks to merge the features from different images. Extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance and produces excellent results where color artifacts and geometric distortions are significantly reduced.
summary: Reconstructing ghosting-free high dynamic range (HDR) images of dynamic scenes from a set of multi-exposure images is a challenging task, especially with large object motion and occlusions, leading to visible artifacts using existing methods. To address this problem, we propose a deep network that tries to learn multi-scale feature flow guided by the regularized loss. It first extracts multi-scale features and then aligns features from non-reference images. After alignment, we use residual channel attention blocks to merge the features from different images. Extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance and produces excellent results where color artifacts and geometric distortions are significantly reduced.
abstract_zh: Reconstructing ghosting-free high dynamic range (HDR) images of dynamic scenes from a set of multi-exposure images is a challenging task, especially with large object motion and occlusions, leading to visible artifacts using existing methods.为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种深度网络，尝试学习由正则化损失引导的多尺度特征流。它首先提取多尺度特征，然后对齐非参考图像的特征。对齐后，我们使用残差通道注意块来合并来自不同图像的特征。 Extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance and produces excellent results where color artifacts and geometric distortions are significantly reduced.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度网络，通过学习正则化多尺度特征流，解决动态场景下多曝光图像生成高动态范围（HDR）图像时的鬼影问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大物体运动和遮挡时会产生明显伪影，难以生成无鬼影的高质量HDR图像。
AI.method: 网络首先提取多尺度特征，利用正则化损失对齐非参考图像特征，再通过残差通道注意力模块融合多图像特征。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量指标上均达到SOTA水平，显著减少颜色伪影和几何失真。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度特征流学习有效处理运动与遮挡，为动态HDR重建提供了新思路。

title: Transformers discover an elementary calculation system exploiting local attention and grid-like problem representation
title_zh: Transformers 发现了一种利用局部注意力和网格问题表示的基本计算系统
abstract: Mathematical reasoning is one of the most impressive achievements of human intellect but remains a formidable challenge for artificial intelligence systems. In this work we explore whether modern deep learning architectures can learn to solve a symbolic addition task by discovering effective arithmetic procedures. Although the problem might seem trivial at first glance, generalizing arithmetic knowledge to operations involving a higher number of terms, possibly composed by longer sequences of digits, has proven extremely challenging for neural networks. Here we show that universal transformers equipped with local attention and adaptive halting mechanisms can learn to exploit an external, grid-like memory to carry out multi-digit addition. The proposed model achieves remarkable accuracy even when tested with problems requiring extrapolation outside the training distribution; most notably, it does so by discovering human-like calculation strategies such as place value alignment.
summary: Mathematical reasoning is one of the most impressive achievements of human intellect but remains a formidable challenge for artificial intelligence systems. In this work we explore whether modern deep learning architectures can learn to solve a symbolic addition task by discovering effective arithmetic procedures. Although the problem might seem trivial at first glance, generalizing arithmetic knowledge to operations involving a higher number of terms, possibly composed by longer sequences of digits, has proven extremely challenging for neural networks. Here we show that universal transformers equipped with local attention and adaptive halting mechanisms can learn to exploit an external, grid-like memory to carry out multi-digit addition. The proposed model achieves remarkable accuracy even when tested with problems requiring extrapolation outside the training distribution; most notably, it does so by discovering human-like calculation strategies such as place value alignment.
abstract_zh: 数学推理是人类智力最令人印象深刻的成就之一，但对人工智能系统来说仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在这项工作中，我们探讨现代深度学习架构是否可以通过发现有效的算术过程来学习解决符号加法任务。尽管这个问题乍一看似乎微不足道，但事实证明，将算术知识推广到涉及更多项（可能由更长的数字序列组成）的运算对于神经网络来说极具挑战性。在这里，我们展示了配备局部注意力和自适应停止机制的通用变压器可以学习利用外部网格状存储器来执行多位加法。即使在测试需要在训练分布之外进行外推的问题时，所提出的模型也能实现显着的准确性；最值得注意的是，它通过发现类似人类的计算策略（例如位置值对齐）来实现这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了配备局部注意力和网格状问题表示的Transformer模型是否能学习解决符号加法任务，并发现类似人类的计算策略。
AI.motivation: 数学推理是人工智能的挑战，尤其在处理多数字位数和复杂算术操作时，现有神经网络难以有效推广知识。
AI.method: 采用带有局部注意力和自适应停止机制的通用Transformer模型，结合外部网格状内存实现多数字加法计算。
AI.result: 模型在超出训练分布的外推问题上表现优异，成功发现人类类似的位值对齐计算策略，准确率显著。
AI.conclusion: Transformer通过局部注意力与网格内存机制有效解决了数学推理难题，为复杂计算任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Transformers discover an elementary calculation system exploiting local attention and grid-like problem representation Transformers 发现了一种利用局部注意力和网格问题表示的基本计算系统 Mathematical reasoning is one of the most impressive achievements of human intellect but remains a formidable challenge for artificial intelligence systems. In this work we explore whether modern deep learning architectures can learn to solve a symbolic addition task by discovering effective arithmetic procedures. Although the problem might seem trivial at first glance, generalizing arithmetic knowledge to operations involving a higher number of terms, possibly composed by longer sequences of digits, has proven extremely challenging for neural networks. Here we show that universal transformers equipped with local attention and adaptive halting mechanisms can learn to exploit an external, grid-like memory to carry out multi-digit addition. The proposed model achieves remarkable accuracy even when tested with problems requiring extrapolation outside the training distribution; most notably, it does so by discovering human-like calculation strategies such as place value alignment. 数学推理是人类智力最令人印象深刻的成就之一，但对人工智能系统来说仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在这项工作中，我们探讨现代深度学习架构是否可以通过发现有效的算术过程来学习解决符号加法任务。尽管这个问题乍一看似乎微不足道，但事实证明，将算术知识推广到涉及更多项（可能由更长的数字序列组成）的运算对于神经网络来说极具挑战性。在这里，我们展示了配备局部注意力和自适应停止机制的通用变压器可以学习利用外部网格状存储器来执行多位加法。即使在测试需要在训练分布之外进行外推的问题时，所提出的模型也能实现显着的准确性；最值得注意的是，它通过发现类似人类的计算策略（例如位置值对齐）来实现这一点。 本文研究了配备局部注意力和网格状问题表示的Transformer模型是否能学习解决符号加法任务，并发现类似人类的计算策略。 Samuel Cognolato,Alberto Testolin cs.LG,cs.AI
